name: Royce White
subject: This is what the old-guard Republicans are afraid of
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE
body:
I need your help | [ ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=80b7ff809bd84fbb8b7228868eb9b80e&_e=IZga-6CIoBEuhK3n75LTRfujK5jHV5D2kMLk_0jhQfu65hgDRGgkQKPJxjR3eD8Id5uX0vQ_uNLEmf5TnYNLb5JlrArBQQSZMDXTGwUW5MjxzMde8DkMZDlfy87_yYgdI4gPgOnnEYqN8LLmK7GidHw6ih5fE0672IyPYPu5WDVmi7Qvwwe6iDx83RgK5L2EzVkdq7HnnvamtMJZ_gjkSs3NO4ZYihMCT6GEK5lUkKYmbwoq7q_EhHJ-M1JI2OudW1rEnsa1Vgd1qrmlUNFntviwva2B_Ztmy20H4BazVugOGjx7gZ7Q9NyUab0g60VIcv_yTSXEZZef7V9-t3x8nA%3D%3D)
---

Dear Peter,

This is what the old-guard Republicans in Minnesota and nationwide are afraid of. This is why they keep lying about suburban White women as their election strategy. In order to win in deep blue areas, these old-guard Republicans would have to actually change their mentality about America's priorities. They would have to tell the truth about the value of citizenship. They would have to acknowledge the corruption of these industrial complexes.

[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=80b7ff809bd84fbb8b7228868eb9b80e&_e=IZga-6CIoBEuhK3n75LTRfujK5jHV5D2kMLk_0jhQfu65hgDRGgkQKPJxjR3eD8Id5uX0vQ_uNLEmf5TnYNLb5JlrArBQQSZMDXTGwUW5MjxzMde8DkMZDlfy87_yYgdI4gPgOnnEYqN8LLmK7GidHw6ih5fE0672IyPYPu5WDVmi7Qvwwe6iDx83RgK5L2Eg-8hI_hDvDAs2sd8Zi2tEx5FZX-xv_bGvd6NECZbJ7RvSkHNId2l6RkdudZw19v5U0vsbbEPKbT1-rpc_I_mvdooiptt_M95i58zjLF-2pNheSdQSAfTeGw3yYiYo2ZUafO28onEvkEOTH8kA1taTA%3D%3D)
They don't want to do that; they're on the payroll, and they were educated at the same universities. They're overeducated, unintelligent, mealy-mouthed puppets. This is where you get Norm Coleman, Tim Pawlenty, Kendall Qualls, Dustin Grage, Michael Brodkorb, Julia Coleman, etc.

| [ **THE PEOPLE ARE COMING!** ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=80b7ff809bd84fbb8b7228868eb9b80e&_e=IZga-6CIoBEuhK3n75LTRfujK5jHV5D2kMLk_0jhQfu65hgDRGgkQKPJxjR3eD8Id5uX0vQ_uNLEmf5TnYNLb5JlrArBQQSZMDXTGwUW5MjxzMde8DkMZDlfy87_yYgdI4gPgOnnEYqN8LLmK7GidHw6ih5fE0672IyPYPu5WDVmi7Qvwwe6iDx83RgK5L2EcPWH0ljZ-5vWmw0QpRK9LYipi2uLSkU8FNyaUJdbH5I412Z0tVuFqCEi5S77hrK0YY7B1-3mKmaBTbZ5D8eB6CRGEfdllPeLY5dfZtlshy0tcDCUIVkh6aRXwFkK6CXCMnPso_NFLOmHwiKj5ccnmg%3D%3D)
---

They don't really want to win. They want people to think they want to win; they want to talk about winning. They want to talk about low-propensity Republican voters, but it's all a facade. The new Republicans that want to come into the party try to keep out because they're too MAGA. But we're winning all across the state. When they say "bad candidate or inexperience", it's a dog whistle: they don't like Trump but have to tolerate him. They want to keep their thing going, controlled opposition losers. All so they don't have to tell people in the inner cities they're being scammed. USAID is just the tip of the iceberg. Losing $2 trillion dollars at the Department of Defense is the real racket.

We all know where we have to go and what needs to be done to win another statewide election in Minnesota. Will we do it or not?

[**If we do, I will need your help.**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=80b7ff809bd84fbb8b7228868eb9b80e&_e=IZga-6CIoBEuhK3n75LTRfujK5jHV5D2kMLk_0jhQfu65hgDRGgkQKPJxjR3eD8Id5uX0vQ_uNLEmf5TnYNLb5JlrArBQQSZMDXTGwUW5MjxzMde8DkMZDlfy87_yYgdI4gPgOnnEYqN8LLmK7GidHw6ih5fE0672IyPYPu5WDVmi7Qvwwe6iDx83RgK5L2E_gvTdteJLBBwGNsHQQr9lVVUpUFB_i2Z2fkFMgtBYyRIM2Nz6ScjSpfLFH2x9P2GzIATjpafBAUxc2A-OmNl1v9_bW4IL9Dvhx9EBcQ7IVSg5xdAGIbNlBHj4sV8hvhrXKzrBfIFKfOgNEgjCXlplQ%3D%3D) The Neocons and Left are united against me. They’re both going to spend an ungodly amount of money to prevent me from winning this Senate race.

[**I need you to donate as little as $5 before midnight. Every contribution fuels our People-First Movement, and with enough help we can FLIP MINNESOTA RED.**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=80b7ff809bd84fbb8b7228868eb9b80e&_e=IZga-6CIoBEuhK3n75LTRfujK5jHV5D2kMLk_0jhQfu65hgDRGgkQKPJxjR3eD8Id5uX0vQ_uNLEmf5TnYNLb5JlrArBQQSZMDXTGwUW5MjxzMde8DkMZDlfy87_yYgdI4gPgOnnEYqN8LLmK7GidHw6ih5fE0672IyPYPu5WDVmi7Qvwwe6iDx83RgK5L2Eqizx_FsRyueSIn2Zcu84QyhKRgTAX1Xsz1Amt_5UX3AzGhuKHe4Evn3VYX6gPw1fgM2ckhUdhHFYjB2h1YhwckqcsEhGGHvvqbkyywrxU_96o2KmpSxG-i7R8y52jVhoDsMXWFDRiDHwBlznKuMRTg%3D%3D)

Royce White for U.S. Senate 2026
The People Are Coming

[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=80b7ff809bd84fbb8b7228868eb9b80e&_e=IZga-6CIoBEuhK3n75LTRfujK5jHV5D2kMLk_0jhQfu65hgDRGgkQKPJxjR3eD8Id5uX0vQ_uNLEmf5TnYNLb5JlrArBQQSZMDXTGwUW5MjxzMde8DkMZDlfy87_yYgdI4gPgOnnEYqN8LLmK7GidHw6ih5fE0672IyPYPu5WDVmi7Qvwwe6iDx83RgK5L2ESWO4qnGHb3-cDrhGI4BU2bXwKgiMSPsy8vNBYBaGBkYm122N7GwupBl8n0zOqPE97M4oEro9nMGyd1B0B9W6XFf_UnOAOUF5jnXt3gTyVgOQGP7BmZ7fuI278XZLOV4delmcNKNFfAkUCOYZPl6__A%3D%3D)

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc.

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

** [**PASS ROYCE AN ASSIST**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=80b7ff809bd84fbb8b7228868eb9b80e&_e=IZga-6CIoBEuhK3n75LTRfujK5jHV5D2kMLk_0jhQfu65hgDRGgkQKPJxjR3eD8Id5uX0vQ_uNLEmf5TnYNLb5JlrArBQQSZMDXTGwUW5MjxzMde8DkMZDlfy87_yYgdI4gPgOnnEYqN8LLmK7GidHw6ih5fE0672IyPYPu5WDVmi7Qvwwe6iDx83RgK5L2EP7C7Ut55nJ52MppUzgcsDjO5ngomcrNM8hXPKFoAQLiuiHOJgYwsp36phsyZML5X8XUGrHLyUtMugrRrqJokUkHmxSIyLIuk1reMZ9rRps3w3manC14Vpzr690RqNv1p7a8Na9f5fC-HYgwfNmhI5Q%3D%3D)

subject: USA Today Opinion: “North Carolina Republicans might just get away with stealing an election”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
Here’s the response from Attorney General Eric H. Holder, Jr:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105837372/539552173/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUzOGZiZDk2LThjMTktZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=G3qFDbq-szmPEOS-MHzV1TcCmQmmWC1nkmWK2gA97g4=&emci=d6fe12b5-7319-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=538fbd96-8c19-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=8431045)
---

**“North Carolina Republicans might just get away with stealing an election” —USA Today Opinion** **“The ruling calls into question enough votes to potentially undo Riggs’ November election win” —NBC News** [**Make a donation to fight back against the anti-democracy agenda >>**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105837373/539552181/1925646595?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_NCSCOTUSRR_email_20250414-NDRC-Tier1-NCSCOTUSRR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250414-NDRC-Tier1-NCSCOTUSRR_&utm_campaign=NCSCOTUSRR&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUzOGZiZDk2LThjMTktZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=G3qFDbq-szmPEOS-MHzV1TcCmQmmWC1nkmWK2gA97g4=) Peter — In a stunning ruling on Friday, the North Carolina Supreme Court’s Republican majority decided to disenfranchise military and overseas voters in the case where a failed GOP candidate is trying to overturn a state supreme court election. Here’s Attorney General Eric H. Holder’s reaction: “**This shocking decision abandons the judiciary’s most basic role, to protect the rights of the people, and sanctions an outright attempt to steal an election.** The North Carolina Supreme Court’s Republican majority has, for naked partisan reasons, cherrypicked whose votes count and whose do not. It is the height of political arrogance to tell military members who serve and sacrifice for our country, and other voters, that their votes and those of their family members are questionable.”

**“This opinion is both a disgrace and legacy defining for those who put their names behind it.”** [**Now is a time to fight back for our democracy — will you rush a donation to push for free and fair elections in North Carolina and around the country?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105837374/539552185/1925646595?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_NCSCOTUSRR_email_20250414-NDRC-Tier1-NCSCOTUSRR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250414-NDRC-Tier1-NCSCOTUSRR_&utm_campaign=NCSCOTUSRR&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUzOGZiZDk2LThjMTktZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=G3qFDbq-szmPEOS-MHzV1TcCmQmmWC1nkmWK2gA97g4=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Don’t miss this quote from North Carolina Supreme Court Justice Anita Earls’ dissenting opinion:
“It is no small thing to overturn the results of an election in a democracy by throwing out ballots that were legally cast consistent with all election laws in effect on the day of the election. **Some would call it stealing the election, others might call it a bloodless coup** , but by whatever name, no amount of smoke and mirrors makes it legitimate.”
Democratic incumbent Justice Allison Riggs, who won last November’s election fair and square — as confirmed by multiple recounts — is now appealing the state supreme court’s ruling and will keep fighting for the will of the people to be heard:
**“I’m the proud daughter of a 30-year military veteran who was deployed overseas, and it is unacceptable that the Court is choosing to selectively disenfranchise North Carolinians serving our country, here and overseas.”**
[**This team helped re-elect Democratic Justice Allison Riggs last November, and now we must fight even harder to protect free and fair elections from the GOP. clean_body: Here’s the response from Attorney General Eric H. Holder, Jr: | “North Carolina Republicans might just get away with stealing an election” —USA Today Opinion “The ruling calls into question enough votes to potentially undo Riggs’ November election win” —NBC News = Peter — In a stunning ruling on Friday, the North Carolina Supreme Court’s Republican majority decided to disenfranchise military and overseas voters in the case where a failed GOP candidate is trying to overturn a state supreme court election. Here’s Attorney General Eric H. Holder’s reaction: “This shocking decision abandons the judiciary’s most basic role, to protect the rights of the people, and sanctions an outright attempt to steal an election. The North Carolina Supreme Court’s Republican majority has, for naked partisan reasons, cherrypicked whose votes count and whose do not. It is the height of political arrogance to tell military members who serve and sacrifice for our country, and other voters, that their votes and those of their family members are questionable.” “This opinion is both a disgrace and legacy defining for those who put their names behind it.” = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Don’t miss this quote from North Carolina Supreme Court Justice Anita Earls’ dissenting opinion: “It is no small thing to overturn the results of an election in a democracy by throwing out ballots that were legally cast consistent with all election laws in effect on the day of the election. Some would call it stealing the election, others might call it a bloodless coup , but by whatever name, no amount of smoke and mirrors makes it legitimate.” Democratic incumbent Justice Allison Riggs, who won last November’s election fair and square — as confirmed by multiple recounts — is now appealing the state supreme court’s ruling and will keep fighting for the will of the people to be heard: “I’m the proud daughter of a 30-year military veteran who was deployed overseas, and it is unacceptable that the Court is choosing to selectively disenfranchise North Carolinians serving our country, here and overseas.” = Thanks so much — we’ll keep you posted on what happens next. name: Voter Action Project
subject: A damning list of attacks on voter protections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Don't believe us? Check this out:
➜ In early February, Musk’s team laid off 130 staffers at the Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency, or CISA, including 10 regional security specialists who worked with local and state election officials.
➜ Also in February, Attorney General Pam Bondi disbanded a key FBI task force charged with investigating foreign efforts to influence elections.
➜ Bondi has also placed an FBI task force that investigated threats against election workers and polling places on the chopping block, their fate is still up in the air.
➜ In March, Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem canceled the funding for national information sharing efforts that helped state and local election officials detect and ward off coordinated hacking attacks and other threats.
This administration has placed a premium on appointing election deniers to positions of power over our elections. From Musk, Noem, and Bondi to FBI Director Kash Patel and the new head of the Department of Justice's Civil Rights division, Harmeet Dhillon, people who spread and defended Trump's "big lie" are in place to wreak havoc on our fundamental right to vote.
Protecting voting rights is our job #1. Help us fight back with $25 or more right now in defense of our fundamental right to vote and make every vote count in our elections >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2]
Voter Action Project
CNN: Trump is dismantling election security networks. State officials are alarmed [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=25.00&contactdata=WVGZUhIXtjDezeuMbKnxp+Tt3eA0iGKw/XOns+9KK2ApD/4aFs2qgRtr4JW5CPtZ0sjIQPLGcQQOIEObrLufbdba0TLCjeA3/7nD1z4wWZg=]
Team,
The United States has a history of strong preparation and quick work by an information-sharing and analysis network of hundreds of federal, state, and local election, cybersecurity, and law enforcement officials to protect our elections. It's a history we should be proud of.
But now key parts of this security network, much of it built over the past decade, are being systematically dismantled by the Trump administration and Elon Musk’s Department of Government Efficiency, a CNN investigation has found – leaving election offices across the country scrambling to protect against future threats.
In an age of cyber attacks, poorly funded election equipment breaking down, or anti-voting activists trying to skew the results, these moves to remove the guardrails on our elections are a dangerous step away from democracy.
That's why our work is so critical. We need to get the word out about these threats to voting rights -- all while we work to register new voters, activate registered voters, and fight suppressive laws to make sure every vote counts.
Help multiply our efforts to defend voting rights by chipping in $25 or whatever you can today to make sure every voice is heard in our elections >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2]
If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=15.00&tknfa=6m9FkTrPc5SH37kYtkLEpVL3-Uo5-G9heazRZuIVBgc=&contactdata=WVGZUhIXtjDezeuMbKnxp+Tt3eA0iGKw/XOns+9KK2ApD/4aFs2qgRtr4JW5CPtZ0sjIQPLGcQQOIEObrLufbdba0TLCjeA3/7nD1z4wWZg=] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=25.00&tknfa=6m9FkTrPc5SH37kYtkLEpVL3-Uo5-G9heazRZuIVBgc=&contactdata=WVGZUhIXtjDezeuMbKnxp+Tt3eA0iGKw/XOns+9KK2ApD/4aFs2qgRtr4JW5CPtZ0sjIQPLGcQQOIEObrLufbdba0TLCjeA3/7nD1z4wWZg=] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=50.00&tknfa=6m9FkTrPc5SH37kYtkLEpVL3-Uo5-G9heazRZuIVBgc=&contactdata=WVGZUhIXtjDezeuMbKnxp+Tt3eA0iGKw/XOns+9KK2ApD/4aFs2qgRtr4JW5CPtZ0sjIQPLGcQQOIEObrLufbdba0TLCjeA3/7nD1z4wWZg=]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=100.00&tknfa=6m9FkTrPc5SH37kYtkLEpVL3-Uo5-G9heazRZuIVBgc=&contactdata=WVGZUhIXtjDezeuMbKnxp+Tt3eA0iGKw/XOns+9KK2ApD/4aFs2qgRtr4JW5CPtZ0sjIQPLGcQQOIEObrLufbdba0TLCjeA3/7nD1z4wWZg=] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=250.00&tknfa=6m9FkTrPc5SH37kYtkLEpVL3-Uo5-G9heazRZuIVBgc=&contactdata=WVGZUhIXtjDezeuMbKnxp+Tt3eA0iGKw/XOns+9KK2ApD/4aFs2qgRtr4JW5CPtZ0sjIQPLGcQQOIEObrLufbdba0TLCjeA3/7nD1z4wWZg=] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=WVGZUhIXtjDezeuMbKnxp+Tt3eA0iGKw/XOns+9KK2ApD/4aFs2qgRtr4JW5CPtZ0sjIQPLGcQQOIEObrLufbdba0TLCjeA3/7nD1z4wWZg=]
The simple truth is this: We can counter the awful anti-democratic voter suppression provisions enacted into law in Georgia, Texas, Arizona, Florida, and beyond over the last few years.
We can protect our democracy from those who want to lie to keep themselves in office -- or scheme their way back. We can increase voter participation and end the tactics -- like gerrymandering -- that are used to silence our voices.
We can make our country the democracy we've all been promised. But we need your help.
Fuel our work this year with $25 or however much you can to help us protect the right to vote and so much more from the threats we're facing >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2]
https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=WVGZUhIXtjDezeuMbKnxp+Tt3eA0iGKw/XOns+9KK2ApD/4aFs2qgRtr4JW5CPtZ0sjIQPLGcQQOIEObrLufbdba0TLCjeA3/7nD1z4wWZg= [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=WVGZUhIXtjDezeuMbKnxp+Tt3eA0iGKw/XOns+9KK2ApD/4aFs2qgRtr4JW5CPtZ0sjIQPLGcQQOIEObrLufbdba0TLCjeA3/7nD1z4wWZg=]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2]
Donate Now [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=WVGZUhIXtjDezeuMbKnxp+Tt3eA0iGKw/XOns+9KK2ApD/4aFs2qgRtr4JW5CPtZ0sjIQPLGcQQOIEObrLufbdba0TLCjeA3/7nD1z4wWZg=]

A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.

From Musk, Noem, and Bondi to FBI Director Kash Patel and the new head of the Department of Justice's Civil Rights division, Harmeet Dhillon, people who spread and defended Trump's "big lie" are in place to wreak havoc on our fundamental right to vote. Protecting voting rights is our job #1. Help us fight back with $25 or more right now in defense of our fundamental right to vote and make every vote count in our elections >> [] Voter Action Project CNN: Trump is dismantling election security networks. State officials are alarmed [=] Team, The United States has a history of strong preparation and quick work by an information-sharing and analysis network of hundreds of federal, state, and local election, cybersecurity, and law enforcement officials to protect our elections. It's a history we should be proud of. But now key parts of this security network, much of it built over the past decade, are being systematically dismantled by the Trump administration and Elon Musk’s Department of Government Efficiency, a CNN investigation has found – leaving election offices across the country scrambling to protect against future threats. In an age of cyber attacks, poorly funded election equipment breaking down, or anti-voting activists trying to skew the results, these moves to remove the guardrails on our elections are a dangerous step away from democracy. That's why our work is so critical. We need to get the word out about these threats to voting rights -- all while we work to register new voters, activate registered voters, and fight suppressive laws to make sure every vote counts. Help multiply our efforts to defend voting rights by chipping in $25 or whatever you can today to make sure every voice is heard in our elections >> [] If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately: GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [=] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [=] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [=] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [=] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [=] OTHER AMOUNT [=] The simple truth is this: We can counter the awful anti-democratic voter suppression provisions enacted into law in Georgia, Texas, Arizona, Florida, and beyond over the last few years. We can protect our democracy from those who want to lie to keep themselves in office -- or scheme their way back. We can increase voter participation and end the tactics -- like gerrymandering -- that are used to silence our voices. We can make our country the democracy we've all been promised. But we need your help. Fuel our work this year with $25 or however much you can to help us protect the right to vote and so much more from the threats we're facing >> [] = [=] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [] Donate Now [=] Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. name: Justice Democrats
subject: Court says Trump can deport Mahmoud Khalil
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

It’s been over a month since Palestinian activist and Columbia University
graduate Mahmoud Khalil was arrested by plainclothes agents, flown across
the country, and jailed in an ICE detention center.

Now, a Louisiana immigration judge claims the Trump administration has the
authority to revoke his green card and deport him, even though he hasn’t
committed a crime.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em-20250414-free-mahmoud-rumeysa-update/?source=em20250414-36584&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&akid=36584%2E1203867%2EFKQsDu ]Headline from Politico which reads "Immigration judge rules that
Columbia University activist Mahmoud Khalil can be deported". Subhead
reads "Lawyers for Khalil are expected to appeal, and a federal judge in
New Jersey has temporarily barred his removal from the country."

This is abhorrent, Peter.
Mahmoud is facing deportation for his anti-genocide activism while his
wife prepares to give birth to their first child any day now. A New Jersey
judge has temporarily delayed his deportation while his legal team appeals
this decision—which means public pressure still matters.

In the same week, we learned that the U.S. State Department found no
evidence to justify the kidnapping of Tufts University student Rumeysa
Ozturk by ICE. She was simply persecuted because of writing an op-ed
criticizing Netanyahu’s genocide of Palestinians.

As a result, Rumeysa has suffered multiple asthma attacks and has been
forced to experience poor living conditions including insufficient medical
treatment while detained for the last month.

Peter, no one
should be jailed or deported for their political beliefs. We must speak
out against this dangerous trend of targeting activists and students for
exercising their freedom of speech and standing up for Palestinian lives.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em-20250414-free-mahmoud-rumeysa-update/?source=em20250414-36584&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&akid=36584%2E1203867%2EFKQsDu ]Add your name to turn up the public pressure and demand that both
Mahmoud and Rumeysa are freed ASAP →

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em-20250414-free-mahmoud-rumeysa-update/?source=em20250414-36584&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&akid=36584%2E1203867%2EFKQsDu ]Add Your Name

— Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250414-36584-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36584_1203867_FKQsDu&akid=36584%2E1203867%2EFKQsDu

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36584%2E1203867%2EFKQsDu

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Let’s talk about taxing the rich
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Think about what we could do.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2524%2E4032634%2E99Nlf3)
---
Tomorrow’s Tax Day — and while hardworking people across this nation continue to pay what they owe, year in and year out, I want you to imagine what’s possible if we get the rich to pay a fair share: A country where nobody is bankrupted by one bad medical diagnosis. Where every parent can find and afford good, quality child care. Where every child has a first-rate education that gives them a shot at a good life. And where every American has a place to live that doesn’t break the bank. We could build a future not just for the wealthy and well-connected, but for everyone. And there are plenty of paths we can take to get there. I’ve got a plan for a wealth tax on fortunes greater than $50 million. I’ve passed a bill that gives us tools to prevent some of the largest, most profitable corporations in America from paying $0 in taxes. And I’m fighting to stop Congressional Republicans from extending Donald Trump’s massive tax breaks for the wealthy — while calling out the ways Trump and his unelected co-president, Elon Musk, are trying to give a free pass to rich tax cheats. Right now, Musk and his DOGE goons are trying to go on a firing spree at the IRS, targeting the very staff who go after wealthy people dodging their taxes. Already, the wealthiest five percent of Americans skip out on paying an estimated $591 billion in taxes each year. And experts say that cutting the IRS in half would lead to an _additional $2.4 trillion_ in lost revenue over the next decade. Read that again: _$2.4 trillion._ Just imagine the investments we could make in our kids’ future with that kind of money. It’s no surprise that Trump and Musk are trying to make it easier for rich people to cheat on their taxes. And of course they’re pushing massive tax breaks for the wealthy. Billionaires helped send Donald Trump to the White House, and now they’re expecting a return on that investment. But we’re fighting back for a tax code where a Boston public school teacher doesn’t pay a higher tax rate than Jeff Bezos. A tax code that invests in schools, health care, infrastructure, and programs that help working families get ahead. A tax code that helps give everyone a fighting chance at the American dream. And as long as we fight together, we can win together. [**If you want to build a tax code that works not just for the wealthy and well-connected, but for everybody, sign on to say you’re with me in this fight.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-taxday25/?source=EMZ25K_ENG_E_20250414_V1S1&t=8&akid=2524%2E4032634%2E99Nlf3) | [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-taxday25/?source=EMZ25K_ENG_E_20250414_V1S1&t=9&akid=2524%2E4032634%2E99Nlf3)
---
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

---
| | | |
---
| [DONATE](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2980?t=13&akid=2524%2E4032634%2E99Nlf3)
---
| [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/365?t=4&akid=2524%2E4032634%2E99Nlf3) | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/367?t=5&akid=2524%2E4032634%2E99Nlf3) | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/368?t=6&akid=2524%2E4032634%2E99Nlf3) | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/369?t=7&akid=2524%2E4032634%2E99Nlf3)

|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105838105/539559181/-729519538?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGU5YzFmNy04ZDE5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x9IN_N5qP1Li4MIO3xajSrE1bWG40shmA1-vNS1zOLs=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105838106/539559182/-1751156451?refcode=em-4.14.25-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGU5YzFmNy04ZDE5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x9IN_N5qP1Li4MIO3xajSrE1bWG40shmA1-vNS1zOLs=) **➤➤ NEW: Trump targets former election security official for telling the truth** Friend, Donald Trump is now directing the Department of Justice to investigate Chris Krebs – the former top cybersecurity official who oversaw election security in 2020. What was Krebs’ crime? **Simply stating the truth: that the 2020 election was the most secure in American history.** This is not normal. This is not politics. This is authoritarianism. Trump is making it clear that he will use the full force of the federal government to punish those who stand up for democracy and truth. name: Shawnna Bolick
subject: April 14th Legislative Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTE BOLICK
body:
| | | [ ](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=7b65590f47&e=a7ab36849c)
---
| | Good evening!

Last week, I participated in a brief roundtable discussion alongside other legislators with Border Czar Tom Homan after the Joint Protocol [session](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=315711fec8&e=a7ab36849c). I thanked him for working with Arizona to secure our Border and to help stop human and sex trafficking to Make Arizona and America Safe Again.

Later in the day, HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy, Jr., held a [press conference](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=91c01db111&e=a7ab36849c) in the State Senate to discuss the administration’s willingness to ensure our kids’ school lunches become more nutritious and aren’t ladled with a bunch of chemicals and toxins.

This week the State Senate will convene its legislative work Tuesday through Thursday.

On Thursday, the [Finance Advisory Committee](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=bed39de491&e=a7ab36849c) (FAC) will convene from 12pm to 1:30pm to discuss the state and the US economies. The FAC serves as a resource to the JLBC staff and the legislature in developing a revenue forecast each year.

**Bolick Bills Signed into Law by the Governor**

[Senate Bill 1226](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=afe669403e&e=a7ab36849c) is a mirror bill of House Bill 2484 that was signed into law today.

**Bolick Bills Passed out of the House Rules Agenda Today**

The House Rules Committee passed the following bills to be constitutional and in proper form and will now, head to the House for a full vote:

**[SB 1103](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=5e4f092206&e=a7ab36849c)**
penalty assessment; victims’ rights enforcement

**[SB 1107](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=d0fe3cc606&e=a7ab36849c)**
motorcycle safety fund continuation

**[SB 1226](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=c2e6f800c7&e=a7ab36849c)**
school policies; wireless communications devices

**[SB 1343](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=a80b20e8f4&e=a7ab36849c)**
probation supervision; transfer

**[SB 1405](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=329898128c&e=a7ab36849c)**
mental health transition program; extension

**Press Release by State Senate Republicans **

[https://www.azsenaterepublicans.gov/post/senator-bolick-celebrates-new-law-addressing-cellphone-distractions-among-students-during-class-time](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=951955c977&e=a7ab36849c)

**Bolick Bills Voted Out of the House Today**

**[SB 1220](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=3e6ee5931a&e=a7ab36849c)**
victims’ rights; audio recordings; appeal 54-2 – is headed to the Governor’s desk for hopefully a signature.

_About the Legislative Process_

People have asked me about the legislative process, and last week I was asked what a Strike Everything (SE) amendment was.
A SE is often used to redraft an original bill or completely change the underlying bill. If the original bill is being heavily amended the Legislative Council bill drafter might suggest a cleaner version instead of striking out words or sentences and replacing it with newly revised text to make it easier to read.

Since I first got elected in 2019, I have been able to use this tool each legislative session. Sometimes bills are not drafted properly. Instead of having lengthy amendments it is cleaner to just strike the entire bill with a new version. Sometimes a member in the opposing chamber will utilize legislation as a vehicle to use for something entirely different than the original subject matter of the underlying bill. Not every member in the opposing chamber will ask for your permission to run a SE, so sometimes it become a bit of a struggle. Once the original bill comes back to your chamber, you can concur or refuse changes made to your original bill before it goes up for a final vote.

_Examples of Strike Everything Amendments_

This session [SB 1206](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=fd6613be25&e=a7ab36849c) wasn’t properly drafted, so I ran a SE amendment in the Senate Committee on Regulatory Affairs and Government Efficiency that I chair. [SB 1227](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=9db8be5d9e&e=a7ab36849c) was my appropriations bill to expand the school safety grant program and companion piece of legislation to SB 1226. Since I let a House member send her version of the cell phone policy bill to the governor’s office for a signature, I relinquished SB 1227 to Representative Quang Nguyen to run a SE to work on a cleaner ACJC continuation bill in the House.

[SB 1424](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=ea3e3a4edc&e=a7ab36849c) was a mirror to Representative Chris Lopez’s [HB 2741](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=10f4cc5323&e=a7ab36849c) . For some reason the bills didn’t get swapped with one another, so we had the same bill moving through the chambers a second time, so I let Representative Walt Blackman use it for his stolen valor bill.

After the Speaker of the House double-assigned my [SB 1234](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=8898f91281&e=a7ab36849c), I relinquished [SB 1658](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=6268e4eab9&e=a7ab36849c) to revive SB 1234. Both bills came out of touring and meeting with the Arizona Humane Society during the interim. SB 1234 is a bill to help law enforcement with animal cruelty cases and SB 1658 was creating an alternative pathway for certification as a veterinary technician.

Finally, I had two bills that weren’t ready when our bill deadline was approaching, so I had two technical corrections bills that were later used to define [bullying and cyberbullying](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=8576b5e57b&e=a7ab36849c) and a second bill to tell the state department of Agriculture they couldn’t [require or prescribe minimum housing size standards for egg-laying hens.](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=546eac8eba&e=a7ab36849c)

_Bolick Legislation in the News_

[https://azcapitoltimes.com/news/2025/04/12/more-than-300-striker-amendments-proposed-during-legislative-session/](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=af37a5d89e&e=a7ab36849c)

[https://swvalleytimes.com/stories/670796598-shawnna-lm-bolick-expresses-concern-over-urban-planning-issues-and-regulations](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=4aaa16875a&e=a7ab36849c)

[https://azcapitoltimes.com/news/2025/04/07/legislators-want-a-definition-of-bullying-but-will-it-go-far-enough/](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=472a14395e&e=a7ab36849c)

_Campaign Information_

If you live in Legislative District 2, [**please sign my online nomination petition**](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=48e0991312&e=a7ab36849c) ensuring my name appears on the Republican primary ballot. To qualify from the Republican ballot, I need to collect more than 500 signatures from registered Republicans and Independents. It only takes a minute or two to login to sign your name on my online nominate petition.

It takes money to run an effective campaign. Please consider making a [**donation**](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=dfba89a16c&e=a7ab36849c) to help fund our campaign. Last cycle, not only did I have a primary, but I worked tirelessly to defeat my Democrat opponent as well. The Democrats spent nearly $2 million in 2024 to unseat me. During a mid-term election, they will likely have even more resources to try to buy this legislative seat.

If you'd like to volunteer on our campaign, please [**email me**](mailto:info@bolickforarizona.com?subject=Volunteer) and let me know how you'd like to help us secure this seat.

Thank you for your continued support!

Take care,
Shawnna

name: Powered By People
subject: Wichita Falls on Saturday
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

We threw a town hall in Wichita Falls on Saturday – and over 400 people
showed up:

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250414.yZC5ef&refcode=ema20250414-240066&t=1001&akid=240066%2E444211%2EEN51TN ]A full room of people at the Wichita Falls town hall, seated with some
standing around the edges of the room. Beto O'Rourke is speaking in the
center of the room flanked by Texas and American flags

We were stunned by the turnout. We were at standing room
only and had to set up an overflow room.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250414.yZC5ef&refcode=ema20250414-240066&t=1002&akid=240066%2E444211%2EEN51TN ]Will you make a donation today to help Powered by People host even more
events and connect with even more Texans? Your donation will help keep
Beto on the road fighting for our democracy.

We held this town hall because Texans deserve answers from their
representatives – especially when Republican elected officials are
threatening to end Medicaid and Social Security, destroy our public
schools, and more.

Republican representatives Ronny Jackson, James Frank, and John Cornyn
have failed again and again to show up and talk to their constituents in
Wichita Falls.

Whether you’re a Democrat, a Republican, or an Independent, every Texan
deserves to be listened to by their representatives.

We’re hoping to host more town halls across Texas. But hosting these
events costs money!

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250414.yZC5ef&refcode=ema20250414-240066&t=1003&akid=240066%2E444211%2EEN51TN ]Will you make a $3 donation today to help send Beto on
the road again, so we can host more events and connect with more voters?
Every dollar counts in getting us closer to hosting our next event.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250414.yZC5ef&refcode=ema20250414-240066&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=240066%2E444211%2EEN51TN ]DONATE $3

Thank you,

Powered by People

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=240066%2E444211%2EEN51TN

name: Team Griswold
subject: Peter, did you see?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
Friend,
We wanted to make sure you saw Jena’s note about why she’s running for Attorney General. Her fight represents the commitment to justice and progress many of us share.
Please read it below, and if you are inspired, we hope you will support her by making a donation today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2402-q2-jg-launch?refcode=250414-email]
— Team Griswold
----- Original Message -----
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2402-q2-jg-launch?refcode=250414-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2402-q2-jg-launch?refcode=250414-email]
Peter,
I want to take a moment to share a little bit about who I am and why I’m running to be Colorado’s next Attorney General. Before I go into that, can you chip in $10 to help power this campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2402-q2-jg-launch?refcode=250414-email&amount=10]
I grew up in a working-class family in Estes Park. At times, we relied on food stamps to get by, but my mom worked hard and taught me the value of perseverance and hard work. I became the first person in my family to graduate from a four-year college, and eventually, I earned my law degree from the University of Pennsylvania Law School.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2402-q2-jg-launch?refcode=250414-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2402-q2-jg-launch?refcode=250414-email]
Public service has always been my purpose. From protecting voting rights to helping secure hundreds of millions of relief dollars to help Colorado communities rebuild after the 2013 floods, I’ve dedicated my career to standing up for others. As Secretary of State, I fought to expand voting rights, protect election workers, and stand strong against extremists—even in the face of threats.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2402-q2-jg-launch?refcode=250414-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2402-q2-jg-launch?refcode=250414-email]
Now I’m ready to take that fight to the Attorney General’s office. I’ll work every day to protect all Coloradans’ rights and freedoms, and will stand up to corporate special interests that take advantage of working people. I’ll never back down to extremists, and I'll fight for fairness and justice—making sure victims of crime are supported and our communities are safer and stronger.
I’m proud of where I come from and the path that brought me here. And I’m ready to continue fighting for the people of Colorado.
Will you join me on this journey? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2402-q2-jg-launch?refcode=250414-email]
Thank you for believing in this movement,
Jena Griswold
Follow Jena Online:
https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/ [https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/] https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold [https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold] https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold/ [https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold/] https://www.threads.net/@jenagriswold [https://www.threads.net/@jenagriswold] https://bsky.app/profile/jenagriswold.bsky.social [https://bsky.app/profile/jenagriswold.bsky.social]
Paid for by Jena for Colorado. Rachel Gordon, Registered Agent.
Jena for Colorado
P.O. Box 270218
Louisville, CO 80027
United States

subject: 🚨ALERT: IL GOP’s Rhonda Belford Blocks Trump Group
body:
view in browser (https://mailchi.mp/115de857a919/exclusive-donald-trump-jr-draws-large-crowds-receives-lifetime-membership-10352068?e=1cb5fdae9e) | update preferences (https://illinoisreview.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=811d47b3c0783e80274d515f7&id=1a5a561027&e=1cb5fdae9e&c=71744d7f47) | unsubscribe (https://illinoisreview.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=811d47b3c0783e80274d515f7&id=1a5a561027&t=b&e=1cb5fdae9e&c=71744d7f47)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=71744d7f47-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
This IR e-Blast Powered By:
https://www.bestdental.org/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=71744d7f47-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823

Dear Peter,

Folks, this is Scott Kaspar, General Counsel of Illinois Review, and on behalf of IR we thought you may be interested to receive this conservative news alert.

This story has special meaning for me, because I ran for Illinois' 6th Congressional district in 2022 with the intention of unseating liberal Democrat Sean Casten. What I learned doorknocking throughout the district and indeed talking to Rep. Casten directly is that Sean Casten is a really nice family guy who espouses some of the most liberal policies ever. But I heard it from so many people, "We're voting for Sean because he's a nice guy."

So it's absolutely no surprise to me that the DNC would dispatch Sean Casten to evangelize in Ruby Red Illinois. What is unconscionable though is that leaders of our own party are giving cover to Rep. Casten and suppressing our Trump supporters from attending his events and making our voices heard.

Illinois Review is the largest conservative media source in Illinois, and the only source in Illinois that has been shared by President Donald Trump.
http://www.twitter.com/illinoisreview?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=71744d7f47-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823 Twitter (http://www.twitter.com/illinoisreview?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=71744d7f47-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)

https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=71744d7f47-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823 IllinoisReview.com (https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=71744d7f47-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
IL GOP’s Rhonda Belford Blocks Trump Group From Organizing, Attending Transgender Rights Activist Sean Casten’s Downstate Town Hall (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/04/il-gops-rhonda-belford-blocks-trump-group-from-organizing-attending-transgender-rights-activist-sean-castens-downstate-town-hall.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=71744d7f47-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/04/il-gops-rhonda-belford-blocks-trump-group-from-organizing-attending-transgender-rights-activist-sean-castens-downstate-town-hall.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=71744d7f47-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
IL GOP National Committewoman Rhond Belford, left, and U.S. Rep. Sean Casten, right. (Belford: Sweet Bee Photography/Casten: photo provided by the U.S. House of Representatives)
By Illinois Review

U.S. Rep. Sean Casten (IL-6) – a progressive liberal Democrat and pro-transgender rights activist, made an extraordinary visit to downstate Illinois on Saturday for a series of town hall events in heavily Republican districts – in a move that sent shockwaves across the state.

But while the visit was unexpected, the real headliner was Illinois Republican leader and Republican National Committeewoman Rhonda Belford, who, according to posts on social media – denied pro-Trump Republicans from attending the event who were organizing and planning to peacefully protest the controversial Democratic congressman’s appearance in the ruby red congressional district.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/04/il-gops-rhonda-belford-blocks-trump-group-from-organizing-attending-transgender-rights-activist-sean-castens-downstate-town-hall.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=71744d7f47-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
U.S. Sean Casten and President Joe Biden. (Facebook: Sean Casten for Congress)

name: Oregon GOP
subject: Democrats Are Taxing EVERYTHING
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE OREGON REPUBLICAN PARTY (COMMITTEE ID 379) 187 HIGH ST
body:
They just dropped a plan to slam Oregonians with 12 new taxes. Add your name to fight back now.

| | | | [ ](https://secure.winred.com/oregon-republican-party/transportation-package-petition?utm_source=ac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250411_ORGOP_TransportationPetition&utm_id=pc)
---
| | Friend, Oregon Democrats just dropped a transportation plan that would _SLAM working families with more than a DOZEN new taxes and fees_ – **totaling nearly $2 BILLION every two years.** 🚨 A **20-cent-per-gallon** gas tax hike🚨 A new **1% tax** on all car sales🚨 A new **“road usage charge”** for EVS🚨 **Higher** registration and title **fees** 🚨 A **tire tax.** A **bike tax.** Even a new **payroll tax** **And they want to do it without a single Republican vote.** _**All this while ODOT can’t account for $1 BILLION in missing funds and unfinished mega-projects.**_ **Enough is enough.** Republicans are standing up to this madness – calling it **“egregious,”** **“tone-deaf,”** and a **“slap in the face”** to hardworking Oregonians. Now we need YOU to stand with us. [**_Sign the petition right now to demand that Democrats withdraw this reckless tax package. >>>_**](https://links.infooregongop.com/els/v2/XaEqBxqPVECw/SHZOdmdtaHdTc090aEpqQk9JaEMzb0pQeHVsQm5LQWhXOGlQdXVvNXJUWFV5aVZ6cnh1Qm5sclJyeUpXWUdQbzFTSm9yZkhpd2s5bFNMZFBaVVJKYUs3WG0yTVRwQWk3SmsxSExLK3h1akU9S0/)

clean_body: They just dropped a plan to slam Oregonians with 12 new taxes. Add your name to fight back now. | | | | | | Friend, Oregon Democrats just dropped a transportation plan that would SLAM working families with more than a DOZEN new taxes and fees – totaling nearly $2 BILLION every two years. 🚨 A 20-cent-per-gallon gas tax hike🚨 A new 1% tax on all car sales🚨 A new “road usage charge” for EVS🚨 Higher registration and title fees 🚨 A tire tax. A bike tax. Even a new payroll tax And they want to do it without a single Republican vote. All this while ODOT can’t account for $1 BILLION in missing funds and unfinished mega-projects. Enough is enough. Republicans are standing up to this madness – calling it “egregious,” “tone-deaf,” and a “slap in the face” to hardworking Oregonians. Now we need YOU to stand with us. | | | | | We’re working around the clock to push back against this outrageous plan, but we can’t do it without grassroots support. name: David Hogg
subject: F*cking infuriating
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
We need to be taking pages out of Mitch McConnell’s playbook.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250414-1&t=1&akid=1981%2E587540%2E8cZShs)
Peter, it is fucking infuriating to watch the Trump administration wreak havoc on our government and enact their dangerous, destructive agenda.
We need to be taking pages out of Mitch McConnell’s playbook that he used for years to stop Obama, to stop Biden, and prevent Democrats from passing our agenda. Everything has to be on the table to stop and slow Trump.
On top of that, we need to be organizing against vulnerable Republicans and turning the screws on them. We have to make their lives as painful as possible and line up the incentives for them to oppose Trump.
And finally we have to look ahead to upcoming elections and get behind people that are filled with rage over Trump’s actions and have a burning fire within them to stop Trump and fight aggressively for a vision of this country that allows us to have more affordable housing, better healthcare, and provides some real economic opportunity and security.
That’s where we come in.
**[Can you pitch in $5 to power our mission to elect the next generation of leaders?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250414-1?refcode=em20250414-1981&amount=5&refcode2=1981_587540_8cZShs&akid=1981%2E587540%2E8cZShs)**
This is no joke. _Every single day counts in the fight ahead._
**Here’s the truth:** The GOP is already gearing up for the next fight. If we don’t keep our fundraising on track, the billionaires and corporate elite will keep pouring money into the Republican right-wing agenda while Democrats and progressives are left scrambling.
**But we’re not going to let that happen.** We may not have the special interests on our side, but I know that the grassroots can be even more powerful.
**We need leaders who fight for working families, voting rights, and climate justice. Leaders who will not back down when things get tough.**
That’s exactly why Leaders We Deserve exists. Now, we need your help to make sure we can keep electing the young, progressive leaders we deserve.
**[Can you chip in $5 and help power our game-changing work?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250414-1?refcode=em20250414-1981&amount=5&refcode2=1981_587540_8cZShs&akid=1981%2E587540%2E8cZShs)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250414-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250414-1981&refcode2=1981_587540_8cZShs&akid=1981%2E587540%2E8cZShs)**
Thank you for being part of this movement,
David Hogg
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250414-1&t=2&refcode2=1981_587540_8cZShs&akid=1981%2E587540%2E8cZShs)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1981%2E587540%2E8cZShs)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1981%2E587540%2E8cZShs)

subject: Property Tax Protest Rally Set for Tuesday, April 15th at 5pm - Capitol Steps, Olympia
body:

#

**Property Tax Protest Rally!**
**Tues, April 15th in Olympia, Capitol Steps, 5pm **
**Bellevue** —Radical Democrat lawmakers in Olympia are pushing the largest tax package in WA state history, including HB 2049 that triples the growth cap on property taxes from 1% to 3%.

Please help us push back on this horrible bill. Join us on Tuesday, April 15th, at the**Property Tax Protest Rally on the Capitol Steps in Olympia, at 5 pm. **(Address: **416 Sid Snyder Ave SW, Olympia, WA 98504**.)

As an extra bonus, Rally sponsor Let’s Go Washington is offering a giveaway that could pay your property taxes [for one year](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=b9a0ef1568&e=6a281f566d). For rules and eligibilty, click [here. ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=0b36badd39&e=6a281f566d)

Property taxes in WA are already too high. HB 2049 will also tack an inflation fee and a population growth fee. Practically speaking, this increase in property taxes could price many Washington homeowners out of their homes.

Please join us. Public pressure works. We cannot let up. We must fight. Fight. Fight. Thank you.

Sincerely,

Matthew Frolich, WAGOP Executive Director

name: Andrew Yang
subject: A Crisis of Confidence
body:
What a time in American life. Our President initiates a trade war, the markets tremble, and then he pulls back on most of it. But the damage is done. | |
---
| | |
---
| [ ](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=2e6d8863fc&e=0f227c2ae3)
---
|
---
| [ ](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=fe12b0a3cc&e=0f227c2ae3)
---
| What a time in American life. Our President initiates a trade war, the markets tremble, and then he pulls back on most of it. But the damage is done. Consumer confidence is plummeting. Tourism is down. The appetite for dollars and American debt is shaky. Companies are scaling back. Credit card delinquencies are rising. The probability of a recession has spiked. I met with a couple of CEOs this week who said, “The 10% blanket tariffs and the China tariffs will stifle billions of dollars in economic activity each month. People are acting relieved because of the 90-day stay but even what’s left behind is very significant. Plus, it’s not realistic to hammer out trade deals with other countries in 90 days, so there’s a lot of uncertainty.” In my own circle, a friend lost his job and a company had investors pull out. Sometimes, uncertainty feeds on itself. Are you going to hire that person or take that trip or make that purchase? Or maybe you should hunker down? Major companies and individuals alike are reining in spending. If enough people choose the latter, it kicks off a cycle. This is one thing Trump either didn’t realize or didn’t care about; confidence is a delicate thing. If you shake it too much, it can waver and fail. People cue off of each other, and if enough people start heading in a direction others follow. You don’t want to be on the wrong side of that. It’s impossible to witness the leadership of the last couple of weeks and have confidence in those who are making decisions on behalf of all of us. The tortuous justifications and rationales were painful. Leadership matters, for better or worse. We deserve better than this. I know a lot of people who were anxious about their retirement account diminishing last week. My advice – use this time to recalibrate. If you are going to need something in the next few years and have some savings, set it aside. Peace of mind will help you sleep at night. There are times to be aggressive and times to be cautious. I get different data points than most and the data I’m seeing are not promising. I expect continuing rough water. We have never had a recession in the age of AI before. Employers are going to see what the technology can do. Here is a passage from [_The War on Normal People_](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=4a24a549e3&e=0f227c2ae3) that seems very relevant today: “If you look at the histories of layoffs, they maintain a fairly normal pace until a recession hits. Then employers go wild looking for efficiencies and throwing people overboard. The real test of the impact of automation will come in the next downturn. Companies will look to replace their call centers and customer service departments with artificial intelligence and hybrid bot-worker arrangements . . . Large companies will question why their accounting and legal bills are so high. And on and on. Cost-cutting knives will come out, turbocharged by new automated tools. Productivity will then shoot up in the worst way possible as companies accomplish the same tasks with many fewer workers. Our public sector will also be faced with dramatic new needs even as tax revenues decrease.” There are going to be opportunities in the times ahead. The key is to make it there. [Forward](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=fb0344c1fa&e=0f227c2ae3) is growing as people look for different leadership – see what we are doing in [your state](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=559bae1744&e=0f227c2ae3). Also this week, I talk about [AI and the economy](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=bc3c96a970&e=0f227c2ae3) with Nihal Mehta, an experienced AI investor.
---
| **
Andrew Yang**
Co-Chair, Forward Party
[forwardparty.com](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=07edf861e8&e=0f227c2ae3)
[andrewyang.com](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=b22573ef01&e=0f227c2ae3)
---
| | | Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/profile?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=de65787ec1&e=0f227c2ae3&c=991aa622c8) or [unsubscribe](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=de65787ec1&t=b&e=0f227c2ae3&c=991aa622c8).

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: “Why are AOC and Bernie going to Idaho?”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
You know I was hearing earlier today on the television there was someone saying, “Why are AOC and Bernie going to Idaho?”
And I’ll give you one simple answer:
**It’s because the people of Idaho matter. It’s because _we_ matter.**
This movement is not about partisan labels or purity tests, it is about class solidarity—the thousands of folks who came out tonight in Idaho to stand together to say our lives deserve dignity and our work deserves respect no matter who we are.
Something special is happening. Working people are ready to stand together and fight for our democracy. **We just held the largest political event in Idaho since Obama in 2008.**
****
[ Will you donate right now to help us host more town halls and power our fight on the road? These town halls take major resources to host safely and every donation makes a difference.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250414-2.sbptQv&refcode=em20250414-8611-P_FND_RES_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8611%2E2526796%2E3o00yA)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250414-2.sbptQv&refcode=em20250414-8611-P_FND_RES_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=8611%2E2526796%2E3o00yA)**
Pa’lante,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250414-2?refcode=em20250414-8611-P_FND_RES_GRM&t=21&refcode2=8611_2526796_3o00yA&akid=8611%2E2526796%2E3o00yA)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250414-8611-P_FND_RES_GRM&t=22&akid=8611%2E2526796%2E3o00yA)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=23&akid=8611%2E2526796%2E3o00yA) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=24&akid=8611%2E2526796%2E3o00yA) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=25&akid=8611%2E2526796%2E3o00yA)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: Thomas Quiter
subject: One day, you will depend on others
body:
Imagine if you had to wait 12 hours for a glass of water...
| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zuqdj9eeiskev1mbmisdhmourr8lgbgnqij61f60_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cti68oj4cph2bs)
Friend,

Imagine if you had to wait 12 hours for a glass of water...

Imagine if you were trapped in your own home for months... even years...

Imagine how it feels to drive your car down the road with a check engine light on, and it’s making a strange sound, and you’re pretty sure it’s going to break down soon...

But instead of being able to go to the mechanic half a mile down the road to get it fixed, you need to file paperwork to request permission from the insurance company, and it could take up to six months for them to respond... And they can just say NO.

Imagine you had to go through this insane process every six months because your vehicle isn’t designed for the trips you need it to make, and you have no way to afford a better vehicle except through what insurance is willing to pay for... and they can just say NO!

**This wasn’t a passing thought of mine.

This was my reality.**

And it still is the reality of so many others.

My name is Thomas Quiter, founder of the Mobility Independence Foundation (MIF). I was born with Osteogenesis Imperfecta and have required the use of a wheelchair for my entire life.

Here’s what most people don’t understand — government regulations are standing in the way of people who can’t stand for themselves accessing the mobility technology they need to access the world around them just like you.

All joking aside, I founded MIF to revolutionize and deregulate mobility technology so we can provide impactful mobility solutions to those who need it most.

[Government regulations have trapped too many people in their own homes. Could you donate $10, $35, $50, or even $100 to help the Mobility Independence Foundation expose these inhumane policies? ](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zuc4rgm0q1bq6usicisqsbopjrhvkf8kl7rdkl3o_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cti68oj4cph2bs)
[Donate](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zu0ofc9t1pmk0ku705sentudao823lek0odmt4k0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cti68oj4cph2bs)
Imagine what someone like me has to go through because our own government is interfering with our ability to access mobility devices.

**When I was told I should discard a $65,000 custom wheelchair over a 2-inch part, it made me realize why open-source mobility equipment is the next step in the industry.**

_Currently, the FDA considers wheelchairs the same as a prescription, and people are told they cannot modify or repair them_.

_Not only that..._

Because of the “in-the-home rule,” insurance companies are only required to provide mobility equipment for “daily living,” which means it must be able to handle the trip from your bedroom to your bathroom. That’s it!

_**Imagine the government telling you that you don’t need to go outside or even around your entire home, and that’s considered a full life! **_

Our local communities are far more capable of supporting each other as neighbors than the bureaucrats in Washington, D.C., ever will be. This is why our mission is to use open-source hardware rather than relying on government programs.

Under open source hardware:
* People have the right to repair
* We don’t have to fight IP laws
* Communities can produce equipment themselves
* Nobody will be forgotten, trapped in their own homes!

This means everybody wins.

[Will you help the Mobility Independence Foundation empower communities rather than the government? Please donate any amount below >>> ](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ziqj782hnnq0joj9nk14mii8v5qgqlpanaoo4lm8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cti68oj4cph2bs)
[Donate $10](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zskht5iq5mstv77u6gonv2ank73dcsmtihct3qpg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cti68oj4cph2bs)

[Donate $35](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zvhbjv4h5tc3frg4v58r5b1uhjulnolmp1e8el0g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cti68oj4cph2bs)

[Donate $50](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zab232oj3nqpo50smkcum225qv0hae224dcp7bi8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cti68oj4cph2bs)

[Donate $100](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zgt5k00659gja24m7djd4le9nt1s2ioslea445r8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cti68oj4cph2bs)

[Donate $250](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6i0trbgadn7mlp2os7jfd4n8t959cecoqau15r8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cti68oj4cph2bs)

[Donate $500](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z7rr7tq9mte9ifpa5hveht19ekk82j8sjvcvdu1o_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cti68oj4cph2bs)

[Donate $1,000](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z31gsurpcpgs8nfset5dai6d7ibhf33ma32vf540_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cti68oj4cph2bs)

[Donate Any Amount](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zoppi9t2lnm8f6v9vd6d1qomnqk9nlmkjor0539o_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cti68oj4cph2bs)

Imagine if everybody had the opportunity to live an active and purpose-driven life...

That is what I am fighting for.

Thank you for helping us to get one step closer to everyone living the American Dream.

Thomas Quiter
Founder & President
The Mobility Independence Foundation
[TheMIF.org](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zvc7j3p5fbius4rg54ih1fmp0j056251n8g3ats8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cti68oj4cph2bs)

The Mobility Independence Foundation Inc. is a nonprofit organization formed under 501(c)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions or gifts to The Mobility Independence Foundation Inc. are deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. No goods or services are given in exchange for any contribution.

**EIN:** 92-0887459

**Address:**
The Mobility Independence Foundation Inc
1789 State Highway 8
Mount Upton, NY 13809

name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: My situation is in your hands right now, Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
I wrote this email to give you an update

| | | | | | | [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z6tl2sf2eoe0nsrnfkhdo0q6ohuecsukdv2dlif8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cti64p36cth2bs)
---
Our future rests in your hands, friend. I wrote this email to give you an update and to make a plea from the heart. _This is a humble from the heart, so _please_ read it all the way through._In 2021, my team and I put together a historic victory to help flip every one of Virginia's highest offices RED! Ever since taking office as Lieutenant Governor, I have been notching big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every one of my fellow Virginians.Now, I'm running for Governor so that we can keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history once again.**Unfortunately, I 'm facing a few _SERIOUS_ challenges right now:**
---
**While I was in the Virginia legislative session, I was _legally_ barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign. **But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was fundraising _**BIG TIME**_ while I've been working hard in our capital. **Seriously,_a Soros-backed, far-Left group dumped $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a single thing I could do to respond!_**
---
Now Spanberger has a _**GIGANTIC**_ fundraising advantage, friend. Polls show that my race is tied, but Spanberger has a _serious_ cash advantage. Look, if we can't make up the difference, our conservative mission __**will**__ be cut short. **Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a faithful Christian, a mother, and a Marine; __please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign!__**
---
[ DONATE TO SUPPORT WINSOME >>](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z9eoq57qoka2kv8ifb80n31jbjpc22513lbhro9g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cti64p36cth2bs)
---
I am not exaggerating one bit when I tell you this: **without your support, we will fall even _further_ behind. **The Democrat elitists will log a win and the Commonwealth will regress down a path to _irreversible socialism!_ I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think the battle was worth it. And friend, I _**know**_ we will win if we hold strong and fight this together. **[I'm not asking you to write a big check; all I'm asking is that you send in a few dollars to support me and my team in this CRITICAL battle!](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zg48lpu7j4bf0a312ck0r8h49npv25971puvc360_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cti64p36cth2bs)**

Ever since taking office as Lieutenant Governor, I have been notching big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every one of my fellow Virginians.Now, I'm running for Governor so that we can keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history once again.Unfortunately, I 'm facing a few SERIOUS challenges right now: While I was in the Virginia legislative session, I was legally barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign. But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was fundraising BIG TIME while I've been working hard in our capital. Seriously,a Soros-backed, far-Left group dumped $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a single thing I could do to respond! Now Spanberger has a GIGANTIC fundraising advantage, friend. Polls show that my race is tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage. Look, if we can't make up the difference, our conservative mission will be cut short. Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a faithful Christian, a mother, and a Marine; please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign! I am not exaggerating one bit when I tell you this: without your support, we will fall even further behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and the Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism! I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think the battle was worth it. And friend, I know we will win if we hold strong and fight this together. If you cannot afford to keep fighting for the future of our Commonwealth, our children, and our nation, all I ask is you please keep me and my team in your prayers!I am asking you from the bottom of my heart; please stick with me and help us keep the conservative movement thriving!Ever Forward,Lt. name: American Hartford Gold Group
subject: The Silent Heist Draining Your Retirement Savings
body:
A Silent Heist of Your Retirement Savings

---
# U.S. Debt Crisis - A Silent Heist of Your Retirement Savings
---
# Americans are losing wealth daily and don't even know it. Fight back using this.
There's a major heist happening on American wealth in real time.
Except this one doesn't involve masks or vaults. It's quiet. Slow. And it's targeting your retirement.
The U.S. government has racked up over $36 trillion in debt, and their solution?
Print more money... borrow more... kick the can down the road.
But that road ends with your retirement savings in the crosshairs.
401(k)s and IRAs tied to the stock market are more exposed than ever. Inflation eats away your value. Market volatility crushes your growth. And when the next shock hits, it'll be too late to act.
[But there's a way out for you and the nest egg you've built.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zmqf46vq1pa1o9p91tsu0kve8noql37r0s9k5mt0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cti69pj6c5h2bs)
A little-known IRS loophole that lets you move your savings into a private
safe haven, free of the chaos and manipulation in the stock market.

| |
---
---
# Elon Musk Warns of America’s $36 Trillion Dollar Debt Bomb
# The system is crumbling, protect your wealth or suffer the fallout.
---
Elon Musk has avoided two major financial crises before. He pulled Tesla and SpaceX back from the brink of collapse and built two of the most valuable companies in history.

Now, he’s sounding the alarm about America’s $36 trillion debt time bomb that could destroy the fabric of our society.

As head of the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) under President Trump, Musk is exposing just how bad things are:

✅ Runaway government spending has pushed national debt to unsustainable levels
✅ The Federal Reserve’s rate hikes are squeezing the economy, making inflation irreversible
✅ The stock market is on shaky ground, putting traditional 401(k)s, IRAs, and TSPs at risk

With Trump back in charge, major spending cuts are coming. While necessary, these cuts may send shockwaves through Wall Street, creating unpredictable market turbulence.

That’s why financial elites aren’t waiting to react, they're moving their wealth now.

For the everyday American who’s worked hard to build their nest egg, Trump preserved a IRS loophole that allows you to protect your retirement savings before billions in American wealth are lost.
