**Good Morning!** On this day in 1955, [Ray Kroc opened his first McDonald's](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyUUT2v2zAM_DXyZkOiJX8MHoIG3tIuBToatEQ_q5AtQ9JL4qW_vYgaoPNbeAfe4UiCv27TDa2z-8d33GhIi58SPg2eSyCaLUX_mYz3gZ4-TsBBlVyWQk0GrTsnWZhhIQKqCxpEK2UrhOKqWIdZK9VQ3xG0smv5Ms-SdN8gim7uul4XdnilcSmU4FxxqBogAa1peYMGJSGTnIxNPlS_vd3TSos7_Z1Cpf1WuGFN6YisvjAYGYzah8MHTFRt2vgdnYkv31vZtGEw-s9Qar8duJ8MxsfqyweVGOgtrTYmH85qTZtjULP68ofVl0TPxOqr6JVioIC_yjWznytlHG2IKbObvubRDNqYGz8O2iODb_8tBs-MER398-QF3sGybppKQFWEwRwP65yNTcsk_9jQunx3-vqH7gP8DQAA__82y5j2) in Des Plaines, Illinois, featuring the now-iconic red-and-white tiled building and Golden Arches. The new restaurant's first day sales: $366.12. Let’s face it: Tax Day is rarely anyone’s favorite holiday. It’s like the Monday of financial obligations—inevitable, stressful, and best handled with snacks. Luckily, at least [free food can soften the blow](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyU0DGO6yAQxvHT4M4WDGDiguJJT2yVbbe0sBkSVsQTGZLYt1850h5g6780-s33dR7PPuW0XD79DW2NNFa_Bb_HFXFKWOhRA9GKG5UROOiWq1boMfiU91E1wUZEQNmgFUYpI4TmurnaqDmPRqBUvZFm8Hia59NkhgkNDDDIJtnjGldCC841h64HFGCC4b0PXqFnimNIldbum9JSrxjzTk9cu5luTbbXWu-FyX8MHAPnp3nBV-kudGQG7uN8FEcUGLjqtzb4vX37I1Fof79rQyozPZZaGLhSad2ZdCkw-V8AN8MhbFYb7q-Ucyq9YYpfbj7lN6L-fa6nhZ8AAAD__0AMdvI). Read more below. Later today, _The Flyover_ will send you a special message from our sponsor [Brad's Deals](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyUkbGu3CAQRb8Gd6wAg9ktXERauXtpU1pjM_aSgMcB_Pycr4-8WSn1lhxG947O_PjoP8AHv8zfIWJbJuoLfDk4poQ4eMy0FUeU8Ityr4QyXGguTe_Ah6PXlWsnRIV1ha20WlspjTDVo23k1Vp9U0bfjARZOzsYiTCJ6_VmrspWvj3ThJZGCmGEujQKpbLOigYcaASmBTpfKF1-kl_KA6dw0Cemy0ixCu2jlDWz-htTHVPdvu-XIYHLDiHkc4Spbgg0M9VJwSHCH1r4mnxEPuCCky-ZH7TxCAdfqPBfC-0cBtoKq7utxD7TlkZk9f1_M3cFmGrO34jOb5HVd-fzGuB44RHiCn5eWH1_s_WfVn46YaoZe--eGbfnE8bffSQH4VwnbfhCD0huhoIvWqXWrbsPwefGMi3mCD48bZX37_rZqr8BAAD__-zCs74), packed with tips to help you unlock the full potential of your Amazon Prime membership. ## Tax Day 2025: Deadlines, Dollars, and Deals
Today is tax filing day, but the IRS has extended the deadline for at least nine states impacted by recent natural disasters: Alabama, Florida, Georgia, North Carolina, South Carolina, Alaska, New Mexico, Tennessee, and Virginia. [See your deadline here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyUkLFuwyAQQL_G3rAODKYZGLpkS9eOFvEd8bXERECD_fdV-gfdn96T3udlvniOvN0-_J1cDWmufkd_hEx0ZSrpp2JKmfZUZgXKCNBCmhk9x2PWPbpApGjsyUmrtZXSgOlXFwDJGhzHsMBVTkEq_bYsegoYlhNp27N72UBLIwEMqGFSJJVFC5NHr8l3Ggi5pjx8Jd7qSiEe6Ul5WNK9j26t9VG68b1T506dW2vDRq00ou8X0Kkz5yL8I3MU0ojqd4HkMfJGgvZKGxKKkyjVVyqirYdQYE4jyD47fDSOkctkOw23u-f416z_v_N06jcAAP__dSx0Xw). The top 1% of U.S. earners paid 40% of all federal income taxes in 2022. Meanwhile, the bottom 50% of earners—nearly 77 million people—contributed just 3%. [See a chart here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyUkLGSpCAQQL8GMyxoQe8CgkvM5tINrR5oh95FsQTH8e-3Zv9g81evXr2P23RDTrw-_uNCrs55qvgKeM070Z2p5KOGnHd65TKBAiuVkdpOATldk2mCm4mAuoacHowZtLbKNtF1poPQA_Uwd_avUf1Md2MwdOCV_uN9w-5tU0ZbrZRV0PZAGoYwqB4DGkJhFAWueW8_M6810pyu_KS99Xlpkou1bkV0_wSMAsbzPNsnlwOTx40rJi71DQoYYz7lcvgoQ6YiCX2UhyzyJEw1yvuO_ouq3PCSvEpefV5IVnxRETA2uwvbySlx6Qdh1GNBTj8B9ferng6-AwAA__96VXn2). For readers who need a break after filing, plenty of restaurants are offering Tax Day freebies—from 1-cent burgers at Burger King to free pastries at Paris Baguette. See [a list of freebies here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyU0DGO6yAQxvHT4M4WDGDiguJJT2yVbbe0sBkSVsQTGZLYt1850h5g6780-s33dR7PPuW0XD79DW2NNFa_Bb_HFXFKWOhRA9GKG5UROOiWq1boMfiU91E1wUZEQNmgFUYpI4TmurnaqDmPRqBUvZFm8Hia59NkhgkNDDDIJtnjGldCC841h64HFGCC4b0PXqFnimNIldbum9JSrxjzTk9cu5luTbbXWu-FyX8MHAPnp3nBV-kudGQG7uN8FEcUGLjqtzb4vX37I1Fof79rQyozPZZaGLhSad2ZdCkw-V8AN8MhbFYb7q-Ucyq9YYpfbj7lN6L-fa6nhZ8AAAD__0AMdvI).
## Trump Moves to Defund NPR, PBS, USAID
The Trump administration on Monday unveiled a $9.3 billion rescission plan that seeks to [eliminate all federal funding for NPR and PBS](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyU0DHOozAQBeDTmG4i2zEQChfb0GXbLdFgj8Erx4OwScLtV-wN_maa0fv09P48pyfGFPPyG19ka-Cp4tfjGXaiOVLho3rmnb5cJi11C9KAaiePMZ2TabwNRJruDVnVG9Mr1cq2WW2YA-nu4cIdlRrUMAxSPgZnBid1Z6Rqor00aVSrpGylvnWalO59Lzv0aAiFkeRj5f32l2OuK4V08pv2m-NXk-xa61bE_ZfQo9BjPjcu9XoJPV6w0KM0Qo_qOkeBTJ8i9PhZYyVY-SgEhbIv4DgvO5UCW8IMlQG_gCnBdswpOph3Ru-w1JgXCMeVwOzBsY_hBM8LAUYP7qgX3-zWb5-YUixdL4xcXhjT_8L159O-rf4XAAD__8QjiH0), as well as cut billions from USAID. Funding reductions include $1 billion for public media and $8 billion for USAID and State Department programs that the administration says conflict with its priorities. The proposal, shaped with input from Elon Musk’s Department of Government Efficiency, cites political bias and wasteful spending, including funding for Iraqi _Sesame Street_ , electric buses in Rwanda, and PBS programming featuring transgender characters. The request is expected to face a vote when lawmakers [return from recess on April 28](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyUkLtuwzAMAL9G3hxItBQ7g4Yu3tK1o0FbdMRWNgNJef19kf5B5wPugPs6T2fkxPvlEzfydZWp4jPga81EM1ORWw0imZ5SJtDgWm1b46aAnF6TbYJfiYC6hrzpre2Ncdo10S-OBpgtwalzaNzQoZ71amfCVcOAp4b926atcUZrp-FwBDLQh14fMaAlVFZT4Cr58C2810hresmd8mGRrUk-1notqvtQMCoYa6TIKb2ZgjHKRjs9ioIRw8Y7l5qxsuwKRgd2sHZoH5ErtVFuhdpMZeFSWPb2issPXkjB2GQfrg9OicuxV1ZfNuS_QFP_v-nu4TcAAP__U8J3ug). The plan was formally sent to Congress on Monday, triggering a 45-day approval window.

_(Editor's Note: Just a reminder that The Flyover takes no public funding and delivers free, unbiased news to millions of readers every day.)_
## First All-Female Spaceflight Returns Safely
Blue Origin successfully launched its [first all-female crew into space](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyUkL1uwyAYAJ8Gb1h8GEwyMFSqvKVLVXW0MHw4X4NNhMmP375K36DzSafTfZ_Gk6NE6_zhFrQ15rG6Z3B7LIgT4ZZvNeRc8Jm3UQqpuVAc9BgcpX1UTbARUWLXoAWjlAHQQjdnGzswWh1cD2B0f9Qihil4iBNMxzihb8i-bEKBBiG0kG0vEaQJRvQuOIWOKYGBai7tT6a1njGmPd-xtD4vTbLnWq8b696YHJgc3ORXfGztnF-YyeHrk8lhSjfkudBMKy_ZX7DyiItLyH3BB6fVp1ugdeYXV3d-xVJ2Joet5rKzbqDAuneQwpgjHExTbLg-KCXaesOUmBdH6a-l_v_a3crfAAAA__9W3HwR) Monday, with pop star Katy Perry and journalist Gayle King among the six-person team. The mission lasted about 11 minutes, reaching over 60 miles above Earth and briefly entering outer space. [Watch the launch here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyUz7GOqzAQheGnsbugmYkdXwoXt6HLtluiAY8TrwyOwAvh7VfsG2x3pCN90v957--ccpofHzyJr7H0ld-Bj7iIDEnW8l1DKYu8y9oTkL2AuaDtA6d89EYHH0VIrlo8OmMcogWrnz5I-w8hOoSxjWxdi5FwRMutGQDY6ORPDQxaBLBAzY0EyQUHNw5shJUBCamWpfkqaa5PifkomyzNWCad_bPW16qu_xV1irp935thGM9PUTfLvirqthSknGOcyGyzvF-PqejFh9eeck7rzSkDj4lT_jXr3-s3Tz8BAAD__90kaLs). The crew members, including Jeff Bezos’ fiancée Lauren Sanchez, former NASA scientists, and a filmmaker, described the journey as emotional and profound. Perry brought a daisy into space in honor of her 4-year-old daughter, Daisy, calling the experience a “supernatural” journey filled with love. [See photos here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyU0LGOnjAQBOCnMd3-Wvs3OClcpKG7tCnRghfYnH8b2ebuyNNH5A3STDPSp9H8epveSKKk7Se92Lc1T42-Al1rYZ6Faz5byLnwV66TQdMDWtD9FEjiNdku-JXZ8LNjr521Tuse-273vJgBZ4czo_6mOSzf5-c8B3SO7BIQO_G3hlb3GrFH8xgMa-OCw4ECWSZlkYO0XB6_s6S28xqv_MHlseRXF_3e2lHV84cyozJjuo5c210pM96wMiNaZUZ9x1kh8WdVZlyl1AaHLBXyCu_ULji4lAsinYUTVErLzn-AUoCNrsjwLmkDSVAPWhhygjmeDLnIJgnWKNvelBm74sPxKTFKHZyyuL1I4r-l7f8__fDmbwAAAP__BKeGrg).

body:
And ROVAC Let It Happen

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/d72a2a9f0187/when-we-vote-we-win-14763038?e=8763c56857)

| | | | | “There’s a time and place for political rants—like Twitter, or a backyard barbecue. Not a mandatory government training with 200 civil servants in folding chairs. Knowing the difference isn’t just basic etiquette—it’s what separates leadership from a meltdown.”\- Dominic Rapini
---
|
---
| **# RESIST Meets Connecticut Elections**
---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=49f2f8d862&e=8763c56857)
---
|
---
| **Opinion | Patisan Meltdown**
**Opinion | Stephanie Thomas’ Partisan Meltdown Was a Disgrace—And ROVAC Let It Happen**
**By Dominic Rapini, ’22 GOP candidate for Secretary of the State, Election Moderator**
The**job of a Registrar of Voters in Connecticut is, by design, nonpartisan**. It’s not glamorous, it’s not highly paid, and for many, it’s not even full-time. These are hardworking public servants—some even volunteers—tasked with safeguarding the most sacred function in a democracy: the vote. They don’t ask for much. A little respect, some professional development, a chance to do their jobs well. What they got last week was a political ambush disguised as a training conference.
At the semi-annual ROVAC (Registrar of Voters Association of Connecticut) conference—a forum meant to be strictly nonpartisan—the state’s top elections official, Secretary of the State Stephanie Thomas, used her platform not to educate or inform but to deliver a campaign-style screed dripping with partisan venom. According to multiple attendees,**Thomas veered into outright insult, reportedly referring to President Trump as the “General of the SS”—a not-so-subtle Nazi reference** aimed at half the room, which consisted of Republican Registrars of Voters.
This wasn’t a slip of the tongue. It was deliberate. Inflammatory. Divisive. And deeply inappropriate.
What’s worse is the context. This wasn’t a political rally. It was a professional event—one many **Registrars were required to attend** to maintain certification. Instead of guidance, they were treated to an ideological lecture that mocked their beliefs, distorted facts, and accused them—implicitly and sometimes directly—of undermining democracy simply for holding different political views.
One attendee put it bluntly:**“She stood in front of people who just want to do their jobs and effectively called them ‘Nazis’.”**
Others walked out. Some sat in stunned silence. Some, out of disbelief, asked if anyone had recorded her. The answer: yes—and that footage is already circulating.As if that wasn’t enough, Secretary Thomas leaned into fear-mongering around voter eligibility.**She claimed, falsely, that married women could be prevented from voting if their ID didn’t exactly match their voter record.**
**One outraged Registrar responded:**_“The married woman can’t vote thing boils my blood! Any person who has changed their name and holds a driver’s license (Real ID or otherwise) knows perfectly well how to verify their name. Stephanie knows how that works. She’s making a choice to scare and confuse women by weaponizing their gender for political gain. It’s unbelievably disgusting. These women trust her, and she’s exploiting that fear. She KNOWS she’s spreading false fear—and she doesn’t care. What kind of person does that?”_
This is what passed for “training” at a state-run conference. Facts optional. Smears encouraged.
Thomas’ address wasn’t just offensive—it exposed a fundamental misunderstanding of her role. The Secretary of the State is not a political influencer. She is a **constitutional officer sworn to serve all voters and all election officials** —regardless of party. But her speech made one thing crystal clear: neutrality is not on her agenda. She also**dismissed commonsense election safeguards like voter ID** and citizenship verification. Never mind that about 80% of Americans, across party lines, support requiring government-issued ID to vote and believe only U.S. citizens should be allowed to cast ballots.
Instead of listening to the public, Secretary Thomas—like so many progressive ideologues—refuses to even acknowledge the growing evidence of noncitizens being registered and voting. In our own debate, she went as far as to suggest that some voter fraud is acceptable.
Let me be clear: it’s not.
**States like Arizona are finally taking action. Following a lawsuit from America First Legal, Arizona counties are now working with the Department of Homeland Security to remove nearly 50,000 registrants lacking proof of citizenship. They’re checking their rolls monthly, as the law requires.**
And in Connecticut?
**We rely on a checkbox.** No documentation. No verification. Just hope and good faith. Suggest adding any proof, and you’re labeled a “fascist.” **Or the favorite insult these days—a “racist.”**
That’s the atmosphere Secretary Thomas is promoting: where legitimate concerns about election integrity are mocked, and the very officials working to protect the system are smeared.
The Registrars in that room didn’t come to fight culture wars. They came to learn, to improve the process, to better serve all voters. These are civic-minded professionals—part-time, underpaid, and often underappreciated—who believe in the process. Who believe in showing up, doing the work, and keeping politics out of the polling place.And what did they get? Accusations. Insults. Smirking contempt from the state’s top election official.
**And the institution meant to protect them—ROVAC—sat on its hands.** No pushback. No correction. No apology. The very organization that claims to represent Connecticut’s Registrars failed to defend them when it mattered most.Secretary Thomas wasn’t just out of line—she was a disgrace to her office. If she wants to go back to activism, she’s welcome to it. But**if she intends to hold constitutional office, she needs to act like it—and that means respecting all voters, all election officials, and the nonpartisan traditions that keep our democracy functioning.**
**She owes every Registrar in that room an apology.**
But more than that, she owes it to the people of Connecticut to get on board with the **SAVE Act,** clean up our voter rolls, verify citizenship at registration, and finally do the job the state Constitution mandates her to do: ensure free, fair, and trustworthy elections for everyone. **Not just the voters who agree with her politics.** And ROVAC? **They owe their members a backbone.**

* * *

---
|

Would you be willing to _**[send in 10 or 20 bucks](https://links.house-republicans.org/r?u=-KKwfzWl7oK4gNPooZXuJ4Zn2xET82xeGk9Y43EVmFJg5YcipVNCUJjHbhMN4qxjG_j0VS3NJ8-gYTOxBdVs6g_nTs_BSSTDbpP3SbdWJ9gteKnEDMAz58fUHDgOOZz82Z9DMYI7LbEJ8f4A4M6WFttkrZatPb2Plu7lILHEakWprhBXiSpxJeV4rortdDw3PJelX5Rx78tafqOYbJKSlX6so_QdwkYo05Q3vfhssGrGNn-AG1EPKqvAm2sSozYU2TvfZ0YzP84MStFfV-L_0NxxHyEXMNk3elbxBJtfAvs&e=998fa18fd50048d580e64d9cd10dc33f&utm_source=hdscalise&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_f4f3648b6881ec494644f82db7a&n=3 "send in 10 or 20 bucks")**_ instead?

**Good Morning!** On this day in 1825, Haden Edwards, Green DeWitt, and Robert Leftwich [received contracts from the government of Mexico](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyc0LGyqyAUheGngU4HdjYhFBS3scttT-mA7ERmUBwgMb79GfMIp_qr9RXr5z7eXUxxff53C9n2eeSxvjYqU162V6NS57wQfbaUaxxBgOoEdlKNwcV0jMiD9SIYyclKjagl3q7AZysNav-YwAWc9E0i3IyfLgTGeHk1wvFoT0ygVFIKoUxPoIXyQWDwoKUKDAWF2HLp20yNPq4-0pHfVPopLzzZubWtsss_BgODYd_3vtXZ5TXFlfpcngyG76oL7uj8cYbBQGsrZy9K8GLDtseUYr1qhuK5uJi-ePvDD28LvwEAAP__p0lsrg) to colonize areas near Nacogdoches and along the Guadalupe and Navasota rivers. AI tech giant Nvidia announced yesterday it will build two supercomputer plants in Texas, fueling the state's reputation as a leader in the artificial intelligence boom. Check out [the story](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyckLHOozAQhJ_GdEa2swRSuLiGLtdeidb2ElayMcJOSN7-RLq__ZtpRvo-zfy7T3fkyOvjLyay9T3nqTw32n1O27PSXpaciN5bzIUno0wnFUjdTQE5fiZognUq3HRDVvcAvYbhaprFYjCk_c17gN7NenA4OH1xYfCIiDA3bE-YAt1prVR3a8n0qnNBQXCm110QoChwzXtbF6r0xjLHT37R3vqcmmiXWrciLn-EGYUZj-No_er8WQoznmxhRgXCjPqM9cWBUdYsE5Yitz2HpyeJLH-ulbzKr6xdaorNbsN2cIxcrr0A9UjI8euvv7jqZc3_AAAA__8F3HnH) in today's _Roundup_ section. ## Nvidia Building Supercomputer Plants in Texas
California-based tech company Nvidia plans to [build two supercomputer plants](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyckLHOozAQhJ_GdEa2swRSuLiGLtdeidb2ElayMcJOSN7-RLq__ZtpRvo-zfy7T3fkyOvjLyay9T3nqTw32n1O27PSXpaciN5bzIUno0wnFUjdTQE5fiZognUq3HRDVvcAvYbhaprFYjCk_c17gN7NenA4OH1xYfCIiDA3bE-YAt1prVR3a8n0qnNBQXCm110QoChwzXtbF6r0xjLHT37R3vqcmmiXWrciLn-EGYUZj-No_er8WQoznmxhRgXCjPqM9cWBUdYsE5Yitz2HpyeJLH-ulbzKr6xdaorNbsN2cIxcrr0A9UjI8euvv7jqZc3_AAAA__8F3HnH) in Houston and Dallas as part of a broader $500 billion effort to develop AI infrastructure in the U.S. over the next four years. The Houston plant will be constructed in partnership with iPhone supplier Foxconn, and the Dallas plant is being built with Taiwanese electronics manufacturer Wistron. Together with supplier-owned [chip fabrication plants in Arizona](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyckL2OozAURp8GOiPbsfFSuNiGLttuiQy-hKv4B_maQN5-lOmmnf7Tp3PO__t0dxgwPf65CLZea57o2KEsOe5HhUJbjgDXHjLhJLnUjCsm9OQdhvekWm9n7gfRghVGKSPUn162m_W9UkI7J6DXEuZZgxfDDZabX40ZfN-i_ZxxJbQQnOuhA2m4nj1XfpZGaN8oDh5rLl3doMLlaA3v_ILSLTm2wW617tTc_jZybOR4nme35ms-CBMQfTaNHKMrT6jUyDG90KNjLqV8pAWI7cElYtE9gTlkP5XZQWzFQpVVjNAW6_cTQ0DqTaP4IzoM3xD1F71eVn4FAAD__5-hfkc), Nvidia will commission "more than a million square feet of manufacturing space” for the initiative. The move will enable Nvidia to avoid tariffs on imported chips and marks the first time the company will build AI supercomputers entirely in the U.S. Mass production at both facilities is expected to begin [within the next 12 to 15 months](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyckLuO3DAMRb9G7jiQtJK1LlQMArjKpgqQ0pBH9FqIXtFjPP77wNulTUte8uDcXx_Lh3Hexc8fJqBury0ttWcsjxRyb1jqngLiK_tU3cIpl0AFMLlY4_y5iMHqldqJDaiZEkIx8T7yYdd2km9stJyNalNitRxHaxgz47vaJqnM4PT1jAomGaNUTjfkisrVUmFXrpi0RFC0rqVyazs2fJm6-TM9sdweKQxe763lSt7uhM-Ez8dx3EKN147wGSP0SvgcUsST8Dm1HQvhc3w66wy0BMH8RjAO_nUFF-ELBdmbWKHnKysphdV571K8Ar1CLsn2R7sGh2u7i7ClXuBEUy6sKXC_s28__3zvQ9E2H9dxHRUR9DMY578M2n-U_dT8bwAAAP__PNqRig). Nvidia founder and CEO Jensen Huang reportedly [struck a deal](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyc0DGO6yAUheHV4M7W5RpCXFC8xl1eO6UF5iYgYYMAx8nuR8kSpj7Sd6T_57bcTIhhf_w3G-n2uqelHpnKmrZ8NCrVp43olWOqYUFA2YPouVycCfG9iM5pC27iHWmuhFBcXC_YeU2Sj5NU99Gqi7I4XmF1Eo2V0yhHvGIX9AcDwSXnAHIaCBVI60A4i4pLxwSQCy2VoXlq9DL1Ht_pSWVY09ZF7VvLlY3_GM4M5_M8h9WXtH9WhrM9atipVoazKS2skRjO-zO4YPov1vt01Jb2HgGVBOBD9rkr2uUzxBjqRTEBj82E-P1rf0jz1PgbAAD__2d8crk) with President Trump to allow exports of its H2O chips from China in exchange for investing in U.S.-based AI infrastructure.
## Home Explodes in Austin
A two-story house in a Northwest Austin neighborhood [exploded Sunday morning](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyckLFuwyAYhJ8Gb7bgD4R4YOjiLV07Wr_N7xgJAwISO29fue0TdDvpTqf77us-3tF5Fx6fuJGpxxLH8kyU57ilZ6Vc1rgRHcnH4kbgoFouW6FGi86_R9lYM3Hbi4aM0FJqIW9XaFYz37DXt6tFWC5CASqlZwVIU4_aYn9pnDnLuBRKCM5V3xForibLpZ1AC2WZ5GRdjbmrK1U6sCz-HV-UuzlujTdrramwyweDgcGw73u3vQsGDDUGF88QgyHQXhgM-CzVhVPk6mZPDIaCGduFvDvaX7c9Qds_0hha4KClln2X1tRkY9PuvHflqpnkjw2d_9lR_3HZy8B3AAAA___1o3zL), injuring six people and damaging at least 24 homes, two of which were deemed “uninhabitable.” A nearby elementary school was also damaged. Officials performed "advanced extrication efforts” to [remove several people from the debris](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyckLGurCAYhJ8GOwwgiBYUt7Hb297S_MjPSi6KAVx33_7Ek_MEp5xMZjLz_XvMDwgx7M-_sKGpb5_mch6Yl7QdZ8Vc1rQhvo-YSpgFE4oySbmaHYT4mWXjjGVu5A0arqXUXA69aFbDADQHZ4XthbeegVZKKd4r9AolQBPMXcYkV5wzpsYWhWbKOiadFZorRyRDF2rKbV2x4huKj5_0wtwuaWuiWWs9Cun-EDERMV3X1f5_nXibREyQa1giEjHteBUippgWiLdMua4XlkrhLDXstNR8LvXMSH3ISH-epp1mPFKud1b0I0XluZNioP2Aksqu6-iAXtNRdcNgWWcHgCYbd1whxlB6TSR7bhDi99r6C7AvI74CAAD__9Dzh8g). The cause of the explosion has not been determined, but no criminal charges are expected; the home does not have gas service, but it did have propane tanks. The blast damaged power lines in the area, causing a temporary outage. The Red Cross is providing assistance to those displaced. See [videos and photos](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyckLGO6yAURL8GOhAQMElB8Rp3ee2WFjbX8dWCsQDbyd-vssoXbDvFzJzzdR_uHiOuj_8-gWvPOQ9136BMOW17g1KXnACeW8wVByWUYUIzaYbgMb4GTYMbRbhJCk5ara3U107Rxc3K3tQ4GQimG62U4DuYL16LYIWH7krRvcuElkZKIcyNg7LCjEHoMCorTSBaQMCWC28LNHj6OsdXPqDwKSca3dLaVsnlH1E9Uf15nvz3UvIY-ZT5_k1Uv8JZiep9aThFYFJ3Uih5eUd7bbiyJe8V2AcvryyfK5TK6l4OPIAdGCDzpaVIiwvbiTFi7SzR4vHZSbT9Qdrh1E8AAAD__-vEfgg) of the damage here. The explosion was heard up to 20 miles away. "_I was just walking around my house, and all of a sudden the house shook and I heard a boom_ ," [said a resident](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyckL2SgyAURp8GOxwgIFpQbGOXbbd0UC6RGQSHS6J5-x2zb7D99zPn_Nynuw0xpMe33cDU0-cJnzuUJW_7s0LBNW8A5x4zhkkwoSiTlKvJ2RDfk2ycmZkbeAOGayk1l30nmtUsenB-6XuvbsrpWWk_yK5ztvNsVnrpm2CuMSa54pwxNbQgNFOzY9LNQnPliGTgQs2lrStUOC36-M4vKO2StyaatdYdye2LiJGI8TiO1udT2yfWkK4IEWOCA4kYBcWay5teJPSD4gBpyqWuB2Clfx2aE9AdCuZEQ8LgoCnG7UeIMWCniWSPzYb4ea__EPUy4jcAAP__0aV7Fg) whose home was damaged. "_It sounded like a tree limb had fallen on our roof_."
## All-Female Space Flight Launches from Texas
A Blue Origin rocket that launched from Van Horn on Monday [carried six women to the edge of space](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyckLFuwyAURb_G3l7EI2DXA0OXbOna0cLwsFGwQYCTuF9fuZ_Q7V5d6erofN_Hu_bBb_OXXknVt4tj2RNlE9e0V8pliSvRO4VY_MgZl8AEoByt9uEYRWvVxOyALSnshehRfHS8XZRjTKDhbJqkwys6Qms6OeDgHB-o61qvzjMmUCIyJocL8Z7JyTJhJ96jtI1gZH2N-VIXqvTWxYUjPilfTFzboJZaU2munw2_NfyWKKZA59Tw2xR2gpj97DdwtOpAYDK9IOh9MwuVM2TaoOiz_sBD1wMS5XyA3izM-ggED7_NUCOUpA0BYo-cM9FmZdPLh-BL1zeCzav24Y-o_kPeU_HfAAAA___cGIBg) and back during an 11-minute autonomous flight—the first since 1963 to boast an all-female crew. The [passengers included](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyckLGupCAUQL9GOwwwqGNBsY3dbLulAbnqzSAQuI7695t5n_Dqk5ycnH-v6WXQY1j_mh00XUucypEgz3FPB0EuW9wBruRjwUly2TKumGgnZ9Dfk6qdttwNogYteqV6oZ6drDc9O7d08JDS9JbbDoQyfHACnqYbuFCyRv2VcSVaIThvhwZkz1vruHJW9qJ1leLgkGJuaAOCy5TF3_EDuZnjXnu9EaVSPf5UcqzkeJ5ns8QrwFm-vJIjBIJMBsMOgSo5vg3dLEHON7MZzLswF8_AzEKQmfUHsJhxxcC8CQ7Dyt5YChS25ngEx1IsxDDMGRxaD4wyJlaSmaHO2qUTvcfS9ZXi627Q_0TSL35-tPwfAAD__yAQih0) journalist and Blue Origin founder Jeff Bezos’s fiancée Lauren Sanchez, pop singer Katy Perry, _CBS Mornings_ co-host Gayle King, former NASA rocket scientist Aisha Bowe, film producer Kerianne Flynn, and civil rights activist and research scientist Amanda Nguyen. Bezos was [joined by celebrities](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyc0D2upDAQBODTQNbINuZnAgebTPY23RA1uMHWa2xke4ZhT79ij_Di0lcq1Z-v6Qs9-7D9xp1M-axxyq-D0hL341UoZRd3os_BMftJCdWB0CC7yaLna9K1NbOwD1mTkYPWg9Rjr2pn1LJYawWt49qODykGhWocRiLdy1n0fe3NXSa07KQUons0pAbRzVZoO6tBdrbSgqwvMTXFUaEP5pWv-KbULHGv2bhSjly1vyr1rNTzPM_mQhfjnVbqGejMlXrO_CKIyW8-ZEBmWGlHJljZb64A4yssjjKUCGQ3grhCPnAhOH1xsOHFBN8-bPCN5YKDUroAg71hogAZb_4XYoA5YrIgWyXbdlBd48rOdTL2OD2zz_1QabHt6Pn__PKDp99G_QsAAP__H1iQoQ) Oprah Winfrey, Kris Jenner, and Khloé Kardashian in the crowd of onlookers. It was the 11th human space flight for Blue Origin’s New Shepard program. Perry sang “What a Wonderful World” during the flight, saying she felt “super connected to love” after landing. “ _It’s about a collective energy in there. clean_body: California-based tech company Nvidia plans to build two supercomputer plants in Houston and Dallas as part of a broader $500 billion effort to develop AI infrastructure in the U.S. over the next four years. | | | | | | Tuesday, April 15, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1825, Haden Edwards, Green DeWitt, and Robert Leftwich to colonize areas near Nacogdoches and along the Guadalupe and Navasota rivers. AI tech giant Nvidia announced yesterday it will build two supercomputer plants in Texas, fueling the state's reputation as a leader in the artificial intelligence boom. Check out in today's Roundup section. Later today, The Flyover will send you a special message from our sponsor , packed with tips to help you unlock the full potential of your Amazon Prime membership. Today's sponsor is , offering a pre-IPO investment opportunity to The Flyover readers. Abilene 🌦️ 76/53° | Amarillo ⛅ 70/44° | Austin ☁️ 80/62° | Brownsville ⛅ 85/68° | Corpus Christi 🌦️ 82/68° | DFW ⛅ 76/58° | El Paso ☀️ 83/60° | Houston 🌩️ 81/65° | Laredo ☁️ 89/66° | Lubbock 🌥️ 72/52° | Midland 🌥️ 74/56° | San Antonio ☁️ 82/65° | Tyler ⛅ 78/57° | Waco ⛅ 77/60° | Nvidia Building Supercomputer Plants in Texas California-based tech company Nvidia plans to in Houston and Dallas as part of a broader $500 billion effort to develop AI infrastructure in the U.S. over the next four years. The Houston plant will be constructed in partnership with iPhone supplier Foxconn, and the Dallas plant is being built with Taiwanese electronics manufacturer Wistron. Together with supplier-owned , Nvidia will commission "more than a million square feet of manufacturing space” for the initiative. The move will enable Nvidia to avoid tariffs on imported chips and marks the first time the company will build AI supercomputers entirely in the U.S. Mass production at both facilities is expected to begin . Nvidia founder and CEO Jensen Huang reportedly with President Trump to allow exports of its H2O chips from China in exchange for investing in U.S.-based AI infrastructure. Home Explodes in Austin A two-story house in a Northwest Austin neighborhood , injuring six people and damaging at least 24 homes, two of which were deemed “uninhabitable.” A nearby elementary school was also damaged. Officials performed "advanced extrication efforts” to . The cause of the explosion has not been determined, but no criminal charges are expected; the home does not have gas service, but it did have propane tanks. The blast damaged power lines in the area, causing a temporary outage. The Red Cross is providing assistance to those displaced. See of the damage here. The explosion was heard up to 20 miles away. "I was just walking around my house, and all of a sudden the house shook and I heard a boom ," whose home was damaged. "It sounded like a tree limb had fallen on our roof." All-Female Space Flight Launches from Texas A Blue Origin rocket that launched from Van Horn on Monday and back during an 11-minute autonomous flight—the first since 1963 to boast an all-female crew. The journalist and Blue Origin founder Jeff Bezos’s fiancée Lauren Sanchez, pop singer Katy Perry, CBS Mornings co-host Gayle King, former NASA rocket scientist Aisha Bowe, film producer Kerianne Flynn, and civil rights activist and research scientist Amanda Nguyen. Bezos was Oprah Winfrey, Kris Jenner, and Khloé Kardashian in the crowd of onlookers. It was the 11th human space flight for Blue Origin’s New Shepard program. Perry sang “What a Wonderful World” during the flight, saying she felt “super connected to love” after landing. “ It’s about a collective energy in there. It’s about us ,” . | Flying together with our sponsor Meet the Founder That’s Revolutionizing Smartphones A black turtleneck, a game-changing product, and an industry-shifting vision. But no, it’s not Steve Jobs. Meet Dan Novaes, the visionary behind Mode Mobile—the company redefining smartphones. Mode’s revolutionary EarnPhone transforms phones into income streams, and generating over $60M in revenue from 45M+ users. And Dan has no plans of letting up now, recently reserving the Nasdaq ticker $MODE with the goal of taking the company public. But the real opportunity is now. . | ➤ Corpus Christi: The Murrow Energy gas plant at the Cefe Valenzuela landfill generated $4.6 million in profit during its first year, significantly more than the $1 million projected. The site’s profitability will enable the city to slow the rise of trash fees. () ➤ Frisco: A judge reduced the bond for 17-year-old Karmelo Anthony from $1 million to $250,000. Anthony is accused of fatally stabbing another student at a track meet earlier this month. The family has received more than $400,000 for legal expenses from an online fundraiser. () ➤ Houston: The law firm Susman Godfrey sued the Trump administration on Friday, alleging that an executive order stripping the firm’s lawyers of security clearances is unconstitutional. () ➤ Tyler: State Rep. Jay Dean (R-Longview) claimed the North Texas Water District Board has abandoned a plan to purchase water from Lake O’ the Pines. The district said, “ We continue to believe a future agreement for the sale of water could make sense.” () ➤ Collin County: U.S. Sen. John Cornyn has asked the Department of Justice to investigate the planned EPIC City Muslim-focused community over concerns about potential discrimination against Jewish and Christian Texans. The community is the subject of at least five probes. () ➤ Big Spring: The Texas Department of Public Safety unveiled a sign designating a portion of I-20 as the "Trooper Troy Hogue Memorial Highway.” Hogue was shot and killed while on duty on December 30, 1994. name: Maisy Deans, Evergreen
subject: Tell Congress: Save clean energy programs that save us money
disclaimer_text: paid for by Evergreen Action
body:
Use our script and start making some calls 📞
| | | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3490765/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
---
| Friend—

On this Tax Day, we’re thinking about how millions of Americans were able to claim billions of dollars in residential clean energy tax credits last year—a huge win for our climate, our health, and our wallets.

But we’re also thinking about how **Republicans are actively trying to gut these popular credits and other clean energy investments** made possible by the Inflation Reduction Act (IRA). They’re likely to try just as soon as Congress is back in session later this month.

Lena and I have been meeting with members of Congress on the importance of protecting IRA programs, and now is a critical moment for constituents like you to weigh in too by making a quick phone call. **Check out our message below to hear why,**[**then start making some calls—we’ve made it extra easy to connect with their offices, and have even provided a sample script for you to use!**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3490766/87SdQ4wZ) |
[](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3490767/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| And hey, I know that picking up the phone isn’t always easy. But the extra effort—even if you go right to voicemail—is what makes it **one of the best advocacy tools in your arsenal.**

Because every call to a congressional office is logged, counted, and reported. Because lawmakers know that public opinion influences their chances of getting re-elected.

Right now, every Republican needs to feel the heat for planning to repeal these historic investments and the hundreds of thousands of local jobs that come along with them. And every Democrat needs to hear the importance of these programs too, so that they’ll keep fighting for them. |
---
[CALL YOUR MEMBERS OF CONGRESS](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3490768/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Thanks for all that you do. |
---
| | |
---
### Maisy Deans
Senior Government Affairs Advocate
Evergreen Action
---
---
* * *
---
| _Evergreen is building the ambitious, actionable policy roadmap for an all-out mobilization to defeat climate change—and to create millions of jobs in a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future. None of this would be possible without your support._ |

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 4/15/2025
body:
HB25-1312 and the silencing of parents: What the Rocky Mountain Summit revealed
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._5HJA/sfg03829e37)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._5HJA/s2ga76c9ef2)**
| | Hi everyone,
Listen to today's **Mountain Minute Podcast** [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._5HJA/sej3f6fa7ae), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._5HJA/s8tf5846156) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._5HJA/s4ld6f657b6)! Here is a summary of today's top stories:
**🏛️ Colorado Legislative Session Updates...** HB25-1312 is fueling parental outrage over vague language that could [penalize families for misgendering](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._5HJA/sfqe1e2e7e3), with critics calling it a state power grab. Rose Pugliese told Newsmax the law is sparking [bipartisan backlash](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._5HJA/s2kb89fc4f4) as parents unite to defend their rights.
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Faith-based schools in Colorado are proving that character-driven leadership [creates safer campuses](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._5HJA/s2j71799854) than public alternatives. Meanwhile, a [second reintroduced gray wolf has died](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._5HJA/scr1013ddea) in Wyoming, fueling criticism of the state’s wolf plan. And a federal audit found Colorado paid $7.3 million in [Medicaid benefits to the deceased](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._5HJA/ser8ed96de4)—prompting Rep. Gabe Evans to demand a crackdown on fraud and waste.
🗣️ **Commentary Spotlight...** Michael Hancock urges Christians to reengage in politics as a [biblical duty](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._5HJA/s5le404f03d). Meanwhile, Colorado’s energy boom is being driven by [private-sector innovation](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._5HJA/s7vd7f45e91)—not green mandates—with experts warning that overregulation could stall progress. Dr. Brian Joondeph warns that COVID-era lies and pharma politics have [shattered public trust in medicine](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._5HJA/s2ge8bff994).
This is the Mountain Minute for Tuesday, April 15, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[HB25-1312 and the silencing of parents: What the Rocky Mountain Summit revealed](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._5HJA/sbj4e61cf4a)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._5HJA/s2l1bf5c4fc)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._5HJA/sct16742261)
>From court-ordered gag rules to the looming threat of custody loss, this isn’t hypothetical — it’s happening now. Colorado families gathered at the Rocky Mountain Summit in early April to share what it means to raise children under a system that increasingly treats concern as abuse.
Held April 6 in Englewood, the event brought together medical professionals, whistleblowers and families.
Their message was clear: parents are being sidelined by courts, schools and legislation that favors affirm-only practices. And proposed legislation like HB25-1312 may take things further, redefining parental objection as emotional abuse under the law.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._5HJA/s4le8fc7433)**
|

The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._5HJA/s4p2472a22c)
|
---
**[Colorado taxpayers footed $7.3M bill for dead Medicaid enrollees, audit finds](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._5HJA/sbpcac40cf7)** [DENVER GAZETTE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._5HJA/sdlb73c3429)
* A federal audit found Colorado paid $7.3 million in Medicaid funds for deceased enrollees between 2018 and 2020 due to outdated reporting systems and delays.
* Although the state has recovered $2.34 million and improved its systems, officials admit the issue reflects broader systemic problems affecting Medicaid across the country.
* Rep. Gabe Evans called for stronger oversight, saying millions are being wasted that should be going to taxpayers and vulnerable populations who truly need care.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._5HJA/s7n212b62ad)**
|
---
**[House Minority Leader Pugliese: Parental rights transcend party lines](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._5HJA/s8l0dd3179a)** [NEWSMAX](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._5HJA/s0u37514e5c)
* Colorado House Minority Leader Rose Pugliese told Newsmax that recent legislation like HB25-1312 represents “coercive control” by the state and could result in parents losing custody for not affirming a child’s chosen gender identity.
* She warned that these laws are part of a broader effort by Democrats to replace parental authority with government control—an issue she says resonates across party lines.
* Pugliese emphasized that Coloradans of all political backgrounds are pushing back against what they see as dangerous government overreach into family life.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._5HJA/s5rcf39588f)**
|
---
**[Linnebur: Rural Colorado’s energy boom isn’t luck—it’s leadership](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._5HJA/sfs9fdcdb35)** [THE DAILY SENTINEL](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._5HJA/s6v373a169d)
* Colorado’s energy sector is booming thanks to a balanced, all-of-the-above strategy that supports oil, gas, wind, and solar—boosting rural economies and attracting major investment.
* Energy job growth continues statewide, with over 4,000 new jobs added between 2022–2023 and major projects like Pueblo’s CS Wind expansion expected to create hundreds more.
* Leaders like Reps. Gabe Evans and Jeff Hurd are championing this approach, linking Colorado’s energy diversity to national security, economic growth, and meeting future power demands.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._5HJA/s7q1da24a70)**
|

Some elected officials can't take a joke.

And unfortunately, they think they have the power to do something about it.

After the governor of California saw a video parody of a politician, he responded by saying the video should be "illegal." Then the California legislature fast-tracked and passed two bills, banning certain political speech.

_The Babylon Bee_ and other plaintiffs filed a lawsuit against California officials because the bills censor free speech and punish people for posting certain political content online, including political memes and parodies of politicians.

Where do you stand on the issue of free speech and humor?

name: Derek Lyons - RITE
subject: RITE FILES BRIEF WITH SUPREME COURT SUPPORTING OHIO’S RIGHT TO REGULATE ITS BALLOT INITIATIVE PROCESS
body:
Supporting Ohio’s efforts to uphold its law requiring that voters receive fair and truthful summaries of proposed ballot initiatives |
---
| |
---
| | **RITE FILES BRIEF WITH SUPREME COURT SUPPORTING OHIO’S RIGHT TO REGULATE ITS BALLOT INITIATIVE PROCESS**
(Washington, DC) – Restoring Integrity and Trust in Elections (RITE) has filed a [brief](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=7a0465b876&e=ea91f782ea) with the U.S. Supreme Court supporting Ohio’s efforts to uphold its law requiring that voters receive fair and truthful summaries of proposed ballot initiatives that amend the state constitution. Ohio sought an emergency stay application with the Supreme Court to pause an order that required Ohio to publish a ballot summary submitted by proponents of an initiative to abolish qualified immunity for police officers. Ohio argues that the summary, which specifically purports to “protect Ohioans’ constitutional rights,” is misleading.

Ohio is appealing a district court ruling that held the state’s law requiring initiative summaries be “fair and truthful” violated the First Amendment. RITE’s brief explains that ruling was wrong, noting that the initiative process is a form of lawmaking—not private speech—and therefore not subject to the First Amendment’s free speech clause. RITE also challenges the lower court’s use of the Anderson-Burdick standard, which typically applies to laws regulating voting, not legislating.

“Liberal activists frequently use deceptive summaries and titles to try and trick the public about the true effect of ballot initiatives, including those that weaken election integrity,” said RITE spokesman Tim Murtaugh. “States have a strong interest in regulating legislation enacted through ballot initiatives. The Supreme Court should act to preserve Ohio’s commonsense protections and uphold public trust.” ###
---

name: NDRC
subject: What Ohio’s map redraw could mean for the 2026 midterms
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
What happens could affect the whole country
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105847727/539606922/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkzYzJhMWRkLWYxMTktZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Jsem2R_qBH6qE-tB1tlKIlAwzeN98N2TfITF4KPKqo8=&emci=38b206b9-4d19-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=93c2a1dd-f119-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, 2025 is shaping up to see another crucial fight for fair representation in Ohio. As you read this, the state’s lawmakers are getting ready for another mid-decade redraw of its congressional map. But how did we get here? Ohio has a long history of politicians adopting maps without bipartisan support. This is how bad it’s gotten: The Ohio Supreme Court has struck down these gerrymandered legislative maps five times and their congressional maps twice. Because Republicans passed their most recent maps without Democratic support, they’re required to pass a new map before the 2026 midterms. Last November, voters had the opportunity to create an independent, citizen-led redistricting commission to fix this. But partisan forces and outside interests spent millions to sabotage the ballot initiative, and it fell short of passage. Now, the state faces another redraw of the congressional map under the same system Republicans have used to lock in their majorities and deprive voters of fair representation. **But this doesn’t just affect voters in Ohio — it could have national implications.** If left unchecked, Ohio Republicans could once again pass an extreme, gerrymandered map ahead of the midterm elections to try to give Republicans more opportunities to unfairly gain congressional seats. With the majority in the U.S. House down to just a handful of seats, they’re desperate to hold on to control. That’s not how any of this should work — voters should decide who represents them and which party gets to lead. No one should be allowed to skew the maps to dampen the voice of the people. **The NDRC has identified Ohio as one of our top-priority states this year. We’re working to prevent an egregious Republican power grab. And we need the support of grassroots donors like you to help.** [**Will you make a contribution of $31 or more to support our work to fight for fair maps in Ohio and across the country?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105847730/539606924/1925646595?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_Ohio_email_20250415-NDRC-Tier1-Ohio_31&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250415-NDRC-Tier1-Ohio_31&utm_campaign=Ohio&amount=31&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkzYzJhMWRkLWYxMTktZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Jsem2R_qBH6qE-tB1tlKIlAwzeN98N2TfITF4KPKqo8=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. subject: TFVC Tuesday: You’re Invited to the World Premiere

| | | [ ](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/td/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTUxNzQ5MTkzMjEyMzY0MDE4LFwiclwiOjE1MTc0OTI0MDA4NTgwODcwM30iLCJzIjoiNmRiNzc3YzhiZTRiNjQwNyJ9)

|
# You're Invited to the World Premiere
---
| |
---
| We are thrilled to announce that the world premiere of _**Follow the Silenced**_ , the groundbreaking documentary that gives voice to those whose lives were forever changed by the COVID vaccine trials, has been set for the evening of **May 15, 2025 in Austin**. These are the stories that the powers that be tried valiantly to censor and suppress. But rather than remain in the shadows, the brave souls in this movie chose to speak up—and in doing so, found strength and solidarity. **The film is a deeply moving testament** to resilience, truth, and the power of community. TFVC is proud to partner with **React19 and Elevate Films** to present this award-winning, truth-telling documentary. With **only 300 seats available** at this exclusive event, you are invited to join us for an unforgettable, historic night that dares to ask the hard questions and honors those who **refused to be silenced**.
---
|
---
| | [ Reserve Your Seats HERE ](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/td/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTUxNzQ5MTkzMjIwNzUyNjI5LFwiclwiOjE1MTc0OTI0MDA4NTgwODcwM30iLCJzIjoiMDA3NDM0MDU0MDMzNDY1ZCJ9)
---
| | [ ](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/td/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTUxNzQ5MTkzMjI1OTk1NTExLFwiclwiOjE1MTc0OTI0MDA4NTgwODcwM30iLCJzIjoiZjlkOTMwYWNmODI3YTcxYyJ9)

|
## **Sound off!**
|
---
HB 1787 is being heard in committee this week. If passed into law, taxpayer dollars would be utilized to promote HPV vaccination on college campuses. Some are concerned that a law like HB 1787 could be a precursor to a mandate.
**With that in mind, here is this month’s question:**

| | | | | | Do you think state resources should be used to advertise vaccines at schools or on college campuses?
---
| | [ Yes ](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/td/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTUxNzQ5MTkzMjQxNzI0MTU1LFwiclwiOjE1MTc0OTI0MDA4NTgwODcwM30iLCJzIjoiNzgyYjBjZWQ2NWY2OGRmNyJ9)

---
|
---
# News
| |
---
| |
# Chairman VanDeaver Needs to Hear from You
---
While nearly**two dozen TFVC-supported bills await a hearing** in the House Committee on Public Health, Chairman Gary VanDeaver is passing out bills to require informed consent for STD testing and medical privacy for the deceased. **Call Chairman VanDeaver today** to let him know that you want true medical liberty bills to be heard **without delay**! When you call or email, please refer to **these priorities** :
HB 730 (Swanson), HB 1356 & HB 3957 (Schatzline), HB 3392 (Swanson), HB 4076 (Leach), HB 1468 (Leo Wilson), and HB 4927 (Shofner) **Phone:** 512-463-0692**
Email:** gary.vandeaver@house.texas.gov
| | [ Click HERE to Send an Email to Chairman VanDeaver ](mailto:gary.vandeaver@house.texas.gov?subject=Set%20Hearings%20for%20Vaccine%20Choice%20Legislation&body=Chairman%20Vandeaver%2C%0A%0AI%20am%20writing%20to%20you%20today%20to%20ask%20that%20you%20please%20swiftly%20set%20hearings%20for%20the%20following%20vaccine%20choice%20priority%20bills%3A%0A%0AHB%20730%20\(Swanson\)%2C%20HB%201356%20%26%20HB%203957%20\(Schatzline\)%2C%20HB%203392%20\(Swanson\)%2C%20HB%204076%20\(Leach\)%2C%20HB%201468%20\(Leo%20Wilson\)%2C%20HB%204927%20\(Shofner\)%0A%0AThank%20you%2C%0A%5BYOUR%20NAME%5D)

There is one GOOD pharmacist bill and one BAD Gardasil bill being heard in committee this week. If you missed yesterday's Action Alert, it's not too late to make your voice heard on these bills!

## Your Gardasil Story is Needed
|
---

SB 1787 would easily lead to HPV vaccine mandates on college campuses. Your voice could help bring awareness to the risks of Gardasil injections and ultimately stop this bill. If you or someone you know has suffered adverse effects from the HPV vaccine, please share your story, which we will present to legislators as powerful evidence of why this bill must be opposed.
**Simply reply to this email with your experience to help protect informed consent!**

body:
What happens tonight could define our race for a long time.

| | | Co-pilot— What happens tonight could define our race for a long time. We cannot afford to fall behind with all we are facing. **[I’m humbly asking you, if you are able, can I count on you to help me reach my first major goal of my campaign?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvnposevlo3hbdu0scr3d0k486h71cvl4f4jgft0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1ctj62or6c5h2bs)** Your Friend,John

---
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **John James**
Date: Mon, Apr 14, 2025
Subject: This is our first big test.
---
Friend, Our first **_REAL TEST_ **of strength is approaching. We’re hours away from the **FIRST mid-month fundraising deadline** of my campaign for Governor. I need to level with you. The Democrats will be looking for any weakness to exploit. **This is what they want to see: **
* They want to see that the America First movement is dying in Michigan.
* They want to see that they are on track to secure 4 MORE YEARS of their socialist corruption.
* They want to see us fail so they can breathe a sigh of relief.

**_I’m asking you to show them_**** _just how wrong they are._** This mission needs the full support of the America First grassroots movement if we’re going to have a chance to win this. **If you believe in this campaign,****now’s the time to step up****.** **[We can’t fall behind.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqr39h5gi9biangt25c992rfiejantlhvu30r5d0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1ctj62or6c5h2bs)**
---

---
Thank you for your support. Let’s fly,
John James

name: Team DPVA
subject: We pay. They plunder.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
You paid your taxes, but did MAGA billionaires?

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105849640/539609086/-793144256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTA2MTY3NS1mNzE5LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HEM9ZSQzq3_U13NRLCnIejBu87wicZqtanzEZnCefYg=&emci=76474af8-f216-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=ba061675-f719-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=15759664)
---
Derek, Today, millions of Virginians are filing their taxes — doing their part, just like we all do every year. **But while you’re paying your fair share, the GOP administration is using your tax dollars to bankroll chaos.** We’re sure you’ve seen it on the news, but the stock market is in a downward spiral due to reckless tariffs. And now, those same tariffs are hitting Virginia’s biggest trade partners — China, Mexico, and Canada — triggering rising prices for the goods our families and businesses rely on. **That’s not economic policy, Derek. Kevin O'Leary **[put Trump-deranged Don Lemon in his place](https://substack.com/redirect/4ce508b7-cee4-4edc-9f71-01af3e50408b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for complaining about President Trump telling Americans "it's a good time to buy" the stock market at the peak of tariff hysteria.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/4ce508b7-cee4-4edc-9f71-01af3e50408b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/4ce508b7-cee4-4edc-9f71-01af3e50408b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"You have no problem with the President telling people it's time to buy?" Lemon asked O'Leary.
"Yeah, he's telling people to go buy the America index, a president is supposed to do that. He's supposed to be a cheerleader!" O'Leary fired back. "We should be spending our time worried about the country, **[not trying to throw Trump in jail all the time!" ](https://substack.com/redirect/4ce508b7-cee4-4edc-9f71-01af3e50408b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Lemon questioned the claim that people wanted to throw Trump in jail over this, but of course that is the insinuation behind accusing him of insider trading. He played the clip of Trump joking with businessmen about how much they made in the market's recovery after the initial drop at the start of the tariffs.
"Not a bit cringe?" Lemon asked O'Leary of the video clip.
"No, no, " O'Leary answered. **["Don I'm helping you with your Trump Derangement Syndrome."](https://substack.com/redirect/4ce508b7-cee4-4edc-9f71-01af3e50408b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
"I don't have Trump Derangement Syndrome!" Lemon snapped. "And I'm not a Democrat so don't even try it!"
Watch the awkward clash right here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/4ce508b7-cee4-4edc-9f71-01af3e50408b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**[Together With Health Science Institute](https://substack.com/redirect/64d10eab-411f-4c65-9a09-220929802a45?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# 9 drugs linked to Alzheimer's disease?
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/64d10eab-411f-4c65-9a09-220929802a45?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Dear Reader,
**[Are you taking one of these 9 "memory erasing" prescriptions?](https://substack.com/redirect/64d10eab-411f-4c65-9a09-220929802a45?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
You may think your memory loss is just a sign of getting older, but one of these **[9 drugs](https://substack.com/redirect/64d10eab-411f-4c65-9a09-220929802a45?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** could actually be damaging your brain...
**[These 9 prescription drugs](https://substack.com/redirect/64d10eab-411f-4c65-9a09-220929802a45?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** have now been linked to Alzheimer's disease diagnoses.
If you're over the age of 60, and you're taking even 1 of these 9 drugs, your brain could be at risk.
**[Click here to learn more.](https://substack.com/redirect/64d10eab-411f-4c65-9a09-220929802a45?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/64d10eab-411f-4c65-9a09-220929802a45?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
P.S. These "memory erasing" drugs could affect more than 1,429,000 American seniors this year alone -- **including you or your spouse**. **[Click here to see the list of drugs before it's too late...](https://substack.com/redirect/64d10eab-411f-4c65-9a09-220929802a45?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
* * *
# **Jim Jordan SHUTS DOWN obnoxious Jasmine Crockett, puts an end to her woke rant in congress**
GOP Rep. Jim Jordan **[fired back at Democrat Rep. Jasmine Crockett](https://substack.com/redirect/681e7f43-7473-4913-b493-7817e5534ffe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for an absurd rant against Kash Patel, Trump and DOGE's attempt to clean the corruption out of the FBI.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/681e7f43-7473-4913-b493-7817e5534ffe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/681e7f43-7473-4913-b493-7817e5534ffe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"Today is nothing more than a dog and pony show for the Republicans to avoid facing the American people for the trash policies that are killing the economy and our democracy," Crockett said. "We are here today because Republicans are willing to throw our country's top law enforcement agents under the bus to appease Trump and execute his political vengeance!"
Jordan was eager to chime in, starting by saying that Pam Bondi's Justice Department is far superior and more transparent than the previous administration's DOJ. "They couldn't tell us who planted the pipe bombs, who leaked the Dobbs opinion, who put cocaine at the White House! They couldn't tell us any of that but they had plenty of time to put together a memo to investigate moms and dads at school board meetings,... they equated pro-life catholics to extremists!"
"That is as political as you can get!!" Jordan exploded, obliterating Crockett's premise that the Trump DOJ is focussed on political objectives in an unprecedented way.
**[Watch Jordan go off at Crockett and the Democrats](https://substack.com/redirect/681e7f43-7473-4913-b493-7817e5534ffe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for accusing Trump of exactly what they have been doing for the past four years:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/681e7f43-7473-4913-b493-7817e5534ffe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: Senate GOP Endorsement Alert!
subject: Jon Husted just got the BIGGEST endorsement of them all!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Click to learn more

_**["One of the leaders I know I can count on is Ohio's Senator Jon Husted." \- President Donald J. Trump](http://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2znb0sge3qlab893m0spl2mvcqopqu4lcvk1h8j0g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1ctj6apb4c1h2bs)**_

Friend, Jon Husted has worked tirelessly for the American people and he has a huge battle ahead of him in 2026.

Despite being appointed to Vice President J.D. Vance's Senate Seat only recently, Jon Husted has worked around the clock to create jobs, lower costs, secure our border, and protect President Trump's America First Agenda! _**[This has made him one of the #1 Targets for Democrats in 2026.](http://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z30iv9s3rr4g99vdqvda9usgrs6lhlgqhilsppoo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1ctj6apb4c1h2bs)**_

We just got word that _**[President Trump has given Senator Husted his COMPLETE AND TOTAL Endorsement](http://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zrjpul5f65lm6l6l77l3r9chabgjagcfntab1vr0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1ctj6apb4c1h2bs)**_ and we could not be more proud! With YOU & the President on his side, we have no DOUBT Jon Husted will easily defeat whoever the Democrats nominate to challenge him in 2026!

_**[Click HERE to read President Trump's entire message and show your support for Senator Husted](http://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zv80m8orgktges9r75okks3efitoarsc7ukr07i0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1ctj6apb4c1h2bs)**_

Celebrities have voiced strong criticism of Blue Origin’s first all-female space mission which took place yesterday. Olivia Munn, Amy Schumer and Olivia Wilde are just three famous faces who all publicly questioned the purpose and cost of the 11-minute expedition that carried six women to the edge of space. ## Electric bikes to be introduced across UK city for first time in bid to remove cars from roads
A major city has announced plans to begin an electric bike rental trial across the region in a bid to reduce the number of cars clogging up roads. Belfast City Council has revealed that it will grant permission for e-bike operator Beryl to introduce 100 electric mobility options into the region later this year. subject: Secret Democrat plot to DECIMATE Trump’s Cabinet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Scalise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit Scalise For Congress and Eye Of The Tiger PAC
body:
| Not interested? [Unsubscribe here](https://links.house-republicans.org/unsubscribe?e=998fa18fd50048d580e64d9cd10dc33f&utm_source=hdscalise&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_3725d360812388af8df91d2741a&n=1).
---
| Peter –

It wasn’t a shock when a Radical House Democrat threatened _impeachment against President Trump_... It wasn’t a shock when Democrat Leadership formed an _anti-Trump taskforce_ ... It wasn’t a shock when one of the most Liberal governors in America declared herself the _leader of the “Trump Resistance Movement”_...

But this just shook us to our core:

**Axios just broke a story revealing the secret Democrat plot to DECIMATE President Trump’s Cabinet. Rep. Ilhan Omar is floating Articles of Impeachment against Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth, National Security Advisor Mike Waltz, and CIA Director John Ratcliffe.**

And it gets even worse: The Democrats are just a HANDFUL of seats away from taking our House Majority and having the power to impeach President Trump and any Cabinet member they set their eyes on!

That’s why we’re rushing to you with an urgent request.

_**[We’re respectfully asking Conservatives from ALL 50 STATES to help us support President Trump and his Administration, defend his top allies in Congress, and save our Conservative House Majority.](https://links.house-republicans.org/r?u=-KKwfzWl7oK4gNPooZXuJ4Zn2xET82xeGk9Y43EVmFJpnPk2wJOSNxi5_VcfC6ey5wr14I1lG14yAo8scN2QfHlBz-2JtL1YhJzw-MGkErqZeqIqecRnPBT9nhkWdAf4M5SJi316J11HkfSY6gup0KmzGCoK0PsM0C3kQtoxpPiDUHbja_AujDKYcid7CGq3--oDIFZLVqsm54RF8odc6_PKmfYLYG45oSN-zOc-yNFnvlgNoHOkt0L5ybaEX4LEMO5fR6rkHIwSQxwbY1o8uA&e=998fa18fd50048d580e64d9cd10dc33f&utm_source=hdscalise&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_3725d360812388af8df91d2741a&n=2 "We’re respectfully asking
Conservatives from ALL 50 STATES to help us support President Trump
and his Administration, defend his top allies in Congress, and save
our Conservative House Majority.")**_

**We still need a donation from YOUR STATE – will you step up when we need you the most?** | | [PLEASE: RUSH SUPPORT NOW](https://links.house-republicans.org/r?u=-KKwfzWl7oK4gNPooZXuJ4Zn2xET82xeGk9Y43EVmFJpnPk2wJOSNxi5_VcfC6ey5wr14I1lG14yAo8scN2QfHlBz-2JtL1YhJzw-MGkErqZeqIqecRnPBT9nhkWdAf4M5SJi316J11HkfSY6gup0KmzGCoK0PsM0C3kQtoxpPiDUHbja_AujDKYcid7CGq3--oDIFZLVqsm54RF8odc6_PKmfYLYG45oSN-zOc-yNFnvlgNoHOkt0L5ybaEX4LEMO5fR6rkHIwSQxwbY1o8uA&e=998fa18fd50048d580e64d9cd10dc33f&utm_source=hdscalise&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_3725d360812388af8df91d2741a&n=3 "PLEASE:
RUSH SUPPORT NOW")
---
The Democrats are desperate.

They’re praying that folks like you ABANDON Republicans so they can **1)** flip Republican-held districts, **2)** retake the House, and **3)** see their corrupt scheme to undermine President Trump and his Cabinet through to the very end.

We need your urgent help to put a HARD STOP to their plot.

If ONE MILLION true American Patriots can join us right here and right now, we’ll have the power and resources to fight back. _**[We’re asking you to dig deep and join us in this critical fight.](https://links.house-republicans.org/r?u=-KKwfzWl7oK4gNPooZXuJ4Zn2xET82xeGk9Y43EVmFJpnPk2wJOSNxi5_VcfC6ey5wr14I1lG14yAo8scN2QfHlBz-2JtL1YhJzw-MGkErqZeqIqecRnPBT9nhkWdAf4M5SJi316J11HkfSY6gup0KmzGCoK0PsM0C3kQtoxpPiDUHbja_AujDKYcid7CGq3--oDIFZLVqsm54RF8odc6_PKmfYLYG45oSN-zOc-yNFnvlgNoHOkt0L5ybaEX4LEMO5fR6rkHIwSQxwbY1o8uA&e=998fa18fd50048d580e64d9cd10dc33f&utm_source=hdscalise&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_3725d360812388af8df91d2741a&n=4 "We’re
asking you to dig deep and join us in this critical fight.")**_

| Fellow Patriot,

In an interview with Lara Trump, Hannity said, **_“I’m watching what they’re doing to Elon. Frankly, these are like acts of terrorism to me. Then, you have death threats this guy is facing...”_**
---
But New York Attorney General Letitia James has decided to fan the flames of the Radical Left...

She successfully secured a _RESTRAINING ORDER_ against Elon Musk from a Biden-appointed judge in her lawsuit to bring down President Trump’s Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE).

As campaign manager, it’s my job to share why investing in Valerie’s mission is so important.

**Valerie’s campaign is a people-powered movement.** This means she relies on small-dollar donations from grassroots supporters like you, rather than large donations from special interest groups.

A gift of just $10 might not seem like much in comparison to the millions in the GOP’s warchest, but a little truly goes a long way, Peter. If you join the network of grassroots folks who have already given $10 this week, we’ll have the resources it takes to fight back and keep Valerie fighting for a better future.

Valerie’s campaign is a people-powered movement. This means she relies on small-dollar donations from grassroots supporters like you, rather than large donations from special interest groups. A gift of just $10 might not seem like much in comparison to the millions in the GOP’s warchest, but a little truly goes a long way, Peter. If you join the network of grassroots folks who have already given $10 this week, we’ll have the resources it takes to fight back and keep Valerie fighting for a better future. It’s also my job to make sure we’re meeting our benchmarks and staying on track to keep Valerie in Congress, and as of right now we have about $1,652 left to reach our April mid-month fundraising goal. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thanks for your support, Emma Campaign Manager * | | | ---|---|--- = Valerie is fighting to protect access to health care, working families, and to reform our criminal justice system. name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: [ACTION NEEDED] April DOGE Tracking Poll
body:
https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/april-doge-tracking-poll-/?utm_campaign=20250407&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A

Peter,

President Trump has made it clear that the work of DOGE will continue and that his cabinet secretaries will work to root out waste, fraud, and abuse throughout his term.

And with more than an estimated $140 billion in savings already cut from the federal bureaucracy, there is still much work to be done.

But through acts of domestic terrorism, radicals on the Left are trying to intimidate President Trump and DOGE leaders into stopping this important work.

This work is vitally necessary, and we cannot allow violence from the Left to silence us.

That is why I asked my staff to put together a short DOGE Tracking Poll. I want to know where you stand on DOGE and make sure that the Left doesn’t drown out your voice.

[So please take my official April DOGE Tracking Poll to make sure that my colleagues in Congress and I know exactly how you feel about the work President Trump is doing with DOGE.](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/april-doge-tracking-poll-/?utm_campaign=20250407&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A)

Patriot,

I have to be honest - it's a little difficult for me to send this message. I feel hesitant because you've already done so much to support me and my campaign from the very beginning.

**I 'll get straight to it:** your contributions are what fuel this fight against the Left. They give me the strength to stand up for MAGA conservatives and fight for our values as we approach the crucial battle that lies ahead.

Your sincere support lifts my spirits on the toughest days, but rest assured, I will never stop fighting for you, your family, and this country. The stakes are simply too high. It's time to take action and END the border crisis, CONFRONT Communist China, and RESTORE American jobs and prosperity.

**[I don't want to take up too much of your time, but if you can, would you consider making an urgent donation today?](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=fbdfab8166db43a1b6f7bf61bd1543d6&_e=vpfnOToSrMfmdrYoVdp48m4ltbzKDh4y0JgGSdh8qcsHHE8I7E-K8C74aDo6S9LQbVIh7w4pXDGwZLnKOVFckwDUYzjwWWS-BvWrTIaJBndFDZhu3XBaIaX-WoQlxbo8VaBMWfoi_N-sb_U0PLIQ900vq5p7CCwUmTYGNyOATcFU6GROai6TJN43yVwkqDIwJTH6OWh-nV9AqHKma48U9JI03_DDFGNz1pPtW3ZlmbGbx4Qec_RSHl5LxG52HEn4TeMddqI0vGfxXQThtn2XuHytMkLT7urmbNk4d9J701IO9peXGycdKTvZj7mGMKmuWa_1U3lzOKb0rGKOI_aGpKKHFR0cKzvdDqUbhbJXjCc%3D)** We need every resource possible to get our country back on track and fend off the ongoing attacks from the Radical Left.

name: The Democratic National Committee
subject: Update: DNC Launches “People’s Cabinet” →
body:
---
Derek, Right now, it’s our responsibility as Democrats to challenge Trump’s lies, confront his reckless agenda, and communicate to voters all over the country that we can _offer a better alternative._ With your help, that’s exactly what we’re doing — take a look: **_Breaking: DNC Chair Ken Martin Launches “People's Cabinet” to Fiercely Counter Trump Administration Chaos and Lies_** The DNC recently announced a new project: The People’s Cabinet. This project brings together qualified policy experts, national and local leaders, and voices from our communities — people who will cut through the lies and speak directly to Americans about the reality of what the Trump administration is doing. The People’s Cabinet will include a wide array of national, state, and local experts on the economy, health care, working families and communities, public safety, and national security and foreign policy — including former Labor Secretary and co-founder of Inequality Media Civic Action Robert Reich, former Acting Labor Secretary Julie Su, former Wisconsin Lieutenant Governor Mandela Barnes, and more. In order to reach as many people as possible and meet them where they are, the Cabinet will conduct briefings with media and coalition partners, speak directly with Americans at town halls, produce digital content to reach people across the platforms where they get their news, engage in rapid response to counter the lies and disinformation from the Trump Administration, and serve as thought leaders for the Democratic ecosystem on effective strategy and tactics in countering the worst of the Republican agenda. **We heard from thousands of people earlier this year that you want to see Democrats aggressively countering Trump, while reaching voters where they are, year-round. That’s exactly what we’re working to do.** [**This work is only possible with your help. If initiatives like these are important to you, we hope you’ll consider pitching in a few dollars to help fund the work we’re doing:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250415_3184_fr&refcode2=3184_22930333_O16dJo&akid=3184%2E22930333%2EO16dJo) **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025?refcode=em_20250415_3184_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3184_22930333_O16dJo&akid=3184%2E22930333%2EO16dJo)** Thank you, and we’ll have more updates to share soon. The Democrats

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: Reid Rasner, CEO
subject: What the lack of succession planning for your business really costs
body:
| Hi Peter, What would happen if you had to step back from your business tomorrow? Or if a key member of your leadership team suddenly left?
---
|
---
The potential costs of a leadership vacancy could reach $200k or more,1 not to mention the indirect effects like reduced productivity, employee burnout, and impacts on morale. Competitors might even take advantage of these leadership gaps, leading to a potential loss of market share. The good news? These challenges can be avoided with proactive succession planning. By preparing now, you can ensure your business is ready to handle transitions smoothly, maintain stability, and keep moving forward—no matter what the future holds. [**Click here to explore smart tips for business succession planning.**](https://financeinsights.net/7XzNTxxWzS4W6xPTqm354IPmJJE?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) To solid plans and more success in the future,
---
**Reid Rasner - CEO**
Omnivest Financial
(307) 337-1223
[https://www.omnivestfinancial.com](https://snpy.io?djJ7InVybCI6Imh0dHBzOlwvXC93d3cub21uaXZlc3RmaW5hbmNpYWwuY29tIiwiaGFzaCI6IldhTG1GYWFxbHVZdlFMSyIsImNvbnRhY3RfZW1haWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9)
* * *
---
P.S. What's been one of the biggest "lessons" or eye-opening moments you've had while running your business? What happened and what did you realize? Hit "reply" and share your story.
