name: Gary Sinise
subject: Celebrating the 20th Anniversary of the National Memorial Day Parade
body:
These heroes are counting on you
It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.
| | | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=174daf9f159a4dbe9621eba5f991cb3d&_e=QbvOpCJzmGpQKS0DlziAjFlgtcid9cgo6fc0bxaSGm8Xvrhm9vM7CJcN3l_cQR8lElSVyiwmWbE1qfbTTSTuONnl3GTRh-TcVIt4z7nxU3wy8rOHOa19Q7HOLtShImlrseC6hp-Oqpi7-mVow0z9cZUkOFSm1t9fuZ65JKR2kBqJQpytteIjiKXWZeRe_f73pgp9q5R75dBqBr5EhaQMVgdoEr8yrq7z5mnzqOXMtVNv4NWHh2NMJcKA2yyGJvzeDXSqeo4Ex10jgQwuGFl3uQlJrAo5DE5Q4BLYSuwqXHYpaKKiZ_Sh7G6Yy7ZZ1cXh)
---
Peter, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 __and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. **Now, I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.** This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. **[Peter, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENTIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=174daf9f159a4dbe9621eba5f991cb3d&_e=QbvOpCJzmGpQKS0DlziAjFlgtcid9cgo6fc0bxaSGm8Xvrhm9vM7CJcN3l_cQR8lElSVyiwmWbE1qfbTTSTuONnl3GTRh-TcVIt4z7nxU3wy8rOHOa19Q7HOLtShImlrseC6hp-Oqpi7-mVow0z9cZUkOFSm1t9fuZ65JKR2kBoAuTiDEmgH19AMcSjq-0b1icnZT0BXsbRmhvzC8_sIgIuSD_NCAQ4L0JLeZpZqJkcRHQHzQU9hqlqwJmhQOk_Xy5ADp3GE2Yyq7_5pSlkKeTWyA_N2Gv2DicKISxZRbyBwzWnBrxzaVsYph8J-_OzP)**
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=174daf9f159a4dbe9621eba5f991cb3d&_e=QbvOpCJzmGpQKS0DlziAjFlgtcid9cgo6fc0bxaSGm8Xvrhm9vM7CJcN3l_cQR8lElSVyiwmWbE1qfbTTSTuONnl3GTRh-TcVIt4z7nxU3wy8rOHOa19Q7HOLtShImlrseC6hp-Oqpi7-mVow0z9cZUkOFSm1t9fuZ65JKR2kBpgtrcSU7vC8to9cfsGcqFXOpiWfDJ7kRVBavw0vYnKyJys2KsQAyw_0zJJ7ay0e3EkwAEffzbpb6ZlN2RLBblnWhHrf3UAFPXiWjhrXsw2bM2llHBDU8LQSgu2I3w_nBk1spaiBISfB5tlhgwqYZUY)
---
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=174daf9f159a4dbe9621eba5f991cb3d&_e=QbvOpCJzmGpQKS0DlziAjFlgtcid9cgo6fc0bxaSGm8Xvrhm9vM7CJcN3l_cQR8lElSVyiwmWbE1qfbTTSTuONnl3GTRh-TcVIt4z7nxU3wy8rOHOa19Q7HOLtShImlrseC6hp-Oqpi7-mVow0z9cZUkOFSm1t9fuZ65JKR2kBpY4q8kpQXLto9yvyAGR8ylSnYUamlip4fkbmOBrA5LhzKIqz8kqpVlGOeTG8qh9QWOLLbw0PY2f3JQMK_0Rmaq95WI-sVCOzEDMJchpzfcfxlIJBgyOfps5_lse3P6SWJHfkPl2XS_Ja3pMwn06sSt)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ **But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded _entirely_ by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country.** Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.

* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=174daf9f159a4dbe9621eba5f991cb3d&_e=QbvOpCJzmGpQKS0DlziAjFlgtcid9cgo6fc0bxaSGm8Xvrhm9vM7CJcN3l_cQR8lzVNsdonH6UcnnNWvKeHVf0_PVZsAQ2B_Fu4dISSDMUpjV3AKY5ObVlgk52_crWCivbx62Wetu0PcBTUphDgSDDC1l2DlBW2e6dp7gdW_-9ggg7xHoV-iTn0Pc-QoRkatL0w7JlVEtGQjZHm-io1X7itW7zBkD4rSygeyPiQcYXPpAmQgIKKGqouD7sOoDHtlbmIRYJz1Y7I5xyfPRrXuBTqkI0-cn5XLSGXTVUX9Ai4%3D)[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=174daf9f159a4dbe9621eba5f991cb3d&_e=QbvOpCJzmGpQKS0DlziAjFlgtcid9cgo6fc0bxaSGm8Xvrhm9vM7CJcN3l_cQR8lElSVyiwmWbE1qfbTTSTuONnl3GTRh-TcVIt4z7nxU3wy8rOHOa19Q7HOLtShImlrseC6hp-Oqpi7-mVow0z9cZUkOFSm1t9fuZ65JKR2kBqF7XlZYy78Za9jxCsoYWMp07lI6DkphDkAj_ZdJg-LbvZNS3PoLGeWcFSBW9QSnaAilMteDHGAXqmc59CKES3DbcoEkoyeRArMjqVWgS2a3WC5eO2sxk_lbi6Ws_BxpizEoFVbeCge0YrbFbBe5e2k) If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. _And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get._ You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. _But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade._** ** **That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. ** So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II - and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps - I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us.
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=174daf9f159a4dbe9621eba5f991cb3d&_e=QbvOpCJzmGpQKS0DlziAjFlgtcid9cgo6fc0bxaSGm8Xvrhm9vM7CJcN3l_cQR8lElSVyiwmWbE1qfbTTSTuONnl3GTRh-TcVIt4z7nxU3wy8rOHOa19Q7HOLtShImlrseC6hp-Oqpi7-mVow0z9cZUkOFSm1t9fuZ65JKR2kBo8OOibFiTyGfTVYDUO2xOHNpUqIxOfYlYRE_KPCqbW2kzgubq0zNpWyVVNUGo27QP2pMQ4jaHm2d7NxuhHX9S-SvNm2D6URvNUwgjEr5zqyiFaN_VbV0yEqqtvb7gofSFqCgreCiyiluwgILZtwXb6)
---
And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ _**[Peter, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please - if you're able, make a gift to fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now during its 20th anniversary.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=174daf9f159a4dbe9621eba5f991cb3d&_e=QbvOpCJzmGpQKS0DlziAjFlgtcid9cgo6fc0bxaSGm8Xvrhm9vM7CJcN3l_cQR8lElSVyiwmWbE1qfbTTSTuONnl3GTRh-TcVIt4z7nxU3wy8rOHOa19Q7HOLtShImlrseC6hp-Oqpi7-mVow0z9cZUkOFSm1t9fuZ65JKR2kBpKu33AvSGowEUdo_xVLwklGOmZ8w7Pqvx4B14wpRSnMTjpFc7HETPoZgy2Ah5zlidAZaaAfUUrvpUKipsWJTapNbJneeP_pIzcXIbKtUVkmxnqlzacCW1wSR4LeosYGf0M0K726v8XssiUO_H3_mii)**_ Sincerely, Gary SiniseHonorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade
---
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=174daf9f159a4dbe9621eba5f991cb3d&_e=QbvOpCJzmGpQKS0DlziAjFlgtcid9cgo6fc0bxaSGm8Xvrhm9vM7CJcN3l_cQR8lElSVyiwmWbE1qfbTTSTuONnl3GTRh-TcVIt4z7nxU3wy8rOHOa19Q7HOLtShImlrseC6hp-Oqpi7-mVow0z9cZUkOFSm1t9fuZ65JKR2kBrhHPQ03K9wbq_FG8TNLNCmcwH0W56OqAiy8NVb8hgnVAEBdC-5IaBQtS4WnOarvqKnvKRl4Pd986Svo208Rt5PGifYVA2LVgBGhuU_oSFY-CMfy6Md0k9smtxHF8vNGJ1_YxaTgbWfWLnNzeT_YiQo)
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=174daf9f159a4dbe9621eba5f991cb3d&_e=QbvOpCJzmGpQKS0DlziAjFlgtcid9cgo6fc0bxaSGm8Xvrhm9vM7CJcN3l_cQR8lElSVyiwmWbE1qfbTTSTuONnl3GTRh-TcVIt4z7nxU3wy8rOHOa19Q7HOLtShImlrseC6hp-Oqpi7-mVow0z9cZUkOFSm1t9fuZ65JKR2kBqh6y5oq7ceSqbiDJOp_fJE9z7Hdi5gNSOPlfCv4KAfRLPb5jQ_msJitP49y46KbkHN6KYjppW0zY-7dJO6nJwtKAkE2I4lp2S8G_zPJWyH5Uzmw_1mqXH8YEI2loPY0SwQRDuTNYG8I5UJwXehYj_f)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201

It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. | | | Peter, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. Now, I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event. But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded entirely by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country. Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like: Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever. Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam. Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom. If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get. You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade. That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II - and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps - I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us. And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more. ** Sincerely, Gary SiniseHonorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center 1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201

name: Seth Koslow
subject: Tax Day Check-In: Feel Those Cuts Yet?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Koslow for Nassau
body:
Feeling those big tax cuts Bruce Blakeman promised? I know my family didn’t. | | Dear Friends,

**Feeling those big tax cuts Bruce Blakeman promised?** I know my family didn’t.

Blakeman said he’d lower taxes and fix the assessment system. Instead, Nassau’s still one of the most expensive places to live, and the assessment system – still a mess. Oh, and those illegal red light camera fees? Just a generous little bonus tax for drivers.

**[Nassau County deserves better – not more broken promises from Bruce Blakeman. Join my campaign for County Executive today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105866593/539653780/-1414184198?contactdata=Ld6/m3CAQvy4A+sBu3VMYitV0trM7IAeptwsuoxFnB7pYvHSAhOlEoUPlH9+VeaoPKdS/degGX7f4hjju4DM3SCLQMBXap6W2vbrYejMgNw=&am=25.00&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTYyMTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTM2ZmVlN2MtMDUxYS1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zqlfmC0eWM_epzk0VbZwhmnwum0S0h9xJi33ni-qRxk=&emci=7df8f63e-fe19-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=136fee7c-051a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=17551891)**

If your wallet feels exactly the same – or somehow lighter – it might be time for leadership that delivers more than empty promises.

I plan to cut your taxes – by cutting the waste, fraud, and political favoritism driving them up.
* I’ll audit and eliminate useless political jobs, slash outside attorney fees by 75%, and end no-bid contracts. Non-essential County cars? I’ll sell them off.
* To fix Nassau’s broken assessment system, I will shift control to local towns, eliminate the bloated County office, and make it easier for you to challenge unfair taxes – without needing a lawyer.
* I’ll fix our roads, kill hidden fees, cut red tape for businesses, and stop political favoritism in how your tax dollars are spent.

**[I’ve got a plan to clean this place up. Can Bruce say the same? Click here to lower your taxes.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105866594/539653781/-1414184198?contactdata=Ld6/m3CAQvy4A+sBu3VMYitV0trM7IAeptwsuoxFnB7pYvHSAhOlEoUPlH9+VeaoPKdS/degGX7f4hjju4DM3SCLQMBXap6W2vbrYejMgNw=&am=25.00&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTYyMTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTM2ZmVlN2MtMDUxYS1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zqlfmC0eWM_epzk0VbZwhmnwum0S0h9xJi33ni-qRxk=&emci=7df8f63e-fe19-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=136fee7c-051a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=17551891)**

Best,
Seth Koslow
---

* * *

name: Her Bold Move
subject: Fwd: 4 million MEN... and 69 million women
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Her Bold Move Action
body:
| | |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105868275/539657355/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250415fwd_N_HBM_90DO_5_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYxMzc3MjFhLTA3MWEtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GOKM0MDWoqwB4ZSWoxbGKBHUX83idJ4TziiadbiSNr8=)
---
**Peter, last week, the House of Representatives voted to pass one of the most dangerous threats to women’s rights in America. It is now one step closer to becoming federal law.**

**If the Senate passes the SAVE Act, millions of women would lose access to the ballot box, resulting in a catastrophic backslide for women’s rights in America. We must keep electing women as our best line of defense against these proposed laws.**

Congresswoman Maxine Dexter introduced an amendment that gave her colleagues a chance to protect women’s voting rights by stopping the bill from being implemented _unless Congress could guarantee that no women would be denied the right to vote._ **Republicans voted it down.**

[**At Her Bold Move, we were not surprised to learn that a Congresswoman stood up against this anti-woman policy. As male legislators continue to pass dangerous laws about women’s bodies, healthcare, and hard-fought rights, we desperately need to elect as many women as we can to offices across the country. Join us in our fight to do just that by donating $20.25 today. →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105868276/539657356/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250415fwd_N_HBM_90DO_5_NG_N_L1&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYxMzc3MjFhLTA3MWEtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GOKM0MDWoqwB4ZSWoxbGKBHUX83idJ4TziiadbiSNr8=)

Thank you,

Her Bold Move

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
---
Hi Peter,

We are writing today because one of the most dangerous threats to women’s rights in America is now one step closer to becoming federal law.

Yesterday, the Republican-controlled House officially voted to pass the “Safeguard American Voter Eligibility” (SAVE) Act which would result in the disenfranchisement of millions of eligible voters. You may have heard about this bill and how it would impact millions of American women... Now that Republicans have a trifecta in Washington, it could easily become law.

**Here is just one reason why this matters:**
This bill would have a devastating impact on women – **most notably on the approximately 69 million women in America who legally changed their last names when they got married** – because the SAVE Act **requires** a _birth certificate that matches the name of the person registering to vote._
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105868277/539657357/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250415fwd_N_HBM_90DO_5_NG_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYxMzc3MjFhLTA3MWEtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GOKM0MDWoqwB4ZSWoxbGKBHUX83idJ4TziiadbiSNr8=)
---
On April 1st, Congresswoman Maxine Dexter gave her colleagues a chance to protect women’s voting rights by introducing an amendment to the bill that would block it from being implemented unless Congress could guarantee that no eligible married women be denied the right to vote. **Republicans voted it down.**

[**At Her Bold Move, we were not surprised to learn that a Congresswoman stood up against this anti-woman policy. As male legislators continue to pass dangerous laws about women’s bodies, healthcare, and hard-fought rights, we desperately need to elect as many women as we can to offices across the country. Join us in our fight to do just that by donating $25 today. →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105868278/539657358/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250415fwd_N_HBM_90DO_5_NG_N_L2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYxMzc3MjFhLTA3MWEtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GOKM0MDWoqwB4ZSWoxbGKBHUX83idJ4TziiadbiSNr8=)

We will be monitoring the progress of this bill in the Senate and will keep you posted. In the meantime, we remain deeply concerned about the implications this would have on millions of Americans who might not have access to birth certificates, passports, or the documentation this bill would require them to present in order to exercise their constitutional right to vote.

If 69 million American women across the country lose their ability to vote, that would be a catastrophic backslide for women’s rights in America. We’ve said it before, and we’ll say it again: we must keep up the fight. Women have made SO MUCH PROGRESS over the last century. We must defend that hard-fought progress on behalf of our mothers, our grandmothers, our daughters, and our friends.

[**At Her Bold Move, we know our first line of defense will be the women we elect to our government – the women in the rooms where these decisions are being made. clean_body: | | | | | = Peter, last week, the House of Representatives voted to pass one of the most dangerous threats to women’s rights in America. It is now one step closer to becoming federal law. If the Senate passes the SAVE Act, millions of women would lose access to the ballot box, resulting in a catastrophic backslide for women’s rights in America. We must keep electing women as our best line of defense against these proposed laws. Congresswoman Maxine Dexter introduced an amendment that gave her colleagues a chance to protect women’s voting rights by stopping the bill from being implemented unless Congress could guarantee that no women would be denied the right to vote. Republicans voted it down. = Thank you, Her Bold Move \---------- Forwarded message --------- Hi Peter, We are writing today because one of the most dangerous threats to women’s rights in America is now one step closer to becoming federal law. Yesterday, the Republican-controlled House officially voted to pass the “Safeguard American Voter Eligibility” (SAVE) Act which would result in the disenfranchisement of millions of eligible voters. You may have heard about this bill and how it would impact millions of American women... Now that Republicans have a trifecta in Washington, it could easily become law. Here is just one reason why this matters: This bill would have a devastating impact on women – most notably on the approximately 69 million women in America who legally changed their last names when they got married – because the SAVE Act requires a birth certificate that matches the name of the person registering to vote. = On April 1st, Congresswoman Maxine Dexter gave her colleagues a chance to protect women’s voting rights by introducing an amendment to the bill that would block it from being implemented unless Congress could guarantee that no eligible married women be denied the right to vote. Republicans voted it down. = We will be monitoring the progress of this bill in the Senate and will keep you posted. In the meantime, we remain deeply concerned about the implications this would have on millions of Americans who might not have access to birth certificates, passports, or the documentation this bill would require them to present in order to exercise their constitutional right to vote. If 69 million American women across the country lose their ability to vote, that would be a catastrophic backslide for women’s rights in America. We’ve said it before, and we’ll say it again: we must keep up the fight. Women have made SO MUCH PROGRESS over the last century. name: Kamala Harris
subject: A great rebuke to Trump and the Republican Party
body:
As you read this, Republicans in North Carolina are quite literally trying to use the courts they control to overthrow a state Supreme Court election decided by voters.
# [](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/2780?t=1&akid=512%2E2563979%2EG69Veb)

Peter --
I've tried not to send a lot of emails lately. It's mostly because of the economic uncertainty I know a lot of you are feeling since Trump started with his tariffs.
But this one couldn't wait any longer, and I am asking you to contribute to the Democratic National Committee today if you are in a position to do so.
As you read this, Republicans in North Carolina are quite literally trying to use the courts they control to overthrow a state Supreme Court election decided by voters.
These elections are critically important. It wasn't long ago Elon Musk spent a ridiculous amount of money to try and win one in Wisconsin.
And if it wasn't for the unending chaos around the Trump administration, this would be national news. Not only does the North Carolina Supreme Court decide on issues of national importance like voting laws and gerrymandering in a swing state, but it is nothing less than a direct attack on our democratically decided elections.
The DNC is engaged in the fight to protect the Democratic victory Republicans are trying to steal, but they can't do it alone.
[**Please contribute $5 to the Democratic National Committee. Your contribution will serve as a great rebuke to Trump and the Republican Party's attempt to overturn an election. This is such an important moment for our democracy.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc?refcode=em250415-1C&refcode2=512_2563979_G69Veb&akid=512%2E2563979%2EG69Veb)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: My fight against Trump is guided by tikkun olam
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
My faith has always been a core part of my values and work in the Senate – and it always will be.
| | |
---
Friend,
Every day, I’m motivated and guided by the Jewish principle of "tikkun olam” – which means to repair the world and leave it in a better place than how we found it.
It’s why I ran for office in the first place – becoming the only former synagogue president and just the third Jewish woman ever elected to the U.S. Senate.
And today, it’s why I'm fighting back with everything I have to stop Donald Trump's reckless and dangerous agenda. At every turn, he is harming the American people and leaving our country in a far worse place than when he stepped into the White House.
Friend, because you're a member of this team, I know you're by my side in this fight to bring positive change to communities in Nevada and across the country. **And right now, I need your help more than ever.**

If we're truly going to stop Donald Trump's agenda once and for all and get back to making progress for working families, Democrats _must_ take back the Senate. **Winning key battleground races here in Nevada and across the country hinges on reaching our fundraising goals – but as things stand right now, we're on track to fall short of our $15,000 mid-month goal.**
**[With time running out before our deadline, can I count on you to chip in $5 or more now? Every dollar will help Democrats take back our Senate majority and continue making progress for the people and communities that we love.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105868542/539657734/1468349536?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5509-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjI1Yjc4NS0wNzFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=njxLJV3rN7DDKpuxzDYUyAlk7e8nZ9Jj17RdEhXi3dI=)**

Jacky Rosen:**

Friend, I’m fighting tirelessly in the Senate to deliver progress for people across Nevada and our country. But with Donald Trump in the White House and Republicans in control of both houses of Congress, I need your grassroots support to keep up the fights that matter most.

Senate Democrats like me are the only thing standing in the way of Trump's extreme agenda that will hurt everyday Americans. That's why I need people like you on my side to help defend our progress and take back power from the GOP.

clean_body: My faith has always been a core part of my values and work in the Senate – and it always will be. | | | Friend, Every day, I’m motivated and guided by the Jewish principle of "tikkun olam” – which means to repair the world and leave it in a better place than how we found it. It’s why I ran for office in the first place – becoming the only former synagogue president and just the third Jewish woman ever elected to the U.S. Senate. And today, it’s why I'm fighting back with everything I have to stop Donald Trump's reckless and dangerous agenda. At every turn, he is harming the American people and leaving our country in a far worse place than when he stepped into the White House. body:
| | | Y'all...Ohio and Florida. **Ohio and freakin' Florida!**

As pissed as I am that Trump and his followers are back in charge, they could be giving us two HUGE chances to take back the Senate.

Putting JD Vance's and Marco Rubio's seats up for grabs in special elections? I mean, they might as well be handing us a personalized invitation to get right back in this!

And you know what? We've gotta reply HELL YES! If you agree, **[chip in $5 before tonight's mid-month deadline to fight for every seat and say "sorry Donald Trump, but we're gonna win back the Senate!!" Your gift will even be TRIPLED to $15 until the deadline>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/21464?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250415-JamesCarville-CarvilleSpecialElectionsFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250415-JamesCarville-CarvilleSpecialElectionsFR-Pros-sl1&akid=20034%2E9716520%2ECAd0Cm)**

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Join me in the fight against Oligarchy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
I just launched my campaign for reelection because I am committed to building a working class movement to fight against these oligarchs.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1591%2E791427%2ElT3v9m)

Friend, as America becomes more of an oligarchy, the mega-rich have never had it better.
They have a president in the White House who lets billionaires like Elon Musk slash government services and deregulate big businesses.
They have Republican majorities in Congress who are willing to cut Medicaid and Social Security to deliver huge tax cuts for the 0.1%.
They have a far-right SCOTUS majority that almost always sides with corporations and bosses over workers and consumers.
And it sure seems that just last week, Trump and his friends in the billionaire class made away like bandits by gaming the stock market with Trump’s tariff announcements.
**I just launched my campaign for reelection because I am committed to building a working class movement to fight against these oligarchs.**
Because the billionaires have made it clear that they are willing to lead our country down the road of MAGA fascism if it means they can put a few more dollars in their pockets.
So, I’m asking you: Will you join me in the fight against these oligarchs and for a democracy of the people and not just the rich and powerful?
They may have millions of dollars to spend against us, but we have the power of a grassroots movement, where a $3 donation from you can turn into millions when everyone does their part.
**[Chip in $3 today and help us fight back against Trump and the oligarchs in his White House. It’s past time to take power in our democracy out of the hands of the wealthy few and return it to the people so we can create a country where the working class thrives.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-april25.zbfFse&refcode=em250415-1-180&t=2&akid=1591%2E791427%2ElT3v9m)

body:

---
We’re giving away **250 of these hilarious "Better Coverage Than 5G" Trump t-shirts for FREE.**
Yep, totally free.
All you need to do is cover shipping, and we’ll send one your way. This tee isn’t just funny—it’s bold.
It’s for patriots who aren’t afraid to stand tall, speak up, and make a statement.

**You’ll be heard.** But don’t wait too long.
Only **250 shirts** are up for grabs.
Once they’re gone, they’re gone.
So grab yours now and show that Trump’s message has better coverage than ever before!
---
[](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/21116/6374453/0300880f547558fb6eaacf04ca73231fa9e13175/59949532388ceda0d4ffd5483a5163467951d4a9)

Wear the shirt.
Make the statement.
And let everyone know—you can hear us now.

This tee isn’t just funny—it’s bold. It’s for patriots who aren’t afraid to stand tall, speak up, and make a statement. You’ll be heard. But don’t wait too long. Only 250 shirts are up for grabs. Once they’re gone, they’re gone. So grab yours now and show that Trump’s message has better coverage than ever before! P.S. Want to be louder than 5G? Wear the shirt. Make the statement. And let everyone know—you can hear us now. | | | | | MATERIAL CONNECTION DISCLOSURE: You should assume that the sender of this email has an affiliate relationship and/or another material connection to the person or businesses mentioned in this message and may receive commissions from purchases you make on subsequent web sites. subject: Supporter survey: Foreign interference in our elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=25.00&contactdata=lRc0gipG0chuy9tq87kPTFIamMegxRZ6cvf52/0HzDH4JjLIzacqD5ThsamjYvqqxKqt+aDuz5CrfV0vydSvbk0S0g3fYiulNAtZXgqra5s=]
Politico: Foreign influence efforts are circling the presidential election. Again. [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/Politico_ForeignInterference.png]
The Department of Justice has previously seized websites linked to Russian disinformation campaigns. Federal authorities separately accused two employees of the Moscow-controlled media organization RT of being a part of a scheme to spread Russian propaganda, bolstered by millions of dollars.
That comes on the heels of a Beltway think tank revealing that a network of pro-Iranian sites have been circulating disinformation around the election, not long after the intelligence community linked Iran to a hacking of a presidential campaign. U.S. officials have said that Russia, Iran, and China were all trying to influence our elections.
We want to hear from voters in your area on this issue. Will you take our one-question poll right away?
Team: Are you worried about foreign interference in our elections?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.everyaction.com/WI7XQsH6D0Kn6HzC8Tsadw2?am=15.00&contactdata=lRc0gipG0chuy9tq87kPTFIamMegxRZ6cvf52/0HzDH4JjLIzacqD5ThsamjYvqqxKqt+aDuz5CrfV0vydSvbk0S0g3fYiulNAtZXgqra5s=] NO [https://secure.everyaction.com/WI7XQsH6D0Kn6HzC8Tsadw2?am=15.00&contactdata=lRc0gipG0chuy9tq87kPTFIamMegxRZ6cvf52/0HzDH4JjLIzacqD5ThsamjYvqqxKqt+aDuz5CrfV0vydSvbk0S0g3fYiulNAtZXgqra5s=]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=25.00&contactdata=lRc0gipG0chuy9tq87kPTFIamMegxRZ6cvf52/0HzDH4JjLIzacqD5ThsamjYvqqxKqt+aDuz5CrfV0vydSvbk0S0g3fYiulNAtZXgqra5s=]

Taming the Tariff Talk: How Trump's Bold Action Could Help Your Family

Talk of tariffs is in the wind and on the lips of every politician, pundit, and newscaster. Trump promises a dramatic shift in the
world economic system in favor of our nation. Despite the naysayers who claim it will fail to help our country in any way – we
believe this dramatic action will Make America Wealthy Again.

This week, we're breaking down the tariff talk and discussing what the Trump administration could do for your family through this
and other initiatives.

A HEALTHIER 2025 WITH MOMS FOR AMERICA AND CARDIO MIRACLE

At Moms for America, we prioritize sharing resources that promote health and wellness among our community. One such product is
Cardio Miracle. We encourage you to explore Cardio Miracle and determine if it's the right fit for your health journey. Many moms,
including our founder Kimberly Fletcher, have incorporated it into their daily routines and appreciate its commitment to quality
and transparency. Watch the video below, and for more information and to see if Cardio Miracle aligns with your wellness goals,
visit their website.

clean_body: If you have a Gen Z child or grandchild you have probably wondered about the world we are leaving them. There are big signs of hope in the conservative movement! If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] [] April 15, 2025 • Newsletter Moms for America Weekly Blog [] [] Taming the Tariff Talk: How Trump's Bold Action Could Help Your Family Talk of tariffs is in the wind and on the lips of every politician, pundit, and newscaster. Trump promises a dramatic shift in the world economic system in favor of our nation. Despite the naysayers who claim it will fail to help our country in any way – we believe this dramatic action will Make America Wealthy Again. This week, we're breaking down the tariff talk and discussing what the Trump administration could do for your family through this and other initiatives. Read the Blog [] Isabel Brown on Gen Z and Family Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] [] Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] Our returning guest Isabel Brown shares what she sees Gen Z doing right. Isabel is a content creator giving voice to conservative values for a new generation. On her podcast and in her books, she shares what she sees happening in culture, media, dating, fashion, and the latest trends. When Isabel joined us at CPAC this year, she also had some exciting news to share! Like, subscribe and share. View the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast on Spotify [] [] In Truth & Liberty, Kimberly Fletcher Founder and President Moms for America® The Mom View [] [] Empowering Conversations Start Here! From parenting to public policy, The MomView delves into the topics that shape our culture, impact our nation and influence our homes, because every issue is a mom issue. Season 2 Episodes on Mondays at 10am ET View on YouTube [] View on Rumble [] [] [] A HEALTHIER 2025 WITH MOMS FOR AMERICA AND CARDIO MIRACLE At Moms for America, we prioritize sharing resources that promote health and wellness among our community. One such product is Cardio Miracle. We encourage you to explore Cardio Miracle and determine if it's the right fit for your health journey. Many moms, including our founder Kimberly Fletcher, have incorporated it into their daily routines and appreciate its commitment to quality and transparency. Watch the video below, and for more information and to see if Cardio Miracle aligns with your wellness goals, visit their website. | URGENT: [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T69ddd772-0743-4b34-8066-d63abd1825e2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, the National Museum of African American History and Culture is an incredible institution, but Trump is threatening to DEFUND it!! [We have to show Trump that Americans won’t stand by while he ruins the beloved Smithsonian Institution! Will you add your name to our petition condemning Trump’s threats to defund our national museums? We need [350] people in VA today:](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0d96ab51-e629-401d-a33d-062ef606a69c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [SIGN ON TO PROTECT
BLACK HISTORY →](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf604cfbc-d873-45eb-af3f-41377367b07f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Trump’s attacks on DEI are ridiculous. He used an executive order to LIE. He said the African American Smithsonian Museum is part of a “widespread effort to rewrite our nation’s history.” – but in reality that’s exactly what he’s doing!! He’s trying to twist the truth about our nation’s painful history of slavery and segregation, and totally ignore the ongoing fight for equality. But the facts speak for themselves: [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0b321f2b-0419-4b7e-b932-4a468909e559/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [We _must_ stand in defense of Black history and DEMAND that Trump stop his dangerous attacks on the Black Smithsonian TODAY!! Please, Peter, sign on to our petition by 11:59 PM tonight.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T879e7d35-d016-427e-88d0-c397fbc63607/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [SIGN ON TO PROTECT

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb5c26933-472c-4fc3-b693-2a9f987b2501/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Michigan.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
As you know, our senior senator, Gary Peters, recently announced that he won't seek re-election this term.
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=2271%2E135344%2EE0ZKpK)

As you know, our senior senator, Michigan’s senior senator, Gary Peters, recently announced that he won't seek re-election after this term.
That makes Michigan's Senate seat one of only two senate races in the country currently held by a Democrat happening in a state won by Donald Trump.
That means the Michigan Senate race will be the highest priority race for Republicans this cycle. We won our Senate race last cycle by about 19,000 votes – one of the closest races in the country – and we did it facing almost $80 million in outside spending trying to defeat us.
You might have heard that Mike Rogers, the man I beat last year, is running again. Mike knows how to run and starts with an existing fundraising network, base of volunteers, and millions of people who have already voted for him.
I will be all-in to support the eventual Democratic nominee in this race, just as Senator Debbie Stabenow was in my race, and I will do everything I can to make sure they are elected. One of the ways you and I can do that is by making a donation to the Michigan Senate Democratic nominee fund.
This is a fund that raises money for the winner of the 2026 primary and is available for them as soon as they win. Senator Stabenow raised into this fund in last year’s race, and when I won the primary, the funds were allocated to my campaign.
[**If you understand the importance of Michigan's Senate race, split a donation between the Democratic Senate Nominee Fund and my campaign so we can both help the winner of the Democratic primary in August 2026.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-msnf-jan25.cK2qzP&refcode=em250415-1&t=2&akid=2271%2E135344%2EE0ZKpK)
There will be a number of good candidates running in the Democratic primary for this Senate seat. Your help ensures that whoever wins is poised to head into the vital 2026 election strong.
Thank you,
Elissa Slotkin
**[CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-msnf-jan25.cK2qzP&refcode=em250415-1&t=3&akid=2271%2E135344%2EE0ZKpK)**

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=2271%2E135344%2EE0ZKpK).

[ Sign up here to receive fewer emails.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/signup/users-fewer-emails/?t=5&akid=2271%2E135344%2EE0ZKpK)

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.

Solicitations made by Elissa Slotkin are limited by Federal law. As a Federal candidates and officeholder she is soliciting only donations of up to $3300 per election from individuals and up to $5000 per election from multi-candidate political committees. She are not soliciting donations in any amount from corporations, labororganizations, foreign nationals, federal contractors, or national banks.

name: Giffords.org
subject: 404 Page Not Found
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We cannot let this continue.
#

Friends -
The gun lobby loves Donald Trump.
In each of his elections, they’ve done everything they could to support him – from endorsements to donations to mobilizing their base to turn out the vote.
Now Trump is paying back the favor.
**FIRST:** Shortly after being inaugurated, Trump shut down the Office of Gun Violence Prevention, removed the government advisory declaring gun violence a public health crisis in America, and took any mention of it off the White House’s website.
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-apr25.x-ZdIQ&refcode=em250415-1-b&t=1&akid=10307%2E3935704%2E4_-IEI)
**THEN:** Health Secretary RFK Jr. announced the CDC would be laying off thousands of workers — which included massive cuts to the department leading the research on preventing gun violence.
**NOW:** The ATF is announcing that they are repealing its “zero tolerance” policy — meaning gun dealers who willingly sold firearms to convicted felons or failed to run basic background checks can keep selling guns.
And we’re not even three months in. Every week, the Trump administration is working to undo every achievement we’ve made to make our communities safer from gun violence.
It’s clear the Trump administration is doing the bidding of the gun lobby and the CEOs who profit from the epidemic of gun violence in our communities. We cannot let this continue.
[**GIFFORDS is building a movement of Americans committed to gun safety, and we’re ready to stand up against every attack from the Trump administration. Rush a contribution before tonight’s fundraising deadline to power our work:**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-apr25.x-ZdIQ&refcode=em250415-1-b&t=2&akid=10307%2E3935704%2E4_-IEI)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

Thank you,
The team at GIFFORDS

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=10307%2E3935704%2E4_-IEI) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Gary Sinise
subject: 20 years of the National Memorial Day Parade
body:
This could be the last chance to honor WWII veterans on Memorial Day
It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.
| | | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=dbd1aa8b61da4dbaa724b4390727cf1b&_e=oKRyCoKOnMRDom2krtdL8yi4LAT6M0u7Yvv1AAWnRijI4KCc352ijGzU5SoAEhS3buwyAnCdfN3mAYmkEugbigeD7MnQDmrbxZhPu7203gqH-zPw_Q2hgkSQvyuW1CBJvgOSWNlOtLsfROau5yzb5uElX1lnk6u_8zqhTTCRHeX9A7NA-ShX-iyJjSwYYpc6Vl23L3H6nqAB2FViLv3P-dMNB3y2t-qa0KzJQNf60LhD0BUjlU2EbDpUmUw9E2yHvMm5riG8Q0tUNhg0sYn_n2eKzuOmP_8OzKlJOeT7RI1h2AbvzyPoHVTRxPCH5yJ6)
---
Friend, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 __and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. **Now, I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.** This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. **[Friend, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENTIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=dbd1aa8b61da4dbaa724b4390727cf1b&_e=oKRyCoKOnMRDom2krtdL8yi4LAT6M0u7Yvv1AAWnRijI4KCc352ijGzU5SoAEhS3buwyAnCdfN3mAYmkEugbigeD7MnQDmrbxZhPu7203gqH-zPw_Q2hgkSQvyuW1CBJvgOSWNlOtLsfROau5yzb5uElX1lnk6u_8zqhTTCRHeV4KeoSjJh77cem_QkkE1zQb1lA3w3T0OsaMhn0w7oh2C9Q7_mXJZ47lWO37prTXAT8erxkkpVmxLey1PuSg9ggulwfY9ovrmPn8uUcqIX2sRJ7gSNAwWZY8FBPhZby-jveDBWHz9oTNJI7ZbYfdo4s)**
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=dbd1aa8b61da4dbaa724b4390727cf1b&_e=oKRyCoKOnMRDom2krtdL8yi4LAT6M0u7Yvv1AAWnRijI4KCc352ijGzU5SoAEhS3buwyAnCdfN3mAYmkEugbigeD7MnQDmrbxZhPu7203gqH-zPw_Q2hgkSQvyuW1CBJvgOSWNlOtLsfROau5yzb5uElX1lnk6u_8zqhTTCRHeW78Z4Y2zsXEH1aiLf_yxSAHkiVKMfA69FpVBuZS8EpMdv5TecQilh6JTutNFON4twZIHSmY1sSlXZ_ZDTro-bKuWoOiU49lAP8gQCoAqt-ISJ6jaWM7iZj1gin42xoewuwFq30d9qtDZCB97VV2oRA)
---
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=dbd1aa8b61da4dbaa724b4390727cf1b&_e=oKRyCoKOnMRDom2krtdL8yi4LAT6M0u7Yvv1AAWnRijI4KCc352ijGzU5SoAEhS3buwyAnCdfN3mAYmkEugbigeD7MnQDmrbxZhPu7203gqH-zPw_Q2hgkSQvyuW1CBJvgOSWNlOtLsfROau5yzb5uElX1lnk6u_8zqhTTCRHeUu2gJvJPVq03q49zKmlwg9BrTZWaTYkeulqNpWvqFzU5V6aL41Oive30OnoEv0ibP8iioukPF7NLzZRdgR2SEprjeZNWxpM9R8LacISNkxOeZpw2gBqlWKoOnjVDAmnbzQ7kBTtX6IJJQ3RGTI6PrE)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ **But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded _entirely_ by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country.** Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.

* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=dbd1aa8b61da4dbaa724b4390727cf1b&_e=oKRyCoKOnMRDom2krtdL8yi4LAT6M0u7Yvv1AAWnRijI4KCc352ijGzU5SoAEhS30J9unY0fxWbiuB4U1jFAZ6dUoYici9iM4jAMRl3QJo9BUKpP8oFu99NxUNRkRqj-PvwnAXW14OQxgT9s4WR7DEspn7gIY3Q4849bE-yCUlw69IOlfSbBZIvhny2JdqeGKYLxnEaXxT-0FxFFkl6_1OdEB6jIrT9CIT0LdkU-NOBLMcvbKjejX1JNbGtiGyhD0UMAyh0hjyuZbEwbc6ZQlWPN2CNLKPPcAuTU9Pp6wE8%3D)[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=dbd1aa8b61da4dbaa724b4390727cf1b&_e=oKRyCoKOnMRDom2krtdL8yi4LAT6M0u7Yvv1AAWnRijI4KCc352ijGzU5SoAEhS3buwyAnCdfN3mAYmkEugbigeD7MnQDmrbxZhPu7203gqH-zPw_Q2hgkSQvyuW1CBJvgOSWNlOtLsfROau5yzb5uElX1lnk6u_8zqhTTCRHeVUIniuzkS54rTDH86BMsdresUkM7K1RWjzfW09KeOf8SmHEZDtX_v2rMkZ2-hk3qNiEekI2fSJ49Y8Anas2p99h88tPmERLwIG19qzDeqHQlV646E7cRKrZFSYwW_aAAl1tqnNGqf4gR-OScnzTLJB) If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. _And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get._ You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. _But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade._** ** **That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. ** So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II - and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps - I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us.
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=dbd1aa8b61da4dbaa724b4390727cf1b&_e=oKRyCoKOnMRDom2krtdL8yi4LAT6M0u7Yvv1AAWnRijI4KCc352ijGzU5SoAEhS3buwyAnCdfN3mAYmkEugbigeD7MnQDmrbxZhPu7203gqH-zPw_Q2hgkSQvyuW1CBJvgOSWNlOtLsfROau5yzb5uElX1lnk6u_8zqhTTCRHeXwXyn-4XTrY9gG5mVjc4EX0bygl8TRVMOl4cQW0bqzvRu8ld3RVp8dLvuZCgt-Tf1tS_faHzep-rQEWUcJ8PEAJ3jKIgguOWGFBTicycWFV8PSx52O_wcVmYsvlDES1quveaLrX7_a-MGEfs7dKEwq)
---
And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ _**[Friend, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please - if you're able, make a gift to fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now during its 20th anniversary.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=dbd1aa8b61da4dbaa724b4390727cf1b&_e=oKRyCoKOnMRDom2krtdL8yi4LAT6M0u7Yvv1AAWnRijI4KCc352ijGzU5SoAEhS3buwyAnCdfN3mAYmkEugbigeD7MnQDmrbxZhPu7203gqH-zPw_Q2hgkSQvyuW1CBJvgOSWNlOtLsfROau5yzb5uElX1lnk6u_8zqhTTCRHeVw85j8SV0JAwYdRBmEJyJ4yJyC8hmq7TaD2FH_ltB881LVyfEJhKgH25tme2cuhGLXKHIQTnMJwxpBKPTz7H-DxLGW3jp5bH63mPf2KYpNKFzZ9WK6mxDzMWi-epWEsH8ttdc3W3R4DnQcf5wtQKhn)**_ Sincerely, Gary SiniseHonorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade
---

clean_body: This could be the last chance to honor WWII veterans on Memorial Day It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. | | | Friend, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. Now, I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event. But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded entirely by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country. Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like: Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever. Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam. Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom. If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get. You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade. That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II - and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps - I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us. And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more. ** Sincerely, Gary SiniseHonorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center 1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201

Peter,

I’ve seen a lot of tough races in my time, but let me tell you: **this one is as important as it gets.**

The Virginia Governor’s race isn’t just about the future of Virginia – it's a bellwether for the entire country. This will be the first major election after Trump’s inauguration, and it could set the stage for Democrats in 2026. If we don’t win big here, we’ll be facing a rough road ahead.

[_**So, before I continue, can I count on you to contribute to Abigail Spanberger’s campaign for Governor of Virginia?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105874204/539673402/-735451259?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-04-15_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWI5MGJlOWMtMGYxYS1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=V15LgyWMMECENiqzO9T4hPCU8qzDCyAyg4WuKAWPJkQ=)

Here’s what’s got me terrified: _The Cook Political Report_ has called this race a TOSS-UP, and I couldn’t agree more. Polls are going to stay tight, and this race is going to be one of the hardest-fought in the nation. Republicans are going to flood the state with millions of dollars through their super PACs, trying to keep the Governor’s seat red. They know this race is everything to them – and we need to match their energy, their money, and their commitment. Remember, this race is the only opportunity to flip a Governor's office from red to blue in 2025.

If we don’t win this one, we’ll be handing Republicans a major victory ahead of 2026, and trust me – we can’t let that happen.

Right now, Democratic Governors are our last line of defense against the reckless policies coming out of the Trump administration, and Abigail Spanberger is the leader Virginia needs at this moment.

That’s why I’m asking you to step up today. We can’t win this without your help. The money that’s coming from the other side is going to be massive, and we need to be able to push back. Every dollar you contribute will make a difference in keeping Virginia blue and in keeping the Democrats on track for victory in 2026.

clean_body: I’ve seen a lot of tough races in my time, but let me tell you: this one is as important as it gets. | = Peter, I’ve seen a lot of tough races in my time, but let me tell you: this one is as important as it gets. The Virginia Governor’s race isn’t just about the future of Virginia – it's a bellwether for the entire country. This will be the first major election after Trump’s inauguration, and it could set the stage for Democrats in 2026. If we don’t win big here, we’ll be facing a rough road ahead. = | | | = Here’s what’s got me terrified: The Cook Political Report has called this race a TOSS-UP, and I couldn’t agree more. Polls are going to stay tight, and this race is going to be one of the hardest-fought in the nation. Republicans are going to flood the state with millions of dollars through their super PACs, trying to keep the Governor’s seat red. They know this race is everything to them – and we need to match their energy, their money, and their commitment. Remember, this race is the only opportunity to flip a Governor's office from red to blue in 2025. If we don’t win this one, we’ll be handing Republicans a major victory ahead of 2026, and trust me – we can’t let that happen. Right now, Democratic Governors are our last line of defense against the reckless policies coming out of the Trump administration, and Abigail Spanberger is the leader Virginia needs at this moment. That’s why I’m asking you to step up today. We can’t win this without your help. The money that’s coming from the other side is going to be massive, and we need to be able to push back. Every dollar you contribute will make a difference in keeping Virginia blue and in keeping the Democrats on track for victory in 2026. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, James Carville * | | Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States | = =

subject: They’re laughing at you behind closed doors, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chip Roy for Congress
body:
| | | [](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/zxuNJ5lI29FN4symijRxebCKHefY_qx3V4qB8nLJDQmFVwrRHUsPZAws_cD3j1ZJGGPp7PFsDaH5qPHmU3Jo_zg6ABr7BoYG4_5vKTexaPDsRI0TFgnW85bxiKEI8oI6tlj8IxCD0JiQaGn1mx2zLBsoH1cMTQ7zglMMtjlMo9RexYIR-8RsuPKW_V8xahJIbjtDBNPBZC3CGhwH-EB1F6DtA41X1pdVsCRKWqknHrvKbBxiEV5Z9hR69dvsADtKAxvNUsk6nxxJpz7tZ1rVOw5_NTw0qUYlSpVynxoee95z4V5OH7wlrtaRWoGYF_8qlrUeJte6pqendm4EAzYOS-GBNsyPukSzciSI9XaJhO4Xw3_VNfPc430EEjQYo7nDNAST1zeF4CoFgPRFuV0WDfLx9ewU5qymn_KhlwBWxHPvJQOoLB-vygTr36ZPy1bv1P5gL9saD4bhbKczXWC5aEQv29f6c-ooxBgF5bIOPhFjxWdekgUbcyw/V4XuGSR13n6EXGQ7nyVst26KQfYysoz4/8)
---
** ****I’m pissed, Peter.** ** ** You’re bombarded every single day — texts, emails, pop-ups — all begging you to take a survey, sign a petition, or chip in a few bucks to “stop the Democrats.” ** ** And what actually happens, Peter? **NOTHING.**** ** The same RINO cowards fold like cheap suits. The spending gets worse. The lies keep piling up. And you — the one actually footing the bill — are left betrayed and ignored.** ** They take your hard-earned dollars and then turn around and vote for the same damn policies that wrecked your savings, crushed your community, and left you wondering if _anyone_ in D.C. actually gives a damn about you. ** **_**You want the truth?**_** ** When they scam you out of a donation, they pat themselves on the back, head to some fancy cocktail party, and LAUGH at you behind closed doors. **They don’t respect you. They don’t fear you. And they sure as hell don’t represent you.** I’ve had it. With the lies. The games. The sellouts. I know what you're probably thinking right now: _"Who the hell is this guy?"_ My name is Chip Roy.** ** You may have seen me getting trashed by some spineless RINO on Fox News for not “playing for the team.”** ** Well guess what, Peter? ** ****Damn right I’m not a team player.**** ** Because I don’t work for _them_.** ** **[I work for YOU](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/jGH5JUS1jSJ6gRdoV9Jugqys5_Dg3jj6K7l1-jNLJs53QIsdbwzHLJ_12LGagFYfrBoVsCzsvUor08_BRKiYbPTe0g43RbWFVVnr1Mmxk_Wu39iQzPIHIJEmRX7CjgKVuTuL5h4_hj2vKgo9ugDVjZvcOt3j4ws3PGGM_6FU2rxqt3RYd6aTU3PFMWO6nIvFZs5WOEyZhqDv2er-3oJE1hhvwwuV6M0n76nEVCDnyhLbGY4VgK7099e39elGz3ECDhNSFAP9z6-6_fZ90YERrU80YV6BHbNSt128hnSUt65UkOKI85XBz4BiW3l8U78u4wCjS8El2-vsdtrZw6LEj3ZRJUFp1hwWoOqrnvU1IVKrWsG9VUbaO8zundnqGRpyp_DAArxQTWfHzf1z616VjQrr4AKAD7QdsBWWDj31dbiW-QhuuM_zsabBHHWMT3qO6GWhu2qUl1lwNg-TPHwscEa3Ve2Bx3UVcV3bMRS3RTr0UAk41CIx9Qk/C55Z-BRxcjzRIQohdE6WkThr5awLFHHH/8).** ** ** I see your posts. I hear your calls. I _feel_ the same betrayal that lights a fire in your gut every time you turn on the news and watch our country circling the drain. ** ** President Trump gave us real hope for real change. But these DC swamp rats — **Republicans and Democrats alike** — are trying to feed him the same old garbage from the last 30 years.** ** So here’s what I’m doing, Peter: **I’m fighting like hell to blow up this broken status quo.** I’m helping elect people who will **stand with Trump** and finally put **YOU first**. It’s not easy. I’ve got the entire **Uniparty** gunning for me. But I’m not backing down — not now, not ever.** ** Now let me be straight with you — no gimmicks, no BS. ** ** I won’t lie and say there’s a 2500% match. I won’t trick you into taking a fake survey just to ask you for money. And I’m not going to pretend I’m Trump or Elon or JD Vance. I’m just a man — a father, a patriot — asking you directly: **[Can you chip in $25, or whatever you can afford, to help me fight back](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/D3RAtsixiEogxugjylFaadFvkf7QjjlDJ3PJOZhgCwQiAbQpDfbWRj1LcNZ7LsCUB7Mq3gQ1HFFM5QJVLB2lIS_t_jSB3ZMEPqyMv1Qio627Gxa8De8tZLoEfQdAMrgovqluXVgLfincm4DsHbHujeIRaeU6Si_oTs6RYF8lJ6qu5dSTP5OgtJTpYOetwQodhh3nliLHVYOrcdAY2ie75ELMe_6o7SnhcMAHTZeIAPR9hbNESKFwNaUKVRH8FGpHvOW2Qx9GvjJ5Eqo9qNnmJYO6unzIXmT07jyq7hW4WWJ29XGyvFlTeDkXnrIHn8bFVBUb0TPm7RRVdidfs_Rmu_02VJPlervFwIe1Hma9YugJxS4U6tcRx_GepyMtRzXcSPB657Vl5LvsNCw9kUXe442NcN0x1jLbVfoiRAWLeG84YyZceraMDpK6Z_sVyt4zw6ay2WXkxSppm4s-zdTY_PgGJ7DBUKwKqxRzAbZO5U8Cbz7YLZOyjpU/oO08NpWs_ZY3z1GzlRHiAwmQMIYCFIF8/8)?** That’s it. You have my word, Peter:
✔ I will never stop fighting for you.
✔ I will never stop listening to you.
✔ And I will NEVER sell you out — not for a vote, not for a check, not for anything. This is my promise to you. As a man. As a father. As someone who actually gives a damn. **[I would be honored to earn your support today](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/QGW01aCIiP3vq2k6rhnaV8pB37BoRhQVxYFxKgMVKVZzUfdX-6abvTrn-fGjJwGgBWJhelb6c4kkHCtfTv2nMA_dYkQZyNYymO3a6l_2rtbOGHtMATXLUQbHmgtuwMCxkbAOQAv5vQR27h-DUXHDa1PcstOewJlG20p1fKa9fv1eVN8ZS53i8R1Nuo-X_5fxNlv_18J5PBbRVnKlZ2uVCkP0qKPSd5N3I1B2RuX7ZtEhV8nS57yyzGz_6G7ZG8tFoHXuhkZAqrLnX_c3GfwI6vRelfA1tyWYZdk6PbB23ZmRDuO-9GzmXJHHIqVGbVLiVGzRWwCtwLRQHS7aCRD88-752rCBQp7EMmerX7XlT-erfRzMIMBWcVYOvFlq2_IzgVMQytpC2gYoL6wPz0U200BOLnNvR5FdZXTDMPmejCAr-AAtcqgqfn7V-VLyxL_mnTQUEUXHf-XbS-1OY3gGM3G7F3mPsA9uSvbsD8uBVnaErS_uPza9SsQ/JnWNPn2uhxDLzt9_6RdITBjz2UCiOzMU/8). ** **Together, we can rip the mask off this corrupt system and start winning again — for YOU!** Thank you and God Bless,

body:
Bernie told CNN the hard truth. Now, let’s make sure America hears it loud and clear. | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=64a1bcd7e57c48e4ad89ffb6314597c3&_e=asgQsb_al0gZxZl7XorCxiSvbuB7ZPXHd6sdqDqU8Me8y4SlCG5rxZcm--NEoQfNZr2ujGdDnmbWmQJcaJLOc7Quhp1wEu8lVHhupHCjDU1A_OdT6MNSJ9Kc9Ct4xcazNe4EGWyFmStMY7SVel2coTKmMe_Da8AFK6q0zjJM8hBjVtAoHrPGF5TUUmQYmKZP8czfZADvDT9UcwUZqPP64ETzkwjmbF-o_DFHsR9yARUaGOhnZLMD6Ek5ISvG0khuYGnzH9d7UthO2D7HN--35JtmMpBgij03pceNv9DW6bcTLdgJU817fUl0Q-qu3uYx0ehDFe9kjzP-M61mSoini-jQJINlMCHaAAepsW_dkGUOxanCWypdR8vns8UBJdWXq_V627vBUfBFIf7YFEDTUqvljDr1s_2S-b0XwcmhWlS_4Le60dbLw_axyD_Y1Hx_TF4jXb1LIei6xAsiKIkfEg%3D%3D)

clean_body: | | Hey there friend — I wanted to send a quick Congressional update: On Thursday, House Republicans passed their budget. This budget should have focused on desperately needed services that will help families put food on the table, access health care, and address rising costs of living. But do you know what it does instead? Caters to billionaires like Elon Musk while slashing Medicaid, SNAP, and benefits for veterans. This budget is reckless and wrong, and I voted against it. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Democrats in both the House and Senate are doing everything in our power to stand up to this agenda that attacks the social services that working families rely on, guts government agencies, and attacks the dedicated civil servants that keep our country moving. The reality is, we will have more success in defeating this agenda with a Democratic majority in the House. Republicans know that, and that is why they are preparing to spend a historic amount of money to protect and expand their narrow majority. name: Adele McClure
subject: This is what EMILYs List was built to support
body:
|
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105874714/539675255/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE432_20250415_AdeleSign_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1055953&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjUwYmUxMi0xMTFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aXtXWVdJqtvsIwGqj-04YkGmSfBZ2WzJjLjOnmzK_8U=) Dear Members of the EMILYs List Community,

My name is Adele McClure, and I proudly represent the 2nd District in the Virginia House of Delegates. I'm honored to have the opportunity to share a little bit about myself with you — and deeply humbled to have been named the winner of the 2025 Gabrielle Giffords Rising Star Award.

I am currently running for reelection for my second term as a state legislator to continue serving the very community where I was raised. Growing up in Northern Virginia, the daughter of a resilient early childhood educator and a Filipino immigrant and veteran, I witnessed firsthand the systemic barriers faced by families like mine. Those lived experiences have shaped who I am — and who I fight for every single day.

[**You can help Democratic pro-choice women like me win nationwide by supporting EMILYs List with a donation. Join the movement today:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105874715/539675256/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE432_20250415_AdeleSign_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1055953&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjUwYmUxMi0xMTFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aXtXWVdJqtvsIwGqj-04YkGmSfBZ2WzJjLjOnmzK_8U=) | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105874716/539675257/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE432_20250415_AdeleSign_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1055953&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjUwYmUxMi0xMTFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aXtXWVdJqtvsIwGqj-04YkGmSfBZ2WzJjLjOnmzK_8U=)
---
This election year is a pivotal moment for Virginia. With so much at stake, now more than ever, we need strong, Democratic pro-choice women leading the charge. EMILYs List recognizes this urgency — they've already endorsed 11 Democratic women in Virginia alone, including Abigail Spanberger for governor. That's a powerful statement about what's possible when we invest in bold women who are ready to lead.

Since my historic election in 2023 — becoming the first Black person since Reconstruction and the first Asian person to represent Arlington County in the Virginia General Assembly — I've focused on the most pressing challenges facing our communities: affordable housing, consumer protections, workers' rights, child care, and gun violence prevention.

I've worked to champion common sense, progressive bills to improve maternal health care, expand the rights of tenants, increase access to essential services, and more. After the 2025 General Assembly session, I was proud to rank among the top legislators for bills passed — progress made possible by deep collaboration with community members and advocacy partners.

I am where I am today because of the fierce, inspiring women in my life — including those I serve alongside in the General Assembly. Their leadership reminds us why it is absolutely critical to elect more bold, thoughtful women who lead with purpose and resolve. Representation matters, and our work today will echo through generations of young girls who deserve to see their experiences reflected in the leaders who represent them.

We're building something bigger than one campaign or one legislative session. We're building a future where equity and justice are within reach for everyone. We are called to uplift one another, to amplify each others' voices, and to stand arm-in-arm as we strive to protect our progress. It starts with us, and I am so honored to be a part of the movement that EMILYs List represents that is powered by a diverse coalition of women who refuse to take "no" for an answer.

[**If you're able, please help us keep the momentum and support EMILYs List with a donation of any amount today.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105874717/539675258/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE432_20250415_AdeleSign_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1055953&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjUwYmUxMi0xMTFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aXtXWVdJqtvsIwGqj-04YkGmSfBZ2WzJjLjOnmzK_8U=)
