clean_body: | = Dear Members of the EMILYs List Community, My name is Adele McClure, and I proudly represent the 2nd District in the Virginia House of Delegates. I'm honored to have the opportunity to share a little bit about myself with you — and deeply humbled to have been named the winner of the 2025 Gabrielle Giffords Rising Star Award. I am currently running for reelection for my second term as a state legislator to continue serving the very community where I was raised. Growing up in Northern Virginia, the daughter of a resilient early childhood educator and a Filipino immigrant and veteran, I witnessed firsthand the systemic barriers faced by families like mine. Those lived experiences have shaped who I am — and who I fight for every single day. = | = This election year is a pivotal moment for Virginia. With so much at stake, now more than ever, we need strong, Democratic pro-choice women leading the charge. EMILYs List recognizes this urgency — they've already endorsed 11 Democratic women in Virginia alone, including Abigail Spanberger for governor. That's a powerful statement about what's possible when we invest in bold women who are ready to lead. Since my historic election in 2023 — becoming the first Black person since Reconstruction and the first Asian person to represent Arlington County in the Virginia General Assembly — I've focused on the most pressing challenges facing our communities: affordable housing, consumer protections, workers' rights, child care, and gun violence prevention. I've worked to champion common sense, progressive bills to improve maternal health care, expand the rights of tenants, increase access to essential services, and more. After the 2025 General Assembly session, I was proud to rank among the top legislators for bills passed — progress made possible by deep collaboration with community members and advocacy partners. I am where I am today because of the fierce, inspiring women in my life — including those I serve alongside in the General Assembly. Their leadership reminds us why it is absolutely critical to elect more bold, thoughtful women who lead with purpose and resolve. Representation matters, and our work today will echo through generations of young girls who deserve to see their experiences reflected in the leaders who represent them. We're building something bigger than one campaign or one legislative session. We're building a future where equity and justice are within reach for everyone. We are called to uplift one another, to amplify each others' voices, and to stand arm-in-arm as we strive to protect our progress. It starts with us, and I am so honored to be a part of the movement that EMILYs List represents that is powered by a diverse coalition of women who refuse to take "no" for an answer. = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you again for this honor. = State Del. Adele McClure (she/her/hers) = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe . Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at mailto:information@emilyslist.org or simply reply to this email. name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: The Rent’s Too High — But Why?
body:
Thomas C. Willcox | B+L Featured Columnist | | | |
---
| | |
---
| **__Thomas C. Willcox_ :__ Don’t blame AI for Pennsylvania’s high rent_**
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=4c5a23f548&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
* * *
---
| ''Pennsylvanians might be more politically divided than ever before, but there’s one thing they can all agree on: the rent is too darn high. In The Commonwealth, [rents are expected](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=adb0a9c8c8&e=b7b3eddce2) to jump by more than six percent in 2025, well above the national average of 4.8 percent. This lack of affordability has led Pennsylvania politicians to do what they do best: [point fingers](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=8cf004a725&e=b7b3eddce2). Easiest to blame is something new and complicated..."
---

# [What the arson attack on Governor Josh Shapiro's home reveals about our broken country.](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4399133&post_id=161393172&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYxMzkzMTcyLCJpYXQiOjE3NDQ3MzMyNzUsImV4cCI6MTc0NzMyNTI3NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQzOTkxMzMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.mlw2ZyfaIwkl6yFMaT-K7mPa0LQzCs8RAAWor_yWuZw)
### Fear and division are being profited on while our democracy pays the price
| | [Patrick J. Murphy](https://substack.com/@patrickmurphypa)
---
| Apr 15
---
| [](https://substack.com/@patrickmurphypa)
---

---

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4399133&post_id=161393172&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYxMzkzMTcyLCJpYXQiOjE3NDQ3MzMyNzUsImV4cCI6MTc0NzMyNTI3NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQzOTkxMzMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.mlw2ZyfaIwkl6yFMaT-K7mPa0LQzCs8RAAWor_yWuZw&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4399133&post_id=161393172&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYxMzkzMTcyLCJpYXQiOjE3NDQ3MzMyNzUsImV4cCI6MTc0NzMyNTI3NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQzOTkxMzMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.mlw2ZyfaIwkl6yFMaT-K7mPa0LQzCs8RAAWor_yWuZw)

| | [](https://substack..kXzp9YK9kR0ngWxSwTkZLb5bJJrg0wIqF_VB543RrLY?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/patrickmurphypa/p/what-the-arson-attack-on-governor?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Perhaps the most dangerous thing about political violence today isn't the violence itself. It's how quickly we scroll past it.
That's what happened this past weekend in Pennsylvania.
Like millions of Jewish families around the world, Governor Josh Shapiro and his loved ones gathered to retell an ancient story--the Exodus. A people once enslaved, finding freedom through faith, community, and ritual.
Hours later, someone tried to kill them.
At 2 a.m. on Sunday morning, a man broke into the Pennsylvania governor's residence. He smashed two windows with a hammer and threw in Molotov cocktails made from lawnmower gasoline and beer bottles. The Shapiros, including their four children, two dogs, and overnight guests, were all asleep inside.
The arsonist didn't just break windows. He shattered something much harder to replace: the illusion that public servants, or people who live visibly Jewish lives in America in 2025, are somehow safe from extreme acts of violence.
By the time state troopers banged on the door, flames had already engulfed the rooms the Shapiros and their guests had eaten in hours earlier. The images have a striking resemblance to the Israeli homes torched by Hamas on October 7th.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/333374a2-bd34-44cb-ad1c-ad08812263d1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Governor Shapiro's home the morning after the attack
This was not a random act. This was a planned assassination attempt on a sitting governor.
Not just any governor. A Jewish governor. During Passover. In a house full of children.
Authorities are still investigating the motive. Mental illness may be a factor. The arsonist's mother told the [Associated Press ](https://substack.com/redirect/d3f350c4-ee8c-4694-a31f-33e9a27484a5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)her son has bipolar disorder and schizophrenia and hasn't been taking his medication.
But whatever the final report concludes, it will never fully explain the image of a Jewish family, asleep after a sacred ritual, being burned out of their home in the dead of night.
It is the kind of story that, not long ago, would've frozen the entire country. Instead, for most, it feels like background noise.
That's what's most alarming. Not just the violence, but how ordinary it now feels. We've been trained to accept political violence as if it's just another day.
A generation ago, a firebombing of a governor's home--especially during a religious holiday--would've shaken the nation.
Instead, it was barely a blip. A passing headline in the endless scroll.
That numbness should terrify us.
But even more terrifying is what this attack reveals: there is an entire ecosystem--political, digital, and psychological--profiting off of making us hate each other.
I call it the **Hysteria Industrial Complex**.
This is what happens when fear becomes a commodity.
This isn't an isolated incident, either. It's part of a troubling trend:
* In **2024** there were two assassination attempts on Donald Trump.
* In **2022** a man with a hammer nearly killed [Nancy Pelosi's husband](https://substack.com/redirect/3331d8f1-33f4-44c8-9bf9-82c826daaa3e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
* In **2020** , extremists plotted to kidnap Michigan [Governor Gretchen Whitmer.](https://substack.com/redirect/a45256bc-24ae-4e36-a9df-04b87079d912?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* Oh--and in **2021** we had an insurrection at the Capitol, remember that one?

And now, this.
Notably, President Trump has not commented on the incident. Governor Shapiro is considered a strong potential 2028 Presidential candidate and campaigned hard against Trump in Pennsylvania--one of the states Trump won.
Make of that what you will.
Thanks for reading From the Desk of Honorable Patrick J. Murphy! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support my work.
[Subscribed](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wYXRyaWNrbXVycGh5cGEuc3Vic3RhY2suY29tL2FjY291bnQiLCJwIjoxNjEzOTMxNzIsInMiOjQzOTkxMzMsImYiOnRydWUsInUiOjkwNTAxMTkyLCJpYXQiOjE3NDQ3MzMyNzUsImV4cCI6MTc0NzMyNTI3NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTAiLCJzdWIiOiJsaW5rLXJlZGlyZWN0In0.5uiGshJRneoOM7oT3Eu1qjR9yhq5Kb0RLLG8kaCWz34?)
**Political violence isn 't "on the rise."**
It's already here. It's been here. I know firsthand.
When I served in Congress, I received death threats in 2010 during the debate over the Affordable Care Act. I was in my early thirties, fresh back from combat in Iraq. But the truth is, I was scared. Not just for myself--but for my family back home in Bucks County, Pennsylvania.
That fear was very real.
In 2011, my colleague Gabby Giffords was shot in the head at a community event in Arizona and miraculously survived. Daniel Hernandez, the young intern who rushed to her side and helped save her life, is now [running for Congress himself.](https://substack.com/redirect/22dac1d4-3161-4a90-ae4f-87ab62dd68c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
#### **Surge in Antisemitism**
According to the FBI, **[reported anti-Jewish hate crimes rose 63% in 2023](https://substack.com/redirect/96d30210-892d-412a-9312-3d94285d4bf5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** --the highest number ever recorded since they began tracking in 1991.
Jews make up only about 2% of the U.S. population, yet they were the target of 68% of all religion-based hate crimes.
The Anti-Defamation League logged 8,873 antisemitic incidents in 2023 alone--a 140% increase from the year before. Physical assaults on Jews rose 45%.
That's not a trend. That's an alarm bell.
In Pennsylvania, we still live in the shadow of the Tree of Life massacre, which was the deadliest massacre of Jews in American history, killing 11 people inside a Pittsburgh synagogue. That wound isn't fully healed. And this week, it was reopened.
I have long admired Josh Shapiro--not just for his public service, but for the way he shares his faith: openly, proudly, and humbly. The kind of pride that anchors a person. He doesn't hide who he is. He doesn't flaunt it either. It's grounded and dignified. This kind of religious conviction was once honored in public life. Think of George Washington, who[ prayed with his troops at Valley Forge](https://substack.com/redirect/f42439d8-aee7-40d3-b7a4-95f1d5d31328?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and later [visited the congregants of Touro Synagogue](https://substack.com/redirect/6ccd169c-bede-4fa2-aa89-fb5dee9c56f8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in Rhode Island--the oldest standing synagogue in the United States. After his visit, he penned a letter reaffirming this new nation's commitment to religious liberty. Washington promised the Jewish community they would live "under their own vine and fig tree," with "none to make them afraid."
That's the exact kind of moral leadership and pluralism we need today.
Whether or not this arson was explicitly antisemitic, the image remains: a Jewish governor's home, firebombed during Passover, with his family asleep inside.
That should be enough to make every American pause.
Because when public servants become targets in their own homes, we are no longer arguing about policy. We are watching the fabric of civil society unravel.
This week isn't just Passover. It's also Easter. In different ways, these holidays ask us to reckon with the past, to reflect on sacrifice, and to remember who we are.
What happened in Harrisburg should snap us back into attention.
This is not just about one man, or one family, or one faith. This is about the kind of country we still claim to be.
Josh Shapiro didn't run. He stood tall. He celebrated a second Seder the next night, just as proudly. And that is what courage looks like in 2025.
The governor said it best at his press conference:
"If this individual was trying to deter me from doing my job as your governor, rest assured, I will find a way to work even harder than I was."
He's not just talking about his job. He's talking about all of us.
Because if we let this hysteria define us, we risk letting the angriest, most hateful voices win. We cannot allow domestic terrorists to win. We must stand strong.
We get to decide what kind of country we live in. And what kind of people we want to be.
Let's choose better.
Before it burns down, too.
-Patrick
_The Honorable Patrick J. Murphy is a Wharton lecturer, Vetrepreneur, and the 32nd Army Under Secretary after earning the Bronze Star for service in Baghdad, Iraq as an All-American with the 82nd Airborne Division --@PatrickMurphyPA on Instagram and Twitter._

body:
House GOP representatives recently passed an extremely misleading bill that will make it more difficult for all Americans, but especially women and troops stationed overseas, to vote.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105875687/539678729/-1072566757?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGQzN2NiMS0xMjFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WLs_z-JiohWlzUlSF01vRGmsHMijrG-A21I6NeCr_MM=&emci=a5822f87-7119-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=54d37cb1-121a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=21278485)
---
Derek –

House GOP representatives recently passed an extremely misleading bill that will make it more difficult for all Americans, but especially women and troops stationed overseas, to vote.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105875694/539678735/-256290429?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1121-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGQzN2NiMS0xMjFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WLs_z-JiohWlzUlSF01vRGmsHMijrG-A21I6NeCr_MM=)
Let me be clear: It is already illegal for noncitizens to vote. **This so-called "proof of citizenship" bill is NOT voter reform. It's voter suppression. **
By forcing troops stationed overseas to return home to register to vote and making it extremely difficult for women who have changed their last names to cast a ballot, this bill will suppress the votes of active-duty service members, married women, and rural voters all across the country. **That includes thousands of people in Berks and Chester counties.**
This bill is pure theater, it's un-American, and it's a direct threat to our democracy – which is why Chrissy voted against it.
**As your representative, Chrissy is committed to fighting for Pennsylvania, for the hardworking Americans who live here, and to protect our democracy. But she can't do this work without supporters like you, Derek, standing by her side. That's why we are asking:**

[**_Will you please chip in $5 or more right now to help Chrissy hold this administration accountable, protect our rights, and defend our democracy from the GOP's attacks?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105875700/539678744/-256290429?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1121-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGQzN2NiMS0xMjFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WLs_z-JiohWlzUlSF01vRGmsHMijrG-A21I6NeCr_MM=)

clean_body: House GOP representatives recently passed an extremely misleading bill that will make it more difficult for all Americans, but especially women and troops stationed overseas, to vote. | | | Derek – House GOP representatives recently passed an extremely misleading bill that will make it more difficult for all Americans, but especially women and troops stationed overseas, to vote. = Let me be clear: It is already illegal for noncitizens to vote. This so-called "proof of citizenship" bill is NOT voter reform. It's voter suppression. By forcing troops stationed overseas to return home to register to vote and making it extremely difficult for women who have changed their last names to cast a ballot, this bill will suppress the votes of active-duty service members, married women, and rural voters all across the country. That includes thousands of people in Berks and Chester counties. This bill is pure theater, it's un-American, and it's a direct threat to our democracy – which is why Chrissy voted against it. As your representative, Chrissy is committed to fighting for Pennsylvania, for the hardworking Americans who live here, and to protect our democracy. But she can't do this work without supporters like you, Derek, standing by her side. That's why we are asking: = | | = There's work to be done, Chrissy | Chrissy Houlahan for Congress P.O. name: Congresswoman Sarah Elfreth
subject: A Trade War With No Strategy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elfreth for Maryland
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q1-2025-em?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2025-01-04_1&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q1-2025-em?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2025-01-04_1&amount=25]
Earlier this month, the Trump Administration announced sweeping unilateral tariffs on nearly all foreign imports — only to pause most of them just days later. While President Trump’s pause provided the briefest of relief for the markets, these unnecessary actions proved to be chaos for families, small businesses, and our local economy. This is unfortunately typical of what we’ve seen from this Administration so far — it’s governance by chaos.
I want to be clear that there was no plan here. They struck our allies and adversaries alike; they struck everyone from our most valued trade partners to an island exclusively inhabited by penguins.
The Trump Administration has claimed that tariffs will bring back domestic manufacturing, yet they simultaneously cut $1.3 million in federal funding for a Maryland manufacturing program.
What we need right now is a strategic approach to trade that invests in our domestic manufacturers, without upending our economy and raising costs. That’s how I’m spending my Tuesday — meeting with Maryland’s small business owners and hearing directly from them about how we can grow our economy, not tear it apart.
I’m fighting for an economy that works for everyone, where every family and local business owner has the opportunity to get ahead. I know these tariffs are not the answer. Will you join me? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q2-2025-em?refcode=blu_em_sefc_2025-04-12]

Sarah Elfreth

**SHOULD UNHEALTHY FOODS AND SNACKS BE BANNED FROM SNAP?**
_**Do you support a complete and total ban on purchasing Soda, Candy, Dessert, and Salty Snacks with government welfare benefits like SNAP and food stamps?**_**

[** YES, BAN THESE PRODUCTS FROM PURCHASE WITH WELFARE BENEFITS! **](http://links.futureprosperityinitiative.co/u/click?_t=f00dcde1db774f098464bf29925dbc77&_m=7f033c427d5c4b3f8feed1d016251db9&_e=HgWjuCmJs_JCBDOg3jYja0VTjCbKeIkI2mOs8UfpMrppf2tb8ZtFMIwynwiuc7mSMcLHFIuls9Nmmm1AJcieLUXqFZ-24tHWfpf_M1lyyuCfYFftVJcHURaJ7NgIhyfuTCgFsl1yi1njPs5XHTgON_1lOIT6-_XmuvayWCYZm0jMhj0np8WOQY7WrwpWdvwNwtiSUDVQ17pQsTNNvETsdtVCPvPkH2ovSIj-x9WE1aU2HUnrSc_p-5pdjiTpgV-_91qlyfe-fIb2gXmoHxM_RplvxtTna8h5bDArb8kywiyhmCB8A7Ekcu-njmDNPWB-G4R1-y_rCmBMGim8p-k4cQ%3D%3D)

Peter, many Americans support a **complete and total ban on the purchase of Soda, Candy, Dessert, and Salty Snacks with government benefits, like SNAP or food stamps.** They argue that taxpayer dollars should not be used to make America less healthy, and government food benefits should go toward pantry staples and healthier options like eggs, milk, bread, vegetables, and more.

Some even see it as a way to stick it to Big Food and fight back against soda manufacturers by hurting their sales with this ban, given that many of these companies have unprecedented market share and control of the soft drink industry.

**Opponents of the "unhealthy food" ban argue that Americans should be free to purchase whatever grocery they like, **whether that be a healthy or unhealthy option, and method of purchase - credit card, food stamps, SNAP, cash, or something else - shouldn't matter. Some say that banning Americans from purchasing these products is unfair to the companies that sell them, and legislation shouldn't be used to target these companies.

Thanks for your input,

Future Prosperity Initiative

[](http://links.futureprosperityinitiative.co/u/click?_t=f00dcde1db774f098464bf29925dbc77&_m=7f033c427d5c4b3f8feed1d016251db9&_e=HgWjuCmJs_JCBDOg3jYja0VTjCbKeIkI2mOs8UfpMrppf2tb8ZtFMIwynwiuc7mSMcLHFIuls9Nmmm1AJcieLUXqFZ-24tHWfpf_M1lyyuCfYFftVJcHURaJ7NgIhyfuTCgFsl1yi1njPs5XHTgON__Q2B89lQfUHXr7sUROkyjyrYZKcbhdn72JAz1F-HwR1kP4YuRas0KLP5jZE9Yihfq1JGd4kWoUe-VWg90cD-3Pr2rmzm_Dh3oUqIQLC0mDoi92NU6yiohi-lbO0q5uCc-XXrg5Stocd0eFvZFDXK_FU45jw4RQ0bPVVhKhqLUU)
Future Prosperity Initiative (FPI) was founded on the belief in America's enduring promise of opportunity. FPI aims to dissect the varied perspectives within the younger voting bloc and advocate for legislation and policies that pave the way for enhanced opportunities for future generations of Americans.__

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: “the big one to eliminate”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Folks,
While Republicans focus on handing out tax breaks to billionaires and Donald Trump focuses on instigating a constitutional crisis, Elon Musk is up to his own antics – recently announcing that Social Security is “the big one to eliminate” for DOGE.
This comes after he called Social Security “the biggest Ponzi scheme of all time” and falsely claimed that undocumented immigrants and long-deceased Americans are among those receiving benefits.
Let’s be really clear: Social Security is a hugely successful program that allows millions of hard-working Americans to retire with dignity and receive the benefits they earned after paying into the program for decades. It’s also one of our most effective anti-poverty programs in the United States!
I may be young compared to my fellow Members of Congress, but even I am old enough to remember that Republicans used to shy away from these wildly extreme proposals that would gut programs that seniors rely on like Social Security and Medicare!
Now that Musk has made it clear that Social Security has a massive target on its back, it’s more important than ever that we make it unmistakably clear to the GOP that this is NOT an acceptable move for the American people.
I’ve said it before and I’ll say it again – a strong public outcry does matter right now.
So today I’m asking: Will you sign my petition to pass my Delete DOGE Act so we can stop Elon Musk and protect Social Security? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/nZo7FQ33c0Cinl3c-cnlpQ2]
SIGN THE PETITION [https://secure.ngpvan.com/nZo7FQ33c0Cinl3c-cnlpQ2]
I’ll never stop fighting to protect Social Security, Medicare, Medicaid, and other critical programs that millions of people rely on.
Thanks for speaking up today.
-Sara

California’s 51st District

name: Wes Moore
subject: Kilmar Abrego Garcia
body:
The White House’s refusal to act is setting a dangerous precedent.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105878098/539686321/-926250309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjY0YWZjOS0xNDFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xFF14OZSoX9JYD7kYrCcR9B4sFpY4LPiI2D1jA3l3kk=&emci=dea28ece-0b1a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=f264afc9-141a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=24635485)
No matter what others are saying, here are the facts: Kilmar Armando Abrego Garcia is a father. He is a sheet metal apprentice. And he is a Maryland resident. On March 15, 2025, he was wrongfully deported to El Salvador. The Trump administration admitted to their “administrative error” and, in a 9-0 decision, the Supreme Court demanded they fix it. Now, President Trump is refusing to take action and to return Kilmar to his home. _And he’s even threatening to deport other U.S. citizens._ It’s outrageous. Not only that, it has the potential to serve as a dangerous precedent for what Trump can get away with. **I will not stand idly by as this administration disappears Americans to foreign prisons.** I hope you will stand with me. Elevate, Wes

name: BTT
subject: Martha Stewart got 5 months in prison for less
body:
| |
---
Soon we'll see how many members of Congress cashed out on insider info prior to Trump’s recent 90 day tariff pause announcement. | [View in browser](https://yqlzye.clicks.mlsend.com/tl/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwODE2MzUsXCJsXCI6MTUxNzY0MjkzODM2MDgwMTc5LFwiclwiOjE1MTc2NDM1ODUzNDI2ODE5Nn0iLCJzIjoiYjg3NmQ0NDgxMWMzYTZjYyJ9)
| |
---
| [ ](https://yqlzye.clicks.mlsend.com/tl/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwODE2MzUsXCJsXCI6MTUxNzY0MjkzODQxMzIzMDYzLFwiclwiOjE1MTc2NDM1ODUzNDI2ODE5Nn0iLCJzIjoiNTllZTg1MGY1MjI3YzcxMSJ9)
---
|
---
We were not expecting this twist, Friend.

Days after Trump announced his massive tariffs on "Liberation Day" which threatened global economic meltdown, his team repeatedly assured the public that he intended to see them through to the bitter end. Then, suddenly, _Trump paused nearly all of the tariffs - _sending markets soaring in a matter of minutes.

Dozens of wealthy traders made mega-millions on that spike. But how did they know it was coming before anyone else did?

Now, Senators Adam Schiff and Ruben Gallego have launched an investigation to find out whether Trump and his cronies were insider trading on the very market crash—and recovery—that they created.**

And Congresswoman Alexandra Ocasio-Cortez has renewed her call to ban congressional insider trading, armed with more momentum and soon more evidence of corrupt trading around Trump's reckless and arbitrary tariffs** :

|
---
| [ ](https://yqlzye.clicks.mlsend.com/tl/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwODE2MzUsXCJsXCI6MTUxNzY0MjkzODQ3NjE0NTIxLFwiclwiOjE1MTc2NDM1ODUzNDI2ODE5Nn0iLCJzIjoiNjUwOWI3MjJjZjA5MjJkZSJ9)
---
|
---
It’s not new that members of Congress have access to news before everyday Americans that they leverage to enrich themselves.

But what makes this situation different is that _**Trump may have tanked the markets purposely**_ to give his cronies an opportunity to “buy the dip,” or make large investments while stock values were lower. Then, by pausing the tariffs, the market recovered and delivered _huge_ profits for those who were "on the inside" beforehand._
_
Martha Stewart was imprisoned for a lot less than this — as would any of us.__

We will know a lot more when Members of Congress have to disclose their finances on May 15. And when that information is released, we will be ready to take action: **_Ban The Trade is working to stop Congress from ever having the opportunity to cash out on corruption like this again._**

That’s why we’re asking for your support, Team: **_[just $10 can help us in our efforts to make this practice illegal](https://yqlzye.clicks.mlsend.com/tl/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwODE2MzUsXCJsXCI6MTUxNzY0MjkzODU0OTU0NTU1LFwiclwiOjE1MTc2NDM1ODUzNDI2ODE5Nn0iLCJzIjoiZTI0NmIzMzYwYWU4MTU0OSJ9)_**.

clean_body: | | Soon we'll see how many members of Congress cashed out on insider info prior to Trump’s recent 90 day tariff pause announcement. | | | | | We were not expecting this twist, Friend. Days after Trump announced his massive tariffs on "Liberation Day" which threatened global economic meltdown, his team repeatedly assured the public that he intended to see them through to the bitter end. Then, suddenly, Trump paused nearly all of the tariffs - sending markets soaring in a matter of minutes. Dozens of wealthy traders made mega-millions on that spike. But how did they know it was coming before anyone else did? Now, Senators Adam Schiff and Ruben Gallego have launched an investigation to find out whether Trump and his cronies were insider trading on the very market crash—and recovery—that they created. And Congresswoman Alexandra Ocasio-Cortez has renewed her call to ban congressional insider trading, armed with more momentum and soon more evidence of corrupt trading around Trump's reckless and arbitrary tariffs : | | | It’s not new that members of Congress have access to news before everyday Americans that they leverage to enrich themselves. But what makes this situation different is that Trump may have tanked the markets purposely to give his cronies an opportunity to “buy the dip,” or make large investments while stock values were lower. Then, by pausing the tariffs, the market recovered and delivered huge profits for those who were "on the inside" beforehand. Martha Stewart was imprisoned for a lot less than this — as would any of us. We will know a lot more when Members of Congress have to disclose their finances on May 15. And when that information is released, we will be ready to take action: Ban The Trade is working to stop Congress from ever having the opportunity to cash out on corruption like this again. That’s why we’re asking for your support, Team: . We’re identifying the most corrupt politicians and supporting true reformers who will end congressional insider stock trading once and for all. _ | | | | | We can end this self-dealing by supporting candidates for Congress who are dedicated to ending congressional stock trading—and defeating those who think that their power and privilege exists only to enrich themselves. Thank you for being with us in this fight. name: Local Democracy Project
subject: Trump’s new executive order tampers in local elections.

body:
| | |
Peter, we urgently need your help! Right now, we are facing a grave threat: Donald Trump has just issued an illegal executive order that aims to disenfranchise tens of millions of voters across our nation and interfere with state election laws. His order gives Elon Musk’s DOGE unspecified powers to review **_state run_** voter rolls, and it would restrict what ballots states can count. While a president cannot unilaterally impose such voter restrictions, Trump is attempting to manipulate the narrative, claiming that elections not conducted under his draconian guidelines are fraudulent. **The Local Democracy Project is a grassroots organization dedicated to building political power and electing Democrats up and down the ballot who will fiercely protect our votes and enhance our democracy.** [**Make a contribution and help us FIGHT BACK against Trump and Musk’s attempt to interfere with our elections at every level of government!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsCgbBF5rm9TF3OCm2PlAzc830mH0SaEU79yenHkofnNxmYVU0KaNelsGDLQBgZYnw_TLU4ud3LTKaTO7PuapHWBtSwDuHOU_1PJDmfavtIPoCWK8HSTD0cnRWtpFcv7LDBTshATCXm9ZHm_a7Iapa9bM0tpb0GxMNLm3Da3AkaTfpu_ZGRxqssEnbXSrwv4qPOoTdxAcw6sZsfcsR-t7us1TsNqDlONu2ClxOi3CC66PD9xeuUxGy_C7nD2-91o-Wl4Lrnm4a82hvzun3X1gUOJTLGiCUn52oXZaQzLjSrQOS0NeVybsq6DYVaumlJw5Jt2LfRpkWcXhcV0ScYEY_V/4fo/ugFWD7BATiS8QAwtwDhFpg/h0/h001.wFXEgMgYkm4qzN1xQuQTBydgtkRYPPxDNc-rWXzpnHg) ****_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10

clean_body: | | | Peter, we urgently need your help! Right now, we are facing a grave threat: Donald Trump has just issued an illegal executive order that aims to disenfranchise tens of millions of voters across our nation and interfere with state election laws. His order gives Elon Musk’s DOGE unspecified powers to review state run voter rolls, and it would restrict what ballots states can count. While a president cannot unilaterally impose such voter restrictions, Trump is attempting to manipulate the narrative, claiming that elections not conducted under his draconian guidelines are fraudulent. The Local Democracy Project is a grassroots organization dedicated to building political power and electing Democrats up and down the ballot who will fiercely protect our votes and enhance our democracy. **If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Trump’s order encourages states to adopt these measures. Under this order, the only acceptable documentation for voter registration would be a government ID that indicates US citizenship —leaving most Americans, who lack this document, without a voice. It even excludes birth certificates! This order threatens to withhold federal funding from states that refuse to comply and targets legitimate absentee ballots. Trump's history of filing over 60 baseless lawsuits after the 2020 election, only to lose them all, reveals his desperate tactics. We are working to rebuild our democracy from the ground up, but we can’t do that if we can’t vote. Help us strengthen our local democracies so they can fight back against Trump and Musk’s attempts to subvert it!** Together, we can protect our democracy from those who seek to undermine it. -Local Democracy Project supports down-ballot races and empowering communities across the country. We’re rebuilding democracy from the ground up. To donate by check, please mail to: Local Democracy Project PO Box 720800 Pinion Hills, CA 92372 Paid for by Local Democracy Project. Contributions or gifts to Local Democracy Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . name: Team Kelly
subject: Chip in any amount today and help us show Mark we still have his back
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
We believe we need to be straight with you about our goals and the benchmarks we’re working towards. It’s important to make sure you’re informed and for us to stay honest about what we need to mount the kind of resistance we’re working towards.
#

Friends —
We believe we need to be straight with you about our goals and the benchmarks we’re working towards. It’s important to make sure you’re informed and for us to stay honest about what we need to mount the kind of fight we’re getting ready for.
That’s why we’re announcing our fundraising goal for April. If we can get **30,000** contributions by April 30th, Mark will be on pace to hit his goals.
That’s a lot, especially now. But together, we can chip away at this goal with donations of $5 or $10 at a time and show Mark we still have his back.
And when you chip in, we put your contribution to work immediately — building the infrastructure we need to hold onto Arizona this year, supporting the candidates who have to win in the House and Senate to put checks on Trump’s power, and spreading the word about the damage Trump is doing to our country.
Your support helps us do all of that. [**So, if you can, could you chip in $3 to Mark’s campaign? The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself, because it will take a lot of people coming together to reach that 30,000 contribution goal.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-apr25.P7mRSa&refcode=em250414-1-500&t=1&akid=6043%2E6688874%2EvyMdwC)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

With the momentum we build now, we can make a big difference ahead of the elections in 2026.
Thanks for all your help,
Team Kelly

#
Do you think your taxpayer dollars should pay for abortion?

For too long, Planned Parenthood has taken YOUR money to fund abortion--killing 392,715 preborn babies in the last reported year alone.

Now, we have a real chance to end taxpayer-funded abortion.

Elon Musk has signaled his support for cutting off Planned Parenthood's taxpayer funding as part of DOGE's initiatives--but we need to ensure he follows through.

Will you share your voice and demand this life-saving action?

If enough of us speak up, we can finally defund Planned Parenthood once and for all. But we must act now.

## Bill Maher changes his tune on Trump?
A few weeks ago, the White House had an unlikely set of guests -- Kid Rock, Dana White, and Bill Maher joined President Trump for dinner.
The meal, arranged by Kid Rock, sounds like a recipe for a tense, maybe even confrontational night, given Maher's leftist tendencies.
And I'm sure the media was licking their chops, waiting for a juicy tell-all where Maher ripped into Trump.
But that's not what they got.
Instead, last Friday Maher gave his audience, and the world, a glimpse into the Trump that most people will never see.
His newest monologue, describing the White House dinner, was refreshingly honest-- props to him for not playing into what the media wanted to hear.
You could almost feel the audience's confusion... wait, Trump _isn 't _evil?
So what was Maher's experience?...

name: Congressman Troy Downing
subject: Show some love to these Veterans!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
My fellow veterans need your support.

| | | Peter,

This is Congressman Troy Downing, Combat Veteran and proud conservative patriot. I’m reaching out with an urgent request – because the fight for America doesn’t end on the battlefield. It continues in the halls of Congress, and that’s where we need YOU.

Right now, six of my fellow warriors, also Freshman GOP Congressmen, are on the front lines of a different kind of battle: defending our Constitution, securing our borders, and standing up for American values against the radical Left.

These leaders don’t just talk the talk – they’ve served, sacrificed, and stood in the gap for this nation. But they can’t do it alone.

name: Douglas Carswell
subject: Mississippi Freedom Awards – Another Winner Announced!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/msfreedomawards-12848624?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
---
| Dear Friend, **The Mississippi Center for Public Policy (MCPP) recognizes lawmakers who have helped advance the cause of liberty during the 2025 legislative session.

Rep Trey Lamar – income tax elimination hero!**
---
|
---
_Rep Trey Lamar presented with the Mississippi Freedom Award_
| **Representative Trey Lamar led the charge to eliminate Mississippi's income tax, collaborating closely with Speaker Jason White to craft a thorough and well-considered tax plan.** Trey didn't just take on the bulk of the work; he did so with transparency and approachability. Last fall, he laid out his goals at a public meeting on tax policy, engaging openly with attendees. When he brought the plan to the legislature, he debated it candidly and in good faith with all involved. **This process exemplifies how pro-growth reforms should be enacted, and we commend him for it!**

Watch out for more announcements over the coming days!

**The forces in favor of pro-growth policies are winning! The forces of the status quo are in retreat!**
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=1504777c0e&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO

|
---

name: Rick Larsen
subject: How Trump’s tax plan will impact NW Washington Families:
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
The cost to families in Northwest Washington could be as much as $4,000 a year.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105881062/539695182/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGU5OWYxNC0xYjFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lbMKijDrqztRcw8lQmESdW7pT23xWr0z7rpieFkZm2E=&emci=52392936-8219-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=c4e99f14-1b1a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=9494239)
---

| | It is Tax Day. Right now, you may be sitting in the uncertainty of a "90-day pause" on tariffs, or wondering about how Trump's tax scam will impact your household's bottom line this time next year. Last week, Trump announced a partial retreat on his trade war after the stock market nosedived and mass public outcry. But his 90-day pause is too little too late. This White House has already imposed the highest tariff rates since 1936. **The cost to families in Northwest Washington could be as much as $4,000 a year.** Trump's senseless trade war is yet another part of his Republican Rip-Off, and it will further raise the cost of food, gas, and manufactured goods. That theme continues with the Republican budget and tax plan. **Their budget betrays the middle class by gutting services that help millions of families afford health care, groceries, and education. Instead of lowering the cost of everyday items for American families, they are focused on handing a $4.5 trillion tax cut to the richest Americans and corporations.** Under the Republican budget plan, families in our district will see cuts to health care and other essential services, including:
* 34,000 people covered under the Affordable Care Act will see annual premiums increase by $1,460 on average;
* 186,000 people could lose health care coverage through Medicaid, including more than 80,000 children and 18,000 senior citizens;
* 93,000 people will be at risk of losing food benefits, making food more expensive, or forcing them to go without.

In summary, rather than standing up to Trump, the Chaos Caucus is focused on pushing forward with the Republican Rip-Off. **On this Tax Day, I promise to keep up the fight to improve the lives of Northwest Washingtonians and stand up against the Republican Rip-Off.** More soon, _Rick_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Rick Larsen instantly:

clean_body: The cost to families in Northwest Washington could be as much as $4,000 a year. | | | | It is Tax Day. Right now, you may be sitting in the uncertainty of a "90-day pause" on tariffs, or wondering about how Trump's tax scam will impact your household's bottom line this time next year. Last week, Trump announced a partial retreat on his trade war after the stock market nosedived and mass public outcry. But his 90-day pause is too little too late. This White House has already imposed the highest tariff rates since 1936. The cost to families in Northwest Washington could be as much as $4,000 a year. Trump's senseless trade war is yet another part of his Republican Rip-Off, and it will further raise the cost of food, gas, and manufactured goods. That theme continues with the Republican budget and tax plan. Their budget betrays the middle class by gutting services that help millions of families afford health care, groceries, and education. Instead of lowering the cost of everyday items for American families, they are focused on handing a $4.5 trillion tax cut to the richest Americans and corporations. Under the Republican budget plan, families in our district will see cuts to health care and other essential services, including: 34,000 people covered under the Affordable Care Act will see annual premiums increase by $1,460 on average; 186,000 people could lose health care coverage through Medicaid, including more than 80,000 children and 18,000 senior citizens; 93,000 people will be at risk of losing food benefits, making food more expensive, or forcing them to go without. In summary, rather than standing up to Trump, the Chaos Caucus is focused on pushing forward with the Republican Rip-Off. On this Tax Day, I promise to keep up the fight to improve the lives of Northwest Washingtonians and stand up against the Republican Rip-Off. More soon, Rick | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Rick Larsen instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen. | This email was sent by .** Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen PO Box 326 Everett, WA 98206 United States Email is an important way for Rick Larsen to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. name: Royce White
subject: Why I don’t participate in identity politics
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE
body:
Happy Birthday, grandma | [ ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=e74694cf03544d9b91d90405d4f6070a&_e=P_MfFRGlBDMnJ7iu9j58mfA75n70dFJA2rfu4tSLa3Vq1wWZgEsJ6G543dY297r7LGBKHgGdroIKyvqdTMXnALmwRUK0RZZ6qAQvKzOKmnutXPIGtW6NVSkNdSNaBS7cyD4_8RN9PmUEpmpe3iLMmF_naYfa9KcociXPSup7UhLDX9EYs1l-Ekqx5HNE5lO1FtK6AzmTARsFKIIk5YwpPRSoXpud6sswIGPHZQqvyPkbRD8PzQfgrXt-yOfsj4ydExA4mrCgt3inSyXtoXq_rJcYSIv2UnjyqEbBrzx6YlyhSYkZxFXkZ2NOll-RzFxtm2BJRS-gitna0he6pqFUNA%3D%3D)
---
Peter,

This is why I don't participate in the whole "everything is white supremacy... all white people are evil" nonsense. For one, it's just illogical and lazy. Here is a picture of my grandmother, Sandra Pryor. She looks Whiter than most, but her father was Black, one of the 1st Black police officers in Saint Paul. Her mother was 1st generation from Norway. **Judging on skin color is a bad idea.**

[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=e74694cf03544d9b91d90405d4f6070a&_e=P_MfFRGlBDMnJ7iu9j58mfA75n70dFJA2rfu4tSLa3Vq1wWZgEsJ6G543dY297r7LGBKHgGdroIKyvqdTMXnALmwRUK0RZZ6qAQvKzOKmnutXPIGtW6NVSkNdSNaBS7cyD4_8RN9PmUEpmpe3iLMmF_naYfa9KcociXPSup7UhLDX9EYs1l-Ekqx5HNE5lO1QRfyWhFhxU0Ysr2Nmx3Qry9AxiwosQ83XPbX7XBHZTyiRSHI5SDYr4dEy1dzH76bNfwIaEsYNCXaIafUO81QtZr20Murxxrj_NiT6dYabCFHZ5d3Pmr6pWa8M6ouQn9kDPivzHlQ5V_h-b1VY_qa6A%3D%3D)
Earlier this month was her 79th birthday. Everybody wish my grandma a happy birthday! She raised me, loved me, and took me to all my sports and McDonald's playland.

Meanwhile, the Left and Industrial Media Complex will attack me for being a Black Republican. They depend on using identity politics to pressure Black people into blindly voting for their heinous America-Last Agenda.

They call us Uncle Toms, or worse, when we go against the grain and start to think for ourselves. The Left wants us to be subservient slaves and servants to their politics.

But my People First Movement will never succumb to their tactics. Our strength comes from our unity. I need your help.

[**Can you chip in just $10 or more before midnight to help me end their identity politics agenda?**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=e74694cf03544d9b91d90405d4f6070a&_e=P_MfFRGlBDMnJ7iu9j58mfA75n70dFJA2rfu4tSLa3Vq1wWZgEsJ6G543dY297r7LGBKHgGdroIKyvqdTMXnALmwRUK0RZZ6qAQvKzOKmnutXPIGtW6NVSkNdSNaBS7cyD4_8RN9PmUEpmpe3iLMmF_naYfa9KcociXPSup7UhLDX9EYs1l-Ekqx5HNE5lO1OkZbj6SoZcvUU7o7RMQuoPy9Mu9Kj4tQtunkTJLvdXWd8krylcH4vn4s8CbPcLetqzu_WpMe7a1qrbI5Xmx-pcZvs-grz_0_1mBdvf2AOmn2ZdJ7kgOsVz65MccL-0VZk2HEM68ppSSFsBn6w-P7Rw%3D%3D) **With your help, I can finally win my race for the U.S. Senate in 2026 and become Minnesota’s first-ever Black Senator.**

Thank you,
Royce White

| [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=e74694cf03544d9b91d90405d4f6070a&_e=P_MfFRGlBDMnJ7iu9j58mfA75n70dFJA2rfu4tSLa3Vq1wWZgEsJ6G543dY297r7LGBKHgGdroIKyvqdTMXnALmwRUK0RZZ6qAQvKzOKmnutXPIGtW6NVSkNdSNaBS7cyD4_8RN9PmUEpmpe3iLMmF_naYfa9KcociXPSup7UhLDX9EYs1l-Ekqx5HNE5lO1b-7-M_WfQGsWRwtIsr0MlCI3PgW_QUTs82HTVwPD5aMnDyy8p9y4ziVJCnE9fAKPp0z_Ir4hBVqiPHDpsa6YIkAk-kVQrcTNcI3exM4oC8rZE837CQijH64eR68_ehowKHb7nm3tiPTWAq97efOoAw%3D%3D)

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc.

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

** [**PASS ROYCE AN ASSIST**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=e74694cf03544d9b91d90405d4f6070a&_e=P_MfFRGlBDMnJ7iu9j58mfA75n70dFJA2rfu4tSLa3Vq1wWZgEsJ6G543dY297r7LGBKHgGdroIKyvqdTMXnALmwRUK0RZZ6qAQvKzOKmnutXPIGtW6NVSkNdSNaBS7cyD4_8RN9PmUEpmpe3iLMmF_naYfa9KcociXPSup7UhLDX9EYs1l-Ekqx5HNE5lO1E4bWDA6-_5LRyWDkTwPGMJAdDJFO2UBGk53xyhY-ECqKefVfGnc7HQMiOqLb9FPx8T43aCumk8h_0swGbqBID0UJIFsI2Z-p8dL7_DsOG-0uvJxQu5Ci0_QiFt2uavRJK8w6G6aD3RV7BceHdzH0Rw%3D%3D)

---

PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE
P.O. Box 5473 Hopkins, MN 55343

---

Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans. PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE P.O. Box 5473 Hopkins, MN 55343 Copyright (C) 2025 Royce White For Senate, All rights reserved.

**I’m officially running for Congress to win back Colorado’s 8th District.**

I was proud to be the first person to represent Colorado’s 8th – and the first Latina to represent Colorado in Congress.

**[I’ll explain more about why I’m running, but if you’re with me, will you donate right now to get our campaign off the ground? This will be one of the most competitive House races in the country, so every dollar makes a difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105881675/539697061/2033110592?refcode=email_041525_launch-1c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2YzZDI1Yi0xYjFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PnlEOQDm6E5tWAVw9aUDuilLMzV5230JTvdZRc3tkYg=)** | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105881676/539697062/2033110592?refcode=email_041525_launch-1c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2YzZDI1Yi0xYjFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PnlEOQDm6E5tWAVw9aUDuilLMzV5230JTvdZRc3tkYg=)
---
Let me start from the beginning: my parents’ dream.

My parents came to this country from a small town in Mexico. They didn’t come with much, but they came in search of the American Dream. They raised me to believe that with hard work, perseverance, and care for others, anything was possible. That belief led me to become the first in my family to graduate from college and later, become a pediatrician in Adams County.

But as a doctor, I saw families struggling with the rising costs of healthcare and prescription drugs, and I knew I needed to do more. The American Dream my parents worked so hard for was slipping away for too many.

So, I took that fight to the state legislature and then Congress. I forced Big Pharma to lower prescription prices, helped pass a first-in-the-nation cap on the price of insulin, and pushed to allow Medicare to negotiate lower prices.

**But our representative in Congress, Gabe Evans, is trying to rip away health care from tens of thousands of Coloradans, including the very families I served as a pediatrician.**

I won’t stand by while Gabe Evans makes life harder for working families, all while giving tax cuts to billionaires. So I’m getting back in the ring and running for Congress, and I hope I can count on your support.

**[CO-08 was one of the closest House races in the country in both 2022 and 2024, so if we’re going to win what’s bound to be one of the toughest races in 2026, we need a strong grassroots team from the very beginning. Will you donate now to launch this campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105881677/539697063/2033110592?refcode=email_041525_launch-1c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2YzZDI1Yi0xYjFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PnlEOQDm6E5tWAVw9aUDuilLMzV5230JTvdZRc3tkYg=)**

Hey everyone, NextGen here.
We have a few quick facts we need you to know:
1️⃣ Roughly one-third of young adults have faced or are currently facing food insecurity.
2️⃣ Around two-thirds of young adults have gone without medical attention because of high costs.
3️⃣ **Republicans in Congress know ALL OF THIS, and they’re still trying to cut critical federal assistance programs like SNAP and Medicaid to give handouts to their billionaire backers.**
These people aren’t just out of touch with what the Youth Vote needs: They’re actively letting us go sick and hungry to help the ultra-rich get richer.
We’re on a mission to help young voters fight back against the MAGA agenda and defend critical programs that help millions.
But to make an impact, we’re going to need your help.
[Can we count on you to make a $5 investment in our youth-powered movement today? Every dollar we get goes directly toward our fight for progress. clean_body: | Hey everyone, NextGen here. We have a few quick facts we need you to know: 1️⃣ Roughly one-third of young adults have faced or are currently facing food insecurity. 2️⃣ Around two-thirds of young adults have gone without medical attention because of high costs. 3️⃣ Republicans in Congress know ALL OF THIS, and they’re still trying to cut critical federal assistance programs like SNAP and Medicaid to give handouts to their billionaire backers. These people aren’t just out of touch with what the Youth Vote needs: They’re actively letting us go sick and hungry to help the ultra-rich get richer. We’re on a mission to help young voters fight back against the MAGA agenda and defend critical programs that help millions. But to make an impact, we’re going to need your help. | | | | | | Let’s do this, NextGen America | | | |

If we fail to fund our Special Election campaign, we won’t stand a chance of flipping the House and getting the reform we need in Washington.

subject: New Democrat WAR ROOM
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Scalise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit Scalise For Congress and Eye Of The Tiger PAC
body:
| Not interested? [Unsubscribe here](https://links.house-republicans.org/unsubscribe?e=998fa18fd50048d580e64d9cd10dc33f&utm_source=hdscalise&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_eece843b1992c9c47eeea32325c&n=1).
---
| – 170+ lawsuits
– 50+ injunctions
– An anti-Trump taskforce
– Impeachment threats
– Paid anti-Trump protests
– _And now..._
---
| [](https://links.house-republicans.org/r?u=-KKwfzWl7oK4gNPooZXuJ4Zn2xET82xeGk9Y43EVmFLDR5IWJXLuX1xyofMGpAuIp75owg3920kmzZ9HgF71tRDNKvqLP3y4efvqGs-POLmDuj9M0jZUBSJ0WpRoTPJRHYexOnaxd3bAksfkv6AkZNWeoAPybSELc7QFterbrDd-ka3FEEdv1GvuhiU-PEAKkPTd7VwbqQ2kh_MEXeovPAtMHyAEUxb7LbkYI7HleALqCVrSkqrIpyOIlypxuZQBvfWNRSTvxjdb-fFKMcHjSA&e=998fa18fd50048d580e64d9cd10dc33f&utm_source=hdscalise&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_eece843b1992c9c47eeea32325c&n=2)
---
Their plan is simple:

** 1.** Launch the DNC War Room
** 2.** Dominate the Fake News Media
** 3.** Sway on-the-fence voters in key battleground districts
** 4.** Retake the House Majority
** 5.** Establish a COMPLETE LIBERAL BLOCKADE of Trump’s agenda

We, the People, elected our President to do exactly what he’s doing.

But the Democrats won’t have it – they’re about to unleash a brand new wave of political attacks the likes of which we’ve NEVER seen before. And with their billionaire backers, it's getting harder for us to fight back...

_If we can’t strike back with everything we’ve got, the odds of saving our House Majority in the Midterms will absolutely NOSEDIVE!_

We're out of time and out of options.

**The Democrat Machine is mobilizing FASTER and EARLIER than ever. So we either fight back TODAY or not at all.** The size and strength of our grassroots movement is our ONLY HOPE to fight back.

_**[Can we count on you to help?](https://links.house-republicans.org/r?u=-KKwfzWl7oK4gNPooZXuJ4Zn2xET82xeGk9Y43EVmFLDR5IWJXLuX1xyofMGpAuIp75owg3920kmzZ9HgF71tRDNKvqLP3y4efvqGs-POLmDuj9M0jZUBSJ0WpRoTPJRHYexOnaxd3bAksfkv6AkZNWeoAPybSELc7QFterbrDd-ka3FEEdv1GvuhiU-PEAKkPTd7VwbqQ2kh_MEXeovPAtMHyAEUxb7LbkYI7HleALqCVrSkqrIpyOIlypxuZQBvfWNRSTvxjdb-fFKMcHjSA&e=998fa18fd50048d580e64d9cd10dc33f&utm_source=hdscalise&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_eece843b1992c9c47eeea32325c&n=3 "Can we count on you to help?")**_
| | [HELP FIGHT BACK NOW](https://links.house-republicans.org/r?u=-KKwfzWl7oK4gNPooZXuJ4Zn2xET82xeGk9Y43EVmFLDR5IWJXLuX1xyofMGpAuIp75owg3920kmzZ9HgF71tRDNKvqLP3y4efvqGs-POLmDuj9M0jZUBSJ0WpRoTPJRHYexOnaxd3bAksfkv6AkZNWeoAPybSELc7QFterbrDd-ka3FEEdv1GvuhiU-PEAKkPTd7VwbqQ2kh_MEXeovPAtMHyAEUxb7LbkYI7HleALqCVrSkqrIpyOIlypxuZQBvfWNRSTvxjdb-fFKMcHjSA&e=998fa18fd50048d580e64d9cd10dc33f&utm_source=hdscalise&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_eece843b1992c9c47eeea32325c&n=4 "HELP
FIGHT BACK NOW")
---

We know it's intimidating to go toe-to-toe with the full force of the Democrat Machine.

It takes guts. But that's what makes loyal American Patriots with the courage to stand up for what's right – like YOU – so much more important!

It'll take massive numbers if we want to come out on top.

**So we're asking you to make a choice right here and right now... _[Will you help us fight back?](https://links.house-republicans.org/r?u=-KKwfzWl7oK4gNPooZXuJ4Zn2xET82xeGk9Y43EVmFLDR5IWJXLuX1xyofMGpAuIp75owg3920kmzZ9HgF71tRDNKvqLP3y4efvqGs-POLmDuj9M0jZUBSJ0WpRoTPJRHYexOnaxd3bAksfkv6AkZNWeoAPybSELc7QFterbrDd-ka3FEEdv1GvuhiU-PEAKkPTd7VwbqQ2kh_MEXeovPAtMHyAEUxb7LbkYI7HleALqCVrSkqrIpyOIlypxuZQBvfWNRSTvxjdb-fFKMcHjSA&e=998fa18fd50048d580e64d9cd10dc33f&utm_source=hdscalise&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_eece843b1992c9c47eeea32325c&n=5 "Will you help us fight back?")_**

Thank you.

– House GOP

---

name: Oligarchy Tour Alert via Our Revolution
subject: Bernie & AOC’s Latest Rallies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23008?t=1011&refcode=email-20250415_v&akid=8224%2E5885482%2EubLhVe ]Our Revolution logo

Bernie Sanders and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez are taking the fight for a
political revolution into places where national political attention rarely
falls: Nampa, Idaho; Folsom, California; Missoula, Montana.

They’ve already broken records with rallies in Los Angeles and Denver, but
we’re joining them in taking this message to every corner of the country.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25041?source=email-20250415&t=1061&akid=8224%2E5885482%2EubLhVe ]Bernie Tweet about Nampa Rally

Why? Because fighting Trump’s extremist authoritarian agenda means
standing shoulder-to-shoulder with working people everywhere—not just
where it's politically convenient.

This isn't politics as usual. These are conservative towns and cities
where lawmakers take voters for granted, where there are communities
craving real change, and where thousands are filling town halls and
convention centers to join the political revolution.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23008?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20250415nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8224%2E5885482%2EubLhVe ]Our Revolution is working to ensure Bernie and AOC’s message reaches
thousands of politically ignored cities like Nampa and Folsom across the
country to build a truly national grassroots army to take down Trump. Can
you chip in $10, $25, or whatever you're able to help us fuel this
movement?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23008?t=1042&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20250415nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8224%2E5885482%2EubLhVe ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23008?t=1043&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20250415nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8224%2E5885482%2EubLhVe ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23008?t=1045&express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20250415nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8224%2E5885482%2EubLhVe ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23008?t=1046&express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-20250415nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8224%2E5885482%2EubLhVe ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23008?t=1047&express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20250415nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8224%2E5885482%2EubLhVe ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23008?t=1048&amount=9&refcode=email-20250415nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8224%2E5885482%2EubLhVe ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

This fight isn’t about politicians—it’s about people. Bernie and AOC are
bringing attention to areas left behind by the political establishment.

In Missoula, Montana, families face crushing medical debt while
pharmaceutical giants lobby Trump for even higher profits. In Folsom,
California—a city often overshadowed by its larger neighbors—working-class
communities are battling wage stagnation and unaffordable childcare. And
in Nampa last night, Idaho’s doctor shortages and near-total abortion ban
were top of the agenda.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25041?source=email-20250415&t=1060&akid=8224%2E5885482%2EubLhVe ]Headline on Nampa Rally

These places—and countless others—are exactly where Bernie and AOC are
focusing their fight. Because change comes from the ground up, not the top
down. It comes from the overlooked corners of the country that are
desperate to make their voices heard. That’s why we’re asking for your
help to take this fight everywhere.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23008?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20250415nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8224%2E5885482%2EubLhVe ]Your donation today helps us organize voters, support progressive
candidates, and power our Citizen Action Team and turn Bernie and AOC's
powerful rallies into sustained grassroots action. Will you stand with
Bernie and AOC today by making a contribution?

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

clean_body: [ ]Our Revolution logo Bernie Sanders and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez are taking the fight for a political revolution into places where national political attention rarely falls: Nampa, Idaho; Folsom, California; Missoula, Montana. They’ve already broken records with rallies in Los Angeles and Denver, but we’re joining them in taking this message to every corner of the country. [ ]Bernie Tweet about Nampa Rally Why? Because fighting Trump’s extremist authoritarian agenda means standing shoulder-to-shoulder with working people everywhere—not just where it's politically convenient. This isn't politics as usual. These are conservative towns and cities where lawmakers take voters for granted, where there are communities craving real change, and where thousands are filling town halls and convention centers to join the political revolution. [ ]Our Revolution is working to ensure Bernie and AOC’s message reaches thousands of politically ignored cities like Nampa and Folsom across the country to build a truly national grassroots army to take down Trump. Can you chip in $10, $25, or whatever you're able to help us fuel this movement? If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Our Revolution will process immediately. [ ]CHIP IN $9 [ ]CHIP IN $22 [ ]CHIP IN $27 [ ]CHIP IN $46 [ ]CHIP IN $66 [ ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT This fight isn’t about politicians—it’s about people. Bernie and AOC are bringing attention to areas left behind by the political establishment. In Missoula, Montana, families face crushing medical debt while pharmaceutical giants lobby Trump for even higher profits. In Folsom, California—a city often overshadowed by its larger neighbors—working-class communities are battling wage stagnation and unaffordable childcare. And in Nampa last night, Idaho’s doctor shortages and near-total abortion ban were top of the agenda. [ ]Headline on Nampa Rally These places—and countless others—are exactly where Bernie and AOC are focusing their fight. Because change comes from the ground up, not the top down. It comes from the overlooked corners of the country that are desperate to make their voices heard. That’s why we’re asking for your help to take this fight everywhere. [ ]Your donation today helps us organize voters, support progressive candidates, and power our Citizen Action Team and turn Bernie and AOC's powerful rallies into sustained grassroots action. Will you stand with Bernie and AOC today by making a contribution? When we organize, we win. name: America250
subject: Inspire the Next Generation: Submit Now for America’s Field Trip!
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj1lmvyk438mee67m8mhm0d2etfnav7rc4g80avfejibzm8o1jf6xuzch018kwde3cn443r8l9r14m3vyq0pb&__stmp=surs6e&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=surs6e&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6dkapbsrj83nqwhg7qnb8zhco2eltacf0mfyuep62g0bz26v99jvfacao96b29ooh1sg59w4j95v98w86w7t4h3z57kul1r7kwd7n7ul7ucopjl966j5ox6jeomuc4cqcctir3vxtwttpckvu0dj1&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=surs6e&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=surs6e&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=surs6e&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=surs6e&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6dkapbsrj83nqwhg7qnb8zhcoos1jiuch2cfktvvc0pntit97056lhm4grbedbjdijpitm3wenfpwwzk1pox0tbihihnjkpuktu2620lfh6pi8ikp8g8l86w217ezxvkn2dxdi08trv738zyekspl&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=surs6e&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=surs6e&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

subject: They’re laughing at you behind closed doors, Peter.

** ****I’m pissed, Peter.** ** ** You’re bombarded every single day — texts, emails, pop-ups — all begging you to take a survey, sign a petition, or chip in a few bucks to “stop the Democrats.” ** ** And what actually happens, Peter? **NOTHING.**** ** The same RINO cowards fold like cheap suits. The spending gets worse. The lies keep piling up. And you — the one actually footing the bill — are left betrayed and ignored.** ** They take your hard-earned dollars and then turn around and vote for the same damn policies that wrecked your savings, crushed your community, and left you wondering if _anyone_ in D.C. actually gives a damn about you. ** **_**You want the truth?**_** ** When they scam you out of a donation, they pat themselves on the back, head to some fancy cocktail party, and LAUGH at you behind closed doors. **They don’t respect you. They don’t fear you. And they sure as hell don’t represent you.** I’ve had it. With the lies. The games. The sellouts. I know what you're probably thinking right now: _"Who the hell is this guy?"_ My name is Chip Roy.** ** You may have seen me getting trashed by some spineless RINO on Fox News for not “playing for the team.”** ** Well guess what, Peter? ** ****Damn right I’m not a team player.**** ** Because I don’t work for _them_.** ** **[I work for YOU](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/EV56miN2L7ZPRmFmEhec2KPnwv0O_S9T3rWqr85aiRXfG5Ze8UZEjVuJHpHrJiBBs5VypGs6Fvtz_mCQ8_qBO4SRoOHzujY5UNAiByVj6-9ouLBYzmqds71TV8DGC4ECizbd8xYjqx6XU6h0LR_QKU8eOag5fgILaTY9ZORg4Tz8jZ-IxDYzaVRpwVMKRERX7iQLELHP1emIwhRXe4Sx-KVu1F8ZNVo7WB3eIl89Y1kTh8iCV8Rh3espAREreClzFJMM80fCDHnKLy2SjftgVvFLeM1lP6hGab-nTHRu9MOKvGlWuDKwFsPBJAllxFQv0obgOEmynlzwoVTBHWv-8ppgP0OHXHNDIepG0aEMil7nRrlzRdDZz3SjFDF6Jkl0WtbRh8sTa2Y1TA93PkNSHvr17TqKsAuzpfmF9U8gvGtZOqKvDdCxsGIwP5Oh2ItMNo2_Cytu0DOXxhOyGJ5VPEjXbI4lYvOpnX4IX7W0vWbuGexmkdEFg7o/cH7rNftHof3kSPt75Ik8GJTJ_Sks2XYE/8).** ** ** I see your posts. I hear your calls. I _feel_ the same betrayal that lights a fire in your gut every time you turn on the news and watch our country circling the drain. ** ** President Trump gave us real hope for real change. But these DC swamp rats — **Republicans and Democrats alike** — are trying to feed him the same old garbage from the last 30 years.** ** So here’s what I’m doing, Peter: **I’m fighting like hell to blow up this broken status quo.** I’m helping elect people who will **stand with Trump** and finally put **YOU first**. It’s not easy. I’ve got the entire **Uniparty** gunning for me. But I’m not backing down — not now, not ever.** ** Now let me be straight with you — no gimmicks, no BS. ** ** I won’t lie and say there’s a 2500% match. I won’t trick you into taking a fake survey just to ask you for money. And I’m not going to pretend I’m Trump or Elon or JD Vance. I’m just a man — a father, a patriot — asking you directly: **[Can you chip in $25, or whatever you can afford, to help me fight back](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/xisnjJxgNflQdVkKhSNMVvGsRO0lAtNFa0ZmKnymtq_X7aLAzAjuJExO_hTS1sOlv6a5vRlmhnXmbOwaVqprfcPQKHyBkJpEFrhmXF558jz2dpo22IpiF8z6N2wpxKqozI4pFaMM_epKwZklM7MtMzzimPkNvAn7dAWIpwFq42lXxwrP3cSvk1hu0pHwbzWLb36_AdGYNWXIuNE7iC0YO3eR_IsRbEKMejOJk0qhnr1-q3_MEqndIdxo59wWXygMqbQQxqJeSiBDTcTsoASVyd03WMQmYT8bsGghBXkEJ0EFgRX15P1khzQEUjfjPKB6VmgVqHt5ybpb2fGXxr8B6TEqw8mEfApR_hMR6ukJBu4GNb5bVJuGRF49QoiiPC5yplI2ruV4yeytQUBhshm7BnFBb_F_l5zJ2k3TKBBf8YSmlel55ZMD_QBiQhNvKpeEpTIUcFQBqxqy1dtSRRVcWwfNCrm52WNw37k5spYhhOtUH4ikW0FB6rE/6FyAYjCsjM5sX8T3b1t-0Iw6mfcOjhW0/8)?** That’s it. You have my word, Peter:
✔ I will never stop fighting for you.
✔ I will never stop listening to you.
✔ And I will NEVER sell you out — not for a vote, not for a check, not for anything. This is my promise to you. As a man. As a father. As someone who actually gives a damn. **[I would be honored to earn your support today](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/WHLO3XPOSahSGseYZ2x7PPwKvhJ2x0d4NdUzkyZmjLx07LQN_CnH32W0PYwaL2iihOrYP40epo1Qaw13xaQBGF7ckRuP1II2wospOx2LsUyGbhY1Y5HZL1XOg50sSP1xYM7rid-QVSN1knMQK_6dFuC-YoHmtSvrKY0LyfpFqC4Dq-duDq52rhfh8Ma_mnT8B-kH6mb-vzcBlYpie3LmsNfGhYdPFd7W9RMftJDxbg2KMUNWMgFYpudaoj1OXLGxZhOTkkRPMV39GEwFWkYT848roYb4O7CDzgHnzy8Fwy8RGQgu4WX9_nrzzAhTbfuWJ9x_gEkjPrSBzu1Oz8OcFsfzlfXjlOv6biCRzfwU45zwT0wSenAWJ97z8aHRA3ro8gDmOfHsJI_p5-9ztRBrbOzVfZnScWx02JDu7YQ6992wyOeEafQisfjFI_NciDCXFvK1rq558jb7mlhFsmH_0pZZHWvwCpppkB6Kgg2l9Mn-IjOgA88q2Xg/W2dOTxwMz1sAW5qy3V4IquhG0KqvA5aX/8). ** **Together, we can rip the mask off this corrupt system and start winning again — for YOU!** Thank you and God Bless,

🗓️ Save the dates: June 11–15, 2025

Join us for an unforgettable celebration of California’s natural and cultural treasures. From the majestic redwoods of the North Coast to the sunny beaches of Southern California, our state’s 280 park units have something special for everyone.

This year's festivities include engaging community events that focus on exploring new adventures, boosting health and well-being, supporting climate resilience, and celebrating our shared heritage.
