clean_body: Redwood Matters: News from the League | April 15, 2025 | It’s the economy! Forests aren’t the only thing being healed by restoration work. A new study shows how the restoration economy is reviving North Coast communities whiplashed by the boom and bust of industrial timber extraction. Griff Griffith breaks down the powerful benefits. Science They may resemble a distant nebula, but images of redwood leaves under UV light are helping scientists answer a pressing question on Earth: How will the redwoods adapt to a warmer, drier climate? ICYMI Veteran parks leader brings an entrepreneurial vision, a track record of bold leadership, and a passion for healing the forest. “Over the past decade, I have become an unapologetic champion for the redwoods,” says Mietz. Take Me to the Trees The League’s auction packages are unveiled and...wow! On May 3, raise your paddle for a private tour with a redwood expert, a stay at a Julia Morgan–designed retreat, a redwood canoe excursion with Yurok guides, and much more. Education How do you teach kids about watersheds? Our 10-year partnership with East Bay Regional Parks has the answer: Take 1,700 students on fun field trips that connect redwood forests with the San Francisco Bay. | | Instagram Post of the Month ---|--- | | ---|--- 🌟 Get Ready for California State Parks Week 2025! 🌟 🗓️ Save the dates: June 11–15, 2025 Join us for an unforgettable celebration of California’s natural and cultural treasures. From the majestic redwoods of the North Coast to the sunny beaches of Southern California, our state’s 280 park units have something special for everyone. This year's festivities include engaging community events that focus on exploring new adventures, boosting health and well-being, supporting climate resilience, and celebrating our shared heritage. 👉 Find your perfect park event and RSVP at 🔗 See you there! 📷 Matthew Gomez, Save the Redwoods League. THE LEAGUE IN THE NEWS The Mendocino Voice ABC7/KGO MSN.com Support our work Connect with us | | | ---|---|---|--- | | Save the Redwoods League 111 Sutter Street, 11th Floor San Francisco, CA 94104 United States |

body:
According to The New York Times, the White House plans to ask the Republican controlled Congress to rescind more than $1.1 billion in already-approved funding for NPR, PBS, and their local affiliates.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105884107/539704797/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDFjMzgxZmYtMWYxYS1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VlgS3Y-iJK-IsmsFt-5aUn_aF-Jn6lbnEjH2JNfbsYE=&emci=d0c381ff-1f1a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=d1c381ff-1f1a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=14016711)

Peter,
The Trump administration just announced its intention to destroy American public broadcasting.
According to _The New York Times_ , the White House plans to ask the Republican controlled Congress to rescind more than $1.1 billion in already-approved funding for _NPR_ , _PBS_ , and their local affiliates.
**That’s nearly all the federal support public broadcasting receives.**
If successful, it would devastate hundreds of local stations—especially in rural areas where public media is often the only reliable source of news.
[**With the Trump administration doubling down on its authoritarian tactics to silence and intimidate the press, your support for Independent media has never been more important. Can we count on you to fight back by contributing $25 or more today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105884108/539704798/-1581427288?refcode=20250415_NPR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDFjMzgxZmYtMWYxYS1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VlgS3Y-iJK-IsmsFt-5aUn_aF-Jn6lbnEjH2JNfbsYE=)
We’ve already seen Trump ban the _Associated Press_ from the White House press pool, sue _CBS News_ and _The Des Moines Register_ , and unleash federal investigations into _PBS_ and _NPR_. Now he’s trying to erase them entirely.
This is why COURIER exists.
When billionaires buy newspapers, networks cave to lawsuits, and the government tries to erase outlets that tell the truth, we don’t back down. We fight harder.
COURIER reaches more than 5 million Americans across social platforms and runs 11 state-based newsrooms in battleground states—covering the stories other outlets are too afraid or too compromised to touch.
**We will be exposing this attack on public broadcasting across our network, so that voters understand exactly what’s at stake. And we will keep fighting until every community has access to independent, fact-based news.**
If you believe in a free press—and you’re tired of watching it get dismantled—now is the time to act.
**[Chip in $25 or whatever you can today to support independent journalism that refuses to be silenced.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105884109/539704799/-1581427288?refcode=20250415_NPR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDFjMzgxZmYtMWYxYS1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VlgS3Y-iJK-IsmsFt-5aUn_aF-Jn6lbnEjH2JNfbsYE=)**

| | Every once in a while, the media reports the truth. And in the past few days, they have reported on massive fundraising hauls from the Democratic parties. Believe it. Here are just a few headlines about the Democrats’ first quarter fundraising:
* **_Scoop: Arizona Sen. Ruben Gallego's campaign raises $850,000 in Q1_**

The democrats are out of power, but they aren't out of money. Their deep-pocketed elitist donors are already writing big checks to try and stop the _Golden Age of America_ before prosperity can benefit the working families. clean_body: | | | | | Peter, | | Every once in a while, the media reports the truth. And in the past few days, they have reported on massive fundraising hauls from the Democratic parties. Believe it. Here are just a few headlines about the Democrats’ first quarter fundraising: Scoop: Arizona Sen. Ruben Gallego's campaign raises $850,000 in Q1 Ossoff raises record-breaking $11M for Senate reelect Chris Murphy raises eye-popping $8 million Democrats benefit from cash influx despite party turmoil The democrats are out of power, but they aren't out of money. Their deep-pocketed elitist donors are already writing big checks to try and stop the Golden Age of America before prosperity can benefit the working families. They want the rich to get richer at the expense of everyone else. It's not what the American people voted for, but it's what we will get if we don't stop these well-funded democrats in their tracks! | | In Liberty, | | Team Hawley | | | | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | | |

**First,** Donald Trump launched a war on public media, **openly stating he would “love to” defund NPR and PBS.**

**Then,** House Republicans launched the “House Oversight Subcommittee on Delivering on Government Efficiency” led by Marjorie Taylor Greene–a companion to Elon Musk’s DOGE.

**Now,** they're investigating NPR and PBS in an attempt to**defund all public media.**

As Trump and his MAGA allies, including Musk and Rep. Greene, shamefully attempt to strip Americans of access to vital journalism, we must unite to protect the integrity of public media.

name: Marty O'Donnell
subject: Finish the fight!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTY FOR CONGRESS**
body:
I’m running to ensure President Trump has the reinforcements in Congress to carry out the will of the American people, and I’m working to earn his endorsement in this race. | [](http://links.martynevada.com/u/click?_t=3a5223257aca4a93ac027b228c2c976d&_m=47d38bdeebe64e83b1c1edbdf4471206&_e=i7trZqx88l-t1lV9xkOANNp--WeaYdbPvPdIzjTrjHoFj56YnYtf_9FtvJ6dqENOfIVg6-6Cb1lx1-Fm6EHRAgTpmPmSxBnlnQYkk0sKu1NBkOowtBTTecxUAXAHxeVVHUsNZKFSPhgANbx2ZYTFil5UQ5onNSObCf-Li4bZOm-iTWCEF3VO-GVoCQQ0XnJ_skRAMK_KF-WSp0RLuI5itDa6D8j9romxFzeQwEmjtdWQK6JJ5daSwyPWlbnqhlew7m2a49EyYhlTCmzhIGMuZ6svzsQ_80yyC2-_5rQVHAqSOq8D0TO8Vwe2EPioTmhGLuggkIBeGY0M_OBNBPeCrqwIhy4lWWjamDxu1eWbBSdkUztsQbz4jOFWq5TBWc2uhx_9Yi2u5LLRtu3PyGlVNCwIRS0aadIXuEELM0u4j4g%3D)
---
Hi friend,

It’s been just over two weeks since I re-launched my campaign for Nevada’s 3rd Congressional District against left-wing darling, Susie Lee.

We’ve tried letting politicians run our country, and it hasn’t worked.

So, as a conservative and someone that’s not a politician, I care too much about my country to continue letting the politicians make a mess of it. **I'm suggesting we try something different.**

Just to review:
* NV-03 is one of just 13 Democrat-held districts Pres. Trump won
* It’s on the first-round list of top-target seats for 2026
* It’s a battleground seat that WILL decide the House majority in the midterms

**I’m running to ensure President Trump has the reinforcements in Congress to carry out the will of the American people, and I’m working to earn his endorsement in this race.**

_But I need to show we have what it takes to win._

I’m aiming to get 300 online donors in my first month since re-launching this campaign. **Today, we’re halfway through the month** , and we still have a LONG way to go to reach this goal.

[**That’s why I’m asking for just $7 from you before my mid-month deadline tonight to increase our chances of flipping this seat and holding the House in the midterms.**](http://links.martynevada.com/u/click?_t=3a5223257aca4a93ac027b228c2c976d&_m=47d38bdeebe64e83b1c1edbdf4471206&_e=i7trZqx88l-t1lV9xkOANNp--WeaYdbPvPdIzjTrjHoFj56YnYtf_9FtvJ6dqENOfIVg6-6Cb1lx1-Fm6EHRAgTpmPmSxBnlnQYkk0sKu1NBkOowtBTTecxUAXAHxeVVHUsNZKFSPhgANbx2ZYTFil5UQ5onNSObCf-Li4bZOm-iTWCEF3VO-GVoCQQ0XnJ_skRAMK_KF-WSp0RLuI5itDa6D8j9romxFzeQwEmjtdWQK6JJ5daSwyPWlbnqhlewnxGKiHslEjaL5jY8RR_M7C3SFdRKC3KQ5jLQSWztwjGguFOQWEgxQnMhXOC0MRDGL3YTIOxs6iBKJaPnMdGa9HGEcVBfmfkHU65oLU4krv6wsee9lBHAWxscQy-QAmWmifRlVNPl9Gy3Yq5Q7CnVHLt7voZngYe3ESUsdFlFW7A%3D)

[**But $7 is all I need today to ensure we hit our goal.**](http://links.martynevada.com/u/click?_t=3a5223257aca4a93ac027b228c2c976d&_m=47d38bdeebe64e83b1c1edbdf4471206&_e=i7trZqx88l-t1lV9xkOANNp--WeaYdbPvPdIzjTrjHoFj56YnYtf_9FtvJ6dqENOfIVg6-6Cb1lx1-Fm6EHRAgTpmPmSxBnlnQYkk0sKu1NBkOowtBTTecxUAXAHxeVVHUsNZKFSPhgANbx2ZYTFil5UQ5onNSObCf-Li4bZOm-iTWCEF3VO-GVoCQQ0XnJ_skRAMK_KF-WSp0RLuI5itDa6D8j9romxFzeQwEmjtdWQK6JJ5daSwyPWlbnqhlewiEkQXC7W6EieOW1ptzexRqYOZm2VaOthFWj9oT206Y0sOz3VwhBI07IkrK6kbK5FLmpwfBmWJ0HcLyqjCo3pTL3nnGwdnDjr-p2hpCIs9YXIdTKVZvJ2l-mxs07V5wpSMGyvsWyR808pHHXum589j6RvBWhpdmq7X6oCHT76ShE%3D)

Thanks,

**Marty O’Donnell**
Republican for Congress, NV-03

**Marty O’Donnell isn’t a politician** and he’s not taking any corporate PAC money. Marty will give us a voice – not special interests or Wall Street. It’s time to turn our nation around to make life better for Nevadans.

**Marty O’Donnell has an ear for solving problems.** He’s an award-winning composer who wrote the iconic soundtracks for the video games Halo and Destiny. Marty will cut through the noise in DC.

name: DC Daily Journal
subject: Too Much Stress Weighing You Down? Here’s the Fix.
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.
* * *

| **Wake Up Ready --Not Restless**

That feeling in your chest when you wake up? That's stress that didn't go away overnight.

It builds up over time--day after day--until it starts affecting your sleep, your energy, and your ability to focus.

Here's the reality: You can't fix it by just toughing it out. You need a solution that actually works.

That's where microdosing magic mushrooms comes in. Psilocybin helps reset the brain, clearing out the stress so you can focus, stay sharp, and handle what matters.

You'll go through the day with a clear head, sleep soundly at night, and wake up ready to go.

No gimmicks. No fluff. Just results.

[**Get Magic Mushrooms Here**](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/fb90267ebea44eb4bdd052e4b1a9e294-24b36224588e48888cb294a1444f480f/63)

# TUESDAY, APRIL 15, 2024
---|---
**Good Afternoon!** I wanted to personally share this exclusive offer from our friends at Brad's Deals to help you make the most of your Amazon Prime membership. Our advertising partners are critical to our success, and I hope you take a few minutes to read [Brad's Deals message today.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyUkTGv3CAMxz8N2TiBgXBvYKh0yva6doyc4ORoIaSEXHT99NWdInXq8Eb_bPlv_fzjs__EEMMyf8dErk659-TDiJV8LzSXhoPpZePdRASkGnLSam21BqGauzNgW2gNWWwVXD9aK4gmSROCbLW9Dk1wIMAILY28ChDyIsmgUnaUxvir0hPTgnyouVx-5rDUO03xmR9ULmNOTXT3WteNqW8MOgbdcRyXoaDfPGHcXiMMuiHmmUEnBceEf_LC1xIS8YEWmkLd-DPvPOGTL7nyX0s-OA55r0x1e039lvcyElO3f8ncV2TQvrqJfNgTUzcftjXi88QjphXDvDB1-2IqP50KMAzasQ_-vePjXeL4u0_ZY3ydU3Y60R2Ln7HSSZvi_HqEGMPWWqbFnDDEt636__89HPwNAAD__2VMoEA) -Cole, _CEO_
* * *
[](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyUkTGv3CAMxz8N2TiBgXBvYKh0yva6doyc4ORoIaSEXHT99NWdInXq8Eb_bPlv_fzjs__EEMMyf8dErk659-TDiJV8LzSXhoPpZePdRASkGnLSam21BqGauzNgW2gNWWwVXD9aK4gmSROCbLW9Dk1wIMAILY28ChDyIsmgUnaUxvir0hPTgnyouVx-5rDUO03xmR9ULmNOTXT3WteNqW8MOgbdcRyXoaDfPGHcXiMMuiHmmUEnBceEf_LC1xIS8YEWmkLd-DPvPOGTL7nyX0s-OA55r0x1e039lvcyElO3f8ncV2TQvrqJfNgTUzcftjXi88QjphXDvDB1-2IqP50KMAzasQ_-vePjXeL4u0_ZY3ydU3Y60R2Ln7HSSZvi_HqEGMPWWqbFnDDEt636__89HPwNAAD__2VMoEA) Once upon a time we had to make lists and [physically go to stores when we needed things.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyUkTGv3CAMxz8N2TiBgXBvYKh0yva6doyc4ORoIaSEXHT99NWdInXq8Eb_bPlv_fzjs__EEMMyf8dErk659-TDiJV8LzSXhoPpZePdRASkGnLSam21BqGauzNgW2gNWWwVXD9aK4gmSROCbLW9Dk1wIMAILY28ChDyIsmgUnaUxvir0hPTgnyouVx-5rDUO03xmR9ULmNOTXT3WteNqW8MOgbdcRyXoaDfPGHcXiMMuiHmmUEnBceEf_LC1xIS8YEWmkLd-DPvPOGTL7nyX0s-OA55r0x1e039lvcyElO3f8ncV2TQvrqJfNgTUzcftjXi88QjphXDvDB1-2IqP50KMAzasQ_-vePjXeL4u0_ZY3ydU3Y60R2Ln7HSSZvi_HqEGMPWWqbFnDDEt636__89HPwNAAD__2VMoEA) Sometimes we'd have to go to several stores or even shopping malls for what we needed. Then one day, out of the heavens, came Amazon. For many of us, free shipping and access to exclusive shows and movies is enough reason to [fork over the $14.99 per month to get Prime](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyUkTGv3CAMxz8N2TiBgXBvYKh0yva6doyc4ORoIaSEXHT99NWdInXq8Eb_bPlv_fzjs__EEMMyf8dErk659-TDiJV8LzSXhoPpZePdRASkGnLSam21BqGauzNgW2gNWWwVXD9aK4gmSROCbLW9Dk1wIMAILY28ChDyIsmgUnaUxvir0hPTgnyouVx-5rDUO03xmR9ULmNOTXT3WteNqW8MOgbdcRyXoaDfPGHcXiMMuiHmmUEnBceEf_LC1xIS8YEWmkLd-DPvPOGTL7nyX0s-OA55r0x1e039lvcyElO3f8ncV2TQvrqJfNgTUzcftjXi88QjphXDvDB1-2IqP50KMAzasQ_-vePjXeL4u0_ZY3ydU3Y60R2Ln7HSSZvi_HqEGMPWWqbFnDDEt636__89HPwNAAD__2VMoEA). | | **Republicans are gearing up to hand out massive tax cuts for billionaires while cutting vital programs like Social Security, Medicaid, and more**. Just last week, the House voted again to pass their joint budget resolution which continues the process for their outrageous budget plan. Throughout this entire budget process, Republicans have been in lock-step with the Trump administration's plan to pad the pockets of the ultra-wealthy with dollars that belong to working families. **The choice they're putting before us is making your life worse to make billionaires' lives better.** While Americans face rising costs – including the rising costs from Trump's reckless tariffs – and worry about sending their kids to school hungry, Republicans are going full steam ahead with their budget plan that leaves New Jersey behind. **This budget proposal is unacceptable, and I will oppose anything that harms New Jerseyans.** I'll continue to work with my colleagues to stand up for working families and stop the Republican giveaway to the richest and most powerful. clean_body: Friend, don’t forget. Here’s the good news: I want to eliminate these taxes... | | | | TAX FILING DEADLINE TODAY! PLEASE take a moment to read this message from President Trump. Trust me, it’ll be worth your time. President Trump: I know you hate getting reminders about Tax Day. But don’t worry Friend, because I’ve got some good news for you. I’m fighting to ELIMINATE these unfair taxes: \- TAX ON SOCIAL SECURITY \- TAX ON TIPS \- TAX ON OVERTIME Do you approve? If so, tell me: I want to put more money back into your pocket and make America Wealthy Again! Sincerely, Donald J. We’re showing up. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105888705/539718734/-1397648958?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250415_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjUzZmYxYmMtMjYxYS1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=C_mag7NetU3CF17s8v1N_oAUOXlc4L4aidlMTTWryKo=)

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105888706/539718735/2137240182?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250415_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjUzZmYxYmMtMjYxYS1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=C_mag7NetU3CF17s8v1N_oAUOXlc4L4aidlMTTWryKo=) Family, it’s Cory Booker. Republicans are working hand-in-hand with the Trump administration to pass a bill that’s going to savage Medicaid and strip away critical programs from Americans in order to give bigger tax cuts to the wealthy — and they’re hiding from their own constituents while they do it. That’s why on Sunday, I joined a People’s Town Hall in Arizona’s 6th Congressional District. Since their Republican Congressman refuses to show up to listen to his constituents, I joined Senator Mark Kelly, former Representative Gabby Giffords, and Congressman Greg Stanton to hear directly from folks in Tucson about their concerns and what’s at stake. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105888707/539718736/2137240182?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250415_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjUzZmYxYmMtMjYxYS1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=C_mag7NetU3CF17s8v1N_oAUOXlc4L4aidlMTTWryKo=) We showed up to center YOUR voices. We showed up to center YOUR stories. The truth is that right now, our nation is in crisis. The President has inflicted harm after harm on Americans’ safety, financial stability, the foundations of our democracy, and any sense of common decency. But we are not powerless. There are tens of thousands of Americans standing up and fighting back against the Trump administration every single day. They’re showing up at town halls like the one I just attended. They’re calling their Republican representatives. They’re protesting. And they’re showing up to voting booths across the country. As a young man, my parents made it very clear that you need to stand up, even if your legs shake. You need to stand up and speak, even if your voice breaks. Our nation has been founded and formed and shaped and bent by the American people, but change hasn’t always come from Washington. Change has often come to Washington by people who stand up, use their voices, and demand it. **This is a moral moment — one where we all need to speak out against injustice and for truth. And after so many Arizonans joined us yesterday to raise their voices alongside ours, I was filled with hope.** **[If you can, please split a donation between our campaign and the Arizona Democratic Party so we can continue showing up in your communities, grow our movement for justice, and hold Donald Trump and his Republican allies accountable for their disastrous, billionaire-first policies.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105888708/539718737/2137240182?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250415_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjUzZmYxYmMtMjYxYS1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=C_mag7NetU3CF17s8v1N_oAUOXlc4L4aidlMTTWryKo=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[PITCH IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105888709/539718738/2137240182?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250415_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjUzZmYxYmMtMjYxYS1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=C_mag7NetU3CF17s8v1N_oAUOXlc4L4aidlMTTWryKo=)**

clean_body: | | | I'm proud to be endorsed by US Senator Tim Kaine in my red-to-blue race for Virginia House of Delegates. The Guardian reports, "Virginia elections will test the backlash against Musk – and Democrats are ready with a plan." The plan: expand our 51-49 majority in the Virginia House of Delegates, and flip the 22nd House District red to blue! Now that I'm officially the nominee to take on MAGA Republican Ian Lovejoy, our campaign has huge momentum, picking up big endorsements like my good friend US Senator Tim Kaine. I'm also proud to be endorsed by: US Senator Mark Warner Congressman Suhas Subramanyam, Congressman Don Beyer, Chairman Gerry Connolly Prince William County Supervisors Chair Deshundra Jefferson & Supervisor Kenny Boddye Delegates Luke Torian, Michelle Maldonado, Rozia Henson, Alfonso Lopez, Paul Krizek, Patrick Hope, Elizabeth Bennett-Parker, Marty Martinez Prince William County School Board Member Lisa Zargarpur Allied groups like Latino Victory Fund, Emily's List, and Virginia's List Thousands of grassroots donors like you We’ve got more endorsements to come - but to fully take advantage of our growing support, our campaign needs the resources to compete. **** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Thanks for your support, Elizabeth Guzman | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. To donate by check, send to: Friends of Elizabeth Guzman PO Box 74, Nokesville VA, 20182 \- \- Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman. Contributions or gifts to Guzman for Congress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . When I was first sworn into office in the New Jersey General Assembly and State Senate, I made a promise to fight for the families of New Jersey--and I have been delivering on that promise ever since.

And now in Congress since 2023, I have continued to put the families of New Jersey at the forefront of my work in the nation's capital and made progress on the issues that matter most to our communities.

I have built a strong track record of delivering results and fighting to:

🇺🇸 **Secure our Borders** **🇺🇸 Lower the cost of living** **🇺🇸 Ensure the safety of our communities** **🇺🇸 Bring real solutions to New Jersey families

** But our work is not done--****_not by a long shot.

_****_This Congress, we have a unique opportunity to achieve historic wins for New Jersey. However, we are facing determined opposition from extreme radicals who are intent on pushing a dangerous agenda on us._****_

I am ready to fight for what 's right, but I can not do it alone. name: Bernie Moreno [U.S. Senator from Ohio]
subject: It’s official – I have a big announcement:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
body:
I wanted you to hear this from me – I just endorsed Vivek Ramaswamy to be my next Governor! Now I’m personally asking you to join me by endorsing him too:

Hello, my friend!
This is Bernie Moreno.
I've got a BIG announcement for you - I just endorsed Vivek Ramaswamy to be my next Governor! [Now I'm personally asking you to join me by endorsing him too:](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)[](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)[JOIN ME: ENDORSE VIVEK HERE ->
](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._9XaFKUXJH9Xnu5wSrcnzA)[](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)He and I share a vision for the future of our state... and our country, for that matter. President Trump shares that vision. I have a hunch you do too.
We believe:
* You should keep more of your money - **not pay more in taxes**
* Education should be led by states/parents - **not DC bureaucrats**
* Illegal immigrants should be deported - **not rewarded**
* Female athletes should play against other women - **not men**
* America should rely on American energy - **not our enemies '**
* Our military should focus on winning wars - **not promoting DEI **
* We should promote excellence - **not reward victimhood**
* Our farmland should be owned by us - **not Communist China**

[If this list strikes a chord for you, I hope you'll join us in this critical fight.](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._TF_Mfp-Fg)
Vivek will hold the line here at home. I'll be fighting the good fight from Washington. And the President will be leading us all from the White House.
As long as all of us - that includes you, Peter - do our parts to help, the Democrat Party doesn't stand a chance.
_So, with all that being said:_
[I'm personally asking you to endorse Vivek Ramaswamy's campaign for Governor. Your support would mean a great deal to all of us.](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)[](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)[](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-B8ghUA)[JOIN ME: ENDORSE VIVEK HERE ->
](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._ycaSlzNhYpfveRSQ)Best regards,
**Bernie Moreno** U.S. Senator from Ohio

| | |
---
| | PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
---

350 E 1st Ave
Ste 100
Columbus, OH 43201

[Privacy Policy](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-I8A)

To unsubscribe from Vivek Ramaswamy for Ohio, [click here](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)

Dear Friend of Liberty,

Education shapes the future of our nation.

Unfortunately, in recent decades, federal involvement has led to declining academic standards and an increasing focus on ideological agendas.

In standing today for freedom and limited constitutional government, Hillsdale College remains true to its more than 180-year-old mission: providing education of the kind needed to preserve "the blessings of civil and religious liberty"--without accepting any government funding.

[Now, we want to hear from you](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/Yf0dPOBGlMNAOYPSXLC1JXqhT26zrU0Hsft0xujlDMVKeAeIyr9V79BramZuMJvxYQEVlAY6mUeGf1YV2yu8PjhlQWRElHIf41EBHSfk4_HRlbeUt70zo1D8t8FtCvC9AoONvCZ6xgaST-kFdzVbPRgnsN56eiLM5GAslmWbWS1go-jb9EUVuT03I1j7xRjXtSzIWNBlcA6XmpeVDSOpEfoD6j_TeVxGRAZ44PIlhlnr5_Q91uKwch5ocAUA-G6_TwCFZgTdH24TDr9aiGztev1_IAqWxx3ChBV87BOyYUJbm1ATBrQ7eod68_Q6sDZK7FbMCO6y5RYIcnCFR1bOasSGFZ8RPOFIIw7CbdQOKWBZCjKztO_aHdUhRvjjYoKnppkeSpC-tJazORq6ICtv6W53WFIVxsoZfcFN2cqc-AFRoaFVdpjhSLvf16waK-UvtgZUDYg/fV70UBe3_Owin68R68q7qh6iqw6JyAc2/8).

Should the Department of Education be eliminated? Should parents have the final say in their children's education? These are critical questions, and your opinion matters.

[Please take a moment to complete our **National Survey on the Department of Education** and make your voice heard](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/P1SwuJklVvBmtBmbOpz1oawdOrJVIJmFlrUaWNmzm_vqh0jBsSlY8w_R1zlmiGNW_oQB3x7zHyHNYflDSclQdy-DjgREmBuhetZTrHxvAJwgyGCUUZiEUhz4zjs2Cby9ITRb8f36T_1XA6AxYrXH2MLdiBuhzpwuwGNMmpeujaegXeohkVBPxJRIGpkch-xMmBlrRUsqNgjrsvYS6QNr7E8XQuk-otOVbyxZpeApMjMnpepkm-9R-sTYxqd0bdxaLfxn9HoDsHrABE5QagDLbp5BkacBQdQWbfKQHMrVDhou9jHMUPj6AMfKY344nWoKr0300ML6BIT0qve5akogNvbqptY7zcW34UUw2tjv4czl5qkPE_J4DFSSZHe5SasrzkuAMdUxYlJp2uEMijbsLtnaaddJmiZU-NLBis6h1Gbaxg_iN31WgXmvbqgAbl29owQzTXw/kGKAeP3dp642ipTs6uQ7Y3iisFkP9Fnw/8).

[https://info.hillsdale.edu/department-of-education-survey](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/dkXUdP1XBp86eyKh3_d-G-bMoOYD3v4ACwMQacCo4LwaVX-w481ab_6efH-kafPrL71Ys1lm6WV7EuWQJckyIvJIx3utOg1SDPO7TxQ6h-za5WOhzde5UDFechEbBQQe4B4vHe-rekp2YfGTNFP0ozcgS-V278piJ3SgPTtj6-sk2R65ddUItU52tRbTeaKMsE53GYgSDECkxiSEoBRCcBhMbSjeSYD9XBLRxZfEHWrU-BsxgQTTrM3OBlm6p0V9sIKIMtwVUXPmugZRtGS6LHJCkJZuSy7DoyPf7P-XlhZWOiTQiWabGNA4BuCexewQw3JqkHudovAL52of4sKcZr5ZKEnW6FPMv_k4PIxu2JI9D1z6yg_lOsd-XmqEFS_Km2k4vhzxLLqWN6b9HIT-c4CmUP8SK9ZECot1orDcB1k5x0h82asFKadKrtbLnxlb-CkB3G0/pO-7aCkswmAW06ejgNLcO3KX8dpv_xjW/8)

Bill Gray, '01

All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation. name: Peggy Flanagan
subject: 📷 Memories
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
I am committed to giving back to the community that has given me everything
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta9811c80-d897-42a6-83f6-8c99a3abe010/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb0aa50c5-01c7-47ac-bc99-335389a9e958/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Hey there, Peter. It’s Peggy Flanagan. Sometimes I get asked how this little kid... [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdaac5d9e-59cc-4fd9-9f9f-24bd81c28118/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) ...ended up serving as Minnesota Lt. Governor, co-chairing the Democratic National Convention, and running for U.S. Senate. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T16a982bd-02b5-4780-8b1a-57cc595fb755/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Well, I grew up in a family where women just did the work. My grandmother was involved in party politics before it was, you know, polite for women to do that work. My mom raised me by herself in St. Louis Park. We had a home because of a Section 8 housing voucher, and public programs helped her pay for my school lunch, health insurance, and child care. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T405db7a9-a910-4afa-97af-3e8884237c05/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I believe we should wrap our arms around our neighbors in need because my neighbors did that for me. Minnesota is a potluck state. People can come from all walks of life, have different experiences, and yet share the same values. If it snows, we’ll shovel your driveway. If you move into the neighborhood, we’ll bring you a hotdish or bars. Kids who grow up in Section 8 housing don’t get to run for the U.S. Senate often. But I am committed to giving back to the community that has given me everything. I’m not going to lie and say this race is going to be easy. It’s going to take a massive effort. I want to win this race so I can be the voice for Minnesota families in Washington. With your help, I know we can get there. [If you can afford it, can I ask you to make a split $10 donation to my campaign and Blue Amp Action? It would mean the world to me.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6d20f04b-7b23-49d5-ab76-595966f64b66/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T144b2ae2-524e-430d-80f7-b48669a2be4f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Andy Beshear
subject: Voters want facts. We delivered.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by In This Together PAC
body:
Wisconsin was just the beginning.
Peter,

We kicked off 2025 with a major win in Wisconsin — _and I want to thank you for being a part of it._

Our work made a real difference. We sent direct mail to voters to lay out the facts, and targeted it to people whose mailboxes were being bombarded with misleading mail from Elon Musk’s dark money groups. When voters saw the truth about what each candidate stood for, they made their choice.

They chose the person who would fight for them — **not someone chasing power or pushing a self-serving agenda.**

Let’s be honest: **people are tired.** Tired of politicians who focus on the wrong things, who argue over culture wars or try to stoke division while ignoring kitchen table issues. Folks want leaders who protect their rights, advocate for their families, and focus on what really matters.

That’s the work we’re doing together. _And it’s working._

[**But to keep it going, we need to hit our mid-month fundraising goal for April — and I’m asking for your help to do that. Every dollar helps us cut through the noise and reach voters with the truth. Can I count on you to chip in today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105891399/539726676/739826862?refcode=em25_250414_mm1_fndd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250414_mm1_fndd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=4c015dfb-2b1a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGMwMTVkZmItMmIxYS1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UuvlK9N5SAj0XmFxEglJdp5VolUlyvPpJ67rs9K_A5g=) name: WileyNickel.com
subject: Wiley’s “giving hope to Democrats”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for North Carolina**
body:
North Carolina can’t stop talking about this race. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105891436/539726749/-1960556440?refcode=AU_GWN_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20250415_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTAxNWRmYi0yYjFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FY1f1KPHrzW7MF_njlvGgohWGkDB5HP_isXnmzHkYww=)
---
Peter — The energy around unseating Thom Tillis and sending Wiley Nickel to the U.S. Senate is growing — fast. Just take a look at the headlines: **“Former Rep. Wiley Nickel is launching a Senate bid in North Carolina — giving hope to Democrats”**
_— Politico_ **“Former Rep. Wiley Nickel running for Senate in North Carolina. Republican incumbent Thom Tillis ranks among chamber's most vulnerable incumbents”**
_— Roll Call_ **“Wiley Nickel challenging Thom Tillis for North Carolina Senate seat”**
_— The Washington Examiner_ And local networks are abuzz too. ABC11, CBS17, Spectrum, and WCNC Charlotte have all covered Wiley’s launch. North Carolina can’t stop talking about this campaign, and it hasn’t even been a full week since we launched! But if we’re going to take this buzz and turn it into real movement on the ground, we need your help. The press attention is great, but we don’t win campaigns with headlines. clean_body: North Carolina can’t stop talking about this race. | = Peter — The energy around unseating Thom Tillis and sending Wiley Nickel to the U.S. Senate is growing — fast. Just take a look at the headlines: “Former Rep. Wiley Nickel is launching a Senate bid in North Carolina — giving hope to Democrats” — Politico “Former Rep. Wiley Nickel running for Senate in North Carolina. Republican incumbent Thom Tillis ranks among chamber's most vulnerable incumbents” — Roll Call “Wiley Nickel challenging Thom Tillis for North Carolina Senate seat” — The Washington Examiner And local networks are abuzz too. ABC11, CBS17, Spectrum, and WCNC Charlotte have all covered Wiley’s launch. North Carolina can’t stop talking about this campaign, and it hasn’t even been a full week since we launched! But if we’re going to take this buzz and turn it into real movement on the ground, we need your help. The press attention is great, but we don’t win campaigns with headlines. We win them with grassroots support — one donation at a time. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue, your donation to Wiley Nickel will process immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for being part of this team, Team Wiley = Wiley Nickel for North Carolina PO Box 563 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States | mailto:info@wileynickel.com | Paid for by Wiley Nickel for North Carolina

name: Team DLCC
subject: We’re constantly spending to win make-or-break elections
disclaimer_text: paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005
body:
If we fall short of our fundraising targets, our electoral outcomes suffer. Help protect our majorities in states like Virginia and you can feel good knowing you own a huge stake in this race. | | |
---
| |
---|---
At the state legislative ballot level, we don’t have any off-years. While federal special elections are few and far between, state Dems are facing special elections nearly every month. Majority-defining elections are happening in the states _right now_. That means we’re constantly spending the money we raise from dedicated supporters like you – and we need to continually rebuild our war chest. [That’s why we’re urging you to make a donation of $3, $7, or even $25 if you’re able. ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDSCrqP7HuqdVbYWeROcw0Lsvbrq8JXbTXFRr7hmrDZPdw6xykLKqS9n-dCBEIY51kDQaI8VhPs5xrO3GQe1mFfbpFETgG_uIECQxAJvKiR_RjDUOt9uukNFa9fqS9gXk0NhMdxbpa6xBbSpTi3xFCtt_bxUexC3Ep6Z2I9T0LeA2zRJdJcF7S3onfpMGREJ1r7XiBb8htSPjEZKfssmNe4Np0DaOyImiZRZ0pVO89DemeA6IdEYLoQJrpJQma640Med2u5ZLwTIXsKf1EeLWG0mAwwM_2Oj_U_v6bZKFkcqFYJyi8dbKlYyMWvVbt5jqzh3GGuXK7XORecCuNG0PzQB6k4Gbq3Wllm-CdDrr4Ad426HQY_uhMINn29fjyFyxrayONODfmQaM5Bxjd3641Trgn1kBDBwjh7C9KELQXdxY/4fo/0_gQ-yl1SESdFCGVpgNKTw/h0/h001.YdK0eGqDrVDe6jWAcBPl2eT4JJx9k_W83cEQsW0BNiY) Last week, we announced our ongoing **seven-figure investment** to maintain our Democratic majority in the Virginia House of Delegates because protecting our majority means supporting working families, expanding health care access, and making communities safer. Republicans in Virginia are mimicking Trump while Democrats have remained steadfast in passing legislation to benefit all of the commonwealth. And with the governorship up for grabs this fall, we can’t risk the GOP flipping the House. If we fall short of our fundraising targets, our electoral outcomes suffer. Help protect our majorities in states like Virginia, and you can feel good knowing you own a stake in our movement to build Democratic power in state legislatures nationwide. clean_body: If we fall short of our fundraising targets, our electoral outcomes suffer. Help protect our majorities in states like Virginia and you can feel good knowing you own a huge stake in this race. | | | | | ---|--- At the state legislative ballot level, we don’t have any off-years. While federal special elections are few and far between, state Dems are facing special elections nearly every month. Majority-defining elections are happening in the states right now. That means we’re constantly spending the money we raise from dedicated supporters like you – and we need to continually rebuild our war chest. Last week, we announced our ongoing seven-figure investment to maintain our Democratic majority in the Virginia House of Delegates because protecting our majority means supporting working families, expanding health care access, and making communities safer. Republicans in Virginia are mimicking Trump while Democrats have remained steadfast in passing legislation to benefit all of the commonwealth. And with the governorship up for grabs this fall, we can’t risk the GOP flipping the House. If we fall short of our fundraising targets, our electoral outcomes suffer. Help protect our majorities in states like Virginia, and you can feel good knowing you own a stake in our movement to build Democratic power in state legislatures nationwide. # **[Senator Bernie Sanders Holds Event In Idaho](http://trk.libertyledger._Ww3iFFg)**
---
At a fiery Monday night rally in Idaho, Senator Bernie Sanders and Representative Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez pulled out all the old rhetoric, torching President Donald Trump and tech billionaire Elon Musk for allegedly “undermining democracy” and fueling what they branded an American “oligarchy.” Their language was blunt—almost theatrical.

body:
Since his win, Ruben’s been working on charting a new path forward. One that gets the Democratic Party back to meeting the needs of the working class voters that helped him win Arizona in 2024 — without sacrificing our principles.
#

That’s what our data shows us, Peter.
And of that 16%, just 1% will go on to make a donation to support Ruben.
It’s a small percentage of Ruben’s supporters that power the work we do here, and today, we're asking you to join them.
Since his win, Ruben’s been working on charting a new path forward. One that gets the Democratic Party back to meeting the needs of the working class voters that helped him win Arizona in 2024 — without sacrificing our principles. One that exposes Trump and the MAGA Right for the frauds they are, and provides an alternative. A party that’s going to provide opportunity AND defend Social Security, Medicare, Medicaid, and the VA.
We can do all of that, and we have to if we want to make it through the other side of Trump’s presidency with our democracy intact. But, same as in his campaign for Senate, he can’t do this work alone. Never could.
[**So, we’re humbly asking you to make a donation to Ruben’s campaign to help him keep up the fight.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-apr25.dU9j8y&refcode=em250415-1-90&t=1&akid=3821%2E734936%2EDO-bri)

name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: We just launched our first TV ad!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
This is a huge moment for our campaign.
Hi Peter, it’s Mikie.
**We just launched our first TV ad of the campaign!**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87848?refcode=em20250415-8882&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8882%2E614464%2E2Etv7N)
This is a _huge_ moment for our campaign that’s been months in the making. **And it’s all possible thanks to this grassroots team.**
Because folks like you have chipped in when we’ve needed it most, we’re talking to voters in all 21 counties right as most folks are tuning into the race.
**But this is just the start.** With less than two months to go until the primary election, keeping our ad on the air means we’re going to be competing for TV ad time with other campaigns — and in the most expensive media markets in the country.
**[So please, will you split a donation between my campaign and Heartland Patriots to help us ensure we can keep our ad on the air and reach New Jersey voters? No matter the amount you donate, you’ll be making an immediate impact.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87848?refcode=em20250415-8882&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8882%2E614464%2E2Etv7N)**

## Taking on Teddy’s Strip at the Border – HotAir

## Toby Carvey sparks criminal damage row after admitting to chopping down 450-year-old oak tree
An ancient oak tree believed to be around 450 years old has been illegally felled by the owners of a nearby Toby Carvery restaurant. This week I spoke at the Batavia Public Library on the issue of Palestine. I started my 20 minute remarks with a simple question.
> Why is it we never hear media report that in the year prior to 10/7/23, Hamas killed 240 Israeli civilians including 47 children, kidnapped 800 more Israeli children, held 8000 Israelis hostage, and illegally built more than 12,000 homes on Israeli land?
The Answer: Because Hamas did none of those things to Israelis. Instead, the Israeli government did and is doing this to Palestinians. **Let 's Address This.**
**Let's Address This is made possibly by you --the thoughtful person reading this. Add your email below and subscribe to our movement for justice.**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..lkFEzKFSnSJMEOUlYXxWfAaSL-Zg5mw5EJ0u5msne5M?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=161405176)
If we are serious about peace, we must be serious about truth and justice. We must recognize the equal humanity of both Jews and Muslims, and we must demand accountability against those who threaten and harm civilian lives.
Especially at a time when this administration is censoring conversations on Palestine, disappearing those who dare to speak up, and terminating employment for those who refuse to remain silent--it is more critical than ever before we unapologetically speak up for human rights and justice.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=161405176&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYxNDA1MTc2LCJpYXQiOjE3NDQ3NDYwNTgsImV4cCI6MTc0NzMzODA1OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.OM2fuNN1CVecE_uANyBX9IKK64ngJKrOqMJIdHtrwss)
As a human rights lawyer and a student of international law over the last 15 years, it is both my duty and my moral imperative to speak truthfully about one of the most protracted and devastating crises of our time--the occupation and destruction of Palestine and the genocide of its people. In these remarks, I present a historical timeline of modern Palestine and Israel, a factual record of atrocities, and a legal analysis that demands we recognize the reality on the ground and act in the pursuit of justice and peace.
I hope you watch and share this, and share your questions and comments in the discussion below. [You can also watch the video on YouTube here](https://substack.com/redirect/6df87223-45a8-4af0-ba97-cd0926d81892?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
**I am doing everything in my power to raise awareness on human rights and justice. I cannot do it alone. I hope you consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.**

In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges.

name: Nellie Pou
subject: Relentless attacks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nellie Pou for Congress
body:
Team,
Mike Johnson and the NRCC are again attacking me for taking a principled stand for NJ-09 families. But let me be clear: I don't care. I care about working for North Jersey families.
That's why I joined Cory Booker and other NJ elected officials in a town hall earlier this month and why I will continue having conversations with everybody in our communities.
In the last month, the DCCC put my district in NJ-09 on their Frontline list. That signaled just how important our seat is to winning back our House majority.
We know Republicans and their dark money groups are lining up to spend millions against me. The best way to fight back is by mobilizing our grassroots supporters, like you, to help us protect this seat and send a clear message to House Republicans: You cannot buy this seat.
It's the greatest honor of my life to serve North Jersey in Congress, and we're just getting started.
I hope I can count on your support ahead of tonight's mid-month deadline.
Here's a link: **[http://secure.actblue.com/donate/pou_em](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105893414/539732853/-200729754?amp;refcode=250415_np_midnight_l1&ms=250415_np_midnight&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzkwODJlNjktMzIxYS1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cuzOg5PQuacWP4wSq5hvDw3Xa1YGTXTTquIVny5xyTE=)**
— Nellie

Greetings

As a reminder, the Young Democrats of America will gather for an exciting spring meeting from**May****9-11** in **Minneapolis, Minnesota**. This in-person event will bring together young leaders from across the nation for discussions and reflections on how we push forward as a party in this troubling time, hands-on training sessions, important organizational business, and much more. **We're excited to announce that Lieutenant Governor Peggy Flanagan, State Auditor Julie Blaha, Secretary of State Steve Simon, and a number of other exciting elected officials—including State Senator Zaynab Mohamed—will be joining us in Minneapolis.
****
We want to remind you that today, April 16, is the final day to register at our early bird****rate.** You can find all the information in this email on our website at **[yda.org/ydamsp](yda.org/ydamsp?link_id=1&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-reminder-yda-spring-meeting-in-minneapolis-4&email_referrer=email_2698222&email_subject=ydamsp-early-bird-registration-rate-ends-today&&)**
****
* * *
**Registration
****
[Click here to register](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39ispmPgnyBeLzstfRs0GcNMmQ8i0Uu7JlJXUCxxrJCmdAhrI3WMZ3WpZtbbn7FJUyH8PiIH8zUEWT2Y3pu2hvLIyA8UYNzpJxLsJRA6Lz0_aO1-xk1H_mXxDJU7uBJAjzt4387JskVfRjgqThpDz-JMW_jVdeWbBYm4fhMExNOrY7N74sQinZtvXmFRN2w5zG7H1DJMAPis7LC3p1WbSA1xVv-0jBzeI92yRBV7YzDtujA1z2n2zwMgMc1hOo19D7SbidHS3t_J3Iv-V99xSTEhpn7z-yDcImLS6fII8b9CakmV4AI4zJNLBgOXpovO8ixAjToZKjn9v_X5wE9lX1rVSW1_coM1S2_eM06UgNV1MI6DF_5tBcP3CIYCd3OJeQ/4fo/ZpKhbkjDQZSkUnZwe-5H1g/h1/h001.miyx3A-URKk5wMK666PIvj4FAinlQJ6vVHVNTyysfPs) **at the early bird rate of **$60.00**. The early bird registration rate is valid until **April****16****, 2025**.
****
* * *
**Reserving a Hotel Room
**
Lodging will be available at the Royal Sonesta Minneapolis Downtown (35 S 7th St, Minneapolis, MN 55402). subject: The fight has never been tougher

body:
Fellow American, the Republican Party of Florida is committed to upholding the timeless principles that make our state and nation great: freedom, liberty, personal responsibility, and accountability. |
---
[
](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=cd65bf54a9bb48e38a9c1564064d3b1b&_e=T6oLOu0NsIx76ctAA5biGneU2ooB5H_aKdupQKdckAZlIQ0nH_vfHHEVUolcsbG_acEiLH1ojCRlbp2jfD1VRHLkGRn8ulhNghoihX9go_hKyF6xSv6qmqNuaD7fpYlysGxovsbQHlc8JepQsCFtEV5uIGhLRYM5--QfD7vyVat3E0CfdV0T3PPl_U2yACMZ8J_q896YJgPLxf48svRiHUjOwM7lWgnFowKHfvODZqVFSirYBYvF-IGqudIXwKU2nyd24TJKHaE4wiGH9emKW2lo2n8Izqg7TvqYOrssUREFymbVp8JHB6xt4wJtbc-5mg6FracwFonu6NIhb9JPxYkvD7B2ZqBn2hg-lAq54A6z1QoWz7-1meSwtfhmATVzr7aNTTjHI8BgnGvdH0qVpA%3D%3D)
Fellow American,

The Republican Party of Florida is committed to upholding the timeless principles that make our state and nation great: **freedom, liberty, personal responsibility, and accountability.**

**But our principles are under attack every single day by the Left.**

Fellow American, our fight to uphold these principles has never been tougher. With the Left’s fundraising machine, our Conservative values are drastically at risk.

_**With your support today, we will:**_

* Advocate for fiscally sound, common-sense solutions to drive job growth and economic prosperity.
* Ensure our children receive the best education to prepare them for a bright future.
* Elect principled leaders with integrity who will fight for Florida’s path to prosperity.

[**Tonight at midnight is our mid-month fundraising deadline, and we need your help.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=cd65bf54a9bb48e38a9c1564064d3b1b&_e=T6oLOu0NsIx76ctAA5biGneU2ooB5H_aKdupQKdckAZlIQ0nH_vfHHEVUolcsbG_acEiLH1ojCRlbp2jfD1VRHLkGRn8ulhNghoihX9go_hKyF6xSv6qmqNuaD7fpYlysGxovsbQHlc8JepQsCFtEV5uIGhLRYM5--QfD7vyVat3E0CfdV0T3PPl_U2yACMZ8J_q896YJgPLxf48svRiHUjOwM7lWgnFowKHfvODZqVFSirYBYvF-IGqudIXwKU2iRP_DC3Vt3N9JzDL0eYEU2ns_oQ-kIwCsjVhj2y4HRtH8O869RDonakeSgqvuK-mwhU7AsCHZFKwDb3r5EnkviMlKIRulmXkX1jSSB1Nxfwg5_4xYidtKsuHvD9xfTHddR_77SbPMdioVIKZF6VDYQ%3D%3D)

Your donation before our midnight deadline will empower us to unite Floridians, elect strong candidates, and build the most effective Republican state party in the nation.

Together, we can set a model for others to follow and secure a thriving future for Florida.

[**Fellow American, can we count on your support?**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=cd65bf54a9bb48e38a9c1564064d3b1b&_e=T6oLOu0NsIx76ctAA5biGneU2ooB5H_aKdupQKdckAZlIQ0nH_vfHHEVUolcsbG_acEiLH1ojCRlbp2jfD1VRHLkGRn8ulhNghoihX9go_hKyF6xSv6qmqNuaD7fpYlysGxovsbQHlc8JepQsCFtEV5uIGhLRYM5--QfD7vyVat3E0CfdV0T3PPl_U2yACMZ8J_q896YJgPLxf48svRiHUjOwM7lWgnFowKHfvODZqVFSirYBYvF-IGqudIXwKU2_ghsPbarR6E73uHKBbc2_S7EOJ3UY6MOP-14xZdzf6cfAxw9KJyK0XpopSCSn_xOMeEGCFztArEV4FHT7_96DddssTX9lYNe9zmA7GZiBoxcIP0Qzpem9rmZ0O5j-WBGW0X2Ea8AgCNBv-Jb03XDzg%3D%3D)

[**CHIP IN BEFORE MIDNIGHT**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=cd65bf54a9bb48e38a9c1564064d3b1b&_e=T6oLOu0NsIx76ctAA5biGneU2ooB5H_aKdupQKdckAZlIQ0nH_vfHHEVUolcsbG_acEiLH1ojCRlbp2jfD1VRHLkGRn8ulhNghoihX9go_hKyF6xSv6qmqNuaD7fpYlysGxovsbQHlc8JepQsCFtEV5uIGhLRYM5--QfD7vyVat3E0CfdV0T3PPl_U2yACMZ8J_q896YJgPLxf48svRiHUjOwM7lWgnFowKHfvODZqVFSirYBYvF-IGqudIXwKU2of104Bv-RJVHRTRwWttmRicyyjptfzDi0Mvak_jCQTNs6r7eYi0OJ0twqhJoN_qHoZXT8nAIBeMbtnerjjeZuZr7OLw7W1HpZ6eZ3i2_FxBA3Y9tZcavfkoZIVs9qzcok5O6sBgwjf-tSESPIs8V7A%3D%3D)
Sincerely,

Evan Power
_Chairman of the Republican Party of Florida_

[**KEEP FLORIDA RED**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=cd65bf54a9bb48e38a9c1564064d3b1b&_e=T6oLOu0NsIx76ctAA5biGneU2ooB5H_aKdupQKdckAZlIQ0nH_vfHHEVUolcsbG_acEiLH1ojCRlbp2jfD1VRHLkGRn8ulhNghoihX9go_hKyF6xSv6qmqNuaD7fpYlysGxovsbQHlc8JepQsCFtEV5uIGhLRYM5--QfD7vyVat3E0CfdV0T3PPl_U2yACMZ8J_q896YJgPLxf48svRiHUjOwM7lWgnFowKHfvODZqVFSirYBYvF-IGqudIXwKU2O-hkgTeqCUg0lp1Ao35mN5BKgHNk9y4cvVv_m_6MvnKi6qESBZOIrhAfls5hdau3NWZBGDWXHvZYXCIYa6Vl-iaQ2wx7W8huuQsxXrUMXCxyzCgAhu7c37pSdAc_Gurr0sd2UwyNoa-7Ne0jdPeWAQ%3D%3D)

| **About the Republican Party of Florida**
* * *
The Republican Party of Florida will promote the principles upon which our nation and our state were founded: freedom, liberty, personal responsibility, and accountability.

We will advocate fiscally-sound, common-sense solutions that will promote job and economic growth, provide the best education to our children, and create a path to prosperity for Florida and America.

Members of the Republican Party of Florida will be united by these principles and will work to elect Floridians with integrity who will work to enact such solutions. We will seek to be the most effective state party in the nation and serve as a model for other party organizations.

body:
|

Hey there folks — we need our supporters in 18326 to stand up today. Nikki is using her voice and her platform to speak out against the reckless tariff strategy from the Trump Administration. This administration clearly has no plan to lower costs for folks. Instead, they imposed universal tariffs on some of our closest trading partners, watched the stock market plummet, and then reversed course. It’s giving the American people whiplash. Economists agree — these tariffs would do more harm than good and could have our country headed toward a recession. **[Will you add your name right now to support Nikki’s work to stand up to Donald Trump’s recklessness?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105893502/539733191/1050629218?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_PET_AC120_20250415_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2Y0ZWJkMi0zMjFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oeHKf00KFF0x1RYttiQoBUjN7zaxxzmv6nsSa_JqxgM=&emci=8e2a0abe-5019-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=7cf4ebd2-321a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=13891387)** | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105893507/539733193/1050629218?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_PET_AC120_20250415_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2Y0ZWJkMi0zMjFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oeHKf00KFF0x1RYttiQoBUjN7zaxxzmv6nsSa_JqxgM=&emci=8e2a0abe-5019-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=7cf4ebd2-321a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=13891387)

name: Gary Sinise
subject: These heroes are counting on you
body:
Celebrating the 20th Anniversary of the National Memorial Day Parade
It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.
| | | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=3714ccb2f4644481bb1c253fa5abbbcf&_e=WONG6UhibP8OLU4wc7beG6SZNZiAqidG4UwuXw7e8GFH5b1zGx9l13CQ_zobQFP-pmsE3OZxjzxHTtPk-zXYDHGSpekoAhEh4fafn9jjWiGHUfyPWoL_nbHFv3Mi5FAOtI2xiEGcBamnw90sbdwFXJvjbngIrel88PzdustWECL1SHBJElpofXp5Y2WMVWL_w6fIvmZap53weqJ3B4ZOHE6GgLPXZWpa6UjMuR2CSX6bDhU9UdxtkBy8QBR6Mq2ktTKbsQk56a72bPQAJ2ZeBCzSaCWlecjoMhMWPfdIOGk_r-T-QtbOwpGrXnW8GVos)
---
Friend, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 __and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. **Now, I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.** This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. **[Friend, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENTIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=3714ccb2f4644481bb1c253fa5abbbcf&_e=WONG6UhibP8OLU4wc7beG6SZNZiAqidG4UwuXw7e8GFH5b1zGx9l13CQ_zobQFP-pmsE3OZxjzxHTtPk-zXYDHGSpekoAhEh4fafn9jjWiGHUfyPWoL_nbHFv3Mi5FAOtI2xiEGcBamnw90sbdwFXJvjbngIrel88PzdustWECIfGPHRYSBoCOVUM_sSBb2EIoe71MWbZW1mQiY0pf8O9YnWEuKc23gGF29K5K431CzaCqei3dwHIVnBxlaV6QbWk8WrFoibVdcJ6wr1MADc7tgE38q4pkZjyHcDIDkyEEsDl_YDuU16kyoafK9EqqIR)**
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=3714ccb2f4644481bb1c253fa5abbbcf&_e=WONG6UhibP8OLU4wc7beG6SZNZiAqidG4UwuXw7e8GFH5b1zGx9l13CQ_zobQFP-pmsE3OZxjzxHTtPk-zXYDHGSpekoAhEh4fafn9jjWiGHUfyPWoL_nbHFv3Mi5FAOtI2xiEGcBamnw90sbdwFXJvjbngIrel88PzdustWECJGKUi4hOcBTjYKkT6kA5_ZtiHzzq99yhEePewR7TZ2t5zngCVOeg3TCjqBy49aH_gfm4Iv_FMJxUKQVgcciGVFWWW2jTWNuflSaGYSdKcgBZA3dL_kkqAMHrPjK366Gi31KKYV3gP_TMPGZCPLyTAA)
---
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=3714ccb2f4644481bb1c253fa5abbbcf&_e=WONG6UhibP8OLU4wc7beG6SZNZiAqidG4UwuXw7e8GFH5b1zGx9l13CQ_zobQFP-pmsE3OZxjzxHTtPk-zXYDHGSpekoAhEh4fafn9jjWiGHUfyPWoL_nbHFv3Mi5FAOtI2xiEGcBamnw90sbdwFXJvjbngIrel88PzdustWECIHwCEuCAmeofTP4HjUkkDxQaO1MSVRwROhKEInaitp1tNXDbGTArA_BGjJYCWiS4pvbbDgvlb9qEKEZ3gFgELPTy1Ud8tM8IuqQ-VU1Pz0GIgdQ4LNmm2gsvopeb0g2BwUNyHBPlMvL-sMB31ywNC9)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ **But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded _entirely_ by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country.** Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.

* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=3714ccb2f4644481bb1c253fa5abbbcf&_e=WONG6UhibP8OLU4wc7beG6SZNZiAqidG4UwuXw7e8GFH5b1zGx9l13CQ_zobQFP-qMZb5e_kJmGL34Wsa7QYTURLsQrt1s_Nqb7arYDiU5sxLosGgMKkmbF-fqhKssVFgQsZQeJRsgkwYhj41n6-HYn6No19Z97TibTgxAMWGlqEM9ZoqbdFnURP7WZdG80Br0r40Eo-n3kjcnOsFL1cuB3c9zGmb-_oKUnX9-aH76rf0hY4-7mFr24QGmdE41U4cFByvriaqn8X0ovsHa9ZffP3Cw0VVPSTj8LWwNmhRhQ%3D)[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=3714ccb2f4644481bb1c253fa5abbbcf&_e=WONG6UhibP8OLU4wc7beG6SZNZiAqidG4UwuXw7e8GFH5b1zGx9l13CQ_zobQFP-pmsE3OZxjzxHTtPk-zXYDHGSpekoAhEh4fafn9jjWiGHUfyPWoL_nbHFv3Mi5FAOtI2xiEGcBamnw90sbdwFXJvjbngIrel88PzdustWECIOUkyDzisASLX62iwGhv3_IR8V3vAb8CeD9oe86svo7g42Ju5jCqb9J3is3AQ_LChXFZGrBmBGiEzcDpl9ftiGjTF2zvJkElj5W_5fViW0oj7hyThTa_SERnlK1wvk9tnjwAvo_vOhJOV60e1dVPPy) If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. _And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get._ You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. _But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade._** ** **That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. ** So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II - and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps - I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us.
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=3714ccb2f4644481bb1c253fa5abbbcf&_e=WONG6UhibP8OLU4wc7beG6SZNZiAqidG4UwuXw7e8GFH5b1zGx9l13CQ_zobQFP-pmsE3OZxjzxHTtPk-zXYDHGSpekoAhEh4fafn9jjWiGHUfyPWoL_nbHFv3Mi5FAOtI2xiEGcBamnw90sbdwFXJvjbngIrel88PzdustWECLBVcFcebicM0HkhxF50QoKDYmvGkJXMU92hCs50xWzo2vyYmSon5WhiAWjyCPzHKtvI8ZBfOrKaXrOj1j4E_htVv5RB49hD3OnDxRnUq6s_ToiXdMayT3KevZ6lccyoYddQxqIYrTjvvE2f6ML3OaG)
---
And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ _**[Friend, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please - if you're able, make a gift to fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now during its 20th anniversary.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=3714ccb2f4644481bb1c253fa5abbbcf&_e=WONG6UhibP8OLU4wc7beG6SZNZiAqidG4UwuXw7e8GFH5b1zGx9l13CQ_zobQFP-pmsE3OZxjzxHTtPk-zXYDHGSpekoAhEh4fafn9jjWiGHUfyPWoL_nbHFv3Mi5FAOtI2xiEGcBamnw90sbdwFXJvjbngIrel88PzdustWECJb_gM5hhK5y72jpye6ZZDjfkQNPGCdqyJoPbk-1KcWJ0fVHWHY7SohbTvDLpnU_GMcIGudw3ln3z4_dx6CJZuN3__1y5GcUwAXBJaIBse07ahODhoi5v2QXOm_0xHSjnf_e7h9wIrCYKRwNaDpoSt5)**_ Sincerely, Gary SiniseHonorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade

clean_body: Celebrating the 20th Anniversary of the National Memorial Day Parade It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. | | | Friend, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. Now, I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event. But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded entirely by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country. Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like: Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever. Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam. Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom. If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get. You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade. That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II - and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps - I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us. And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more. ** Sincerely, Gary SiniseHonorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. Dear Derek,
Today, millions of Americans are finalizing their taxes. And while you paid your taxes or got a small refund....there are billionaires and corporations paying next to nothing thanks to sneaky tactics.
We lose out on over $600 billion in taxes every year that are owed but not paid.
That’s why when I was in Congress, **I spearheaded full funding for the IRS enforcement division, because the rest of us lose out when ultra-wealthy tax cheats can dodge their taxes.**
Now, Trump is cutting funding to the IRS. This won’t _just_ make wait times longer for taxpayers who have a question. Dismantling the IRS is a giveaway to his cronies at the expense of working people. _It means those tax cheats will get away with it._
**My campaign for governor is about making life easier for everyday Californians who play by the rules—and cracking down on bad actors who try to rip us off.**
