clean_body: I want to share with you five things that give me hope in this moment: = Friend, I’ve heard from so many folks in our community that, right now, the state of our politics just feels hopeless. I want to let you know that I hear you. There’s so much cause for all of us to feel anger, outrage, and exhaustion. But one thing none of us should feel is hopeless, team, because I certainly don’t. If you have a moment, I’d like to share with you five things that give me hope in this moment we’ve found ourselves in: 1. The resilience of the American spirit. As a nation, we’ve faced down greater challenges and come out on top. And I know we won’t give in now: Americans don’t back down from a tough fight. 2. Democratic State Attorneys General across the country who are leading the charge to stop Trump and Musk’s illegal mass firings, prevent DOGE from accessing Americans’ private data, and restore education funding appropriated by Congress. 3. Wisconsin’s Supreme Court race proved that when we stand together, we can defeat right-wing billionaires who want to buy our elections, and instead choose Democracy. 4. Americans are standing up for their rights in town halls across the nation, even in ruby red districts where their GOP representatives have decided to hide rather than face their own voters. 5. And finally, every upcoming election between now and 2026 is a new chance for Democrats to present our case to the American people and build a movement to ultimately reject MAGA extremism for good. We’re just getting started, and there’s still a long road ahead of us. Sadly, Trump’s constant attacks on our democracy and the fundamental rule of law do keep me awake at night. But folks, I refuse to give up. I’m rallying supporters across OR-06 to fight back against Donald Trump’s agenda. I’m speaking out everywhere I can to condemn Republicans’ plan to rip away healthcare from millions of hardworking Americans. I’ve even called on House Republicans to join with Democrats and block Trump’s destructive tariffs. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you so much for your support, — Andrea | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. **Ted is calling out the D.C. Democrats and he 's leading the charge on key issues, from putting a hard stop to illegal immigration to defeating obstructionist leftist lawfare to expanding school choice options to put students over systems.**

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: Add your voice in opposition to Republican tax plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
The Republican tax plan is deliberately designed to make things harder for ordinary Americans.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105895890/539740662/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDUzNWZlNi0zODFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SEm0xCfztpP3lAJdndO1jqyG4oMKmTMANfdm-MtwMpM=&emci=c6535fe6-381a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=cd535fe6-381a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=7731215)
---

| | It's pretty simple. Today, on Tax Day, everybody is supposed to pay their fair share. But too many of the super-rich and corporations don't, leaving the rest of us to pick up the tab for essential programs like Social Security, Medicaid, and disaster relief. Tax policy should benefit working families. But the Republican tax plan is deliberately designed to make things harder for ordinary Americans. Republicans are pushing a corrupt scheme to richly reward corporations and billionaires with even bigger tax breaks that will gut critical programs that help Americans thrive and raise costs for ordinary folks who are already struggling to make ends meet. We need to be lifting people up, not selling them out. **Stockholders and billionaires like Elon Musk will see massive tax cuts and handouts.** During Trump's first term, the federal corporate tax rate was 35 percent. Then, it was reduced to 21 percent. Now, Trump and his cronies in Congress want to further cut that to as low as 15 percent and blow a $500 billion hole in the federal budget. **The math is simple: Republicans want to give more handouts to the wealthiest Americans while cutting services for working families. That's it. That's the goal.****_Billionaires win, families lose._** [**Won't you j****oin me, in demanding Congress reject the Republican great betrayal of working families? Sign the petition to tell Republicans you're fed up with the rich getting richer while everyday Americans scramble to make ends meet.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105895891/539740663/-231544245?contactdata=dcSGiRweHdK3s+elpOii+JSU215uFp+9B9NAyLE2+DLleVwXYfWRfb8N1eXSDhMZCLLwcI0SHebJnd3B5To5ylYcNgEQyDWSHbG8COMQ0vpHCq7OREZOdS/pjilvga6efmueQZidU0YjlQMb8vJyog==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDUzNWZlNi0zODFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SEm0xCfztpP3lAJdndO1jqyG4oMKmTMANfdm-MtwMpM=&emci=c6535fe6-381a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=cd535fe6-381a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=7731215) [Sign the Petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105895892/539740664/-231544245?contactdata=dcSGiRweHdK3s+elpOii+JSU215uFp+9B9NAyLE2+DLleVwXYfWRfb8N1eXSDhMZCLLwcI0SHebJnd3B5To5ylYcNgEQyDWSHbG8COMQ0vpHCq7OREZOdS/pjilvga6efmueQZidU0YjlQMb8vJyog==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDUzNWZlNi0zODFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SEm0xCfztpP3lAJdndO1jqyG4oMKmTMANfdm-MtwMpM=&emci=c6535fe6-381a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=cd535fe6-381a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=7731215) Onward! _Jeff_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Jeff Merkley instantly:

clean_body: The Republican tax plan is deliberately designed to make things harder for ordinary Americans. | | | | It's pretty simple. Today, on Tax Day, everybody is supposed to pay their fair share. But too many of the super-rich and corporations don't, leaving the rest of us to pick up the tab for essential programs like Social Security, Medicaid, and disaster relief. Tax policy should benefit working families. But the Republican tax plan is deliberately designed to make things harder for ordinary Americans. Republicans are pushing a corrupt scheme to richly reward corporations and billionaires with even bigger tax breaks that will gut critical programs that help Americans thrive and raise costs for ordinary folks who are already struggling to make ends meet. We need to be lifting people up, not selling them out. Stockholders and billionaires like Elon Musk will see massive tax cuts and handouts. During Trump's first term, the federal corporate tax rate was 35 percent. Then, it was reduced to 21 percent. Now, Trump and his cronies in Congress want to further cut that to as low as 15 percent and blow a $500 billion hole in the federal budget. The math is simple: Republicans want to give more handouts to the wealthiest Americans while cutting services for working families. That's it. That's the goal.Billionaires win, families lose. Onward! name: Schiff HQ
subject: Recognize these people, Derek?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=8481%2E5257348%2EAFSMwS ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek, do you
recognize this guy?

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q22025_abs_em.gs9A_9&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20250415_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=8481%2E5257348%2EAFSMwS ]Donald Trump's mugshot

Fulton County Sheriff’s Office

That’s Donald Trump — convicted felon and wannabe King. Since returning to
office, he’s worked to slash benefits for hardworking Americans, enrich
himself, abandon our allies, cozy up to dictators like Vladimir Putin, and
attack the rule of law at every turn. He also nearly crashed our economy.
Or did it intentionally?

He’s worked closely with this guy to get it done.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q22025_abs_em.gs9A_9&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20250415_PM1_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=8481%2E5257348%2EAFSMwS ]Elon Musk and Donald Trump shaking hands

That’s Elon Musk. He’s worked closely with Trump to pull off a reverse
Robin Hood scheme — stealing money from working people to give it to the
rich. Musk and his DOGE team have recklessly and unconstitutionally worked
to destroy critical agencies like the Department of Education, the Social
Security Administration, and the National Institutes of Health — all to
pay for more tax cuts for billionaires.

They’ve also had support from Congress,
Derek — primarily this guy.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q22025_abs_em.gs9A_9&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20250415_PM1_V1_S1&t=1006&akid=8481%2E5257348%2EAFSMwS ]Speaker Mike Johnson

That’s Speaker of the House Mike Johnson. Not only has he led the way in
Congress to cut hundreds of billions of dollars in Medicaid benefits to
pay for tax breaks for billionaires, but he’s also completely surrendered
some of Congress’ most critical responsibilities to Donald Trump and laid
out the red carpet for Trump to do whatever he wants.

And this guy?

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q22025_abs_em.gs9A_9&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20250415_PM1_V1_S1&t=1007&akid=8481%2E5257348%2EAFSMwS ]Pete Hegseth

That’s Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth — a living example of the fact
that this administration is not just corrupt but incompetent, too. Hegseth
texted highly classified national security information about an impending
attack in an unsecured Signal message group chat that included the
editor-in-chief of the Atlantic.

Here’s the person who’s standing up to them:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q22025_abs_em.gs9A_9&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20250415_PM1_V1_S1&t=1008&akid=8481%2E5257348%2EAFSMwS ]Tweet from Democratic Wins Media: BREAKING: The Trump administration is
reportedly panicking over Adam Schiff's investigation into them for
potential insider trading. This is amazing.

That’s Adam. He’s fighting tirelessly to bring millions of dollars back to
our state, stand up for access to affordable health care, lower costs for
working families, and fight back against the daily corruption coming from
this administration.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=q22025_abs_em.PyXMxO&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20250415_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=8481%2E5257348%2EAFSMwS ]Whether you’ve been with Adam from the beginning or just joined Team
Schiff, your support makes Adam’s fight to deliver for the people of
California and defend our democracy possible. Chip in ahead of tonight’s
mid-month fundraising deadline to support Adam’s work in the Senate >>

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=q22025_abs_em.WLH6yo&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20250415_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1010&akid=8481%2E5257348%2EAFSMwS ]EXPRESS DONATE

_Peter, Joe Biden is taking the stage for the first time post-presidency:_ [](https://udpac.us/l/5BAtMDgrJyTu) We’re so grateful for his leadership, Peter! **With Social Security on the chopping block, Joe Biden is stepping up to call on ALL OF US to act!**

[That’s why we’re launching a MAJOR letter thanking him for acting to save Social Security – and you’re one of the last top Democrats from 18326 who hasn’t signed »](https://udpac.us/l/HH71dNxvz5FC) | **[10 18326 SPOTS LEFT: ADD YOUR NAME TO THANK PRESIDENT BIDEN »](https://udpac.us/l/jBWZm7SMBH1X)**
---
**_President Biden,_**

I’m so grateful for your leadership during these scary times.

You’ve worked the majority of your adult life to serve the American people, and even now, you’re still stepping up to help everyday Americans who rely on Social Security!

**I know Trump and Musk pose an existential threat not only to Social Security, but to our democracy, so I’m so glad that you’re continuing to speak up to stop MAGA schemes.**

[That’s why I’m signing this letter to thank you for your leadership and chipping in $3 to UNITEDemocrats to elect Democrats who will continue your fight to protect democracy »](https://udpac.us/l/9Xnq79F1WeLe)

Sincerely,
**_X Peter_**
---
**[10 18326 SPOTS LEFT: ADD YOUR NAME TO THANK PRESIDENT BIDEN »](https://udpac.us/l/eUnmNpiwDs4k)**
---
_– UNITEDemocrats_

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105896130/539741411/1561815853?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDViODM1ZS0zYTFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XGwvBAQf1ceGT4VFcl1Bvvdj1-72n89-ioVv5CGWQmY=&emci=3057ab8e-371a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=145b835e-3a1a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=12666102) Hi Peter, we want to be upfront with you:

Gabe Evans is now our representative in Congress—and he’s gone all-in with Donald Trump and the extreme MAGA agenda.

While Yadira Caraveo delivered results for our community—working to lower the cost of prescription drugs, cap insulin prices, and expand access to health care—Gabe Evans is voting to take that progress away.

**Yadira has never backed down from a tough fight.** She’s running again because she knows this district deserves a representative who listens to every family—no matter their party—and actually delivers results.

CO-08 will once again be one of the most competitive districts in the country. And with a margin of just 2,449 votes last cycle, we know what it’ll take to win.

**[If everyone reading this email chips in, we will hit the ground running.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105896138/539741419/2033110592?refcode=email_041525_launch-2&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDViODM1ZS0zYTFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XGwvBAQf1ceGT4VFcl1Bvvdj1-72n89-ioVv5CGWQmY=)**

body:
Our top donor professions are teachers and nurses.
#
I cannot convey enough how grateful I am to the millions of people supporting us with your time, resources, & energy.
Your support has allowed us to rally people together at record scale to organize their communities.
All with an average donation of $21.

name: Spanberger for Governor HQ
subject: re: our official opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
Lt. Gov. Winsome Earle-Sears is the Republican nominee for Governor of Virginia and Abigail’s official opponent in the November 2025 race.
| Peter,

It’s official: Lt. Gov. Winsome Earle-Sears is the Republican nominee for Governor of Virginia and Abigail’s official opponent in the November 2025 race.

[_**We’ll explain more below, but first, will you contribute to Abigail’s campaign for Governor right now?**_](https://fight4progress.org/spanberger?t=DzQnEaicJWe0&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-04-15_1&amount=25)
---
| [ CONTRIBUTE ](https://fight4progress.org/spanberger?t=VBxhcOc6r7aM&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-04-15_1&amount=25)
---
The stakes couldn’t be higher this November. Sears has spent her entire political career pushing extreme right-wing policies and backing Donald Trump at every turn. She’s repeatedly voiced her support for anti-choice measures to restrict women’s reproductive rights — including a near-total abortion ban — and just last week spoke at an anti-abortion rally in Richmond.

She’s not looking out for the people of Virginia. While Virginia's federal workers are facing instability and chaos from the Trump-Musk administration and DOGE’s cuts, Abigail’s opponent is standing behind Trump 100% and “doesn’t understand why” it’s a big deal that Virginians are being fired from their jobs. She literally told Virginians “don’t fret.”

Sears is just another rubber stamp for the MAGA agenda, and frankly, Virginians deserve better. Abigail will always put the people of Virginia first – she’ll work to lower costs, protect our fundamental rights, stand up for Virginia jobs, strengthen our public schools, and so much more.

But this race is set to be the most competitive in the country this November — Cook Political Report is calling it a total TOSS UP. Right now, Abigail Spanberger and Winsome Sears are neck and neck — and with Trump’s MAGA machine ready to flood Virginia with dark money, we can’t afford to fall behind.

[_**We need your help. Will you contribute today between Abigail’s campaign and Fight for Progress to help us flip the Governor’s office blue and elect Abigail Spanberger?**_](https://fight4progress.org/spanberger?t=syoNS0QTFq8k&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-04-15_1&amount=25)
| | | [ CONTRIBUTE $5 ](https://fight4progress.org/spanberger?t=M2r9fzBS43F9&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-04-15_1&amount=5)
---
| [ CONTRIBUTE $10 ](https://fight4progress.org/spanberger?t=7s5GerKdtoMM&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-04-15_1&amount=10)
---
| [ CONTRIBUTE $25 ](https://fight4progress.org/spanberger?t=1AcuivlpAhnh&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-04-15_1&amount=25)
---
| [ CONTRIBUTE $50 ](https://fight4progress.org/spanberger?t=GdpzTzf66OHH&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-04-15_1&amount=50)
---
| [ OTHER AMOUNT ](https://fight4progress.org/spanberger?t=jtGRL8slWAY9&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-04-15_1)
---
Thank you,

Spanberger for Governor HQ
* * *

name: Team Bennet
subject: Building a tax code that puts families first.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250415_taxday_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250415_taxday_act]
Hi folks,
Today is Tax Day—and while it may not be everyone’s favorite day, Michael believes our tax code is a reflection of our values.
President Trump and the Republicans have made it clear who they value.
As we speak, they are working on a budget bill that will hand another tax giveaway to the wealthiest Americans and the biggest corporations. To pay for it, they plan to cut Medicaid and gut the federal agencies that support our veterans, students, and public lands. They’re even considering slashing the clean energy tax credits and infrastructure investments that have benefitted rural communities.
Michael knows they have it all backward.
In the Senate, Michael continues to fight for a tax code that supports our working families and sets up the next generation of Americans for success.
This month, he introduced legislation that would permanently expand the Child Tax Credit. When it was was temporarily expanded over the pandemic, it reduced taxes for 96% of Colorado families and cut the childhood poverty rate nearly in half . Michael’s work on this inspired the Colorado State Legislature to pass their own Child Tax Credit, which has given Colorado families much-needed support.
Michael is also working to expand the Earned Income Tax Credit, which would cut taxes for low-income and middle-class families, and pass a tax credit for family caregivers—including the 600,000 caregivers who live in Colorado.
Now, Michael is running for Governor to bring that same bold leadership to Colorado.
He will work with partners in the state legislature to make sure Colorado's budget prioritizes education, protects access to affordable healthcare, supports our entrepreneurs and small businesses, and brings much-needed relief to Colorado’s working families.
We can do this. We know the best solutions to the challenges we face will come from right here in Colorado, with us working together to get things done. If you’re ready to join us in this, consider chipping in today. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250415_taxday_act]

To pay for it, they plan to cut Medicaid and gut the federal agencies that support our veterans, students, and public lands. They’re even considering slashing the clean energy tax credits and infrastructure investments that have benefitted rural communities. Michael knows they have it all backward. In the Senate, Michael continues to fight for a tax code that supports our working families and sets up the next generation of Americans for success. This month, he introduced legislation that would permanently expand the Child Tax Credit. When it was was temporarily expanded over the pandemic, it reduced taxes for 96% of Colorado families and cut the childhood poverty rate nearly in half . Michael’s work on this inspired the Colorado State Legislature to pass their own Child Tax Credit, which has given Colorado families much-needed support. Michael is also working to expand the Earned Income Tax Credit, which would cut taxes for low-income and middle-class families, and pass a tax credit for family caregivers—including the 600,000 caregivers who live in Colorado. Now, Michael is running for Governor to bring that same bold leadership to Colorado. He will work with partners in the state legislature to make sure Colorado's budget prioritizes education, protects access to affordable healthcare, supports our entrepreneurs and small businesses, and brings much-needed relief to Colorado’s working families. We can do this. We know the best solutions to the challenges we face will come from right here in Colorado, with us working together to get things done. If you’re ready to join us in this, consider chipping in today. >> [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [] DONATE $25 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] OTHER AMOUNT [] We can prove that Colorado is the best state to live, work, and raise a family while providing the visionary leadership our country needs. Thanks, Team Bennet [] [] [] Bennet for Governor PO Box 270117 Louisville, CO 80027 United States WWW.MICHAELBENNET.COM [] | INFO@MICHAELBENNET.COM [info@michaelbennet.com] | PRIVACY POLICY [] Paid for by Bennet for Governor. name: Able Dems
subject: Trump’s tariffs will target life-sustaining pharmaceuticals.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Able Dems PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| | | Friend, we need to have a serious conversation about a looming crisis that threatens our very lives ... Trump's reckless plan to impose tariffs on pharmaceuticals.
_This isn't just a policy shift; it’s a dangerous game he’s playing with our health and well-being._
__Tariffs on pharmaceuticals, which heavily depend on imports from Canada and other nations, could impose staggering costs of up to _$750 million on American patients_ on Canadian imports alone.
This is a direct assault on our access to essential medications. This means an increase of $0.12 per pill for generic drugs, or, even more shocking, an additional $10,000 for life-saving cancer treatments!
**At Able Dems, we are fiercely dedicated to electing Democrats with disabilities and their allies who will champion our health and safeguard our interests.**
****We need leaders who will rise up against these harmful policies and fight for affordable healthcare for every single one of us.
**[Will you be a catalyst for change and make a contribution to support candidates who will boldly advocate against these outrageous tariffs? Every dollar counts in our battle for justice and accessibility!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXO2FiuxEhBk3zsUTCYW6F8lB7-RffhngK16Xoh7-Vi8mCt6gt3nev0IDvPxYqGlK4P24QsgmVAMhGXEWSqUv8Zx8XGgsp4Fc4vwO5CLGIl27eocGRtCICx9axJkSm5Ks2waUMCKVSNz8L0wZF5RVI8MXeBwMjpQq9pKfGdoIoT8m5KnL5L3Ho8_qlEHQSnbnzP6wnkrAy2cJK6hNs7CO64hBcYPmij648MgG7A4Bris6-DOmYrU2ocYwpJxJiSXyx8BNSzpBMVh3fYEpRM5POH84u621n8cx4mWxRB1364UzJDP3Uw20GaCI79y3o-K55B6E-O1dc9B8HJYT-t1fjy3qZP9AVYG5S0b_20OwZ1MIKkea_yr9APYCR1VmKcfoF8O6E678Yic9ecg1AUek51oAuENG5rH-4EdBf9IwXdBj19fLkCHaPI9hsq_mcja0KQ/4fo/PMvnsGKqQiyu-JEx1XRwqA/h0/h001.meVETz-Tp2978AFtCy9IweHiE5e8PntuyQaIT5pRct4)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10

Moreover, these tariffs could trigger devastating shortages of critical medical devices—think syringes and blood pressure cuffs—most of which are sourced from China.
_**We simply cannot allow this to happen!**_

These alarming price hikes aren't just statistics; they represent real suffering for individuals who depend on these medications to survive. They threaten to escalate healthcare costs, particularly for our most vulnerable community members. Moreover, these tariffs could trigger devastating shortages of critical medical devices—think syringes and blood pressure cuffs—most of which are sourced from China. We simply cannot allow this to happen! ** Thank you for standing with us in this crucial fight. -Able Dems | elects Democrats with disabilities. We fight to protect accessible voting, expand health care and Social Security, and equality for all. To donate by check, send to: Able Dems PAC c/o Pocketbook Strategies 1110 N Virgil Ave #375 Los Angeles, CA 90029 \- \- Paid for by Able Dems PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to Able Dems PAC are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . I just checked in with my team about our progress to our $25,000 mid-month fundraising goal.

Unfortunately, we’re not where we wanted to be by now. Here’s why I’m asking you to [_**chip in to help close the gap,**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105896438/539742577/339890710?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_MM2_250415_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOGNjOGVlYy0zYTFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T18cqxFOyhxJ7K9--bM_uoMZd-iB3TrqNHvuSUuYanY=) and why we can’t afford to fall short of crucial benchmarks like this one.

Look at the presidential election. Billionaires were virtually willing to spend _anything_ and go through any dark money channel to buy a policy from the Trump administration. **It would be naive of me _not_ to expect that these same powerful folks put up a $50 or $100 million superPAC against me.**

name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: 100 days in – and we’re just getting started!
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105896471/539742694/846650059?refcode=em-4.15.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTgzZmYzNi0zYjFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l5oZpG-uu7QkilMxP9022a2-f6IsqTv6qvbApKkKlm4=) Sunday marked _100 days_ since I was sworn into Congress, and while dysfunction continues to dominate the headlines in Washington, I’ve stayed focused on what matters: **delivering for Mid-Michigan families.** Here’s what we’ve accomplished so far:
* Returned **over $4.5 million** to constituents by resolving issues with agencies like the IRS, VA, and Social Security.
* Stood up to**Trump’s reckless budget cuts and tariffs** that hurt working families.
* Sponsored or co-sponsored **51 bills** , more than half with bipartisan support.
* **Took action to lower prices** – including bills to cut the cost of prescription drugs and your grocery bill.
* Protected seniors by leading legislation to**fix Social Security overpayment errors.**

But despite this progress, national Republicans are already coming after me – launching dishonest attack ads all because I voted against their effort to gut health care for millions of Americans. **[We still have so much work ahead, but I need your help to fight back and stay focused on delivering real results for MI-08 families. If you’re with me, can you chip in $3 to my campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105896472/539742695/846650059?refcode=em-4.15.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTgzZmYzNi0zYjFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l5oZpG-uu7QkilMxP9022a2-f6IsqTv6qvbApKkKlm4=)** __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | **[Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105896473/539742696/846650059?refcode=em-4.15.25-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTgzZmYzNi0zYjFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l5oZpG-uu7QkilMxP9022a2-f6IsqTv6qvbApKkKlm4=)**

Peter, Donald Trump said he’d lower prices on Day One. Instead, he’s sent the stock market spiraling with his disastrous tariff plan and given an unelected billionaire free rein to put countless Americans out of work — all while costs of living are still skyrocketing, including right here in Georgia. [We need to know: Are your bills too high? Take our 30-second poll and let us know:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105896536/539742929/-1782200894?source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_041525_Bills-PSC_2x30DO-60DC-60DD_D1_S1_T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZGQ3MjE3ZS0zYjFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kdeYdYdT12y5AtT0_Hs-YYDxll8JeKjPjh67NSsL18I=&emci=e5d7217e-3b1a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=edd7217e-3b1a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=43566853) | | **[COMPLETE POLL »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105896537/539742930/-1782200894?source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_041525_Bills-PSC_2x30DO-60DC-60DD_D1_S1_T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZGQ3MjE3ZS0zYjFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kdeYdYdT12y5AtT0_Hs-YYDxll8JeKjPjh67NSsL18I=&emci=e5d7217e-3b1a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=edd7217e-3b1a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=43566853)**

name: Breaking (via OhioDems.org)
subject: You seriously can’t make this up.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Nevada State Democratic Party, NVDEMS
body:
| | | Team, this weekend, Ohio State’s national championship team visited the White House to celebrate their hard-earned title. And what did JD Vance do? **He dropped the trophy. Literally. On national TV.** It’s not just embarrassing.**It’s a perfect metaphor for the way Republicans like JD Vance are treating Ohio — fumbling our democracy, dropping the ball on lowering costs for Ohio families, and putting profits for billionaires above the well-being of Ohioans.** This moment should’ve been about celebrating the resilience, teamwork, and excellence of Ohio’s athletes — but Vance made it all about himself while simultaneously driving home how recklessly he’s treating our country. Thanks to Trump and Musk, that money ended up in the pockets of big corporations and the wealthiest Americans. This is why Josh is running for Governor: to Lower Taxes and make sure Tax Day next year is a bigger success for everyday Americans than for people like Trump and Musk. Do not be mistaken — I am locked into the fight against the attempts by far-right legislators to defund public education, government agencies, and hand over sensitive information to an unelected billionaire. But, as the work in Washington picks up, sometimes our fundraising goals fall lower on the list. Delivering for the people of the 5th District is my top priority, which means that fundraising can fall behind. It is still quite early in the quarter, so we have time to catch up, but I could really use a boost of support from our online supporters. Can I personally count on you to make a contribution today? name: Team Bonta
subject: “California vs. Trump”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
The Attorney General and his team are standing up to Donald Trump when he comes for our liberties and livelihoods.
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em20250415&t=1&akid=1737%2E1088799%2EY8V8gQ)
Did you see Rob and his team featured in the _Los Angeles Times_?
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250415?refcode=em20250415-1737&amount=5&refcode2=1737_1088799_Y8V8gQ&akid=1737%2E1088799%2EY8V8gQ)
Rob and lawyers in the Attorney General’s office are working around the clock – _including weekends and deep into the night_ – to stand up to President Donald Trump when he comes for our liberties and livelihoods.
You can be sure Rob and the team are closely monitoring Trump’s actions and executive orders. Where laws are broken, rights are ripped away, or federal services are weakened, they will take action— _sometimes even filing a lawsuit the very next day._
During Trump’s first term, California sued the administration about 120 times. This time, we’re on pace to hit 100 lawsuits in just two years. Why? _Because Rob won’t rest until Trump stops breaking the law to get his way._
**“If they decide they’re going to stop breaking the law, then we’ll stop filing lawsuits,” Rob told the _Times_.**
Lawsuits have been one of the most effective ways to block the chaos Trump is trying to unleash on the federal government and our communities. As long as this president and his administration keep breaking the law to hurt Californians, Rob will keep taking them to court.
**[But he can’t do it alone. Will you donate $5 or more to our campaign to help us reach our mid-month goal and keep Rob in office fighting for our rights?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250415?refcode=em20250415-1737&amount=5&refcode2=1737_1088799_Y8V8gQ&akid=1737%2E1088799%2EY8V8gQ)**

— Team Bonta

name: Voter Action Project
subject: "There’s never been an attack on voting rights out of Congress like this”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20.00&contactdata=RpzikEfnsDf79HivGi4Gjs9l94Wtc2/8kLt30jgPnafQzmmzQNIvDvAtnBv4cIgHqvYjLnw7QKcei1wioNLhi3qmI2ymhERO1+rnWXWOWSY=]
CBS: Experts warn the proposed SAVE Act could make it harder for some married women to vote. Here's who could be affected. [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=20.00&contactdata=RpzikEfnsDf79HivGi4Gjs9l94Wtc2/8kLt30jgPnafQzmmzQNIvDvAtnBv4cIgHqvYjLnw7QKcei1wioNLhi3qmI2ymhERO1+rnWXWOWSY=]
The SAVE Act was fast-tracked by opponents of voting rights and passed the U.S. House of Representatives. This bill is a stunning assault on our fundamental right to vote, and we can not afford to let this anti-democratic legislation become law, folks.
Don’t be fooled by the name. This bill would force every voter to present proof of citizenship to register -- something millions of eligible Americans don’t have on hand. And that’s the point.
The bill would also obliterate popular methods of voter registration for all voters, including:
* Registration by mail

* 3rd party voter registration drives

* Online voter registration in states that allow it

* Automatic voter registration
Some estimates say that this bill could disenfranchise up to 11 million eligible Americans , especially women and those who live in under-resourced communities.
“ There’s never been an attack on voting rights out of Congress like this ,” said Alexander Keyssar, a professor of History and Social Policy at the Harvard Kennedy School, and a leading historian of voting rights. “ It’s always been the federal government trying to keep states in check on voting rights, for the most part. ”
Team, the consequences of a bill like this passing would be catastrophic for our democracy. Chip in with $25 or whatever you can today to stop the SAVE Act and other voter suppression bills from becoming law >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2]

clean_body: Voter Action Project [=] CBS: Experts warn the proposed SAVE Act could make it harder for some married women to vote. Here's who could be affected. [=] The SAVE Act was fast-tracked by opponents of voting rights and passed the U.S. House of Representatives. This bill is a stunning assault on our fundamental right to vote, and we can not afford to let this anti-democratic legislation become law, folks. Don’t be fooled by the name. This bill would force every voter to present proof of citizenship to register -- something millions of eligible Americans don’t have on hand. And that’s the point. The bill would also obliterate popular methods of voter registration for all voters, including: Registration by mail 3rd party voter registration drives Online voter registration in states that allow it Automatic voter registration Some estimates say that this bill could disenfranchise up to 11 million eligible Americans , especially women and those who live in under-resourced communities. “ There’s never been an attack on voting rights out of Congress like this ,” said Alexander Keyssar, a professor of History and Social Policy at the Harvard Kennedy School, and a leading historian of voting rights. “ It’s always been the federal government trying to keep states in check on voting rights, for the most part. ” Team, the consequences of a bill like this passing would be catastrophic for our democracy. Chip in with $25 or whatever you can today to stop the SAVE Act and other voter suppression bills from becoming law >> [] If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately: GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [=] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [=] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [=] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [=] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [=] OTHER AMOUNT [=] = [=] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. clean_body: Make sure you’ve filed - today’s the deadline! | | | | | | Friend, Today is Tax Day – the official deadline to file your federal and state tax returns. If you haven’t submitted your taxes yet, there’s still time, but the clock is ticking. Don’t forget to file before midnight! | | | | We know this day can be stressful - it’s a reminder of how much hard-working Americans contribute to keep our country running. It’s also a moment to reflect on the importance of using every dollar collected wisely, transparently, and with respect for the people who earned it. At the Oregon Republican Party, we remain committed to advocating for lower taxes, responsible spending, and a government that’s accountable to you – the taxpayer. Thank you for everything you do to support our community and state. Sincerely, Oregon GOP | | | | | | | | | | | * | | | | |

---
[FIGHT THE FAR-LEFT WITH AG MIYARES](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/s/c/Up3hK0DDwFyX2BJicVZBrNl1j5rfXMjZGHpPavYWNnDNOeSq4MPsKBDgcqiDdl4_SRmUdKe-1uYr0ja9JukIhmxlNUifETfaz62H4LTe3AD4kz5WViFaWt3SE3rociNEYSCBpFY5vGpcY7yUiJQTEDaJk6kIv1tDunpYwXYvaLUWZrNP4s3G4yf-sHJP8m9BQUw8XQO9tU6HyqbHRbb0Kfuv9WWfNo7NUq_CtXPPIB_kCZybbJfiqBWvcd_cQ5NJbsyxmnXGntM9LlBc4Otz-1yaEnHAykYlIGmS1Fs1EGBYbPHsOkdh7xSwQhwGPCe36eZzDVJ9XUMRd9BcjZrMZmwqbbfA1gG3EGCaW7pfqz6zeD1QTwRDGyTo-X8/ZF8IMudz_gUeGprc5Z9Qk7RIgDcMErrA/8)

_**Why are they so motivated to take me down? Let’s rewind**_** _._ **Four years ago, Virginia was heading in the wrong direction. Virginians wanted change and I was honored to be elected as your law & order Attorney General. And the results are real:
* overdoses are __lower__
* murders are __lower__
* and we’ve stopped dozens of government overreaches dead in their tracks.

_So OF COURSE the far left is targeting me for defeat this year.__ _**_As the first Hispanic elected statewide in Virginia’s 400+ year history who has delivered real results, I am a threat to their liberal ideology and propaganda. _ **_ __We cannot allow Virginia to go back to the soft-on-crime policies of four years ago.__ _ I’m not afraid of their attacks. We cannot allow radical progressives like them to win. And we cannot allow them to bring chaos and lawlessness back to Virginia._ _ _ I’m ready to stand and fight for the progress we’ve made in Virginia. Will you stand with me, friend?

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105897829/539747634/1606932672?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjhhYTZlZC0zZTFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2lPziAILmBT7QrmbjtJOsdgpTnIMhFrbOXXyxnVdb_s=)
Peter,

Today is our mid-month fundraising benchmark. Before I personally ask you to **[chip in $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105897835/539747641/1606932672?refcode=em-4.15.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjhhYTZlZC0zZTFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2lPziAILmBT7QrmbjtJOsdgpTnIMhFrbOXXyxnVdb_s=)** toward my re-election in this critical seat, I need to get you up to speed.
* Political experts at the _Cook Political Report_ and _Sabato’s Crystal Ball_ have named CA-27 as one of the most competitive 2026 races in the country. **We’re dangerously close to becoming a toss-up race.**

* **National Republicans realize just how critical this seat is for the majority.** Only 3 seats separate House control, and winning the majority is key to holding this administration accountable and stopping the destruction of our democracy.

* It’s why I’m already facing constant attacks from GOP super PACs and the NRCC. **Remember: We faced over $15 MILLION in outside spending in the last election. It’s only a matter of time before we’re hit with millions more.**

* **I’m laser-focused on delivering for our communities in Congress** – protecting Social Security and Medicare, fighting for reproductive rights and healthcare, putting CA-27 first, and standing against Trump’s corruption.

It also means I’m a lot less focused on fundraising for our re-election race. History shows it’s always been a challenge to re-elect a Democrat in this district – and with your help we will flip the script and ensure the GOP loses their House majority and grip on power.

**[But it starts now: Can I count on you to chip in $3 or any amount you can today to keep our strong momentum?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105897838/539747647/1606932672?refcode=em-4.15.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjhhYTZlZC0zZTFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2lPziAILmBT7QrmbjtJOsdgpTnIMhFrbOXXyxnVdb_s=)**

body:
This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it start to finish:

| |
---
| | | | [](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/yt5LOvVWgxJeVMiW167k1pCsDRuHAFGxX7vQFOD_cjZE4sFS1YPi5VkEY-btEGAfOwVKX-Zd3PBN3IXtsMeQlGiV6HWcCWOui5OrmmsoarEKV3qjKXa84wYheLWAkbkF-W_JD2k_ZIGohwkyBBHbcABemaFqu206zRBKeyWdfRiq2SlfHL1limNM_k8V3DlB1Ah0F3obRuwLXBF8jcAEgD5pm1pJ88fgeDvqR13y3RXnEuhuDquvGQYby-5yWPZRz-HvhMIQ4Wu_ATj1S70MmyT8XnyGTGdhD-9qS0BAVd2m-3aAFQASeGOwTNsNBGnn5rQeQ16blU_u1Df3vBEnhTjTI7Wi8ONZFmG03Gmf1GfmxYXQhGWWljJvg0Ybq3y52CJSrLke1ArWIRq-WBZyQSacEH1OG9veMNi31jDuIgGNQ4eIW6y19qr80W8rYYdvs5nKROPhv7XK5Bs8pPexuuwdXTsGsYnSxdEmanXp0A/WeRVs6vYZ21mN_PnUW3xpvE2fNLUDx3u/8 "Vice President JD Vance")

My fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance.

_**[This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/0ZyWwnZqwTbOGdzQZgP1x48R1wuTJTmjgn27p7FDpKyqdylF6R1OJwr-75SJlvxOwMeOPTdv0uDuY0lpWliK2_iYV9HF8pt9K4y-aW4-oaBRw1Ccmn7M5BbGH_wsAaYSfPfZfG_HuSkPRMvpm-CJhwL5Q4_2BZJVfKDkPMpROw7hAijWJ6j5TW_4w1vt4J0CtsBOSBNamDoKmtK2XrZGAcUylDM9urhBiA189prb4UUGHtuIlZ0o--v542qoUaRKKX2yJqofzy2qeArwgDgiz5xCtEKagp3KvDEJ1uXNf4pqrYJf5C8JiwRs3Zn-3xP8wNeLNztyzN8f61bbhlLLPLkgwzx6LUmPC4suM_WJyVmhJxWwQG0KVyfvtahCwJ112nf4fwZU8W8HEsTwLKnYazG-2w4SFo1S4nwkqjaGqjzcJkysuMdYttxqRqtr-RmjlVGRmjmlSB1XV9_dA2g9J5hHRqzJqgxhJtLTSNBOkg/XKksZ3WZWJNkV9list6W3ovacfdToGNy/8 "This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.")**_

It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction.

It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC.

**But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all.** I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11.

_As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. _

I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you.

I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great.

_**[Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/8wRAG_4gnLKlmhwz65Kd0m3DNziwMN3DvLeA3ESdMnurP0D809WVz9OgApMQgHbZyCuLlwtzsY5F_4d-Ey_a4Av_13k9y_an2tEFAo5caZoyasRhnzVokMMF_ezTut6_01RGfKqqhiHS2e1jVquDZczrCYsrXn9zDoVkIf3nx-wIw3jlb-8aphFsa-O1FiUciyJJYi0DVQ_zqNjS3HpYfBawIjHaORGSbIjRq5F1mpe3NHD848kFde8s6dwfp00eUO9S9AjAV-l4YZlOm6M2mpYzQg6_sdxSJ9kP0UnRsEN_QYRV-_ncPZh5qJ5Z2QYFiOeL8mS-YZOoN_GVtsGyWeyScm-8AlE85fPFjlCZC1jzD7LcRfIMvIb9x1v9y5pkVhfwRdPbMuolmR1aUkSKettXGGh4k7B7EwzLC5NXyo1UUCcNR72lBDWt5-kZg9rzsjuGVftNI4rJ1RXb_xuOuGtwyuYS-PXcKTdaJ9zpcg/1WbfXIbYMq5my_-2F-4nSNTo6dnNyUvu/8 "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.")**_

We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win.

So now we're forced to rebuild.

The Democrat Machine is **ALREADY** crushing us in fundraising, **ALREADY** outspending us in key races, and **ALREADY** building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections.

At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable.

So here's my final pitch to you:

_**[I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise - for the FIRST TIME since the election - to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/CKCqx--gpH2F-bTpscHNxbP84OhhcOh_U8tSxuR-x2ENLGabJvP4MfYOR8yXMzCEb3GDwm0mh9Q3kMJzHNLX4wBDL-QLLt4xm-OalWuFO4PHezcCXxNV-e3dYMBJg9mt-JNkMXjMP57Muuc5OF2cvGbKeih0L8yi_TaPUKZ8RpnTRvP51Ejl67j1bFyAVdqS6EpmbnJrm_n1cRjVjVpr2WDt2H07JqQsuIxXYm4bRTRfEp72uQAUPhgTrBOkdmWf7DDxscWTr9-IEreNuPzx1zt77FF4gmeyD3ilnZfg_vK41-xpVeKaf_0rUgC3AfkhS5DJL_UWlkNRgJ6S0UmIRoxWCEGwGjftkpXky28vX8bWE-JimZn_f0Dzp-IMKSUb00AVJMyDU35oP5wBlL_v8kGpBn47TBHFEuTTawezPkqXGbj-c0JETO0SnFDT8pCNIQhi_xgc4PEybMuqxGsJu2o7WEClh_8ziPCb0tJAoA/6gtgfnqB__q7sMKmYXN8M0Q7X3C1YRus/8 "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.")**_ I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win.

Do you think you can help us get there?

_Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up:_
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN US](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/Ukl6r9fDrANioK1ziMi2WfAK2tI8gMznUJkMvFlvV5turDRdmBkxJ7oj5TGtvAYO4NatAEXDqwp0C9g2IlqyTAn8xgRriCYJdon43e8gDKaiDkFm_tSuA26vjsumCzNUzUDc-TJs9yGMOYnP1BinbrTuyg9lGH4bJTG-lp8ewbHhpw3FOtXM3qU1QmNc20TXH8a6KB1yHZzaSJ7eiZQ-aowUI5RPNuivLW78t9R6uj4ZzRJQDOdWdnD86LKiZJub56HTiJI1Iq_jXhEWkG2optj_hZjqO1vCO1MNRJ34OeFQBoLCt5-yQsCh6oigwNiBCPV3jmAB7nDclRSln1n6elL5rbAv4Lg1kvOWRdmcIaM8zm-lSmw-GseHCYUiKhRTlTNVKr_BWDOyQc4DnkZD0oFCTYcogZVb51CFvItD7DHzk1DO_86gL9oQPiHFURe6qDXrBLun4rmpMrpY4DYTwQJ67UzxWaPVHKHW5YFvxQ/WU31VVUeCa7wYOZGXw4r4KOKbgczvhZU/8 "PLEASE JOIN US")
---
Look, you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point.

If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. That's why I'm partnering with Steve Scalise to help lay the critical groundwork we need to win.

_**[I don't ever want you to donate more than you can afford - but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/XPX1L4KZhJDG_JVRqn3Hax1fuyDeKPBA9WQn7cFySGgF7FZfdoPZOPv2RK-shV0hPTVe94QloEn9CXa43RTv_uWO4mmpl-hkJoAzRxT700G9Hb4dnC2ooMEZNoft_JRxnsyFUJb-hjtTGE5JNZXnZBe2LLJZ4d68OWB7nJw73zTyCaJKtTkthBRC0I5xfMoNw7c3OInclvfUNfRVNrGHMYUIo0Ekj__tEHg9etCarEHAhPESN_yP7a4VjRapDPoC5aN4f2G5WN1MJ53OM64SGx-TNBINP29ZreKaAMi2PsKEORPcPo2AxqP8A5YXRJcA3-1OykmqTWYPsnTK3raTLUNqUnZpNDe8v9r70yzllMkNAPNo8mPvuXH30b8iO157uMUr1PQ9vcJNNWqYmClczImdtFBH75vzuSRPUIfFvhoaeRDw4RUeKW1yFaxMAGv3pjx6qeAP-BFg7Ton9MDF0Q0hhVXKAkw7zeMlUK0TPw/0qTiICnHD2pJPLq86Fk7QefuoidC50vU/8 "I don’t ever want you to donate more than you can afford – but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.")**_

Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you.

God bless America,
Vice President JD Vance

subject: First, voter ID in Wisconsin - Now, AMERICA!

body:
| Not interested? [Unsubscribe here](https://links.house-republicans.org/unsubscribe?e=998fa18fd50048d580e64d9cd10dc33f&utm_source=hdscalise&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_bf897fafd75e9a0faa6f3f5dbbc&n=1).

| Hello,

Wisconsinites JUST voted to enshrine voter ID into the state constitution!

Momentum is on our side in the fight to secure our elections. Now I’m taking the next step and calling for voter ID requirements in ALL 50 STATES! If you agree every voter should be required to present a photo ID, I'm asking you to _**[sign my petition](https://links.house-republicans.org/r?u=-KKwfzWl7oK4gNPooZXuJ4Zn2xET82xeGk9Y43EVmFJCaDmbK8P1moD5krhpmefwrHfOmHCjRfGKukrAbjP0XQJAQFKkwvg5m6yQu7geRoarjpHVZc5wJ__7c9_367A4IjYlithILRuBqX8xt_d-a8vERShEDN2H2YIBDlYLOrDB1DmVihaoP9sPBfFByRDxNXPgEY-a6rJESSEv1Ct4whzTxG3pLDTlC6etx-fE7nUtXYutLT84Vuw1WdPBjQg5NYRL8CPvYJawrv28goglcnWNGQV7k_-jZrIdaTRcooQ&e=998fa18fd50048d580e64d9cd10dc33f&utm_source=hdscalise&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_bf897fafd75e9a0faa6f3f5dbbc&n=2 "sign my petition")**_ right here and right now:

name: Jane Fonda
subject: Quiet isn’t an option.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
We’ve got work to do.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105898393/539749586/1328794144?refcode=ea.0b2f5ec9-401a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.0b2f5ec9-401a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBiMmY1ZWM5LTQwMWEtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6y5CFcU-SjPVCUhytXMBR8D3x05EqDXGZuX5XIwuDkI=&emci=cfe10016-7219-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=0b2f5ec9-401a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=4823105)
---
I’ve always had a thing for rebellion. Every movement that has ever changed the world — from civil rights to women’s liberation to climate justice — started because people refused to stay quiet. They didn’t wait for permission. They didn’t let fear or doubt stop them. They acted. That rebellious spirit is what’s needed right now. Because let’s be real — the news under the Trump administration is a never-ending barrage of chaos. Climate disasters, billionaires influencing our democracy, politicians gutting our rights. It’s enough to make anyone feel small. But here’s what I’ve learned after decades of fighting: The feeling of being small is exactly what they want. They want us to believe we’re powerless. They want us hopeless. But we won’t give them that satisfaction. We don’t need to be the biggest, the loudest, or the best. We just need to keep showing up. Because every time we raise our voices and refuse to back down — we prove we are not powerless. **That’s why I started the Jane Fonda Climate PAC. To take the spirit of rebellion into the halls of power — by resisting the fossil fuel industry’s influence and electing climate champions who will fight for our future, not corporate profits.** But this work takes resources. **[If you believe, like I do, that rebellion is as necessary now as it’s ever been, please contribute whatever you can to keep that spirit burning in the climate movement.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105898394/539749587/2105508926?refcode=ea.0b2f5ec9-401a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.0b2f5ec9-401a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBiMmY1ZWM5LTQwMWEtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6y5CFcU-SjPVCUhytXMBR8D3x05EqDXGZuX5XIwuDkI=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [**DONATE $5**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105898395/539749588/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.0b2f5ec9-401a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.0b2f5ec9-401a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBiMmY1ZWM5LTQwMWEtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6y5CFcU-SjPVCUhytXMBR8D3x05EqDXGZuX5XIwuDkI=) | [**DONATE $25**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105898396/539749589/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=ea.0b2f5ec9-401a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.0b2f5ec9-401a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBiMmY1ZWM5LTQwMWEtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6y5CFcU-SjPVCUhytXMBR8D3x05EqDXGZuX5XIwuDkI=)

clean_body: We’ve got work to do. | I’ve always had a thing for rebellion. Every movement that has ever changed the world — from civil rights to women’s liberation to climate justice — started because people refused to stay quiet. They didn’t wait for permission. They didn’t let fear or doubt stop them. They acted. That rebellious spirit is what’s needed right now. Because let’s be real — the news under the Trump administration is a never-ending barrage of chaos. Climate disasters, billionaires influencing our democracy, politicians gutting our rights. It’s enough to make anyone feel small. But here’s what I’ve learned after decades of fighting: The feeling of being small is exactly what they want. They want us to believe we’re powerless. They want us hopeless. But we won’t give them that satisfaction. We don’t need to be the biggest, the loudest, or the best. We just need to keep showing up. Because every time we raise our voices and refuse to back down — we prove we are not powerless. That’s why I started the Jane Fonda Climate PAC. To take the spirit of rebellion into the halls of power — by resisting the fossil fuel industry’s influence and electing climate champions who will fight for our future, not corporate profits. But this work takes resources. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = In solidarity, xx Jane = | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. When I look at my kids, I think about the world they’ll grow up in. I want them to know that public service can be honorable. That government can reflect the values we teach our kids — compassion, fairness, and a belief in progress.

But we won’t get there unless we demand it.

So yes, this is personal. If we want a Congress that looks like America, we need to make room for the lived experiences of young parents and everyday people.

And we need to stand up to those who are doing everything in their power to drag us backward.

We can get through this next administration — but only if we stand together, organize, and fight for a better future. **[Donate $10 to help us build resources, take back the House, and put up a line of defense against extremism in 2026.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105898602/539750342/-1141677817?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_SM_20250415_FR_MMFR_0_1MO_SethMagaziner_NA_NA_1.1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTIyMjMwZS00MjFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gr6zHOwD8Q5FdyHpY1Jy1jdij85aLjVckNoJHIcNteY=)**

Thank you,

Seth Magaziner

subject: Saving Our Mothers:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Save lives and build a more equitable world by supporting the Michigan Chamber for Reproductive Justice today. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWeoblKvNnZJbcOoLSykj8WA3ZLJdph-cIXd7RFWk19OAO2GCapCY8tMuIiaJOB97bNav1L_NhZHKPYFZPWr4wfSrLCTAIsQ4GH_xi_t1sx_9X7A6JqTLV6qBId7vJropY/4fo/smkXFh2gT8WFYdn4_UfIAA/h0/h001.HvCOZOlxEhOJMWnPXQR_9GJRat7MTT8uIhKRKk5CFfg)
---
Friend, This Black Maternal Health Week, I want to lift up incredible leaders in the movement to improve healthcare for Black moms and their babies. **The Michigan Chamber for Reproductive Justice (MCRJ) is advancing Black maternal health through grassroots leadership, policy advocacy, and coalition building.** MCRJ is committed to ensuring that all people receive the dignified, equitable care they deserve before, during, and after birth. In my state of Michigan, this is especially needed because Black maternal mortality rates are among the highest in the nation—with Black women more than 4.5 times likely to die from pregnancy-related causes than white women, and Black infants 3 times more likely to die than white infants. Solutions to this urgent crisis include investing in more Black healthcare providers and more birth centers, which are midwife-led, home-like places that have been proven to improve maternal and infant health outcomes. As the policy lead for the Michigan State of Birth Justice Coalition, MCRJ grounds its work in the foundational leadership of Birth Detroit—home to the only Black-led birth center in the state. The coalition’s community-rooted vision has helped shape critical policy wins, including a newly signed law to license and expand access to birth centers, and the “Michigan Momnibus” policy package—featuring vital bills to support doulas and midwives and protect patients from discrimination. [**Can you chip in today to support the Michigan Chamber for Reproductive Justice’s life-saving advocacy to eradicate racial disparities in maternal and infant health? Stand up for Black moms now.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJo9jrM96lquf-5Db3OvCo_evcxwG0PZGDrnqntM-qWLW7TjBMim7ygqJPeNZullRDtTTvh6kblgNjv6HnKGTuyJIvS1fWODa7m-g3ShjTEhABsx-vbycrwPuKN4Jd__HFHyukGGnIfzFDLnBipkwtVyZrEDiZCC7Al88IHTByrfMLjrZqjCLuOI21_LI6t3xOe84pWpmm9fMUbs10MZIpm_24YQNI_qmK99rLCKGgEji3BLgRWOYXWL7zLt0TOfPHgwg79acIuXlxe6rmjDTnlw/4fo/smkXFh2gT8WFYdn4_UfIAA/h1/h001.rrhLBbqXBMm-K588e9yKM7QUTx_liXi-YipdYf3ttGQ) | [CHIP IN TO MCRJ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJo9jrM96lquf-5Db3OvCo_SuQgE7EaA7bFoyBs3NpkjNKG7h4DtWV9vLd2LzYInWs2hR0Pwiz8QrdDOCw-P-qNWYp9e5MzBWDxipIJSmAvKVgoLo1j3S3GjZYxXULs2W6bM-6a8pAn5_5WzFWrfKNqfNIV_fhvkd9CxmlrbMJjAUXF0Sl4c753FKS3I6702dVr9dhpWfOiuPYHddXau5jPP8UQZRngxYid5spGHNTOjtC5-r1CT0V1goen92oYHIVL3n3nGO_EbUVOWytL-GZrQ/4fo/smkXFh2gT8WFYdn4_UfIAA/h2/h001.oeh3ua8KqOM6AOpZhAIieEn9qBz0Ab-u8I6rXKwEy44)
---
Thanks in part to the relentless advocacy from the Michigan Chamber for Reproductive Justice, lawmakers introduced the “Michigan Momnibus” package during last year’s Black Maternal Health Week. This week, this set of important solutions will be voted on in the Michigan Senate. Then it’s on to the State House!
While pushing for life-saving policies, the Michigan Chamber for Reproductive Justice (MCRJ) is also providing education and resources to communities, their families, healthcare providers, and the institutions that shape their care experiences.
This community group’s work is rooted in reproductive justice, which is the human right to maintain personal bodily autonomy, to have children or not have children, and to parent in safe, sustainable communities.
In addition to birth justice, MCRJ advocates for intersecting issues such as environmental justice and housing justice—recognizing that access to clean water, safe housing, and economic stability are essential to achieving true reproductive freedom.
The Michigan Chamber for Reproductive Justice’s critical work depends on federal resources to expand access to doulas, midwives, and culturally competent care. The federal funding freeze is forcing them to fight harder for every dollar to ensure that communities don’t lose access to life-saving support.
[**Will you chip in today to help the Michigan Chamber for Reproductive Justice eradicate racial health disparities and build a more equitable future where Black reproductive justice thrives?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJo9jrM96lquf-5Db3OvCo_ca2gUOMgY8xC_HGOWNTNPbP9q1DMgyPTbqWqVQUQtSpq5P1fsVWU18FzHuCyPTYnDLK24GQoEbz91qORWyWuOXRgq9XkYN7GBYNN6hvGazYhGu0EZVvOX8_lDuz521NC-z7B7dCB4JT-tePAHhivd0JwuFWpdCA_8UJ-aXLpQV4-lLe3xLLhE6EdzJPIngJLM6t779FC2f1_lZk0ODoXe8yRyvOZhV-ZkR4-8IrLmADYPcVmWfXtaOFovLNRgHOew/4fo/smkXFh2gT8WFYdn4_UfIAA/h3/h001.5DaIPd4jZEMhOKrbhXq1vENa1fNiBEH0QOf0klYipKw)

Thank you. Our systems and institutions have failed to provide Black people with the high-quality healthcare that everyone deserves. But I refuse to accept this status quo, and I thank you for standing with me and the movement for health equity.
In Congress, I’m supporting policies for Black maternal and infant health like the federal _Momnibus Act_ , and I’m working with the Congressional Mamas’ Caucus to center Black mothers and other mothers of color in policymaking.
Together, we will continue demanding and building a society that honors everyone’s safety, dignity, and bodily autonomy.
In love and solidarity,
Rashida

clean_body: Save lives and build a more equitable world by supporting the Michigan Chamber for Reproductive Justice today. | | | Friend, This Black Maternal Health Week, I want to lift up incredible leaders in the movement to improve healthcare for Black moms and their babies. The Michigan Chamber for Reproductive Justice (MCRJ) is advancing Black maternal health through grassroots leadership, policy advocacy, and coalition building. MCRJ is committed to ensuring that all people receive the dignified, equitable care they deserve before, during, and after birth. In my state of Michigan, this is especially needed because Black maternal mortality rates are among the highest in the nation—with Black women more than 4.5 times likely to die from pregnancy-related causes than white women, and Black infants 3 times more likely to die than white infants. Solutions to this urgent crisis include investing in more Black healthcare providers and more birth centers, which are midwife-led, home-like places that have been proven to improve maternal and infant health outcomes. As the policy lead for the Michigan State of Birth Justice Coalition, MCRJ grounds its work in the foundational leadership of Birth Detroit—home to the only Black-led birth center in the state. The coalition’s community-rooted vision has helped shape critical policy wins, including a newly signed law to license and expand access to birth centers, and the “Michigan Momnibus” policy package—featuring vital bills to support doulas and midwives and protect patients from discrimination. | Thanks in part to the relentless advocacy from the Michigan Chamber for Reproductive Justice, lawmakers introduced the “Michigan Momnibus” package during last year’s Black Maternal Health Week. This week, this set of important solutions will be voted on in the Michigan Senate. Then it’s on to the State House! While pushing for life-saving policies, the Michigan Chamber for Reproductive Justice (MCRJ) is also providing education and resources to communities, their families, healthcare providers, and the institutions that shape their care experiences. This community group’s work is rooted in reproductive justice, which is the human right to maintain personal bodily autonomy, to have children or not have children, and to parent in safe, sustainable communities. In addition to birth justice, MCRJ advocates for intersecting issues such as environmental justice and housing justice—recognizing that access to clean water, safe housing, and economic stability are essential to achieving true reproductive freedom. The Michigan Chamber for Reproductive Justice’s critical work depends on federal resources to expand access to doulas, midwives, and culturally competent care. The federal funding freeze is forcing them to fight harder for every dollar to ensure that communities don’t lose access to life-saving support. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Thank you. Our systems and institutions have failed to provide Black people with the high-quality healthcare that everyone deserves. But I refuse to accept this status quo, and I thank you for standing with me and the movement for health equity. In Congress, I’m supporting policies for Black maternal and infant health like the federal Momnibus Act , and I’m working with the Congressional Mamas’ Caucus to center Black mothers and other mothers of color in policymaking. Together, we will continue demanding and building a society that honors everyone’s safety, dignity, and bodily autonomy. In love and solidarity, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . body:
If Congress lets this slide — if they don’t step in immediately to do all they can to bring Kilmar home and hold Trump accountable — then we could be entering a new era of unchecked, authoritarian power. | | | The Trump administration is openly defying the law, Peter. **Kilmar Abrego Garcia** is a Maryland father and a legal U.S. resident. Last month, ICE agents tore him away from his 5-year-old son in an IKEA parking lot. No warrant. No trial. Just a calculated, cold-blooded abduction of an immigrant father picking up furniture.1 Then, Trump’s agents illegally deported him to El Salvador, where he’s now locked inside one of the world’s most brutal maximum-security facilities. **The Supreme Court ruled unanimously — 9 to 0 — that the Trump administration must return Kilmar to the U.S. 2** And now? Trump is defying the highest court of the land. Spitting on the constitution. And daring the rest of us to stop him. This isn’t just a tragedy, Peter. It’s a five-alarm constitutional crisis. If Trump can rip families apart, break the law, and ignore the Supreme Court without consequences, then the rule of law is dead — and none of us are safe. [**Congress must act — now. Add your name to demand they do everything in their power to bring Kilmar home immediately and hold Trump accountable for this lawless, authoritarian abuse of power.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRIq_Rq3KohZ4y2Iu5_arjN9TP18f3mxQm3BpB-F5Ts9w5intyQrymSOj1tIWXFIUNddmlfJYfBT6zfYlCKzLzMkPlD2tVhACAvq7UxebztOYuTgWoTpwtq71VwVjsG7G4g4saGVrwucsSLGsBKE3kNf6-bDoJ-5P3T8MgSl7KgZXP-RKeTwmDqpbt82kInOe0fHp7fBgZLQiFqoMswtMnHqmWgrbnCnvbx498vokgwb-7Cxr2NOVMttQfhPNd31T65PkLi2XW1K_BtDPxrlOQpmbmZjuLU_PubChPxfhOR7uLHAGuOxKwLipQjmzWvs8_0ldqCfjJiS4GtpbTlJeQKqgKgPDZ5VaGEb-xhsVhXRig/4fo/DfwGB1i5TXqkS4w9GX5uIw/h0/h001.BzSgCM8XbFhZ4qdu9ljO_4sItVPQgdvjfUeupF4mrw0) Kilmar’s case is horrifying, but not isolated. **Mahmoud Khalil** , a permanent U.S. resident and Columbia graduate student, was also arrested by federal agents in his Manhattan apartment last month. His “crime”? Attending peaceful protests against the war in Gaza. His student visa was abruptly revoked, and he’s now being detained — without charges.3 **Rumeysa Ozturk** , a Tufts student, was detained by ICE and sent to a prison 1,000 miles away — despite a court order that she remain in Massachusetts. Her deportation is now underway. Why? Because she wrote an op-ed critical of Israel’s war in Gaza. The State Department found no ties to a crime. Just another dissenting voice the Trump administration wanted silenced.4 This isn’t law enforcement. It’s political punishment. And now, Trump is saying the quiet part out loud. Yesterday morning, live on camera, he said he wanted to send “homegrowns” — U.S. _citizens_ — to foreign prisons.5 If Congress lets this slide — if they don’t step in immediately to do all they can to bring Kilmar home and hold Trump accountable — then we could be entering a new era of unchecked, authoritarian power. **[Add your name now. And demand Congress act — before this moment becomes the new normal.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRIq_Rq3KohZ4y2Iu5_arjN9TP18f3mxQm3BpB-F5Ts9w5intyQrymSOj1tIWXFIUNddmlfJYfBT6zfYlCKzLzMkPlD2tVhACAvq7UxebztOYuTgWoTpwtq71VwVjsG7G4g4saGVrwucsSLGsBKE3kNf6-bDoJ-5P3T8MgSl7KgZXDPHc7Vh6xKSmkllEHMBn5SBxV0w9eU4REXitiTlEMz_QZ589rA3kgu3P0Sz0nU2SooMwuZ9xyLvu5_dGNIbJXfh-kab1WFCj9H2M0pP3Qv-OiEZkiitqCqUir0zlJ4HJhspLfLMJQedXqk-wNxx3TA83nkJ7VHAV4ZmiYaKOY92ldsOKNjy4PIs8Qa_kY2b_g/4fo/DfwGB1i5TXqkS4w9GX5uIw/h1/h001.FiYIgTQfQ8zck7-pLiQi_ju0oS9aJNmMnIvqnG1e3Lg)** In solidarity, Working Families Party Sources: 1\. clean_body: If Congress lets this slide — if they don’t step in immediately to do all they can to bring Kilmar home and hold Trump accountable — then we could be entering a new era of unchecked, authoritarian power. | | | The Trump administration is openly defying the law, Peter. Kilmar Abrego Garcia is a Maryland father and a legal U.S. resident. Last month, ICE agents tore him away from his 5-year-old son in an IKEA parking lot. No warrant. No trial. Just a calculated, cold-blooded abduction of an immigrant father picking up furniture.1 Then, Trump’s agents illegally deported him to El Salvador, where he’s now locked inside one of the world’s most brutal maximum-security facilities. The Supreme Court ruled unanimously — 9 to 0 — that the Trump administration must return Kilmar to the U.S. 2 And now? Trump is defying the highest court of the land. Spitting on the constitution. And daring the rest of us to stop him. This isn’t just a tragedy, Peter. It’s a five-alarm constitutional crisis. If Trump can rip families apart, break the law, and ignore the Supreme Court without consequences, then the rule of law is dead — and none of us are safe. Kilmar’s case is horrifying, but not isolated. Mahmoud Khalil , a permanent U.S. resident and Columbia graduate student, was also arrested by federal agents in his Manhattan apartment last month. His “crime”? Attending peaceful protests against the war in Gaza. His student visa was abruptly revoked, and he’s now being detained — without charges.3 Rumeysa Ozturk , a Tufts student, was detained by ICE and sent to a prison 1,000 miles away — despite a court order that she remain in Massachusetts. Her deportation is now underway. Why? Because she wrote an op-ed critical of Israel’s war in Gaza. The State Department found no ties to a crime. Just another dissenting voice the Trump administration wanted silenced.4 This isn’t law enforcement. It’s political punishment. And now, Trump is saying the quiet part out loud. Yesterday morning, live on camera, he said he wanted to send “homegrowns” — U.S. citizens — to foreign prisons.5 If Congress lets this slide — if they don’t step in immediately to do all they can to bring Kilmar home and hold Trump accountable — then we could be entering a new era of unchecked, authoritarian power. In solidarity, Working Families Party Sources: 1\. , AP News, April 14, 2025. 2\. , BBC News, April 9, 2025. 3\. , CNN, March 11, 2025. 4\. , The Washington Post, April 13, 2025. 5\. , ABC News, April 14, 2025. name: OLCV
subject: Peter, do you need some hope for our climate?
body:
Help us celebrate our recent climate wins and create hope for this next year at our Annual Celebration for the Environment! Join us on Friday, May 2nd for an inspiring evening with noteworthy speeches, community members, and delicious food and drink.| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105898938/539751438/-1181493100?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFiMWUwYzQwLTQzMWEtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4MTsvB8nFGgVIQl8F28kEPWtfD8ZSbqafFdH6O58zco=&emci=9c9e9184-251a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=1b1e0c40-431a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230)
---
Photo: [Mike Putnam Photography](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105898939/539751439/-421504261?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFiMWUwYzQwLTQzMWEtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4MTsvB8nFGgVIQl8F28kEPWtfD8ZSbqafFdH6O58zco=&emci=9c9e9184-251a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=1b1e0c40-431a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230)
---
Dear Peter, OLCV's Annual Celebration for the Environment is Friday, May 2nd, and you're invited! Featuring **inspiring speakers** , **delicious food and Oregon wine and beer** , an **auction and paddle raise** , and great company – all to benefit OLCV’s important work protecting our climate and environment. **OLCV’s Annual Celebration for the Environment****Friday, May 2nd, 2025** **[The Loft on 8th](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105898940/539751440/-1828291132?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFiMWUwYzQwLTQzMWEtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4MTsvB8nFGgVIQl8F28kEPWtfD8ZSbqafFdH6O58zco=&emci=9c9e9184-251a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=1b1e0c40-431a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230), Portland, OR**Doors open at 5:30pm for a social/cocktail hour followed by dinner and program beginning at 7pm
---
[**Get your tickets**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105898941/539751441/-1181493100?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFiMWUwYzQwLTQzMWEtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4MTsvB8nFGgVIQl8F28kEPWtfD8ZSbqafFdH6O58zco=&emci=9c9e9184-251a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=1b1e0c40-431a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230)
---
| |
---
|
---
| | **Sponsor and table host opportunities available![Click here for more information.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105898942/539751462/28000903?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFiMWUwYzQwLTQzMWEtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4MTsvB8nFGgVIQl8F28kEPWtfD8ZSbqafFdH6O58zco=&emci=9c9e9184-251a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=1b1e0c40-431a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230)** It's easy to feel defeated right now. Every day seems to bring more bad news from the federal level, but together we can weather the storm and continue making progress for our climate and environment. We still have a lot to be proud of and celebrate – including electing pro-environment supermajorities to the house and senate last November.
---
|
---
| |
---
| The work we do everyday creates hope for a safe, healthy, and equitable climate future for our state. Now is the time to come together to celebrate our shared accomplishments, and ensure that we have the resources we need to continue our important work of protecting Oregon’s people, places, climate, and environment.
---
[Buy tickets now!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105898943/539751470/-1181493100?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFiMWUwYzQwLTQzMWEtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4MTsvB8nFGgVIQl8F28kEPWtfD8ZSbqafFdH6O58zco=&emci=9c9e9184-251a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=1b1e0c40-431a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230)
---
| | For sponsorship opportunities or to become a table host, email OLCV Development Director April Christenson, [april@olcv.org](mailto:april@olcv.org). We hope you will join us for this very special night!
---
**_Thank you to our generous sponsors!_**
---
---
