name: Ro Khanna
subject: TAKE ACTION: Abolish Super PACs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]
Peter,
Rep. Summer Lee and I have introduced the Abolish Super PACs Act, a bill that would effectively eliminate super PACs in federal elections.
Over $4.4 billion spent in last year’s federal elections came from super PACs and dark money. This record is broken year after year, silencing Americans and corrupting our democracy. If we want real change in Washington, we need to get dark money out of the picture.
Sign the petition: End super PAC spending once and for all. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/abolish-super-pacs-act-petition?contactdata=46NHYCQ2bHBhLw3dIZ8VRdnRBqq4NAveJI4LAEDkuzMJqFvn1+BQpU+cGLp/R38ocrRa5RReKETbCnowdLjrEBgmkoRdTIsGzk6KJ9hY79hVsejmtPAfQRuZ8amrg8EbhcPWfng0P9pxiBmMz5FnEuxB2JWYbrcbkV2oJdN/kOlsPI+lAKxVWTcuVJpC9Ycp]
https://x.com/ArtCandee/status/1904972861493641527 [https://x.com/ArtCandee/status/1904972861493641527]
I’ve never taken a dime of PAC or lobbyist money and I never will. When I was first elected, I co-founded the No PAC Caucus and introduced a bill to ban all PAC and lobbyist money from Congress because I firmly believe that our government should work for the people, NOT special interests.
By addressing the dangerous influence of unlimited spending in our elections, we can create a stronger democracy for all Americans.
ADD YOUR NAME [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/abolish-super-pacs-act-petition?contactdata=46NHYCQ2bHBhLw3dIZ8VRdnRBqq4NAveJI4LAEDkuzMJqFvn1+BQpU+cGLp/R38ocrRa5RReKETbCnowdLjrEBgmkoRdTIsGzk6KJ9hY79hVsejmtPAfQRuZ8amrg8EbhcPWfng0P9pxiBmMz5FnEuxB2JWYbrcbkV2oJdN/kOlsPI+lAKxVWTcuVJpC9Ycp]
Thank you for your activism and everything you do.
In solidarity,
Ro
Wait! One more thing–
Ro doesn't accept a cent from lobbyists or PACs, meaning our work is completely funded by grassroots supporters like you. By donating just $3 today, you’re helping us create a country that works for everyone, not just those at the top. That means a renewed investment in American manufacturing, Medicare for All, student debt relief, and a green future.
If you want to support our people-powered campaign as we continue to fight for progress in Washington, please consider making a donation of $3 or more today. Thank you!
DONATE $3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email-footer-donate?refcode=20250415-abolish-super-pacs-act&amount=3]
DONATE MORE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email-footer-donate?refcode=20250415-abolish-super-pacs-act]

### THIS is why they are scared of her...

---

White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt **[clashed with several reporters this afternoon](https://substack.com/redirect/f6ee0a29-1432-4ca7-8695-c41cedec2212?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** who were pressing her about the deportation of Kilmar Abrego Garcia, an illegal immigrant with alleged ties to MS-13, and others deported to El Salvador.
"What is so difficult for everyone in the media to understand?!" Leavitt snapped at reporters during the press conference. "It's truly appalling that there has been so much time covering this alleged MS-13 gang member!"
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/f6ee0a29-1432-4ca7-8695-c41cedec2212?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/f6ee0a29-1432-4ca7-8695-c41cedec2212?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
One reporter thanked Leavitt for the Trump administration releasing more details about recent I.C.E. arrests of illegal aliens, before asking why the same level of information was not made available regarding individuals the administration deported to El Salvador by plane.
Leavitt explained that one case dealt with the deportation of criminal illegal immigrants, while the other case concerned the arrests and removal of designated foreign terrorists.
"Those are counter terrorist operations," Leavitt told the reporter. "They are much different than the arrests and final order of removals that are conducted on a day-to-day basis by law enforcement across the country."
The reporter wasn't satisfied with the answer, again complaining to Leavitt, "information to that detail was not released by DHS though..."
**["I just told you the reason!](https://substack.com/redirect/f6ee0a29-1432-4ca7-8695-c41cedec2212?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** It was a counter terrorism operation,... not illegal criminals. Two different things, foreign terrorist, illegal criminals, you should look them up!" Leavitt snapped.
Moments later, another reporter tried to test Leavitt with a presumptive question. "Hi, how concerned is the President that a federal judge could hold a Trump administration official in contempt of court for defying deportation order?" the reporter asked.
"We are complying with all court orders, I see what you are trying to do there with that question," Leavitt fired back, seeing right through the reporters trap.
Watch the fiery press conference here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/f6ee0a29-1432-4ca7-8695-c41cedec2212?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**[Together With Health Science Institute](https://substack.com/redirect/6a0a6119-da5d-443e-9174-ae81a61dc50d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# 9 drugs linked to Alzheimer's disease?
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6a0a6119-da5d-443e-9174-ae81a61dc50d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Dear Reader,
**[Are you taking one of these 9 "memory erasing" prescriptions?](https://substack.com/redirect/6a0a6119-da5d-443e-9174-ae81a61dc50d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
You may think your memory loss is just a sign of getting older, but one of these **[9 drugs](https://substack.com/redirect/6a0a6119-da5d-443e-9174-ae81a61dc50d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** could actually be damaging your brain...
**[These 9 prescription drugs](https://substack.com/redirect/6a0a6119-da5d-443e-9174-ae81a61dc50d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** have now been linked to Alzheimer's disease diagnoses.
If you're over the age of 60, and you're taking even 1 of these 9 drugs, your brain could be at risk.
**[Click here to learn more.](https://substack.com/redirect/6a0a6119-da5d-443e-9174-ae81a61dc50d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/6a0a6119-da5d-443e-9174-ae81a61dc50d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
P.S. These "memory erasing" drugs could affect more than 1,429,000 American seniors this year alone -- **including you or your spouse**. **[Click here to see the list of drugs before it's too late...](https://substack.com/redirect/6a0a6119-da5d-443e-9174-ae81a61dc50d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
* * *
# _Resurfaced MAGA Moment:_
# **Trump gets EMOTIONAL when grieving wife of fallen hero takes the stage ...**
Watch Donald Trump **[welcome the widow and family of a fallen police officer to the stage.](https://substack.com/redirect/3e370d42-9880-4076-8452-328eab18f7f4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** What he does next is truly incredible and the media will never show you THIS SIDE of Trump.
"You were the only one who actually reached out..." the widow told Trump, breaking into tears in front of the crowd.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/3e370d42-9880-4076-8452-328eab18f7f4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

Kaitlin Collins left the White House with some lumps to the noggin yesterday. As President Trump and El Salvador President Nayib Bukele held a press conference, Collins asked about deported gang member Abrego Garcia. Well, Pam Bondi, Marco Rubio and President Bukele all teed-off on Collins and her reporting. The "Maryland man" is actually a citizen of El Salvador and was ordered to be deported in 2019. On today's show we are going to take a look at our national borders and what a difference a president can make. Ron Vitiello is the senior advisor to the U.S. Customs and Border Protection with the Department of Homeland Security. Mark Hall is the Deputy U.S. Border Czar, working directly with Tom Homan. With decades of experience in border protection and law enforcement, both men point to our robust laws concerning immigration. Our immigration laws and procedures are fair and work when they are enforced. Now that President Trump is enforcing our laws, what was 7,000 crossing per day under Biden has plummeted to below 300 under President Trump. Ron and Mark fill us in on cartel activity, stopping deadly fentanyl precursors from China and how Mexico and Canada have stepped up to do their part. With exceptional leadership from the likes of Pam Bondi, Tom Homan and Kristi Noem, we might already have the most secure border in U.S. history.
Featuring:
**Ron Vitiello**
Senior Advisor to U.S. Customs and Border Protection within the Department of Homeland Security Former Chief of Border Patrol & Acting ICE Director
**Mark Hall**
Deputy US Border Czar | Trump Administration Distinguished Veteran U.S. Customs and Border Protection

body:
Your name still hasn’t come in, Peter!?!

|

**First, election-denying Republicans like Donald Trump spread the lie that millions of non-citizens voted illegally** to justify a direct attack on Americans’ voting rights.

**Then,** they introduced a dangerous voter suppression bill called the “SAVE Act” – requiring voters to show a birth certificate or passport in person at a polling place in order to vote! ****[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105899830/539754528/-1756948306?refcode=NDCAF_20250415_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTJiYWFmZC00NDFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aSAXDVJLlyE8qda8B-C5W7S04PoMFUEpq4aLBq-dX8s=&emci=5af25a67-081a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=312baafd-441a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=48524772)******Now,** nearly 70 million married women who have changed their last name, rural Americans, and servicemembers are all at risk of losing their right to vote!

**This isn’t about “election security,” this is about blocking tens of millions of eligible Americans from voting.** If this bill gains traction, the consequences for 2025 and beyond will be catastrophic.

**[That’s why it’s imperative that we act fast! With voting rights on the line, we’re counting on top Democrats like you to sign our petition to say NO to the “SAVE Act” to kill this voter suppression bill! »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105899831/539754529/-1756948306?refcode=NDCAF_20250415_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTJiYWFmZC00NDFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aSAXDVJLlyE8qda8B-C5W7S04PoMFUEpq4aLBq-dX8s=&emci=5af25a67-081a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=312baafd-441a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=48524772)** | **[STAND WITH NEW DEMS LIKE MARILYN STRICKLAND, SAY NO TO THE “SAVE ACT” NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105899832/539754530/-1756948306?refcode=NDCAF_20250415_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTJiYWFmZC00NDFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aSAXDVJLlyE8qda8B-C5W7S04PoMFUEpq4aLBq-dX8s=&emci=5af25a67-081a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=312baafd-441a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=48524772)**

clean_body: Sign on to fight back! >> | = First, election-denying Republicans like Donald Trump spread the lie that millions of non-citizens voted illegally to justify a direct attack on Americans’ voting rights. Then, they introduced a dangerous voter suppression bill called the “SAVE Act” – requiring voters to show a birth certificate or passport in person at a polling place in order to vote! **, nearly 70 million married women who have changed their last name, rural Americans, and servicemembers are all at risk of losing their right to vote! This isn’t about “election security,” this is about blocking tens of millions of eligible Americans from voting. If this bill gains traction, the consequences for 2025 and beyond will be catastrophic. | Thank you! name: The Squad
subject: We only have a few hours
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250415-1320-foote&t=1001&akid=1320%2E342411%2E1GgRDr ]Squad Victory Fund

Hey Peter, it's
the Squad!

We’re halfway through the month — and right now, we’re still $6,056 short
of hitting our $25,000 mid-month goal.

We’ll be honest, fundraising has slowed down significantly this month –
and if we fall behind now, it'll be that much harder to power the work
ahead.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250415-movement.WgSwjS&refcode=em20250415-1320&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1320%2E342411%2E1GgRDr ]Can we count on you to chip in now to help ensure our Squad can stay on
track with the goals we’ve set this month?

Our Squad has been on the ground — hosting town halls, showing up at
rallies, and meeting voters face-to-face.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250415-movement.WgSwjS&refcode=em20250415-1320&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=1320%2E342411%2E1GgRDr ][IMG]

36,000 people showed up to see AOC speak in Los Angeles on 4/12/25!

While Republicans hide from their constituents, we’re out here doing the
work it takes to win big: Medicare for All, climate action, protecting
Social Security, and building a government that works for everyone.

This work is so important, but it can be expensive. None of us take a dime
from corporate PACs or billionaires, so we rely on grassroots supporters
like you to keep us going.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250415-movement.WgSwjS&refcode=em20250415-1320&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=1320%2E342411%2E1GgRDr ]Can you chip in now to help close the gap and keep our Squad on track?
Every single donation counts.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250415-movement.WgSwjS&refcode=em20250415-1320&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=1320%2E342411%2E1GgRDr ]Contribute ››

Thank you so much,
Peter,

— The Squad

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Trump’s billionaire tax cut
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Trump and Musk are chainsawing through critical programs to bankroll tax cuts for billionaires and giant corporations.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2525%2E4032634%2EI0F0g6)
---
Here’s a Tax Day question for you: **Do you want to end up paying a lower effective tax rate than a billionaire or a giant corporation?** That’s a question about who our government works for: working families, or a thin slice at the top. And right now, Republicans are scheming to force through their tax breaks for billionaires and billionaire corporations by slashing health care for kids, seniors, and people with disabilities. That’s right: They want to double down on the 2017 Trump tax scam, all while paying for it off the backs of working people and increasing our national debt. It’s robbing working families so the richest Americans can get even richer. Republicans in Congress want to use “magic math” to pass giant tax cuts, and then try to turn around and tell the American people those tax cuts cost nothing. But hard-working Americans understand that trillions of dollars in tax cuts for billionaires comes with a price tag. I’m fighting back against this tax scheme. I joined with Democrats to get the Republicans on the record that they won’t rule out giving tax cuts to people or corporations making more than $1 billion. I led an amendment that opposes final budget legislation raising costs for middle-class families while an unelected billionaire illegally directs cuts to key programs like Social Security, Medicare and Medicaid, and services for veterans. And while working to stop the GOP’s billionaire-coddling agenda, I’ve still got plans to make the positive changes we need to see and tax the rich. Here’s how just one of those plans would work: for every dollar of wealth someone has over $50 million, they’d have to chip in two cents — two cents that would help generate trillions of dollars for the next decade. **I’ll keep doing everything in my power to make sure billionaires and giant corporations are paying their fair share, and to stop this billionaire cashgrab of a GOP tax agenda.** It’s a fight we can win, just like how we defeated Trump’s attempt to repeal the Affordable Care Act back in 2017. But it’s going to take each one of us stepping into the ring to fight. It’s going to take every Democrat stiffening their spines and refusing to give Trump an inch. And it’s going to take the American people getting loud enough to convince enough Republicans to do the right thing. [**I’m able to stay in this fight because of the support of people like you. If you’re able to, chip in to support our grassroots campaign and help build a country that works not just for the wealthy and well-connected, but everyone.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2982?t=8&akid=2525%2E4032634%2EI0F0g6)

That’s a question about who our government works for: working families, or a thin slice at the top. And right now, Republicans are scheming to force through their tax breaks for billionaires and billionaire corporations by slashing health care for kids, seniors, and people with disabilities. body:
How did the world's richest man win billions in government contracts?

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105900150/539755743/2145945666?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.04.15_MuskDOT_Wider&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGYzMWQyMi00NjFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VZ-hn2KE0-bbcyzg0bussq-lgQDF7PvXeMG4UdaUj0A=&emci=19512fbe-0b1a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=e0f31d22-461a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=23483442) | We have an update from Congress, Peter. Along with other Democrats on the Oversight Committee, **Emily Randall just launched an investigation into Elon Musk’s conflicts of interest across the U.S. government.** [_**Elon Musk makes $8 million a day from contracts with the federal government.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105900151/539755744/-1154351202?hl=en&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.04.15_MuskDOT_Wider&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGYzMWQyMi00NjFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VZ-hn2KE0-bbcyzg0bussq-lgQDF7PvXeMG4UdaUj0A=&emci=19512fbe-0b1a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=e0f31d22-461a-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=23483442) That’s our taxpayer money. Emily and Ranking Member Gerry Connolly are focusing their investigation on Musk’s dealings with the Department of Transportation (DOT): • Musk’s company, SpaceX, already had contracts with the government. But now, as head of “DOGE,” he is reportedly steering much larger DOT contracts to SpaceX and Starlink. • Musk brought in teams from SpaceX to help run the FAA, the airline safety agency, and brought in his own lawyers to run an “investigation” instead of the agency’s official watchdog. • Musk is trying to redirect a $2.4 billion communications contract the FAA had with Verizon to his own company, Starlink — using his position to sabotage his competitors. • FAA officials have specifically directed staff to work on a Starlink contract to upgrade airspace technology worth tens of millions of dollars. Look, there’s nothing “genius” about buying your way into power and using your influence to enrich yourself. **That’s corruption. That’s robbery.** As a team, Democrats on the House Oversight Committee, like Emily, Rep. Jasmine Crockett, and Rep. Maxwell Frost, are investigating Elon Musk’s conflicts of interest across the government. [_**Emily is standing up to the world’s richest man — and we’ve got to have her back! Chip in any amount to send a message that we want bold, aggressive action to take on Trump and Musk’s agenda →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105900152/539755745/1131891713?amount=6&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.04.15_MuskDOT_Wider&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGYzMWQyMi00NjFhLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VZ-hn2KE0-bbcyzg0bussq-lgQDF7PvXeMG4UdaUj0A=) Valerie Foushee

name: Team Pramila
subject: Tax Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
It’s Tax Day, which means millions of people all over the country are making sure their taxes are filed on time.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250415-4951-footer&t=1&akid=4951%2E420207%2E1ama9u)
Peter, it's Tax Day, which means millions of people all over the country are making sure their taxes are filed on time.
**But while everyday people are trying to make sure their taxes are paid, Donald Trump is in the White House trying to help his billionaire friends cheat on theirs:**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250415?refcode=em20250415-4951&amount=3&refcode2=4951_420207_1ama9u&akid=4951%2E420207%2E1ama9u)
Trump and Elon’s plan to gut the IRS isn’t about making the government more efficient. **It’s about firing the staff who audit billionaires and giant corporations so that they can get away with cheating on their taxes** — and it’ll make the government _less_ efficient as a result.
From the IRS to the Social Security Administration, Medicaid, and Medicare, Donald Trump and Elon Musk have proven over and over again that they’re not in this for working people. They’re in it for billionaires like _themselves_.
Through the Resistance Lab and constant year-round organizing, Pramila is working to grow our movement, resist Trump’s corrupt authoritarian agenda, and build a government that puts working people first.
**But that work takes resources, and with an important mid-month fundraising deadline tonight, we’re counting on your help to reach our $5,000 goal.**
[**So If you’re ready to make sure _everyone_ — including billionaires and giant corporations — pays their fair share in taxes, will you pitch in $3 before midnight to support Pramila’s work for the progressive movement?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250415?refcode=em20250415-4951&amount=3&refcode2=4951_420207_1ama9u&akid=4951%2E420207%2E1ama9u)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250415?amount=3&refcode=em20250415-4951&refcode2=4951_420207_1ama9u&akid=4951%2E420207%2E1ama9u)**
In solidarity,
Team Pramila
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250415-4951-footer&t=2&refcode2=4951_420207_1ama9u&akid=4951%2E420207%2E1ama9u)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

clean_body: It’s Tax Day, which means millions of people all over the country are making sure their taxes are filed on time. Peter, it's Tax Day, which means millions of people all over the country are making sure their taxes are filed on time. But while everyday people are trying to make sure their taxes are paid, Donald Trump is in the White House trying to help his billionaire friends cheat on theirs: Trump and Elon’s plan to gut the IRS isn’t about making the government more efficient. It’s about firing the staff who audit billionaires and giant corporations so that they can get away with cheating on their taxes — and it’ll make the government less efficient as a result. From the IRS to the Social Security Administration, Medicaid, and Medicare, Donald Trump and Elon Musk have proven over and over again that they’re not in this for working people. They’re in it for billionaires like themselves. Through the Resistance Lab and constant year-round organizing, Pramila is working to grow our movement, resist Trump’s corrupt authoritarian agenda, and build a government that puts working people first. But that work takes resources, and with an important mid-month fundraising deadline tonight, we’re counting on your help to reach our $5,000 goal. In solidarity, Team Pramila | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

name: Forward Party
subject: Fast Forward - Economic Impact Follow Up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
It was a big week at Forward - here's what you missed.

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_59&n=1)
---
Tuesday, April 15, 2025 | Peter -- This week we jumped back into our _**Controlling What You Can**_ __ series with a big topic - the economy. We started with personal question this week to get a sense of where Forwardists are feeling the most economic pressure. Next week, we'll dive into questions about the economy more broadly, so keep your eyes peeled for more! Here's what you all had to say: Americans across the country, Forwardists included, are feeling the pressure from the economy. The vast majority are unsatisfied with how things are going and are calling for change. Across all channels, the number one issue was the cost of groceries and other regular living expenses. Summarizing the comments you left: **Cost of Living and Inflation**
* The rising costs of groceries, gas, healthcare, and child care are becoming huge barriers for many Americans.
* One of you put it very succinctly - "It feels like everything is going up except my income."

**Housing Affordability and Access**
* The growth in housing prices in the last decade has pushed more and more people out of the possibility of owning a home - and rents are nearly as high as mortgages.
* Better economic and urban/suburban planning was cited as being necessary to alleviate this pressure.

**Trade and Economic Policy Criticisms**
* It's no secret that the tariff program is top of mind for most everyone these days—Forwardists are not necessarily averse to tariffs, but most all of you called for them to be more strategic and less theatrical.
* Many of you believe predictability and stability in economic policy is key, and many of you feel we are far from that steadiness.

**Frustration with Partisan Politics**
* Many of you feel that these economic issues _are_ solvable, but that our leaders across the country are ignoring the solutions to continue their partisan battles.
* You continuously called for leadership that focuses on practical solutions instead of ideological battles.

**Financial Insecurity and Retirement Concerns**
* Retirement accounts have been hit hard in the last three months, something most noted by those Forwardists closest to retirement age.
* With the cost of living skyrocketing, many Forwardists noted that they're worried Social Security and pension systems can't keep up.

[United Utah Party, Utah Forward Party Announce Plans To Merge Operations](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=cyQb0j7nDEUAWj8v57K6Dt0Cg4XjvYYDMv3HaZC6e3RhhHKsSw0OmSReBtjvu1RUmpFwAkaMAzWRCo-75wS6j37CNGbvgOGeCSrihCkJiD9AcXoIGHBImk9G3xdalyuKdVLtMzNZdOYP-4vggK8AaQ&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_59&n=2) | _KSL 5 TV_ Two of Utah's newest political parties announced a merger last week to bolster their reach in the state. This announcement comes just after sitting Republican State Senator Daniel Thatcher announced that he would join the Utah Forward Party. [Andrew Yang Joins The Aaron Harber Show To Discuss Forward And The Future Of American Democracy](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=bivw41scGJ9-aiJAH6cAIJS1plak6-4PfwI4ZZ3Moo-h4pP68pT3mWPsXRrGFx1oBn_QQA1-VzZ1lEgESX2f2w&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_59&n=3) | _The Aaron Harber Show_ Co-Founder of the Forward Party Andrew Yang joins Aaron Harber to discuss his presidential run, the founding of the Forward Party, and how we can begin to fix our politics.
**April 18 | Northern Virginia Forward Social
** Join the Northern Virginia Forward Party for a social gathering at Ireland's Four Courts in Arlington. [**Register →**](https://home.forwardparty.com/nova_fwd_social_20250418?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_59&n=4) **April 23 | Virginia Forward x Andrew Yang
** The Virginia Forward Party hosts Andrew Yang to discuss the founding of Forward and the progress made in Massachusetts. The interview will be conducted by Sophia Nelson, a former Forward candidate in the state. [**Register →**](https://home.forwardparty.com/vafwd_x_andrew_yang_042025?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_59&n=5) **April 23 | Veterans Roundtable
** Join the Veterans and Veterans Family Committee for a virtual roundtable discussing the current administrations policies and the DOGE cuts effects on veteran employment and workforce stability. [**Register →**](https://home.forwardparty.com/veterans_roundtable_april_2025?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_59&n=6) **April 24 | Changemaker Contest Judging
** The Young Forwardists and guest judge **Mark Cuban** are judging the submissions to their Changemaker Meme Contest. You don't want to miss this! [**Register →**](https://home.forwardparty.com/changemaker_ai_contest?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_59&n=7) **April 24-27 | Vote Run Lead National Training
** Join our friends at Vote Run Lead for their Run As You Are National Training. Learn everything you need to know to run for office! [**Register →**](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=vQtmMvb3PWu4DJ6dKY_VlsThj1SsmRb1g0DJQ-VrQlyRlthUy_avimOTHgToDlUe&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_59&n=8) **April 29 | Run For Office With The Forward Party
** Have you ever thought about running for office, but wasn't sure if you were the right fit or how you'd even get started? Well Forward has you covered. Join us to learn how it all works and how you can get started! [**Register →**](https://home.forwardparty.com/run_for_office_with_forward_party?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_59&n=9) **May 3 | Second Annual Minnesota Convention
** Join the Minnesota Forward Party for their second annual state convention in Mapelwood! Doors open at 10 am on May 3rd! [**Register →**](https://home.forwardparty.com/minnesota_2nd_annual_convention?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_59&n=10) **May 4 | Inaugural Massachusetts Forward Party Convention
** The Massachusetts Forward Party holds its first ever convention. Hear from guest speakers, vote on bylaws and the state executive committee, learn more about the policy and platform, and find out how you can get involved! [**Register →**](https://home.forwardparty.com/2025_massachusetts_forward_party_state_convention?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_59&n=11)

body:
Tonight is the third installment of Emerge Rising: From Civic Engagement to Electing Office, Emerge Action Fund’s new training series built to meet the needs of this moment and empower even more women to run for office.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105900956/539758605/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-04-15_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFjMzIxYzUyLTQ5MWEtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=W18wRLlzw_pcGB4xPD0fSaDwtZbblaMZJbkPN6dnn0s=)

| Peter,

Tonight is the third installment of **Emerge Rising: From Civic Engagement to Electing Office** , Emerge Action Fund’s new training series built to meet the needs of this moment and empower even more women to run for office.

The Trump administration has carried out a mass purge of federal workers, gutting federal agencies and putting essential public services at risk. These dedicated public servants who spent their careers serving our community were pushed out and left to dry.

Now, it’s time to fight back! Emerge Rising is designed for former federal employees or anyone ready to take the next step in leadership — _whether that’s running for office, seeking an appointment to a board or commission, or stepping into policy advocacy in your community._

Over the last 3 weeks of this series, we’ve been meeting people where they are at, tapping into their passions and purpose, and giving them the tools they need to turn that grassroots energy into real political power!

clean_body: Tonight is the third installment of Emerge Rising: From Civic Engagement to Electing Office, Emerge Action Fund’s new training series built to meet the needs of this moment and empower even more women to run for office. | = | Peter, Tonight is the third installment of Emerge Rising: From Civic Engagement to Electing Office , Emerge Action Fund’s new training series built to meet the needs of this moment and empower even more women to run for office. The Trump administration has carried out a mass purge of federal workers, gutting federal agencies and putting essential public services at risk. These dedicated public servants who spent their careers serving our community were pushed out and left to dry. Now, it’s time to fight back! Emerge Rising is designed for former federal employees or anyone ready to take the next step in leadership — whether that’s running for office, seeking an appointment to a board or commission, or stepping into policy advocacy in your community. Over the last 3 weeks of this series, we’ve been meeting people where they are at, tapping into their passions and purpose, and giving them the tools they need to turn that grassroots energy into real political power! = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, \- Emerge HQ P.S. Join us for tonight’s Emerge Rising training at 8 PM EST to hear from our special guest, Virginia Sen. Danica Roem , by signing up . * | | = Paid for by Emerge America Emerge America 818 Connecticut Avenue NW, Suite 450 Washington, DC 97208 United States

name: Team Ilhan
subject: You could really help us get back on track today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Today is the halfway point of the month, so we called a finance team meeting today to go over our fundraising numbers
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1596%2E791427%2EWQdAbL)

Friend — We’ll keep this quick.
Today is the halfway point of the month, so we called a finance team meeting today to go over our fundraising numbers. The upshot is: **We’re way behind.**
Fundraising is down right now, and we’re tracking well behind where we need to be if we want to hit our goal for April.
Look, we get it. We just got out of a big FEC deadline push last month. And Trump’s flip-flopping on tariffs is causing lots of economic uncertainty for regular folks.
We get that it may not be the best time for some to chip in. But if you have just $15 to spare, you could really help us get back on track today.
And if we can get back on track, we’ll have the resources we need to continue to take on Trump and reelect Ilhan in Minnesota’s 5th. So what do you say?
**[Chip in $15 or more today and help us catch up to our April fundraising goal. It adds up fast when lots of people do their part.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-april25.zbfFse&refcode=em250415-2-90&t=2&akid=1596%2E791427%2EWQdAbL)
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately:_
| | **[Donate $15](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/772?c0=io-em-april25.Xdgd6v&refcode=em250415-2-90&t=3&akid=1596%2E791427%2EWQdAbL)**

****
We hope that by being transparent about where things stand we can convince you that your donation today is so important.
In solidarity,
Team Ilhan HQ

Friend,

Our tax system is broken because millionaires and billionaires have rigged the rules in their favor. And Trump and the GOP are dead set on an out-of-touch agenda that’s only going to make this economic inequality _even worse._
During the debate on the Senate budget resolution, Jacky Rosen led the charge to cut taxes for the middle class and small businesses while making sure the ultra-wealthy and giant corporations pay their fair share. But the GOP voted down her commonsense effort in the _dead of night_ to block it from helping the American people.
Instead, Senate Republicans moved forward an extreme budget plan that will force deep cuts to vital programs that help working-class families, like Medicaid and food assistance – all to give even more tax breaks to the richest and most powerful people in this country.
Now, Donald Trump has imposed **reckless tariffs** that amount to a **national sales tax** on American families and will only raise the cost of everyday essentials even further.
To add insult to injury, Trump openly _**bragged**_ about how his tariffs will make his billionaire buddies richer right after he announced them. Pointing at two billionaires in attendance at the Oval Office, he said, “He made $2.5 million today, and he made $900 million! That’s not bad.”
**We don’t think taking money away from everyday Americans to help billionaires is anything to brag about, friend. But we’ve launched our flash poll to confirm where Democrats like you stand, and we’re looking for 100 more responses from 37087 before midnight.** Please, friend, tell us now:
**Do you think Congress should reverse Trump's tariffs?**

clean_body: Please respond before midnight! | | | PLEASE TELL US WHERE YOU STAND, FRIEND: Do you think Congress should reverse Trump's tariffs? | | | | Response missing from dpwillis67@gmail.com. This poll closes soon. | Friend, Our tax system is broken because millionaires and billionaires have rigged the rules in their favor. And Trump and the GOP are dead set on an out-of-touch agenda that’s only going to make this economic inequality even worse. During the debate on the Senate budget resolution, Jacky Rosen led the charge to cut taxes for the middle class and small businesses while making sure the ultra-wealthy and giant corporations pay their fair share. But the GOP voted down her commonsense effort in the dead of night to block it from helping the American people. Instead, Senate Republicans moved forward an extreme budget plan that will force deep cuts to vital programs that help working-class families, like Medicaid and food assistance – all to give even more tax breaks to the richest and most powerful people in this country. Now, Donald Trump has imposed reckless tariffs that amount to a national sales tax on American families and will only raise the cost of everyday essentials even further. To add insult to injury, Trump openly bragged about how his tariffs will make his billionaire buddies richer right after he announced them. Pointing at two billionaires in attendance at the Oval Office, he said, “He made $2.5 million today, and he made $900 million! That’s not bad.” We don’t think taking money away from everyday Americans to help billionaires is anything to brag about, friend. But we’ve launched our flash poll to confirm where Democrats like you stand, and we’re looking for 100 more responses from 37087 before midnight. Please, friend, tell us now: Do you think Congress should reverse Trump's tariffs? | | | | Response missing from dpwillis67@gmail.com . This poll closes soon. name: The Democrats
subject: The DNC isn’t sitting back
body:
---
Derek, We’re about to ask you to [donate directly to the DNC before our mid-month deadline.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025?refcode=em_20250415_3190_fr&refcode2=3190_22930333_kg2ycN&akid=3190%2E22930333%2Ekg2ycN) If you give us a moment of your time, we’ll explain why your support is so important right now._ Here’s the situation: Trump is imposing a trillion-dollar consumer tax on working families, sending the global economy into a tailspin, and is actively working to dismantle our government and democracy as it stands. **There has never been a more important time for Democrats to take action, and the DNC isn’t sitting back.** We’re suing Trump over his illegal voter suppression efforts and his attempted takeover of the FEC. We’ve set up a new War Room operation to combat the far-right’s lies, and we’ve launched the People’s Cabinet, an initiative that brings together experts and community leaders who will cut through the lies and speak directly to the American people about the destruction of the Trump administration. That’s on top of our ongoing work to organize _everywhere_ , year-round, in every ZIP code. But the truth is, these programs take a lot to keep running. When we hit our fundraising goals, we’re able to allocate resources effectively — ensuring these programs remain strong and successful and that we can continue the fight against Trump’s extremism. **That’s why reaching our mid-month fundraising goal is so important. So here comes our question for you, Derek:** **[Will you be one of the Democrats from Cresco we need to chip in a $3 donation to the DNC today and help fund our work?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025?refcode=em_20250415_3190_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3190_22930333_kg2ycN&akid=3190%2E22930333%2Ekg2ycN)** _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250415_3190_fr&refcode2=3190_22930333_kg2ycN&akid=3190%2E22930333%2Ekg2ycN)**
---
****

****

****
Thank you,
The Democrats

body:
| | | **BREAKING: "Trump Calls for MSNBC to Be Shut Down"**
[](https://go.dscc.org/go/21467?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250415-TrumpAlert-ShutDownMSNBC-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250415-TrumpAlert-ShutDownMSNBC-Pros-sl1&akid=20039%2E9716520%2ErU9rms)

Team, Donald Trump's revenge tour is reaching your living room: **He wants to SHUT DOWN MSNBC!**

Trump's latest attack on free speech could have DIRE consequences. We must stand up for the First Amendment and the brave journalists who work to find the truth and hold the powerful accountable, and our URGENT Live Poll will show that Americans support MSNBC.

name: Lily Tang Williams
subject: I never got to use a toilet seat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lily4Congress Committee
body:
I owe my life to the United States of America| | | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=70157d6b1a85485daff72d2b3f1e08a8&_e=czr8vlBZlawc8Pw9-Y7Zpg8acNJiUFtpmtrKYN9JvoAeHPJXaHgffPptbEdsnSi467Wy1jDEob7_GWfaKFGB_7VdrtBoYUKtkeZ8o9RvBrXIvSHQFVZQTMCQtqt9ixYQkK2YznFKXqLmZ-fUlC2P0xQTfSy33fJGtgbp8b3EIx1wPuOgtg_UH9BVIYlayVqkRMlZiIpEfLeibdS8_e-sTOItV_eVOsv4vkYSyctl0o8vPwk8k2SBeCpNe3s9ENqlkJgCVEC5tqyTtLpYwZx6uClC0hMnAv-bcyQ5TkABnM16EDgcJFDJc4CboccF7cOjm4Jsxj4k2X_1K8-yrV8vldaJzr9VnUgdteNj7741Ex3eXfjYc54a-jtp81tfmpwA1kEYcV2H4CLd0quQtGrM5w%3D%3D)
---
I never got to use a toilet seat. Instead, we had to share a hole in the ground with 8 other families. I was raised on food rationing coupons in the Sichuan province of China during Mao’s Cultural Revolution. I was only a child, yet I worshiped him like a God. I had no other choice. I was brainwashed. We all were. Eventually, I was able to escape from China and flee to the United States.
---
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=70157d6b1a85485daff72d2b3f1e08a8&_e=czr8vlBZlawc8Pw9-Y7Zpg8acNJiUFtpmtrKYN9JvoAeHPJXaHgffPptbEdsnSi467Wy1jDEob7_GWfaKFGB_7VdrtBoYUKtkeZ8o9RvBrXIvSHQFVZQTMCQtqt9ixYQkK2YznFKXqLmZ-fUlC2P0xQTfSy33fJGtgbp8b3EIx1wPuOgtg_UH9BVIYlayVqkRMlZiIpEfLeibdS8_e-sTOItV_eVOsv4vkYSyctl0o8C8yK0TCCwRbZ9R6yrJyWqaa2lPZmQ8DFcFBzEhMf3i00KBucAL9v7JCNUh8Axh-v1fKTCDIN2Nhhnm886BybGEbQIcz2KBrlVjhNCuqUH8zW4J-PxjqFp66zrXuhxYFjbNXTxPWXDqv87b78T5L3AlrGiDG-gBAt8YgjCOn4Ptw%3D%3D)
---
I spent the next 20 years uninstalling everything Mao’s regime had programmed into my brain, only to discover the very same evil was now being promoted in America and celebrated by the radical left. Then it hit me. I wasn’t just a product of the American Dream - I was also a survivor of Communist rule. **[My name is Lily Tang Williams, and I’m the Republican running for Congress in New Hampshire's 2nd Congressional District.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=70157d6b1a85485daff72d2b3f1e08a8&_e=czr8vlBZlawc8Pw9-Y7Zpg8acNJiUFtpmtrKYN9JvoAeHPJXaHgffPptbEdsnSi467Wy1jDEob7_GWfaKFGB_7VdrtBoYUKtkeZ8o9RvBrXIvSHQFVZQTMCQtqt9ixYQkK2YznFKXqLmZ-fUlC2P0xQTfSy33fJGtgbp8b3EIx1wPuOgtg_UH9BVIYlayVqkRMlZiIpEfLeibdS8_e-sTOItV_eVOsv4vkYSyctl0o8ljFr5wBh0Y7IIBwIzzlilLb_vA2kKDLzY6pO90ki84UC_krcVJygWXVjwZ7dv3EEMhwSBupNI46xzpR0f6gY6eRvIAEJ4gM2Fe1RQFjgcVSCax_OUrDnY8AW4meZTwdPMrvL9oUKbw_dYDSh5maRTPFj1MtB8E_PD8BlNN-tkgQ%3D%3D)**
---
[**SUPPORT LILY'S CAMPAIGN**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=70157d6b1a85485daff72d2b3f1e08a8&_e=czr8vlBZlawc8Pw9-Y7Zpg8acNJiUFtpmtrKYN9JvoAeHPJXaHgffPptbEdsnSi467Wy1jDEob7_GWfaKFGB_7VdrtBoYUKtkeZ8o9RvBrXIvSHQFVZQTMCQtqt9ixYQkK2YznFKXqLmZ-fUlC2P0xQTfSy33fJGtgbp8b3EIx1wPuOgtg_UH9BVIYlayVqkRMlZiIpEfLeibdS8_e-sTOItV_eVOsv4vkYSyctl0o83xwPgqGFk8tZbn-iQoWAZ6V0iUu-KwW9BwRErrEhuW5p9Mxr_iKi7pVuQgDg7jvLHApLd_CYV4a25kDwglv8b8EYn7Uem1eTEA2CtZLruUbkgpUy4KPh2eWsgvFpdAZP-Svf00GTTq_FVgQP-rosZWMMm02T1TLkBrBJ5p7te9w%3D%3D)
---
My story, my voice, and my campaign endanger everything the Democrats have built their party on - _I don’t fit their mold_. **[And now they’re preparing to spend millions to browbeat me into silence& end my candidacy.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=70157d6b1a85485daff72d2b3f1e08a8&_e=czr8vlBZlawc8Pw9-Y7Zpg8acNJiUFtpmtrKYN9JvoAeHPJXaHgffPptbEdsnSi467Wy1jDEob7_GWfaKFGB_7VdrtBoYUKtkeZ8o9RvBrXIvSHQFVZQTMCQtqt9ixYQkK2YznFKXqLmZ-fUlC2P0xQTfSy33fJGtgbp8b3EIx1wPuOgtg_UH9BVIYlayVqkRMlZiIpEfLeibdS8_e-sTOItV_eVOsv4vkYSyctl0o_xdUMDfglnFnmQxoTKCRxTV7jetDNdblmkPbUCwV8ZHFWEs_229PewoUpQqDAx_1NuZenc9VrEfotXUbXrnZ1fWMOMCYjUSIy4bzNUZ6S58IFsF4q0qcXnXc3HSHrnbl4TnhXKnlLsOauBRxHhdfaGxrWQyLEUEnc_odVVGEzMNg%3D%3D)** That’s why I’m humbly asking for your help today. My candidacy & our country truly do depend on it. I hope you’ll do what you can to save both today. Help me make history, Patriot.
---

| Peter, I spent Saturday with two close friends of mine, Sen. Bernie Sanders and Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez! In the morning, I had the honor of speaking to tens of thousands of people in LA as a special guest on their _Fighting Oligarchy Tour._ [ ](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/3Wd0ZtTrIH4XvByhVRM5lQ~~/AAPPABA~/VN-pPnGMjlapYtLdnfoWKXOge_TKM-LxPvcFzN-j6U9PO6K48g65fbQCQkfffEHU7_c0BuV4vTlERBFyG-0NsO6BYzz8URKUd17WwI97HPwBQunaXZ71YZOxdp-N17ulhjF5TIiwEXux7-2r5VWnDyVxEE7T1Yl3ffN1yl1WRFwxAuBo9qAjBjcZ1_QS0MBjg4utyrQgSwLFz_la_GSQiDgb7T2q3-ofGErdWhlPuNK5hWdSnKTY84UYtFInZl5zh860jlOO39iAbFJf4e9cF17WodO2MOkwATyjFDk7G5iFlqJ6t-R6bFHv3ielA_0vdyxw5nnJlBJ1xNDGYSiOxVFympoUzKUVR4zYBJ6UERk~) My message was loud and clear: **The power of people coming together far outweighs the power of any billionaire, any authoritarian, and any fascist.** Then, that evening, I had the privilege of bringing Bernie Sanders out on stage at Coachella! [ ](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/3Wd0ZtTrIH4XvByhVRM5lQ~~/AAPPABA~/VN-pPnGMjlapYtLdnfoWKXOge_TKM-LxPvcFzN-j6U9PO6K48g65fbQCQkfffEHU7_c0BuV4vTlERBFyG-0NsO6BYzz8URKUd17WwI97HPwBQunaXZ71YZOxdp-N17ulhjF5TIiwEXux7-2r5VWnDyVxEE7T1Yl3ffN1yl1WRFwxAuBo9qAjBjcZ1_QS0MBjg4utyrQgSwLFz_la_GSQiDgb7T2q3-ofGErdWhlPuNK5hWdSnKTY84UYtFInZl5zh860jlOO39iAbFJf4e9cF17WodO2MOkwATyjFDk7G5iFlqJ6t-R6bFHv3ielA_0vdyxw5nnJlBJ1xNDGYSiOxVFympoUzKUVR4zYBJ6UERk~) Bernie said it best: **“You can turn away and you can ignore what goes on, but if you do that, you do it at your _own peril._ We need you to stand up to fight for justice. To fight for economic justice, social justice, and racial justice.”** This is a movement, Peter. **A movement to not just defend what we’ve already fought for – like Social Security and Medicaid – but a movement to demand MORE: like Medicare for All, ending gun violence, and fighting the climate crisis.** I’m happy to be leading this movement alongside Bernie and AOC, but if we’re gonna beat this oligarch-and-billionaire-funded takeover, we need everyone in. That includes _you._ [**_Can I count on you to join this movement by rushing a donation right now? clean_body: | ~ | Peter, I spent Saturday with two close friends of mine, Sen. Bernie Sanders and Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez! In the morning, I had the honor of speaking to tens of thousands of people in LA as a special guest on their Fighting Oligarchy Tour. ~ My message was loud and clear: The power of people coming together far outweighs the power of any billionaire, any authoritarian, and any fascist. Then, that evening, I had the privilege of bringing Bernie Sanders out on stage at Coachella! ~ Bernie said it best: “You can turn away and you can ignore what goes on, but if you do that, you do it at your own peril. We need you to stand up to fight for justice. To fight for economic justice, social justice, and racial justice.” This is a movement, Peter. A movement to not just defend what we’ve already fought for – like Social Security and Medicaid – but a movement to demand MORE: like Medicare for All, ending gun violence, and fighting the climate crisis. I’m happy to be leading this movement alongside Bernie and AOC, but if we’re gonna beat this oligarch-and-billionaire-funded takeover, we need everyone in. That includes you. ~ If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | ~~ Grateful, Maxwell | ~ Maxwell Alejandro Frost is an organizer representing Florida's 10th Congressional District. name: SIGN THE THANK YOU LETTER (VPP)
subject: Former President Biden breaks his silence!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
you can’t miss this HUGE moment >>
| **President Biden Breaks Silence in First Public Address Since Leaving Office, Defends Importance of Social Security**

[**We are THRILLED to see former President Biden still fighting for us! SIGN OUR LETTER ASAP to thank him for standing up for Social Security and defending democracy! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89051?t=6&akid=19536%2E878179%2EgWWlHG) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89051?t=7&akid=19536%2E878179%2EgWWlHG) | [142 SPOTS LEFT: PLEASE GIVE $3 TO INSTANTLY SIGN THIS LETTER BEFORE WE CLOSE IT AT END-OF-DAY TODAY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89051?t=8&akid=19536%2E878179%2EgWWlHG)
---
Dear former President Biden,

I have one thing to say to you: **Thank you!**

Your speech was a much-needed light in the darkness that Donald Trump has inflicted on our nation in just a few short months.

**Even though you are no longer in office, it means the world to know you still have the American people’s back.**

Unlike Trump, we can count on you to defend our democracy and our most critical lifelines like Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid.

I’m inspired to build on your legacy and join you in the fight by electing amazing Democrats all over the country who will limit Trump’s power!

[**I'm signing this letter and sending a small donation of $3 with VPP now to show my support — for our country and for your legacy, Mr. President. With a MAGA trifecta, it's more important than ever that Democrats stand united together. I’m chipping in $3 to do my part. »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89051?t=9&akid=19536%2E878179%2EgWWlHG) | [142 SPOTS LEFT: PLEASE GIVE $3 TO INSTANTLY SIGN THIS LETTER BEFORE WE CLOSE IT AT END-OF-DAY TODAY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89051?t=10&akid=19536%2E878179%2EgWWlHG)
---
__X A grateful American__
— The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19536%2E878179%2EgWWlHG). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19536%2E878179%2EgWWlHG).**

name: Scott Fitzgerald
subject: Update: SAVE Act Progress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
Learn about the recent SAVE Act developments.

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f1f02a20af09/be-the-difference-today-36195?e=561a28864e)
---
|
---
[](https://scottfitzgeraldforcongress.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c59bc0db5e945d61b14749b2b&id=4ad5149ac0&e=561a28864e)
| | | | |
---
|
Friends,
I wanted to give you a quick update on a vote we took in the House of Representatives last week. I supported, and voted for the **SAVE Act** —a bill focused on making sure our elections are secure and that only eligible U.S. citizens are voting in federal elections.
This is about protecting the integrity of our elections. The bill strengthens ID requirements, ensures that only U.S. citizens are voting by requiring proof of citizenship, and helps clean up voter rolls. It’s not about making it harder to vote—it’s about making sure every vote counts and that the system works the way it’s supposed to.
This bill seems like common sense, yet 208 Democrats voted against it. It is unbelievable that this is what we are up against.
I’ve heard from a lot of folks who are concerned about election security. While there is more work to be done, I believe this is a first step in the right direction. We all want to have confidence that our elections are safe, secure, and trustworthy. I am committed to continuing this fight.
All the best,Scott Fitzgerald

---
|
Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress

|

name: Josh Harder
subject: The GOP’s first major attack against me
body:
Why it matters.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105902171/539762557/-1860252395?refcode=-footer-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWZkYzZiMGYtNGQxYS1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2egfZ7j6gLc3D9LO5jtRginVUS9j8athq8_V12n5dpU=) | Peter, Did you see my team’s email yesterday? I wanted to follow up personally because we just learned the National Republican Congressional Committee launched their first major attack ad against me in the Valley. Let’s be clear about what this actually means. If you are a persuadable voter in my district, now every time you scroll through social media you’ll see an ad blaming me for the tanking economy. (Yes, obviously, the stock market is tanking because of Trump’s tariffs, but the GOP will still somehow blame Democrats...) The GOP is running a tried and true method - blame someone else for the problems they created. That’s why they are spending hundreds of thousands of dollars right now on these ads. They know their policies aren’t popular so they are trying to muddy the waters. But the truth is that this strategy works. We can’t let these attacks go unanswered, especially this early in the race. I’ll also be honest with you - we didn’t expect attack ads this early. We didn’t build this into our budget and we don’t have the money to counter this right now. I refuse to take corporate PAC money, so without your support, we simply won’t have the resources to push back against these Republican attacks. [_**Your support is more crucial now than ever. Can you rush in whatever you can to help us fight back against this massive GOP investment in our district?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105902173/539762559/-1071877382?&refcode=E12952-20250415-PersonalAttacks-SL-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWZkYzZiMGYtNGQxYS1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2egfZ7j6gLc3D9LO5jtRginVUS9j8athq8_V12n5dpU=) Thank you for everything. \- Josh
---

clean_body: Why it matters. | = | Peter, Did you see my team’s email yesterday? I wanted to follow up personally because we just learned the National Republican Congressional Committee launched their first major attack ad against me in the Valley. Let’s be clear about what this actually means. If you are a persuadable voter in my district, now every time you scroll through social media you’ll see an ad blaming me for the tanking economy. (Yes, obviously, the stock market is tanking because of Trump’s tariffs, but the GOP will still somehow blame Democrats...) The GOP is running a tried and true method - blame someone else for the problems they created. That’s why they are spending hundreds of thousands of dollars right now on these ads. They know their policies aren’t popular so they are trying to muddy the waters. But the truth is that this strategy works. We can’t let these attacks go unanswered, especially this early in the race. I’ll also be honest with you - we didn’t expect attack ads this early. We didn’t build this into our budget and we don’t have the money to counter this right now. I refuse to take corporate PAC money, so without your support, we simply won’t have the resources to push back against these Republican attacks. = Thank you for everything. \- Josh *

name: Gary Miller for House of Delegates
subject: 🚨 Big Milestone Ahead — and a Clear Choice 🚨
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARY MILLER FOR DELEGATE121 Bell Ct
body:
In just a few minutes, I’ll be filing my very first campaign finance report. Here’s what it will show:

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/adb82cfeef1b/big-milestone-ahead-and-a-clear-choice?e=606d7e9aa2)
---
| | | | |
---
[](https://drmillerforyou.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0c834d5d03c9893fbbb1d8a&id=fcad865726&e=606d7e9aa2)
|
My Friends,
In just a few moments, I’ll be filing my very first campaign finance report. Here’s what it will show:
✅ We raised over **$13,000** from **44 individual supporters**.
✅ The Republican frontrunner raised more - **$100,000** \- but over **$60,000 of it came from his own pocket.**
✅ He had **10 contributors**. We had **44**.
This isn’t just a financial report, it’s a statement about values.
Because this seat is not an inheritance and it’s not for sale. **It’s the people’s seat.** It’s about teachers, parents, nurses, neighbors stepping up to take Virginia forward, together.
[We’re not running a campaign funded by a few insiders. We’re building a movement powered by everyday Virginians who believe in something better.](https://drmillerforyou.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0c834d5d03c9893fbbb1d8a&id=056ec08953&e=606d7e9aa2)
At a time when Donald Trump and Elon Musk are pushing an agenda that puts the **ultra-wealthy first and working families last** , we need voices in Richmond who will stand up and fight back. That means protecting public schools, keeping rural hospitals open, and making sure **no community is left behind while billionaires write the rules.**
Every seat in the House of Delegates matters, no matter where you live in Virginia. **The laws passed in Richmond impact all of us** , from education and healthcare to infrastructure and civil rights. Winning this seat means one more vote to protect our values and **push back against the chaos coming from Washington.**
💙[ Can you make a contribution today and help us keep building this campaign the right way?](https://drmillerforyou.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0c834d5d03c9893fbbb1d8a&id=658f085412&e=606d7e9aa2)
Thank you for believing in this movement. I’m proud to be in this fight with you.
– **Dr. Gary Miller**
Candidate for House of Delegates, District 49

---
|
---
| [DONATE](https://drmillerforyou.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0c834d5d03c9893fbbb1d8a&id=d16d7e025f&e=606d7e9aa2)

Hi team, it’s Martin. I know times are tough right now for so many families. And Donald Trump _certainly_ is not making things easier. He promised to boost our economy and lower your everyday costs, but he is doing exactly the opposite. I will be honest with you — because I always want to be honest with you — we have a fundraising deadline at midnight tonight. But because I know folks are worried about their budgets right now, if you’re not able to chip in, **that is OK.** Focus on yourself and your families. subject: my announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Villegas for Congress Villegas for Congress
body:
|
#
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105903221/539766289/701031030?refcode=em-4.15.25-launch-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjVhMDY0OTAtNTExYS1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7E0xsbEhhrg9Qb37xqA4MKTa-K6UQdNJrWxQd_FX3wU=) Friend, this is Randy Villegas. I’m a son of the Central Valley, a college professor, and the proud child of Mexican immigrants who came to this country with nothing but hope and grit. Today, I’m proud to announce that I’m running for Congress in California’s 22nd District -- one of the most competitive races in the country, and one that could make or break the Democratic majority in the House. [**If that’s all you need to hear, I’m humbly asking you to chip in $3, $35, or even $100 to become a Founding Donor of this campaign. Every contribution -- no matter the size -- will help power a grassroots campaign fueled by working people, not corporate PACs.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105903222/539766291/701031030?refcode=em-4.15.25-launch-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjVhMDY0OTAtNTExYS1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7E0xsbEhhrg9Qb37xqA4MKTa-K6UQdNJrWxQd_FX3wU=) __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:__ | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105903223/539766294/701031030?refcode=em-4.15.25-launch-1&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjVhMDY0OTAtNTExYS1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7E0xsbEhhrg9Qb37xqA4MKTa-K6UQdNJrWxQd_FX3wU=)

---
For far too long, our Central Valley home has been left behind by politicians more in love with power than people -- and billionaires who put profits ahead of our communities.
Like most here, I was born into a working-class family.
I went to public schools in the Valley -- Everything I am and everything I have is because of this incredible place I get to call home.
But while our Valley feeds the world, our workers are struggling to feed their families. Wages stay the same while costs keep rising.
Meanwhile, Donald Trump has given the world’s richest man free rein to gut Social Security and Medicaid. They want to strip millions of their health care and take food out of hungry kids’ mouths -- all to pass more tax cuts for billionaires.
**It’s sick, folks, and our representative, David Valadao, should be fighting back. Instead, he’s been silent -- because the same billionaires hurting us are funding his campaign.**
Working people deserve a champion in Congress.
We need a government that works for us --_not against us._
Our families, our farmers, our veterans, and our kids deserve better.
That’s why I’m running, and I’m not taking a dime of corporate PAC money -- because I want to be part of the solution, not another part of the problem.
[**If you're with me, please chip in $3, $35, or even $100 right now to become a Founding Donor. Help us flip CA-22, retake the majority, and put working people front and center in Washington.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105903229/539766302/701031030?refcode=em-4.15.25-launch-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjVhMDY0OTAtNTExYS1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7E0xsbEhhrg9Qb37xqA4MKTa-K6UQdNJrWxQd_FX3wU=)

clean_body: | = Friend, this is Randy Villegas. I’m a son of the Central Valley, a college professor, and the proud child of Mexican immigrants who came to this country with nothing but hope and grit. Today, I’m proud to announce that I’m running for Congress in California’s 22nd District -- one of the most competitive races in the country, and one that could make or break the Democratic majority in the House. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = For far too long, our Central Valley home has been left behind by politicians more in love with power than people -- and billionaires who put profits ahead of our communities. Like most here, I was born into a working-class family. I went to public schools in the Valley -- Everything I am and everything I have is because of this incredible place I get to call home. But while our Valley feeds the world, our workers are struggling to feed their families. Wages stay the same while costs keep rising. Meanwhile, Donald Trump has given the world’s richest man free rein to gut Social Security and Medicaid. They want to strip millions of their health care and take food out of hungry kids’ mouths -- all to pass more tax cuts for billionaires. It’s sick, folks, and our representative, David Valadao, should be fighting back. Instead, he’s been silent -- because the same billionaires hurting us are funding his campaign. Working people deserve a champion in Congress. We need a government that works for us --not against us. Our families, our farmers, our veterans, and our kids deserve better. That’s why I’m running, and I’m not taking a dime of corporate PAC money -- because I want to be part of the solution, not another part of the problem. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you for believing in me -- and in this movement. More soon, Randy | With deep ties to our community and a lifelong commitment to justice and equity, Randy is running for Congress in California’s 22nd District to bring bold, compassionate leadership to Washington. To support Randy's campaign = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Paid for by Villegas for Congress Villegas for Congress PO Box 1346 Visalia, CA 93279 United States

name: Priority GOP Communication
subject: Pam Bondi – our EXCELLENT Attorney General– just hit the nail on the head:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Scalise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit Scalise For Congress and Eye Of The Tiger PAC
body:
| Not interested? [Unsubscribe here](https://links.house-republicans.org/unsubscribe?e=998fa18fd50048d580e64d9cd10dc33f&utm_source=hdscalise&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_d238a883bca9111718f4a778f67&n=1).
---
| **Pam Bondi – our EXCELLENT Attorney General – just hit the nail on the head:**

---
“Just since January 20th, we’ve had _over 170 lawsuits_ filed against us. That should be the constitutional crisis right there... _Fifty injunctions_ , they’re popping up every single day, trying to control his executive power”
---

Liberals know the only way to sabotage President Trump’s agenda is by hitting him in the press, attacking his allies in Congress, and dragging his Administration into court at every chance they get.

_Our Founding Fathers would be rolling over in their graves!_

But no matter what the Democrat Machine does, we’ll never give up on our President.

_**[That’s why our team is rallying Pro-Trump Patriots in EVERY ZIP CODE to help us expose this politically motivated ambush and build our ranks in the House so we can pass President Trump’s strong legislative agenda ASAP.](https://links.house-republicans.org/r?u=-KKwfzWl7oK4gNPooZXuJ4Zn2xET82xeGk9Y43EVmFK45PVmIsdJcH-ACZ3U0U0PYDWsEHHtPlDK8rWg6N1AQ1BywaQjmG2J9XwNRIomGIbVahOLtuSb4Zxf3Zv8uHarW4gH4EzhpaPKvsj3pV2tsQcCWpXVqL6w-tuXOlkeO5bO-rCDvfxcce28hPBXn1QTHr7NBgX8ThQsG-AGudc7QjZ3LrtFZ3LkF-gMOauALhBMaBV-l0MUGmPJaVELiEE7lwfMFyLiNc8Vx7M-h89ZattJrSesFKOy_bwk8L9pQX0&e=998fa18fd50048d580e64d9cd10dc33f&utm_source=hdscalise&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_d238a883bca9111718f4a778f67&n=2 "That’s why
our team is rallying Pro-Trump Patriots in EVERY ZIP CODE to help us
expose this politically motivated ambush and build our ranks in the
House so we can pass President Trump’s strong legislative agenda
ASAP.")**_

Here's the harsh truth:

**President Trump is being punished at 36 TIMES the rate that Joe Biden saw in his first three years.** This is an unprecedented assault on our President, and the last thing we can do is let them take back power in Congress too.

So it’s incumbent on US to do everything in our power to expand our House Majority, defend our President, and see his agenda through to the very end.

_**[Can we count on you to do your part?](https://links.house-republicans.org/r?u=-KKwfzWl7oK4gNPooZXuJ4Zn2xET82xeGk9Y43EVmFK45PVmIsdJcH-ACZ3U0U0PYDWsEHHtPlDK8rWg6N1AQ1BywaQjmG2J9XwNRIomGIbVahOLtuSb4Zxf3Zv8uHarW4gH4EzhpaPKvsj3pV2tsQcCWpXVqL6w-tuXOlkeO5bO-rCDvfxcce28hPBXn1QTHr7NBgX8ThQsG-AGudc7QjZ3LrtFZ3LkF-gMOauALhBMaBV-l0MUGmPJaVELiEE7lwfMFyLiNc8Vx7M-h89ZattJrSesFKOy_bwk8L9pQX0&e=998fa18fd50048d580e64d9cd10dc33f&utm_source=hdscalise&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_d238a883bca9111718f4a778f67&n=3 "Can we count on you to do your part?")**_

Thanks for all you do for freedom.

– House Republicans
_Sent via Team Scalise_

---

name: Tax the Rich Alert via Our Revolution
subject: Make the political pain intolerable for the Republican lawmakers
disclaimer_text: paid for by cutting
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/24950?t=1011&refcode=email-20250415_v&akid=8225%2E5885482%2EWL8FyH ]Our Revolution logo

Last night, Our Revolution made sure Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent
couldn't ignore the truth — by lighting up his house with a massive
"Defund Oligarchy" projection just hours before Tax Day.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25048?source=email-20250415&t=1060&akid=8225%2E5885482%2EWL8FyH ]Defund Oligarchy Projection

While the rest of us are hoping to eke out a tax refund today, Elon Musk,
Jeff Bezos, and the billionaire class have effectively gamed the tax
system to pay a fraction of what we do–and all those extra untaxed
millions turn into extraordinary political power.

Just 100 billionaire families spent an unprecedented $2.6 billion in the
2024 election, and now Trump’s administration is filled with billionaires
determined to gut Social Security, privatize Medicare, and secure
lucrative government contracts and handouts for themselves.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/24950?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20250415nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8225%2E5885482%2EWL8FyH ]The projection on Bessent's house is part of a multi-prong strategy to
draw nationwide attention and ratchet up pressure on vulnerable
Republicans to vote NO on billionaire tax breaks paid for by cutting
Medicaid. We’re bird-dogging GOP members of Congress, flooding their
offices with calls, and holding rallies across the country. Can you
urgently chip in so we can fight to stop more billionaire tax breaks and
save Medicaid?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/24950?t=1042&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20250415nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8225%2E5885482%2EWL8FyH ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/24950?t=1043&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20250415nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8225%2E5885482%2EWL8FyH ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/24950?t=1045&express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20250415nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8225%2E5885482%2EWL8FyH ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/24950?t=1046&express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-20250415nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8225%2E5885482%2EWL8FyH ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/24950?t=1047&express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20250415nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8225%2E5885482%2EWL8FyH ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/24950?t=1048&amount=9&refcode=email-20250415nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8225%2E5885482%2EWL8FyH ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

Our Revolution doesn't shy away from taking bold actions like last night's
powerful projection to take on the billionaire class, because this isn't
just about taxes–this is about democracy itself. Musk’s 2024 campaign
contributions were four times what he paid in annual federal income taxes
between 2013 and 2018!

Trump’s billionaire backers want a BIG return on their investment to his
campaign, and Republicans in Congress are HELL BENT on giving them
billions while tearing apart the systems that keep working families
afloat.

But public anger is building at this appalling reverse Robin Hood plan and
we’ve got some Republicans WORRIED that supporting these massive tax cuts
could cost them their jobs — which is why Our Revolution is working around
the clock to OVERWHELM Congress with massive opposition to this cruel
plan.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/24950?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20250415nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8225%2E5885482%2EWL8FyH ]Our team is already hard at work pressuring lawmakers, organizing
protests, and showing up in key districts to make the political pain
intolerable for the Republican lawmakers casting the deciding votes – can
you donate $10, $25, or whatever you can spare to keep this fight going
strong?

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ ]CHIP IN $9 [ ]CHIP IN $22 [ ]CHIP IN $27 [ ]CHIP IN $46 [ ]CHIP IN $66 [ ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT Our Revolution doesn't shy away from taking bold actions like last night's powerful projection to take on the billionaire class, because this isn't just about taxes–this is about democracy itself. Musk’s 2024 campaign contributions were four times what he paid in annual federal income taxes between 2013 and 2018! Trump’s billionaire backers want a BIG return on their investment to his campaign, and Republicans in Congress are HELL BENT on giving them billions while tearing apart the systems that keep working families afloat. But public anger is building at this appalling reverse Robin Hood plan and we’ve got some Republicans WORRIED that supporting these massive tax cuts could cost them their jobs — which is why Our Revolution is working around the clock to OVERWHELM Congress with massive opposition to this cruel plan. [ ]Our team is already hard at work pressuring lawmakers, organizing protests, and showing up in key districts to make the political pain intolerable for the Republican lawmakers casting the deciding votes – can you donate $10, $25, or whatever you can spare to keep this fight going strong?
